}\n1267\t}\n1268\t"}]},"uuid":"9bb8b23b-a8fa-445d-ac00-792382b2518d","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:14:42.868Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/server/src/rooms.ts","content":"import { randomBytes } from \"node:crypto\";\n\nimport {\n  CmdAcceptanceWindow,\n  EntityKind,\n  EventFlags,\n  EventJournal,\n  EventKind,\n  FrameType,\n  GameMode,\n  GravityVariant,\n  JoinKind,\n  Ladder,\n  MapId,\n  MapPreference,\n  ProtocolError,\n  RoundState,\n  ServerBaselineEpochs,\n  SnapshotRing,\n  packSnapshot,\n  type CmdFrame,\n  type EntityState,\n  type HelloFrame,\n  type SnapshotEvent,\n  type SnapshotModeState,\n} from \"@gungame/protocol\";\nimport {\n  LadderId,\n  MapSecretKind,\n  MAX_HEALTH,\n  NEAR_MISS_DIALS,\n  RESPAWN_TICKS,\n  TICK_DT,\n  WeaponId,\n  WEAPONS,\n  ladderWeapons,\n  type LadderIdValue,\n  type MapSpawn,\n  type MapSecret,\n  type Vec3,\n  type WeaponDefinition,\n  type WeaponIdValue,\n} from \"@gungame/shared\";\nimport {\n  Buttons,\n  DEFAULT,\n  ModeRules,\n  ProjectileSystem,\n  SCOUTZ,\n  createInitialState,\n  fireDirection,\n  nearMissGeometry,\n  resolveHitscan,\n  resolveMelee,\n  resolveSplash,\n  shooterEye,\n  step,\n  validateFireTarget,\n  type CollisionWorld,\n  type Cmd,\n  type HullHistorySample,\n  type ProjectileDetonation,\n  type ProjectileState,\n  type State,\n} from \"@gungame/sim\";\n\nimport { FixedRing } from \"./ring.js\";\nimport {\n  BOT_AIM_ERROR_DEGREES,\n  BOT_NAMES,\n  BOT_REACTION_TICKS,\n  ImpressiveTracker,\n  MatchStatTracker,\n  angularDeltaDegrees,\n  desiredBotCount,\n} from \"./godtier.js\";\n\nconst MAX_PLAYERS = 12;\nconst RECONNECT_HOLD_MS = 45_000;\nconst EMPTY_REAP_MS = 5 * 60_000;\nconst AFK_MS = 30_000;\nexport const SPAWN_PROTECTION_TICKS = Math.ceil(1.5 / TICK_DT);\nconst HULL_RING_TICKS = Math.ceil(0.4 / TICK_DT) + 1;\nconst SENT_TICK_RING = 64;\n\nexport interface PlayerPeer {\n  sendReliable(bytes: Uint8Array): void;\n  sendBaseline(bytes: Uint8Array, nowMs: number): void;\n  sendSnapshot(bytes: Uint8Array): void;\n  disconnect(code: number, reason: string): void;\n}\n\nexport interface RoomConfig {\n  readonly mode: typeof GameMode[keyof typeof GameMode];\n  readonly variant: typeof GravityVariant[keyof typeof GravityVariant];\n  readonly ladder: typeof Ladder[keyof typeof Ladder];\n  readonly mapPreference: typeof MapPreference[keyof typeof MapPreference];\n}\n\nexport interface HullSample extends HullHistorySample {\n  readonly ducked: boolean;\n  readonly grounded: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface PlayerSlot {\n  readonly id: number;\n  readonly name: string;\n  readonly cmdWindow: CmdAcceptanceWindow;\n  readonly snapshots: SnapshotRing;\n  readonly events: EventJournal;\n  readonly epochs: ServerBaselineEpochs;\n  readonly hulls: FixedRing<HullSample>;\n  readonly sentSnapshotTicks: FixedRing<number>;\n  readonly isBot: boolean;\n  readonly stats: MatchStatTracker;\n  readonly impressive: ImpressiveTracker;\n  state: State;\n  generation: number;\n  health: number;\n  alive: boolean;\n  respawnTick: number;\n  tier: number;\n  team: 0 | 1 | 2;\n  kills: number;\n  deaths: number;\n  ammo: number;\n  nextFireTick: number;\n  reloadTick: number;\n  peer: PlayerPeer | undefined;\n  tokenHex: string;\n  token: Uint8Array;\n  holdUntilMs: number;\n  lastCmd: CmdFrame | undefined;\n  repeatTicks: number;\n  ackedSnapshotTick: number;\n  lastInputMs: number;\n  lastAcceptedTargetExact: number | undefined;\n  airborneSinceTick: number;\n  backgroundSinceMs: number;\n  protectedUntilTick: number;\n  botSeq: number;\n  botAimYaw: number;\n  lastShotYaw: number;\n}\n\nexport interface JoinSuccess {\n  readonly room: Room;\n  readonly slot: PlayerSlot;\n  readonly token: Uint8Array;\n  readonly resumed: boolean;\n}\n\nexport type JoinResult =\n  | JoinSuccess\n  | { readonly refusal: \"room-full\" | \"room-create-refused\" | \"room-not-found\" | \"invalid-name\" };\n\nfunction tokenBytes(): Uint8Array {\n  return new Uint8Array(randomBytes(16));\n}\n\nfunction tokenKey(token: Uint8Array): string {\n  let result = \"\";\n  for (const byte of token) result += byte.toString(16).padStart(2, \"0\");\n  return result;\n}\n\n/** Strip controls before enforcing the normative ASCII name contract. */\nexport function validatePlayerName(input: string): string | undefined {\n  const stripped = input.replace(/[\\u0000-\\u001f\\u007f-\\u009f]/g, \"\");\n  if (stripped.length < 2 || stripped.length > 16) return undefined;\n  return /^[a-zA-Z0-9_ -]+$/.test(stripped) ? stripped : undefined;\n}\n\nfunction toSimCmd(frame: CmdFrame, buttons = frame.buttons): Cmd {\n  return {\n    seq: frame.seq,\n    tick: frame.tick,\n    buttons,\n    viewYaw: frame.viewYaw,\n    viewPitch: frame.viewPitch,\n    fireFraction: frame.fireFraction,\n    lastSnapshotTick: frame.lastSnapshotTick,\n    interpTargetTick: frame.interpTargetTick,\n    interpTargetFraction: frame.interpTargetFraction,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction playerEntity(slot: PlayerSlot): EntityState {\n  return {\n    id: slot.id,\n    generation: slot.generation,\n    kind: EntityKind.Player,\n    position: slot.state.player.position,\n    velocity: slot.state.player.velocity,\n    viewYaw: slot.state.player.viewYaw,\n    viewPitch: slot.state.player.viewPitch,\n    grounded: slot.state.player.grounded,\n    alive: slot.alive,\n    ducked: slot.state.player.ducked,\n    health: slot.health,\n    weaponTier: slot.tier,\n    ammo: slot.ammo,\n    ownerId: 0,\n    fireCmdSeq: 0,\n    weaponId: 0,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction projectileEntity(projectile: ProjectileState): EntityState {\n  return {\n    id: projectile.id,\n    generation: projectile.generation,\n    kind: EntityKind.Projectile,\n    position: projectile.position,\n    velocity: projectile.velocity,\n    viewYaw: 0,\n    viewPitch: 0,\n    grounded: false,\n    alive: true,\n    health: 0,\n    weaponTier: 0,\n    ammo: 0,\n    ownerId: projectile.ownerId,\n    fireCmdSeq: projectile.fireCmdSeq,\n    weaponId: projectile.weaponId,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction initialAmmo(weaponId: WeaponIdValue): number {\n  const magazine = WEAPONS[weaponId].magazine;\n  return magazine === 0 ? 0 : magazine;\n}\n\nfunction clampU16(value: number): number {\n  return Math.max(0, Math.min(0xffff, Math.floor(value)));\n}\n\nfunction segmentIntersectsAabb(start: Vec3, end: Vec3, bounds: { min: Vec3; max: Vec3 }): boolean {\n  let near = 0;\n  let far = 1;\n  for (const axis of [\"x\", \"y\", \"z\"] as const) {\n    const delta = end[axis] - start[axis];\n    if (Math.abs(delta) < 1e-8) {\n      if (start[axis] < bounds.min[axis] || start[axis] > bounds.max[axis]) return false;\n      continue;\n    }\n    const inverse = 1 / delta;\n    let first = (bounds.min[axis] - start[axis]) * inverse;\n    let second = (bounds.max[axis] - start[axis]) * inverse;\n    if (first > second) [first, second] = [second, first];\n    near = Math.max(near, first);\n    far = Math.min(far, second);\n    if (near > far) return false;\n  }\n  return far >= 0 && near <= 1;\n}\n\ninterface PendingFire {\n  readonly slot: PlayerSlot;\n  readonly cmd: CmdFrame;\n  readonly previousPosition: Vec3;\n}\n\nexport class Room {\n  readonly players = new Map<number, PlayerSlot>();\n  readonly config: RoomConfig;\n  readonly id: string;\n  readonly rules: ModeRules;\n  readonly projectiles = new ProjectileSystem();\n  private nextPlayerId = 1;\n  private nextEventId = 1;\n  private lastNonEmptyMs: number;\n  private world: CollisionWorld | undefined;\n  private spawns: readonly MapSpawn[];\n  private secrets: readonly MapSecret[];\n  private readonly mapRotation: readonly RoomMapBinding[];\n  private mapRotationIndex: number;\n  private activeMapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId];\n  private secretTriggered = false;\n  private modeEndEmitted = false;\n  private lastServerTick = 0;\n\n  constructor(\n    id: string,\n    config: RoomConfig,\n    world: CollisionWorld | undefined,\n    nowMs: number,\n    spawns: readonly (MapSpawn | Vec3)[] = [],\n    secrets: readonly MapSecret[] = [],\n    mapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId] = config.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez\n      ? MapId.Spire\n      : MapId.Foundry,\n    mapRotation: readonly RoomMapBinding[] = [],\n  ) {\n    this.id = id;\n    this.config = Object.freeze({ ...config });\n    this.world = world;\n    this.spawns = spawns.map((spawn) => \"position\" in spawn\n      ? spawn\n      : { mode: config.mode, team: 0, position: spawn, yaw: 0 });\n    this.secrets = secrets;\n    this.activeMapId = mapId;\n    this.mapRotation = mapRotation;\n    this.mapRotationIndex = Math.max(0, mapRotation.findIndex((entry) => entry.mapId === mapId));\n    this.lastNonEmptyMs = nowMs;\n    this.rules = new ModeRules(config.mode as 0 | 1, config.ladder as LadderIdValue);\n  }\n\n  get connectedCount(): number {\n    let count = 0;\n    for (const slot of this.players.values()) if (slot.peer !== undefined) count += 1;\n    return count;\n  }\n\n  get isFull(): boolean {\n    return this.players.size >= MAX_PLAYERS;\n  }\n\n  get emptySinceMs(): number {\n    return this.lastNonEmptyMs;\n  }\n\n  get mapId(): typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId] {\n    return this.activeMapId;\n  }\n\n  add(peer: PlayerPeer, nowMs: number, rawName = \"Player\"): JoinSuccess | undefined {\n    return this.addSlot(peer, nowMs, rawName, false);\n  }\n\n  private addSlot(\n    peer: PlayerPeer | undefined,\n    nowMs: number,\n    rawName: string,\n    isBot: boolean,\n  ): JoinSuccess | undefined {\n    this.expireHolds(nowMs);\n    if (this.isFull) return undefined;\n    const name = validatePlayerName(rawName);\n    if (name === undefined) return undefined;\n    const id = this.nextPlayerId;\n    this.nextPlayerId += 1;\n    const token = tokenBytes();\n    const modePlayer = this.rules.addPlayer(id);\n    const spawn = this.spawnFor(id, modePlayer.team, 1);\n    const initial = createInitialState(`player-${id}`);\n    const state: State = {\n      ...initial,\n      tick: this.lastServerTick,\n      player: {\n        ...initial.player,\n        ...(spawn === undefined ? {} : { position: { ...spawn.position }, viewYaw: spawn.yaw * 180 / Math.PI }),\n      },\n    };\n    const weaponId = this.weaponForTier(modePlayer.tier);\n    const slot: PlayerSlot = {\n      id,\n      name,\n      state,\n      generation: 1,\n      health: MAX_HEALTH,\n      alive: true,\n      respawnTick: 0,\n      tier: modePlayer.tier,\n      team: modePlayer.team,\n      kills: 0,\n      deaths: 0,\n      ammo: initialAmmo(weaponId),\n      nextFireTick: 0,\n      reloadTick: 0,\n      cmdWindow: new CmdAcceptanceWindow(),\n      snapshots: new SnapshotRing(),\n      events: new EventJournal(),\n      epochs: new ServerBaselineEpochs(),\n      hulls: new FixedRing(HULL_RING_TICKS),\n      sentSnapshotTicks: new FixedRing(SENT_TICK_RING),\n      peer,\n      token,\n      tokenHex: tokenKey(token),\n      holdUntilMs: 0,\n      lastCmd: undefined,\n      repeatTicks: 0,\n      ackedSnapshotTick: 0,\n      lastInputMs: nowMs,\n      lastAcceptedTargetExact: undefined,\n      airborneSinceTick: 0,\n      backgroundSinceMs: 0,\n      protectedUntilTick: this.lastServerTick + SPAWN_PROTECTION_TICKS,\n      isBot,\n      stats: new MatchStatTracker(),\n      impressive: new ImpressiveTracker(),\n      botSeq: 1,\n      botAimYaw: 0,\n      lastShotYaw: 0,\n    };\n    this.players.set(id, slot);\n    this.lastNonEmptyMs = nowMs;\n    return { room: this, slot, token: token.slice(), resumed: false };\n  }\n\n  resume(token: Uint8Array, peer: PlayerPeer, nowMs: number): JoinSuccess | undefined {\n    const key = tokenKey(token);\n    for (const slot of this.players.values()) {\n      if (slot.tokenHex !== key || (slot.peer === undefined && slot.holdUntilMs < nowMs)) continue;\n      const superseded = slot.peer;\n      const rotated = tokenBytes();\n      slot.token = rotated;\n      slot.tokenHex = tokenKey(rotated);\n      slot.peer = peer;\n      slot.holdUntilMs = 0;\n      slot.repeatTicks = 0;\n      slot.lastInputMs = nowMs;\n      slot.backgroundSinceMs = 0;\n      superseded?.disconnect(4001, \"superseded\");\n      this.lastNonEmptyMs = nowMs;\n      this.rebalanceBots(nowMs);\n      return { room: this, slot, token: rotated.slice(), resumed: true };\n    }\n    return undefined;\n  }\n\n  disconnect(slotId: number, nowMs: number, peer?: PlayerPeer): void {\n    const slot = this.players.get(slotId);\n    if (slot === undefined || (peer !== undefined && slot.peer !== peer)) return;\n    slot.peer = undefined;\n    slot.holdUntilMs = nowMs + RECONNECT_HOLD_MS;\n    this.rebalanceBots(nowMs);\n    if (this.connectedCount === 0) this.lastNonEmptyMs = nowMs;\n  }\n\n  acceptCmd(slotId: number, cmd: CmdFrame, nowMs: number): boolean {\n    const slot = this.players.get(slotId);\n    const accepted = slot?.cmdWindow.accept(cmd) ?? false;\n    if (accepted && slot !== undefined) slot.lastInputMs = nowMs;\n    return accepted;\n  }\n\n  acknowledgeBaseline(slotId: number, epoch: number, snapshotTick: number): void {\n    const slot = this.players.get(slotId);\n    if (slot === undefined) throw new ProtocolError(\"unknown player\");\n    slot.epochs.acknowledge(epoch, snapshotTick);\n    slot.ackedSnapshotTick = Math.max(slot.ackedSnapshotTick, snapshotTick);\n    slot.events.acknowledgeBaseline(snapshotTick);\n  }\n\n  openBaseline(slotId: number, tick: number): Uint8Array {\n    const slot = this.players.get(slotId);\n    if (slot === undefined) throw new ProtocolError(\"unknown player\");\n    const entities = this.entities();\n    const epoch = slot.epochs.openFull(tick);\n    const packed = packSnapshot({\n      tick,\n      lastProcessedCmdSeq: slot.cmdWindow.lastProcessedCmdSeq,\n      cmdArrivalMargin: slot.cmdWindow.size - 2,\n      baselineEpoch: epoch,\n      baselineTick: tick,\n      selfId: slot.id,\n      entities,\n      baselineEntities: [],\n      events: slot.events.pendingAfter(0),\n      modeState: this.modeState(tick),\n      forceFull: true,\n    });\n    slot.snapshots.set(tick, packed.baselineEntities);\n    slot.events.recordSnapshot(tick, packed.frame.events);\n    slot.sentSnapshotTicks.push(tick);\n    return packed.bytes;\n  }\n\n  tick(serverTick: number, nowMs: number): void {\n    this.lastServerTick = serverTick;\n    this.expireHolds(nowMs);\n    this.kickAfk(nowMs);\n    if (this.rules.shouldRestart(serverTick)) this.restartRound(serverTick);\n    this.respawnReady(serverTick);\n\n    const pendingFires: PendingFire[] = [];\n    for (const slot of this.players.values()) {\n      const movementStart = { ...slot.state.player.position };\n      let frame: CmdFrame | undefined;\n      let fresh = false;\n      if (slot.isBot && slot.alive && !this.rules.frozen) {\n        frame = this.botCommand(slot, serverTick);\n        fresh = true;\n      }\n      try {\n        const consumed = slot.isBot\n          ? undefined\n          : slot.cmdWindow.consume((epoch) => slot.epochs.classifyReference(epoch));\n        if (consumed !== undefined) {\n          frame = consumed.cmd;\n          fresh = true;\n          slot.lastCmd = frame;\n          slot.repeatTicks = 0;\n          if (\n            consumed.epochReference === \"current\" &&\n            frame.lastSnapshotTick > slot.ackedSnapshotTick\n          ) {\n            if (slot.snapshots.has(frame.lastSnapshotTick)) {\n              slot.ackedSnapshotTick = frame.lastSnapshotTick;\n              slot.events.acknowledgeBaseline(frame.lastSnapshotTick);\n            } else if (!slot.epochs.deltasSuspended) {\n              slot.peer?.sendBaseline(this.openBaseline(slot.id, serverTick), nowMs);\n            }\n          }\n        } else if (slot.lastCmd !== undefined && slot.repeatTicks < 8) {\n          slot.repeatTicks += 1;\n          frame = slot.lastCmd;\n        } else if (slot.lastCmd !== undefined) {\n          frame = { ...slot.lastCmd, buttons: slot.lastCmd.buttons & Buttons.Duck };\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        slot.peer?.disconnect(4002, error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"protocol error\");\n        slot.peer = undefined;\n      }\n\n      if (slot.ammo === 0 && slot.reloadTick !== 0 && serverTick >= slot.reloadTick) {\n        slot.ammo = 1;\n        slot.reloadTick = 0;\n      }\n      if (frame !== undefined && (frame.buttons & Buttons.Background) !== 0) {\n        if (slot.backgroundSinceMs === 0) slot.backgroundSinceMs = nowMs;\n        if (nowMs - slot.backgroundSinceMs >= AFK_MS) {\n          slot.peer?.disconnect(4004, \"afk\");\n          this.removePlayer(slot.id);\n        }\n        continue;\n      }\n      slot.backgroundSinceMs = 0;\n      if (frame !== undefined && slot.peer !== undefined && slot.alive && !this.rules.frozen) {\n        const previousPosition = { ...slot.state.player.position };\n        const scoutz = this.config.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez ||\n          this.config.variant === GravityVariant.Scoutz;\n        slot.state = step(slot.state, toSimCmd(frame), TICK_DT, {\n          ...(this.world === undefined ? {} : { world: this.world }),\n          params: scoutz ? SCOUTZ : DEFAULT,\n        });\n        if (fresh && (frame.buttons & Buttons.Fire) !== 0) {\n          pendingFires.push({ slot, cmd: frame, previousPosition });\n        }\n      }\n      const hullHeight = slot.state.player.ducked ? 0.9 : 1.8;\n      if (slot.alive && this.world !== undefined && (\n        this.world.playerInKillVolume(slot.state.player.position, hullHeight) ||\n        this.world.playerCrossesKillVolume(movementStart, slot.state.player.position, hullHeight)\n      )) {\n        this.damage(slot, slot.id, WEAPONS[WeaponId.Knife], slot.health, serverTick,\n          EventFlags.Suicide, true);\n      }\n      if (slot.state.player.grounded) slot.airborneSinceTick = 0;\n      else if (slot.airborneSinceTick === 0) slot.airborneSinceTick = serverTick;\n      slot.stats.observeMovement(\n        Math.hypot(slot.state.player.velocity.x, slot.state.player.velocity.z),\n        slot.state.player.grounded,\n      );\n      slot.hulls.push({\n        tick: serverTick,\n        generation: slot.generation,\n        alive: slot.alive,\n        position: { ...slot.state.player.position },\n        ducked: slot.state.player.ducked,\n        grounded: slot.state.player.grounded,\n      });\n    }\n\n    for (const pending of pendingFires) {\n      if (pending.slot.alive) this.fire(pending, serverTick);\n    }\n    const detonations = this.projectiles.tick(\n      serverTick,\n      this.world,\n      [...this.players.values()].map((slot) => ({\n        id: slot.id,\n        generation: slot.generation,\n        alive: slot.alive,\n        position: slot.state.player.position,\n        ducked: slot.state.player.ducked,\n      })),\n    );\n    for (const nearMiss of this.projectiles.drainNearMisses()) {\n      this.broadcastEvent({\n        id: this.nextEvent(), tick: serverTick, kind: EventKind.NearMiss,\n        actorId: nearMiss.projectile.ownerId, targetId: nearMiss.targetId,\n        amount: clampU16(nearMiss.closingSpeed * 10),\n        weaponId: nearMiss.projectile.weaponId, flags: 0,\n      });\n    }\n    for (const detonation of detonations) this.detonate(detonation, serverTick);\n    this.sendSnapshots(serverTick, nowMs);\n  }\n\n  shouldReap(nowMs: number): boolean {\n    this.expireHolds(nowMs);\n    return this.players.size === 0 && nowMs - this.lastNonEmptyMs >= EMPTY_REAP_MS;\n  }\n\n  private currentWeapon(slot: PlayerSlot, buttons = 0): WeaponDefinition {\n    if ((buttons & Buttons.Melee) !== 0) return WEAPONS[WeaponId.Knife];\n    return WEAPONS[this.weaponForTier(slot.tier)];\n  }\n\n  private weaponForTier(tier: number): WeaponIdValue {\n    if (this.config.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez) return WeaponId.Scout;\n    const ladder = ladderWeapons(this.config.ladder as LadderIdValue);\n    return ladder[Math.max(0, Math.min(ladder.length - 1, tier - 1))] ?? WeaponId.Pistol;\n  }\n\n  private fire(pending: PendingFire, serverTick: number): void {\n    const { slot, cmd } = pending;\n    const weapon = this.currentWeapon(slot, cmd.buttons);\n    if (serverTick < slot.nextFireTick) return;\n    if (weapon.id === WeaponId.Goldie && slot.ammo <= 0) return;\n    slot.nextFireTick = serverTick + weapon.refireTicks;\n    if (weapon.id === WeaponId.Goldie) {\n      slot.ammo = 0;\n      slot.reloadTick = serverTick + weapon.reloadTicks;\n    }\n    const estimateTick = Math.max(0, serverTick - 5);\n    const validated = validateFireTarget({\n      executionTick: serverTick,\n      requestedTick: cmd.interpTargetTick,\n      requestedFraction: cmd.interpTargetFraction,\n      estimateTick,\n      estimateFraction: 0,\n      sentSnapshotTicks: slot.sentSnapshotTicks.toArray(),\n      ...(slot.lastAcceptedTargetExact === undefined\n        ? {}\n        : { lastAcceptedExactTick: slot.lastAcceptedTargetExact }),\n    });\n    slot.lastAcceptedTargetExact = validated.tick + validated.fraction / 256;\n    const eye = shooterEye(\n      pending.previousPosition,\n      slot.state.player.position,\n      cmd.fireFraction,\n      slot.state.player.ducked,\n    );\n    if (weapon.kind === \"projectile\") {\n      slot.stats.recordShot(false, 0);\n      this.projectiles.spawn(\n        slot.id,\n        slot.generation,\n        cmd.seq,\n        weapon.id,\n        eye,\n        fireDirection(cmd.viewYaw, cmd.viewPitch),\n        serverTick,\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n    if (weapon.kind === \"melee\") this.tryTriggerSecret(slot, cmd, eye, serverTick);\n    const targets = [...this.players.values()]\n      .filter((target) => target.id !== slot.id && target.alive &&\n        !(this.config.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez && target.team === slot.team))\n      .map((target) => ({\n        id: target.id,\n        generation: target.generation,\n        history: target.hulls.toArray(),\n      }));\n    const input = {\n      weapon,\n      commandSequence: cmd.seq,\n      previousShooterPosition: pending.previousPosition,\n      currentShooterPosition: slot.state.player.position,\n      fireFraction: cmd.fireFraction,\n      yaw: cmd.viewYaw,\n      pitch: cmd.viewPitch,\n      targetTick: validated.tick,\n      targetFraction: validated.fraction,\n      scoped: (cmd.buttons & Buttons.Zoom) !== 0,\n      targets,\n      shooterDucked: slot.state.player.ducked,\n    };\n    const hits = weapon.kind === \"melee\"\n      ? [resolveMelee(input)].filter((hit) => hit !== undefined)\n      : resolveHitscan(input);\n    const aggregate = new Map<number, { damage: number; headshot: boolean; point: Vec3 }>();\n    for (const hit of hits) {\n      if (this.world?.sweepProjectile(eye, hit.point, 0) !== undefined) continue;\n      const prior = aggregate.get(hit.targetId);\n      aggregate.set(hit.targetId, {\n        damage: (prior?.damage ?? 0) + hit.damage,\n        headshot: (prior?.headshot ?? false) || hit.headshot,\n        point: hit.point,\n      });\n    }\n    if (weapon.kind !== \"melee\") {\n      const direction = fireDirection(cmd.viewYaw, cmd.viewPitch);\n      const end = {\n        x: eye.x + direction.x * weapon.range,\n        y: eye.y + direction.y * weapon.range,\n        z: eye.z + direction.z * weapon.range,\n      };\n      const rayVelocity = {\n        x: direction.x * 343,\n        y: direction.y * 343,\n        z: direction.z * 343,\n      };\n      for (const target of this.players.values()) {\n        if (target.id === slot.id || !target.alive || aggregate.has(target.id)) continue;\n        const height = target.state.player.ducked ? 0.9 : 1.8;\n        const head = {\n          x: target.state.player.position.x,\n          y: target.state.player.position.y + height - 0.15,\n          z: target.state.player.position.z,\n        };\n        const geometry = nearMissGeometry(eye, end, rayVelocity, head);\n        if (geometry.distance > NEAR_MISS_DIALS.radius || geometry.closingSpeed <= 0) continue;\n        this.broadcastEvent({\n          id: this.nextEvent(), tick: serverTick, kind: EventKind.NearMiss,\n          actorId: slot.id, targetId: target.id,\n          amount: clampU16(geometry.closingSpeed * 10),\n          weaponId: weapon.id, flags: EventFlags.HitscanNearMiss,\n        });\n      }\n    }\n    const hit = aggregate.size > 0;\n    const flickDegrees = angularDeltaDegrees(cmd.viewYaw, slot.lastShotYaw);\n    slot.lastShotYaw = cmd.viewYaw;\n    slot.stats.recordShot(hit, flickDegrees);\n    const impressiveChain = slot.impressive.recordShot(weapon.id, hit);\n    if (impressiveChain !== undefined) {\n      this.broadcastEvent({\n        id: this.nextEvent(), tick: serverTick, kind: EventKind.Impressive,\n        actorId: slot.id, targetId: 0, amount: impressiveChain,\n        weaponId: weapon.id, flags: 0,\n      });\n    }\n    for (const [targetId, hit] of aggregate) {\n      const target = this.players.get(targetId);\n      if (target === undefined) continue;\n      const flags = (hit.headshot ? EventFlags.Headshot : 0) |\n        (weapon.kind === \"melee\" ? EventFlags.Melee : 0);\n      this.damage(target, slot.id, weapon, hit.damage, serverTick, flags, false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private detonate(detonation: ProjectileDetonation, tick: number): void {\n    if (detonation.reason === \"kill-volume\" || detonation.reason === \"lifetime\") return;\n    const weapon = WEAPONS[detonation.projectile.weaponId];\n    const effects = resolveSplash(\n      weapon,\n      detonation.point,\n      [...this.players.values()].filter((slot) => slot.alive).map((slot) => ({\n        id: slot.id,\n        position: slot.state.player.position,\n      })),\n      detonation.projectile.ownerId,\n      detonation.directTargetId,\n    );\n    const owner = this.players.get(detonation.projectile.ownerId);\n    const posthumous = owner === undefined || !owner.alive ||\n      owner.generation !== detonation.projectile.ownerGeneration;\n    const hitOpponent = effects.some((effect) => {\n      const target = this.players.get(effect.targetId);\n      return target !== undefined && target.alive &&\n        target.id !== detonation.projectile.ownerId && effect.damage > 0 &&\n        !(owner !== undefined && this.config.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez &&\n          owner.team === target.team);\n    });\n    if (hitOpponent) owner?.stats.recordHit();\n    for (const effect of effects) {\n      const target = this.players.get(effect.targetId);\n      if (target === undefined || !target.alive) continue;\n      if (owner !== undefined && this.config.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez &&\n        owner.team === target.team && owner.id !== target.id) continue;\n      target.state = {\n        ...target.state,\n        player: {\n          ...target.state.player,\n          velocity: {\n            x: target.state.player.velocity.x + effect.impulse.x,\n            y: target.state.player.velocity.y + effect.impulse.y,\n            z: target.state.player.velocity.z + effect.impulse.z,\n          },\n        },\n      };\n      const flags = (effect.direct ? EventFlags.Direct : 0) |\n        (posthumous ? EventFlags.Posthumous : 0) |\n        (target.id === detonation.projectile.ownerId ? EventFlags.Suicide : 0);\n      this.damage(target, detonation.projectile.ownerId, weapon, effect.damage, tick, flags,\n        target.id === detonation.projectile.ownerId);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private damage(\n    target: PlayerSlot,\n    attackerId: number,\n    weapon: WeaponDefinition,\n    amount: number,\n    tick: number,\n    flags: number,\n    suicide: boolean,\n  ): void {\n    if (!target.alive || amount <= 0) return;\n    if (attackerId !== target.id && tick < target.protectedUntilTick) return;\n    const applied = Math.min(target.health, Math.max(0, Math.round(amount)));\n    target.health -= applied;\n    this.broadcastEvent({\n      id: this.nextEvent(), tick, kind: EventKind.Damage, actorId: attackerId,\n      targetId: target.id, amount: applied, weaponId: weapon.id, flags,\n    });\n    if (!suicide && attackerId !== target.id) {\n      this.broadcastEvent({\n        id: this.nextEvent(), tick, kind: EventKind.HitConfirm, actorId: attackerId,\n        targetId: target.id, amount: applied, weaponId: weapon.id, flags,\n      });\n    }\n    if (target.health > 0) return;\n    target.alive = false;\n    target.respawnTick = tick + RESPAWN_TICKS;\n    const airborne = !target.state.player.grounded && target.airborneSinceTick !== 0 &&\n      tick - target.airborneSinceTick > 0.5 / TICK_DT;\n    const actualSuicide = suicide || attackerId === target.id;\n    const attacker = this.players.get(attackerId);\n    const posthumous = (flags & EventFlags.Posthumous) !== 0;\n    this.rules.recordKill({\n      attackerId,\n      victimId: target.id,\n      melee: weapon.kind === \"melee\",\n      suicide: actualSuicide,\n      posthumous,\n    }, tick);\n    this.syncRuleState();\n    const killFlags = flags |\n      (actualSuicide ? EventFlags.Suicide : 0) |\n      (weapon.kind === \"melee\" ? EventFlags.Melee : 0);\n    this.broadcastEvent({\n      id: this.nextEvent(), tick, kind: EventKind.Kill,\n      actorId: actualSuicide ? target.id : attackerId,\n      targetId: target.id, amount: 0, weaponId: weapon.id, flags: killFlags,\n    });\n    if (airborne && !actualSuicide && attacker !== undefined) {\n      attacker.stats.recordAirshot();\n      this.broadcastEvent({\n        id: this.nextEvent(), tick, kind: EventKind.Airshot,\n        actorId: attackerId, targetId: target.id, amount: 0,\n        weaponId: weapon.id, flags: killFlags,\n      });\n    }\n    if (!actualSuicide && attacker !== undefined && weapon.kind === \"melee\") {\n      attacker.stats.recordKnifeKill();\n    }\n    if (this.rules.frozen && this.rules.snapshot.winnerId !== 0 && !this.modeEndEmitted) {\n      this.broadcastModeEnd(tick);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private respawnReady(tick: number): void {\n    for (const slot of this.players.values()) {\n      if (slot.alive || tick < slot.respawnTick || this.rules.frozen) continue;\n      this.respawn(slot, tick, false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private respawn(slot: PlayerSlot, tick: number, forceGeneration: boolean): void {\n    if (!forceGeneration && slot.alive) return;\n    slot.generation = (slot.generation + 1) & 0xffff;\n    slot.health = MAX_HEALTH;\n    slot.alive = true;\n    slot.respawnTick = 0;\n    slot.nextFireTick = tick;\n    slot.reloadTick = 0;\n    slot.protectedUntilTick = tick + SPAWN_PROTECTION_TICKS;\n    slot.airborneSinceTick = 0;\n    slot.impressive.resetLife();\n    const spawn = this.spawnFor(slot.id, slot.team, slot.generation);\n    const initial = createInitialState(`player-${slot.id}`);\n    slot.state = {\n      ...initial,\n      tick,\n      player: {\n        ...initial.player,\n        ...(spawn === undefined ? {} : { position: { ...spawn.position }, viewYaw: spawn.yaw * 180 / Math.PI }),\n      },\n    };\n    slot.ammo = initialAmmo(this.weaponForTier(slot.tier));\n  }\n\n  private restartRound(tick: number): void {\n    if (\n      this.config.mode === GameMode.GunGame &&\n      this.config.mapPreference === MapPreference.AutoRotate &&\n      this.mapRotation.length > 1\n    ) {\n      this.mapRotationIndex = (this.mapRotationIndex + 1) % this.mapRotation.length;\n      const next = this.mapRotation[this.mapRotationIndex];\n      if (next !== undefined) {\n        this.activeMapId = next.mapId;\n        this.world = next.world;\n        this.spawns = next.spawns;\n        this.secrets = next.secrets;\n      }\n    }\n    this.rules.restart();\n    this.secretTriggered = false;\n    this.modeEndEmitted = false;\n    this.syncRuleState();\n    for (const projectile of this.projectiles.projectiles) this.projectiles.delete(projectile.id);\n    for (const slot of this.players.values()) {\n      slot.stats.reset();\n      this.respawn(slot, tick, true);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private syncRuleState(): void {\n    for (const player of this.rules.players.values()) {\n      const slot = this.players.get(player.id);\n      if (slot === undefined) continue;\n      const oldTier = slot.tier;\n      slot.tier = player.tier;\n      slot.team = player.team;\n      slot.kills = player.kills;\n      slot.deaths = player.deaths;\n      if (oldTier !== slot.tier) {\n        slot.ammo = initialAmmo(this.weaponForTier(slot.tier));\n        slot.reloadTick = 0;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private tryTriggerSecret(slot: PlayerSlot, cmd: CmdFrame, eye: Vec3, tick: number): void {\n    if (this.secretTriggered || this.config.mode !== GameMode.GunGame) return;\n    const direction = fireDirection(cmd.viewYaw, cmd.viewPitch);\n    const end = {\n      x: eye.x + direction.x * WEAPONS[WeaponId.Knife].range,\n      y: eye.y + direction.y * WEAPONS[WeaponId.Knife].range,\n      z: eye.z + direction.z * WEAPONS[WeaponId.Knife].range,\n    };\n    const sigil = this.secrets.find((secret) =>\n      secret.kind === MapSecretKind.FoundrySigil && segmentIntersectsAabb(eye, end, secret.bounds));\n    if (sigil === undefined) return;\n    this.secretTriggered = true;\n    this.broadcastEvent({\n      id: this.nextEvent(),\n      tick,\n      kind: EventKind.SecretTriggered,\n      actorId: slot.id,\n      targetId: 0,\n      amount: 0,\n      weaponId: WeaponId.Knife,\n      flags: EventFlags.Melee,\n    });\n  }\n\n  private spawnFor(id: number, team: number, generation: number): MapSpawn | undefined {\n    const modeSpawns = this.spawns.filter((spawn) => spawn.mode === this.config.mode);\n    const pool = (modeSpawns.length === 0 ? this.spawns : modeSpawns)\n      .filter((spawn) => team === 0 || spawn.team === 0 || spawn.team === team);\n    const fallback = modeSpawns.length === 0 ? this.spawns : modeSpawns;\n    const candidates = pool.length === 0 ? fallback : pool;\n    return candidates[(id + generation - 2) % Math.max(1, candidates.length)];\n  }\n\n  private modeState(tick: number): SnapshotModeState {\n    const snapshot = this.rules.snapshot;\n    return {\n      mode: this.config.mode,\n      ladder: this.config.ladder,\n      mapId: this.activeMapId,\n      roundState: this.rules.frozen ? RoundState.ScoreboardFreeze : RoundState.Playing,\n      winnerId: snapshot.winnerId,\n      restartTicksRemaining: snapshot.restartTick === 0\n        ? 0\n        : clampU16(Math.max(0, snapshot.restartTick - tick)),\n      teamScores: [snapshot.teamScores[0], snapshot.teamScores[1]],\n      scoreboard: [...this.players.values()]\n        .sort((left, right) => right.kills - left.kills || left.deaths - right.deaths || left.id - right.id)\n        .map((slot) => ({\n          playerId: slot.id,\n          name: slot.name,\n          kills: clampU16(slot.kills),\n          deaths: clampU16(slot.deaths),\n          team: slot.team,\n          tier: slot.tier,\n          bot: slot.isBot,\n        })),\n    };\n  }\n\n  private entities(): readonly EntityState[] {\n    return [\n      ...[...this.players.values()].map(playerEntity),\n      ...this.projectiles.projectiles.map(projectileEntity),\n    ].sort((left, right) => left.id - right.id);\n  }\n\n  private sendSnapshots(serverTick: number, nowMs: number): void {\n    const entities = this.entities();\n    const modeState = this.modeState(serverTick);\n    for (const slot of this.players.values()) {\n      if (slot.peer === undefined) continue;\n      if (slot.epochs.deltasSuspended) continue;\n      const baseline = slot.snapshots.get(slot.ackedSnapshotTick) ?? [];\n      const packed = packSnapshot({\n        tick: serverTick,\n        lastProcessedCmdSeq: slot.cmdWindow.lastProcessedCmdSeq,\n        cmdArrivalMargin: Math.max(-128, Math.min(127, slot.cmdWindow.size - 2)),\n        baselineEpoch: slot.epochs.epoch,\n        baselineTick: slot.ackedSnapshotTick,\n        selfId: slot.id,\n        entities,\n        baselineEntities: baseline,\n        events: slot.events.pendingAfter(slot.ackedSnapshotTick),\n        modeState,\n      });\n      if (packed.promotedToFull) {\n        slot.peer.sendBaseline(this.openBaseline(slot.id, serverTick), nowMs);\n      }\n      else {\n        slot.snapshots.set(serverTick, packed.baselineEntities);\n        slot.events.recordSnapshot(serverTick, packed.frame.events);\n        slot.sentSnapshotTicks.push(serverTick);\n        slot.peer.sendSnapshot(packed.bytes);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private broadcastEvent(event: SnapshotEvent): void {\n    for (const slot of this.players.values()) slot.events.add(event);\n  }\n\n  private nextEvent(): number {\n    const id = this.nextEventId;\n    this.nextEventId = this.nextEventId >= 0xffff_ffff ? 1 : this.nextEventId + 1;\n    return id;\n  }\n\n  private removePlayer(id: number): void {\n    this.players.delete(id);\n    this.rules.removePlayer(id);\n    this.syncRuleState();\n  }\n\n  private kickAfk(nowMs: number): void {\n    let removedHuman = false;\n    for (const slot of [...this.players.values()]) {\n      if (slot.isBot) continue;\n      const backgroundExpired = slot.backgroundSinceMs !== 0 &&\n        nowMs - slot.backgroundSinceMs >= AFK_MS;\n      const droughtExpired = slot.backgroundSinceMs === 0 && nowMs - slot.lastInputMs >= AFK_MS;\n      if (!backgroundExpired && !droughtExpired) continue;\n      slot.peer?.disconnect(4004, \"afk\");\n      this.removePlayer(slot.id);\n      removedHuman = true;\n    }\n    if (removedHuman) this.rebalanceBots(nowMs);\n  }\n\n  private expireHolds(nowMs: number): void {\n    for (const slot of [...this.players.values()]) {\n      if (slot.isBot) continue;\n      if (slot.peer === undefined && slot.holdUntilMs <= nowMs) this.removePlayer(slot.id);\n    }\n  }\n\n  rebalanceBots(nowMs: number): void {\n    const humans = [...this.players.values()]\n      .filter((slot) => !slot.isBot && slot.peer !== undefined).length;\n    const target = desiredBotCount(humans);\n    const bots = [...this.players.values()].filter((slot) => slot.isBot);\n    while (bots.length > target) {\n      const bot = bots.pop();\n      if (bot !== undefined) this.removePlayer(bot.id);\n    }\n    while (bots.length < target && !this.isFull) {\n      const name = BOT_NAMES[(this.nextPlayerId + bots.length) % BOT_NAMES.length] ?? \"Ari\";\n      const joined = this.addSlot(undefined, nowMs, name, true);\n      if (joined === undefined) break;\n      joined.slot.holdUntilMs = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;\n      bots.push(joined.slot);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private botCommand(slot: PlayerSlot, tick: number): CmdFrame {\n    const candidates = [...this.players.values()].filter((target) =>\n      target.id !== slot.id && target.alive &&\n      !(this.config.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez && target.team === slot.team));\n    const target = candidates.sort((left, right) => {\n      const leftDistance = Math.hypot(\n        left.state.player.position.x - slot.state.player.position.x,\n        left.state.player.position.z - slot.state.player.position.z,\n      );\n      const rightDistance = Math.hypot(\n        right.state.player.position.x - slot.state.player.position.x,\n        right.state.player.position.z - slot.state.player.position.z,\n      );\n      return leftDistance - rightDistance || left.id - right.id;\n    })[0];\n    if (target !== undefined && tick % BOT_REACTION_TICKS === slot.id % BOT_REACTION_TICKS) {\n      const dx = target.state.player.position.x - slot.state.player.position.x;\n      const dz = target.state.player.position.z - slot.state.player.position.z;\n      const error = Math.sin((tick + slot.id * 17) * 0.19) * BOT_AIM_ERROR_DEGREES;\n      slot.botAimYaw = Math.atan2(-dx, -dz) * 180 / Math.PI + error;\n    }\n    const seq = slot.botSeq++;\n    return {\n      type: FrameType.Cmd,\n      seq,\n      tick,\n      buttons: Buttons.Forward | Buttons.Zoom |\n        (target === undefined ? 0 : Buttons.Fire) |\n        (tick % 53 === slot.id % 53 ? Buttons.Jump : 0),\n      viewYaw: slot.botAimYaw,\n      viewPitch: 0,\n      fireFraction: (tick * 29 + slot.id * 13) & 0xff,\n      lastSnapshotTick: Math.max(0, tick - 1),\n      interpTargetTick: Math.max(0, tick - 5),\n      interpTargetFraction: 0,\n      baselineEpoch: 0,\n    };\n  }\n\n  private broadcastModeEnd(tick: number): void {\n    this.modeEndEmitted = true;\n    for (const slot of this.players.values()) {\n      this.broadcastEvent({\n        id: this.nextEvent(), tick, kind: EventKind.ModeEnd,\n        actorId: slot.id, targetId: this.rules.snapshot.winnerId,\n        amount: 0, weaponId: 0, flags: 0, stats: slot.stats.snapshot,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport interface RoomMapBinding {\n  readonly mapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId];\n  readonly world: CollisionWorld | undefined;\n  readonly spawns: readonly MapSpawn[];\n  readonly secrets: readonly MapSecret[];\n}\n\nexport interface RoomMapCatalog {\n  readonly gunGame: readonly RoomMapBinding[];\n  readonly scoutzknivez: RoomMapBinding;\n}\n\nexport class RoomManager {\n  readonly rooms = new Map<string, Room>();\n  private roomSequence = 1;\n  private readonly world: CollisionWorld | undefined;\n  private readonly admissionBlocked: () => boolean;\n  private readonly spawns: readonly (MapSpawn | Vec3)[];\n  private readonly maps: RoomMapCatalog | undefined;\n\n  constructor(\n    worldOrMaps: CollisionWorld | RoomMapCatalog | undefined,\n    admissionBlocked: () => boolean,\n    spawns: readonly (MapSpawn | Vec3)[] = [],\n  ) {\n    if (worldOrMaps !== undefined && \"gunGame\" in worldOrMaps) {\n      this.maps = worldOrMaps;\n      this.world = undefined;\n      this.spawns = [];\n    } else {\n      this.maps = undefined;\n      this.world = worldOrMaps;\n      this.spawns = spawns;\n    }\n    this.admissionBlocked = admissionBlocked;\n  }\n\n  join(hello: HelloFrame, peer: PlayerPeer, nowMs: number): JoinResult {\n    if (hello.joinKind === JoinKind.Resume && hello.reconnectToken.length === 16) {\n      const requested = this.rooms.get(hello.roomId);\n      const resumed = requested?.resume(hello.reconnectToken, peer, nowMs);\n      if (resumed !== undefined) {\n        resumed.room.rebalanceBots(nowMs);\n        return resumed;\n      }\n      if (requested !== undefined) return this.freshJoin(requested, hello, peer, nowMs);\n    }\n    if (hello.joinKind === JoinKind.Invite || hello.joinKind === JoinKind.Resume) {\n      const room = this.rooms.get(hello.roomId);\n      if (room === undefined) return { refusal: \"room-not-found\" };\n      return this.freshJoin(room, hello, peer, nowMs);\n    }\n    if (validatePlayerName(hello.name) === undefined) return { refusal: \"invalid-name\" };\n    if (hello.joinKind === JoinKind.Create) {\n      if (this.admissionBlocked()) return { refusal: \"room-create-refused\" };\n      const room = this.create({\n        mode: hello.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez ? GameMode.Scoutzknivez : GameMode.GunGame,\n        variant: hello.variant === GravityVariant.Scoutz ? GravityVariant.Scoutz : GravityVariant.Standard,\n        ladder: hello.ladder === Ladder.Arsenal ? Ladder.Arsenal : Ladder.Classic,\n        mapPreference: this.normalizeMapPreference(hello.mode, hello.mapPreference),\n      }, nowMs);\n      return this.addHuman(room, peer, nowMs, hello.name);\n    }\n    const candidates = [...this.rooms.values()]\n      .filter((room) => !room.isFull)\n      .sort((left, right) => right.connectedCount - left.connectedCount);\n    let room = candidates[0];\n    if (room === undefined) {\n      if (this.admissionBlocked()) return { refusal: \"room-create-refused\" };\n      room = this.create({\n        mode: GameMode.GunGame,\n        variant: GravityVariant.Standard,\n        ladder: Ladder.Classic,\n        mapPreference: MapPreference.AutoRotate,\n      }, nowMs);\n    }\n    return this.addHuman(room, peer, nowMs, hello.name);\n  }\n\n  tick(serverTick: number, nowMs: number): void {\n    for (const [id, room] of this.rooms) {\n      room.tick(serverTick, nowMs);\n      if (room.shouldReap(nowMs)) this.rooms.delete(id);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private freshJoin(room: Room, hello: HelloFrame, peer: PlayerPeer, nowMs: number): JoinResult {\n    if (validatePlayerName(hello.name) === undefined) return { refusal: \"invalid-name\" };\n    return this.addHuman(room, peer, nowMs, hello.name);\n  }\n\n  private addHuman(room: Room, peer: PlayerPeer, nowMs: number, name: string): JoinResult {\n    const joined = room.add(peer, nowMs, name);\n    if (joined === undefined) return { refusal: \"room-full\" };\n    room.rebalanceBots(nowMs);\n    return joined;\n  }\n\n  private create(config: RoomConfig, nowMs: number): Room {\n    const id = `r${this.roomSequence.toString(36).padStart(6, \"0\")}`;\n    this.roomSequence += 1;\n    const rotation = config.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez\n      ? (this.maps === undefined ? [] : [this.maps.scoutzknivez])\n      : (this.maps?.gunGame ?? []);\n    const requestedMapId = this.mapIdForPreference(config.mode, config.mapPreference);\n    const binding = rotation.find((entry) => entry.mapId === requestedMapId) ?? rotation[0];\n    const room = new Room(\n      id,\n      config,\n      binding?.world ?? this.world,\n      nowMs,\n      binding?.spawns ?? this.spawns,\n      binding?.secrets ?? [],\n      binding?.mapId ?? requestedMapId,\n      rotation,\n    );\n    this.rooms.set(id, room);\n    return room;\n  }\n\n  private normalizeMapPreference(\n    mode: number,\n    preference: number,\n  ): typeof MapPreference[keyof typeof MapPreference] {\n    if (mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez) {\n      return preference === MapPreference.Spire ? MapPreference.Spire : MapPreference.AutoRotate;\n    }\n    return preference === MapPreference.Foundry || preference === MapPreference.Duna ||\n      preference === MapPreference.Cascade\n      ? preference\n      : MapPreference.AutoRotate;\n  }\n\n  private mapIdForPreference(\n    mode: typeof GameMode[keyof typeof GameMode],\n    preference: typeof MapPreference[keyof typeof MapPreference],\n  ): typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId] {\n    if (mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez) return MapId.Spire;\n    if (preference === MapPreference.Duna) return MapId.Duna;\n    if (preference === MapPreference.Cascade) return MapId.Cascade;\n    return MapId.Foundry;\n  }\n}\n","numLines":1268,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1268}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"d5e850a5-5be5-4640-b6bb-5550d5f74e90","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

this.hopChain + 1 : 0;\n32\t      this.longestHopChain = Math.max(this.longestHopChain, this.hopChain);\n33\t    }\n34\t    this.grounded = grounded;\n35\t  }\n36\t\n37\t  recordShot(hit: boolean, flickDegrees: number): void {\n38\t    this.shotsFired += 1;\n39\t    if (!hit) return;\n40\t    this.recordHit(flickDegrees);\n41\t  }\n42\t\n43\t  recordHit(flickDegrees = 0): void {\n44\t    this.shotsHit += 1;\n45\t    if (flickDegrees >= 25) this.flicksLanded += 1;\n46\t  }\n47\t\n48\t  recordAirshot(): void {\n49\t    this.airshots += 1;\n50\t  }\n51\t\n52\t  recordKnifeKill(): void {\n53\t    this.knifeKills += 1;\n54\t  }\n55\t\n56\t  reset(): void {\n57\t    this.airshots = 0;\n58\t    this.topSpeed = 0;\n59\t    this.hopChain = 0;\n60\t    this.longestHopChain = 0;\n61\t    this.flicksLanded = 0;\n62\t    this.knifeKills = 0;\n63\t    this.shotsFired = 0;\n64\t    this.shotsHit = 0;\n65\t    this.grounded = true;\n66\t  }\n67\t\n68\t  get snapshot(): MatchStats {\n69\t    return {\n70\t      airshots: this.airshots,\n71\t      topSpeedDeci: Math.round(this.topSpeed * 10),\n72\t      longestHopChain: this.longestHopChain,\n73\t      flicksLanded: this.flicksLanded,\n74\t      knifeKills: this.knifeKills,\n75\t      accuracyPercent: this.shotsFired === 0\n76\t        ? 0\n77\t        : Math.round(this.shotsHit / this.shotsFired * 100),\n78\t    };\n79\t  }\n80\t}\n81\t\n82\texport class ImpressiveTracker {\n83\t  private chain = 0;\n84\t\n85\t  recordShot(weaponId: WeaponIdValue, hit: boolean): number | undefined {\n86\t    if (weaponId !== WeaponId.Scout && weaponId !== WeaponId.Deadeye) return undefined;\n87\t    if (!hit) {\n88\t      this.chain = 0;\n89\t      return undefined;\n90\t    }\n91\t    this.chain += 1;\n92\t    return this.chain >= 2 && this.chain % 2 === 0 ? this.chain : undefined;\n93\t  }\n94\t\n95\t  resetLife(): void {\n96\t    this.chain = 0;\n97\t  }\n98\t}\n99\t\n100\texport function angularDeltaDegrees(left: number, right: number): number {\n101\t  const delta = ((left - right + 540) % 360) - 180;\n102\t  return Math.abs(delta);\n103\t}\n104\t"}]},"uuid":"3a84c957-1c4f-4b92-bce9-96c11bfcc568","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:16:06.428Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/server/src/godtier.ts","content":"import type { MatchStats } from \"@gungame/protocol\";\nimport { WeaponId, type WeaponIdValue } from \"@gungame/shared\";\n\nexport const ROOM_BOT_TARGET = 5;\nexport const BOT_REACTION_TICKS = 12;\nexport const BOT_AIM_ERROR_DEGREES = 2.4;\n\nexport const BOT_NAMES = Object.freeze([\n  \"Ari\", \"Mika\", \"Noor\", \"Sage\", \"Robin\",\n  \"Quinn\", \"Remy\", \"Jules\", \"Lane\", \"Rowan\",\n] as const);\n\nexport function desiredBotCount(connectedHumans: number): number {\n  return Math.max(0, ROOM_BOT_TARGET - Math.max(0, Math.floor(connectedHumans)));\n}\n\nexport class MatchStatTracker {\n  private airshots = 0;\n  private topSpeed = 0;\n  private hopChain = 0;\n  private longestHopChain = 0;\n  private flicksLanded = 0;\n  private knifeKills = 0;\n  private shotsFired = 0;\n  private shotsHit = 0;\n  private grounded = true;\n\n  observeMovement(speed: number, grounded: boolean): void {\n    if (Number.isFinite(speed)) this.topSpeed = Math.max(this.topSpeed, Math.max(0, speed));\n    if (grounded && !this.grounded) {\n      this.hopChain = speed >= 6 ? this.hopChain + 1 : 0;\n      this.longestHopChain = Math.max(this.longestHopChain, this.hopChain);\n    }\n    this.grounded = grounded;\n  }\n\n  recordShot(hit: boolean, flickDegrees: number): void {\n    this.shotsFired += 1;\n    if (!hit) return;\n    this.recordHit(flickDegrees);\n  }\n\n  recordHit(flickDegrees = 0): void {\n    this.shotsHit += 1;\n    if (flickDegrees >= 25) this.flicksLanded += 1;\n  }\n\n  recordAirshot(): void {\n    this.airshots += 1;\n  }\n\n  recordKnifeKill(): void {\n    this.knifeKills += 1;\n  }\n\n  reset(): void {\n    this.airshots = 0;\n    this.topSpeed = 0;\n    this.hopChain = 0;\n    this.longestHopChain = 0;\n    this.flicksLanded = 0;\n    this.knifeKills = 0;\n    this.shotsFired = 0;\n    this.shotsHit = 0;\n    this.grounded = true;\n  }\n\n  get snapshot(): MatchStats {\n    return {\n      airshots: this.airshots,\n      topSpeedDeci: Math.round(this.topSpeed * 10),\n      longestHopChain: this.longestHopChain,\n      flicksLanded: this.flicksLanded,\n      knifeKills: this.knifeKills,\n      accuracyPercent: this.shotsFired === 0\n        ? 0\n        : Math.round(this.shotsHit / this.shotsFired * 100),\n    };\n  }\n}\n\nexport class ImpressiveTracker {\n  private chain = 0;\n\n  recordShot(weaponId: WeaponIdValue, hit: boolean): number | undefined {\n    if (weaponId !== WeaponId.Scout && weaponId !== WeaponId.Deadeye) return undefined;\n    if (!hit) {\n      this.chain = 0;\n      return undefined;\n    }\n    this.chain += 1;\n    return this.chain >= 2 && this.chain % 2 === 0 ? this.chain : undefined;\n  }\n\n  resetLife(): void {\n    this.chain = 0;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function angularDeltaDegrees(left: number, right: number): number {\n  const delta = ((left - right + 540) % 360) - 180;\n  return Math.abs(delta);\n}\n","numLines":104,"startLine":1,"totalLines":104}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"040fb648-b435-45dd-905c-66601aa9b2d2","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{"parentUuid":"8f2ef0ac-67a7-4817-abab-4bfa1393601e","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01UFYPjsLq6UVdmhmFHhTD5V","type":"tool_result","content":"1\timport { TICK_DT } from \"@gungame/shared\";\n2\t\n3\tconst TICK_MS = TICK_DT * 1_000;\n4\tconst MAX_CATCH_UP = 4;\n5\tconst SAMPLE_LIMIT = 4_096;\n6\t\n7\texport interface TickLoopMetrics {\n8\t  readonly tick: number;\n9\t  readonly aggregateP95Ms: number;\n10\t  readonly overloaded: boolean;\n11\t}\n12\t\n13\texport class AuthoritativeLoop {\n14\t  private accumulatorMs = 0;\n15\t  private previousMs = 0;\n16\t  private serverTick = 0;\n17\t  private overloadUntilMs = 0;\n18\t  private timer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | undefined;\n19\t  private readonly samples: number[] = [];\n20\t  private readonly step: (tick: number, nowMs: number) => void;\n21\t  private readonly sweep: (nowMs: number) => void;\n22\t  private readonly clock: () => number;\n23\t  private readonly warn: (message: string) => void;\n24\t\n25\t  constructor(\n26\t    step: (tick: number, nowMs: number) => void,\n27\t    clock: () => number = () => performance.now(),\n28\t    warn: (message: string) => void = (message) => console.warn(message),\n29\t    sweep: (nowMs: number) => void = () => {},\n30\t  ) {\n31\t    this.step = step;\n32\t    this.clock = clock;\n33\t    this.warn = warn;\n34\t    this.sweep = sweep;\n35\t  }\n36\t\n37\t  get metrics(): TickLoopMetrics {\n38\t    const ordered = [...this.samples].sort((a, b) => a - b);\n39\t    const p95Index = Math.max(0, Math.ceil(ordered.length * 0.95) - 1);\n40\t    return {\n41\t      tick: this.serverTick,\n42\t      aggregateP95Ms: ordered[p95Index] ?? 0,\n43\t      overloaded: this.clock() < this.overloadUntilMs,\n44\t    };\n45\t  }\n46\t\n47\t  get refuseNewRooms(): boolean {\n48\t    return this.clock() < this.overloadUntilMs;\n49\t  }\n50\t\n51\t  start(): void {\n52\t    if (this.timer !== undefined) return;\n53\t    this.previousMs = this.clock();\n54\t    const wake = (): void => {\n55\t      this.wake(this.clock());\n56\t      this.timer = setTimeout(wake, 2);\n57\t    };\n58\t    this.timer = setTimeout(wake, 0);\n59\t  }\n60\t\n61\t  stop(): void {\n62\t    if (this.timer !== undefined) clearTimeout(this.timer);\n63\t    this.timer = undefined;\n64\t  }\n65\t\n66\t  wake(nowMs: number): number {\n67\t    if (!Number.isFinite(nowMs) || nowMs < this.previousMs) {\n68\t      throw new RangeError(\"loop clock must be finite and monotonic\");\n69\t    }\n70\t    this.accumulatorMs += Math.min(250, nowMs - this.previousMs);\n71\t    this.previousMs = nowMs;\n72\t    let stepped = 0;\n73\t    const aggregateStart = this.clock();\n74\t    while (this.accumulatorMs >= TICK_MS && stepped < MAX_CATCH_UP) {\n75\t      this.serverTick += 1;\n76\t      this.runPhase(\"step\", this.serverTick, () => this.step(this.serverTick, nowMs));\n77\t      this.runPhase(\"sweep\", this.serverTick, () => this.sweep(nowMs));\n78\t      this.accumulatorMs -= TICK_MS;\n79\t      stepped += 1;\n80\t    }\n81\t    if (stepped === MAX_CATCH_UP && this.accumulatorMs >= TICK_MS) {\n82\t      this.accumulatorMs = 0;\n83\t      this.overloadUntilMs = nowMs + 5_000;\n84\t      this.warn(\"tick overload: debt dropped; refusing new rooms for 5s\");\n85\t    }\n86\t    if (stepped > 0) {\n87\t      this.samples.push(Math.max(0, this.clock() - aggregateStart));\n88\t      if (this.samples.length > SAMPLE_LIMIT) this.samples.shift();\n89\t    }\n90\t    return stepped;\n91\t  }\n92\t\n93\t  private runPhase(phase: \"step\" | \"sweep\", tick: number, action: () => void): void {\n94\t    try {\n95\t      action();\n96\t    } catch (error) {\n97\t      const detail = error instanceof Error ? error.stack ?? error.message : String(error);\n98\t      this.warn(`authoritative loop ${phase} error at tick ${tick}; tick continued\\n${detail}`);\n99\t    }\n100\t  }\n101\t}\n102\t"}]},"uuid":"24ff3136-cda9-483e-b805-cf3ed496e2d9","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:16:07.332Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/server/src/loop.ts","content":"import { TICK_DT } from \"@gungame/shared\";\n\nconst TICK_MS = TICK_DT * 1_000;\nconst MAX_CATCH_UP = 4;\nconst SAMPLE_LIMIT = 4_096;\n\nexport interface TickLoopMetrics {\n  readonly tick: number;\n  readonly aggregateP95Ms: number;\n  readonly overloaded: boolean;\n}\n\nexport class AuthoritativeLoop {\n  private accumulatorMs = 0;\n  private previousMs = 0;\n  private serverTick = 0;\n  private overloadUntilMs = 0;\n  private timer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | undefined;\n  private readonly samples: number[] = [];\n  private readonly step: (tick: number, nowMs: number) => void;\n  private readonly sweep: (nowMs: number) => void;\n  private readonly clock: () => number;\n  private readonly warn: (message: string) => void;\n\n  constructor(\n    step: (tick: number, nowMs: number) => void,\n    clock: () => number = () => performance.now(),\n    warn: (message: string) => void = (message) => console.warn(message),\n    sweep: (nowMs: number) => void = () => {},\n  ) {\n    this.step = step;\n    this.clock = clock;\n    this.warn = warn;\n    this.sweep = sweep;\n  }\n\n  get metrics(): TickLoopMetrics {\n    const ordered = [...this.samples].sort((a, b) => a - b);\n    const p95Index = Math.max(0, Math.ceil(ordered.length * 0.95) - 1);\n    return {\n      tick: this.serverTick,\n      aggregateP95Ms: ordered[p95Index] ?? 0,\n      overloaded: this.clock() < this.overloadUntilMs,\n    };\n  }\n\n  get refuseNewRooms(): boolean {\n    return this.clock() < this.overloadUntilMs;\n  }\n\n  start(): void {\n    if (this.timer !== undefined) return;\n    this.previousMs = this.clock();\n    const wake = (): void => {\n      this.wake(this.clock());\n      this.timer = setTimeout(wake, 2);\n    };\n    this.timer = setTimeout(wake, 0);\n  }\n\n  stop(): void {\n    if (this.timer !== undefined) clearTimeout(this.timer);\n    this.timer = undefined;\n  }\n\n  wake(nowMs: number): number {\n    if (!Number.isFinite(nowMs) || nowMs < this.previousMs) {\n      throw new RangeError(\"loop clock must be finite and monotonic\");\n    }\n    this.accumulatorMs += Math.min(250, nowMs - this.previousMs);\n    this.previousMs = nowMs;\n    let stepped = 0;\n    const aggregateStart = this.clock();\n    while (this.accumulatorMs >= TICK_MS && stepped < MAX_CATCH_UP) {\n      this.serverTick += 1;\n      this.runPhase(\"step\", this.serverTick, () => this.step(this.serverTick, nowMs));\n      this.runPhase(\"sweep\", this.serverTick, () => this.sweep(nowMs));\n      this.accumulatorMs -= TICK_MS;\n      stepped += 1;\n    }\n    if (stepped === MAX_CATCH_UP && this.accumulatorMs >= TICK_MS) {\n      this.accumulatorMs = 0;\n      this.overloadUntilMs = nowMs + 5_000;\n      this.warn(\"tick overload: debt dropped; refusing new rooms for 5s\");\n    }\n    if (stepped > 0) {\n      this.samples.push(Math.max(0, this.clock() - aggregateStart));\n      if (this.samples.length > SAMPLE_LIMIT) this.samples.shift();\n    }\n    return stepped;\n  }\n\n  private runPhase(phase: \"step\" | \"sweep\", tick: number, action: () => void): void {\n    try {\n      action();\n    } catch (error) {\n      const detail = error instanceof Error ? error.stack ?? error.message : String(error);\n      this.warn(`authoritative loop ${phase} error at tick ${tick}; tick continued\\n${detail}`);\n    }\n  }\n}\n","numLines":102,"startLine":1,"totalLines":102}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"8f2ef0ac-67a7-4817-abab-4bfa1393601e","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

this.pendingSnapshot = bytes.slice();\n101\t      return;\n102\t    }\n103\t    this.ws.send(bytes, true, false);\n104\t  }\n105\t\n106\t  drain(): void {\n107\t    if (this.ended) return;\n108\t (\n141\t    origin === \"\" &&\n142\t    process.env.ALLOW_HEADLESS_BOTS === \"1\" &&\n143\t    request.getHeader(\"sec-websocket-protocol\") === \"gungame-bot\"\n144\t data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(RefusalCode.ProtocolError));\n163\t  data.peer?.disconnect(4002, `protocol state error: ${detail}`.slice(0, 120));\n164\t}\n165\t\n166\tfunction closeProtocol(\n167\t ReadonlySet<ConnectionData>;\n185\t  sweepTimeouts(nowMs: number): void;\n186\t  drainForRestart(): void;\n187\t}\n188\t\n189\texport function sweepConnectionTimeouts(\n190\t  connections: Iterable<ConnectionData>,\n191\t  nowMs: number,\n192\t  log: ConnectionErrorLog = defaultConnectionErrorLog,\n193\t): void {\n194\t  for (const data of connections) {\n195\t    if (data.quarantined || data.fsm.state === \"closing\") continue;\n196\t    try {\n197\t      if (!data.fsm.timedOut(nowMs)) continue;\n198\t      data.fsm.transition(\"closing\", nowMs);\n199\t      data.peer?.disconnect(4000, \"state timeout\");\n200\t    } catch (error) {\n201\t      quarantineConnection(data, nowMs, \"timeout sweep\", error, log);\n202\t    }\n203\t  }\n204\t}\n205\t\n206\texport function createTransport(\n207\t  manager: RoomManager,\n208\t  clock: () => number = () => performance.now(),\n209\t  log: ConnectionErrorLog = defaultConnectionErrorLog,\n210\t): TransportServer {\n211\t  const app = uWS.App();\n212\t  const origins = allowedOrigins();\n213\t  const connections = new Set<ConnectionData>();\n214\t\n215\t  app.ws<ConnectionData>(\"/gg/ws\", {\n216\t    compression: uWS.DISABLED,\n217\t    idleTimeout: 32,\n218\t    maxBackpressure: BACKPRESSURE_HARD + SNAPSHOT_SIZE_CEILING,\n219\t    maxPayloadLength: MAX_FRAME_BYTES,\n220\t    closeOnBackpressureLimit: false,\n221\t    sendPingsAutomatically: true,\n222\t    upgrade: (response, request, context) => {\n223\t      if (!validUpgradeOrigin(request, origins)) {\n224\t        response.writeStatus(\"403 Forbidden\").end(\"origin denied\");\n225\t        return;\n226\t      }\n227\t      const now = clock();\n228\t      response.upgrade<ConnectionData>(\n229\t        {\n230\t          fsm: new ConnectionFsm(now),\n231\t          limiter: new ConnectionRateLimit(now),\n232\t          peer: undefined,\n233\t          roomId: \"\",\n234\t          slotId: 0,\n235\t          quarantined: false,\n236\t        },\n237\t        request.getHeader(\"sec-websocket-key\"),\n238\t        request.getHeader(\"sec-websocket-protocol\"),\n239\t        request.getHeader(\"sec-websocket-extensions\"),\n240\t        context,\n241\t      );\n242\t    },\n243\t    open: (ws) => {\n244\t      const data = ws.getUserData();\n245\t      const now = clock();\n246\t      data.peer = new WsPeer(ws, (error, phase, atMs) => {\n247\t        quarantineConnection(data, atMs, phase, error, log);\n248\t      });\n249\t      try {\n250\t        data.fsm.transition(\"hello\", now);\n251\t      } catch (error) {\n252\t        quarantineConnection(data, now, \"open\", error, log);\n253\t        return;\n254\t      }\n255\t      connections.add(data);\n256\t    },\n257\t    message: (ws, raw, isBinary) => {\n258\t      const data = ws.getUserData();\n259\t      const now = clock();\n260\t }\n265\t      if (!data.limiter.accept(raw.byteLength, now)) {\n266\t        closeProtocol(data, RefusalCode.RateLimited, \"rate limit\", now, log);\n267\t        return;\n268\t      }\n269\t      try {\n270\t        const frame = decodeFrame(new Uint8Array(raw));\n271\t        data.fsm.touch(now);\n272\t        if (frame.type === FrameType.Hello) {\n273\t          if (data.fsm.state !== \"hello\") throw new Error(\"unexpected hello\");\n274\t          if (\n275\t            frame.protocolVersion !== PROTOCOL_VERSION ||\n276\t            frame.buildHash !== __BUILD_HASH__\n277\t          ) {\n278\t            data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(RefusalCode.VersionMismatch));\n279\t            data.fsm.transition(\"closing\", now);\n280\t            data.peer?.disconnect(4000, \"version mismatch\");\n281\t            return;\n282\t          }\n283\t          const joined = manager.join(frame, data.peer as WsPeer, now);\n284\t          if (\"refusal\" in joined) {\n285\t            data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(refusalFor(joined)));\n286\t            data.fsm.transition(\"closing\", now);\n287\t            data.peer?.disconnect(4003, joined.refusal);\n288\t            return;\n289\t          }\n290\t          data.roomId = joined.room.id;\n291\t          data.slotId = joined.slot.id;\n292\t          data.peer?.sendReliable(encodeFrame({\n293\t            type: FrameType.Welcome,\n294\t            playerId: joined.slot.id,\n295\t            roomId: joined.room.id,\n296\t            reconnectToken: joined.token,\n297\t            maxDatagramSize: SNAPSHOT_SIZE_CEILING,\n298\t            mode: joined.room.config.mode,\n299\t            variant: joined.room.config.variant,\n300\t            ladder: joined.room.config.ladder,\n301\t            mapId: joined.room.mapId,\n302\t          }));\n303\t          data.fsm.transition(\"baseline-install\", now);\n304\t          data.peer?.sendBaseline(joined.room.openBaseline(joined.slot.id, 0), now);\n305\t          return;\n306\t        }\n307\t        if (frame.type === FrameType.BaselineAck) {\n308\t          if (data.fsm.state !== \"baseline-install\" && data.fsm.state !== \"resync\") {\n309\t            throw new Error(\"unexpected baseline ack\");\n310\t          }\n311\t          const room = manager.rooms.get(data.roomId);\n312\t          if (room === undefined) throw new Error(\"room disappeared\");\n313\t          room.acknowledgeBaseline(data.slotId, frame.baselineEpoch, frame.snapshotTick);\n314\t          data.fsm.transition(\"active\", now);\n315\t          return;\n316\t        }\n317\t        if (frame.type === FrameType.Cmd) {\n318\t          if (\n319\t            data.fsm.state !== \"active\" &&\n320\t            data.fsm.state !== \"resync\" &&\n321\t            data.fsm.state !== \"baseline-install\"\n322\t          ) {\n323\t            throw new Error(\"unexpected cmd\");\n324\t          }\n325\t          manager.rooms.get(data.roomId)?.acceptCmd(data.slotId, frame, now);\n326\t          return;\n327\t        }\n328\t        if (frame.type === FrameType.Ping) {\n329\t          data.peer?.sendReliable(encodeFrame({\n330\t            type: FrameType.Pong,\n331\t            nonce: frame.nonce,\n332\t            clientTime: frame.clientTime,\n333\t            serverTick: 0,\n334\t          }));\n335\t          return;\n336\t        }\n337\t        throw new Error(\"unexpected client frame\");\n338\t      } catch (error) {\n339\t        closeProtocol(\n340\t          data,\n341\t          RefusalCode.ProtocolError,\n342\t          error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"malformed frame\",\n343\t          now,\n344\t          log,\n345\t        );\n346\t      }\n347\t    },\n348\t    drain: (ws) => {\n349\t      ws.getUserData().peer?.drain();\n350\t    },\n351\t    close: (ws) => {\n352\t      const data = ws.getUserData();\n353\t      connections.delete(data);\n354\t      const now = clock();\n355\t      manager.rooms.get(data.roomId)?.disconnect(data.slotId, now, data.peer);\n356\t    },\n357\t  });\n358\t\n359\t  return {\n360\t    app,\n361\t    connections,\n362\t    sweepTimeouts: (nowMs) => sweepConnectionTimeouts(connections, nowMs, log),\n363\t    drainForRestart: () => {\n364\t      for (const data of connections) {\n365\t        data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(RefusalCode.ServerRestarting));\n366\t        data.peer?.disconnect(1012, \"server restarting\");\n367\t      }\n368\t    },\n369\t  };\n370\t}\n371\t"}]},"uuid":"baa6d887-1ba9-4307-b4d0-0ff5608d146e","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:16:36.010Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/server/src/transport.ts","content":"import from \"./rooms.js\";\n\nconst BACKPRESSURE_HIGH = 32 * 1_024;\nconst BACKPRESSURE_LOW = 8 * 1_024;\nconst BACKPRESSURE_HARD = 256 * 1_024;\n\nexport interface ConnectionData {\n  readonly fsm: ConnectionFsm;\n  readonly limiter: ConnectionRateLimit;\n  peer: WsPeer | undefined;\n  roomId: string;\n  slotId: number;\n  quarantined: boolean;\n}\n\nexport type ConnectionErrorLog = (message: string, error: unknown) => void;\n\nconst defaultConnectionErrorLog: ConnectionErrorLog = (message, error) => {\n  console.error(message, error);\n};\n\nfunction refusal(code: RefusalFrame[\"code\"]): Uint8Array {\n  return encodeFrame({ type: FrameType.Refusal, code });\n}\n\nfunction refusalFor(result: Exclude<JoinResult, { readonly room: unknown }>): RefusalFrame[\"code\"] {\n  switch (result.refusal) {\n    case \"room-full\":\n      return RefusalCode.RoomFull;\n    case \"room-create-refused\":\n      return RefusalCode.RoomCreateRefused;\n    case \"room-not-found\":\n      return RefusalCode.RoomNotFound;\n    case \"invalid-name\":\n      return RefusalCode.InvalidName;\n  }\n}\n\nexport class WsPeer implements PlayerPeer {\n  private pendingSnapshot: Uint8Array | undefined;\n  private aboveHigh = false;\n  private ended = false;\n  private readonly ws: WebSocket<ConnectionData>;\n  private readonly quarantine: (error: unknown, phase: string, nowMs: number) => void;\n\n  constructor(\n    ws: WebSocket<ConnectionData>,\n    quarantine: (error: unknown, phase: string, nowMs: number) => void = () => {},\n  ) {\n    this.ws = ws;\n    this.quarantine = quarantine;\n  }\n\n  sendReliable(bytes: Uint8Array): void {\n    if (this.ended) return;\n    if (this.ws.getBufferedAmount() >= BACKPRESSURE_HARD) {\n      this.closeForBackpressure();\n      return;\n    }\n    this.ws.send(bytes, true, false);\n  }\n\n  sendBaseline(bytes: Uint8Array, nowMs: number): void {\n    const data = this.ws.getUserData();\n    if (data.fsm.state === \"active\") {\n      try {\n        data.fsm.transition(\"resync\", nowMs);\n      } catch (error) {\n        this.quarantine(error, \"baseline transition\", nowMs);\n        return;\n      }\n    }\n    this.sendReliable(bytes);\n  }\n\n  sendSnapshot(bytes: Uint8Array): void {\n    if (this.ended) return;\n    const buffered = this.ws.getBufferedAmount();\n    if (buffered >= BACKPRESSURE_HARD) {\n      this.closeForBackpressure();\n      return;\n    }\n    if (this.aboveHigh || buffered >= BACKPRESSURE_HIGH) {\n      this.aboveHigh = true;\n      this.pendingSnapshot = bytes.slice();\n      return;\n    }\n    this.ws.send(bytes, true, false);\n  }\n\n  drain(): void {\n    if (this.ended) return;\n    if (this.ws.getBufferedAmount() > BACKPRESSURE_LOW) return;\n    this.aboveHigh = false;\n    const pending = this.pendingSnapshot;\n    this.pendingSnapshot = undefined;\n    if (pending !== undefined) this.ws.send(pending, true, false);\n  }\n\n  disconnect(code: number, reason: string): void {\n    if (this.ended) return;\n    this.ended = true;\n    this.ws.end(code, reason.slice(0, 120));\n  }\n\n  private closeForBackpressure(): void {\n    if (this.ended) return;\n    this.ws.send(refusal(RefusalCode.Backpressure), true, false);\n    this.ended = true;\n    this.ws.end(4008, \"backpressure\");\n  }\n}\n\nfunction allowedOrigins(): ReadonlySet<string> {\n  const configured = process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS;\n  const values = configured === undefined\n    ? [\"http://localhost:5173\", \"http://127.0.0.1:5173\"]\n    : configured.split(\",\").map((value) => value.trim()).filter(Boolean);\n  return new Set(values);\n}\n\nfunction validUpgradeOrigin(request: HttpRequest, origins: ReadonlySet<string>): boolean {\n  const origin = request.getHeader(\"origin\");\n  if (origins.has(origin)) return true;\n  return (\n    origin === \"\" &&\n    process.env.ALLOW_HEADLESS_BOTS === \"1\" &&\n    request.getHeader(\"sec-websocket-protocol\") === \"gungame-bot\"\n  );\n}\n\nfunction quarantineConnection(\n  data: ConnectionData,\n  nowMs: number,\n  phase: string,\n  error: unknown,\n  log: ConnectionErrorLog,\n): void {\n  if (data.quarantined) return;\n  data.quarantined = true;\n  const detail = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n  log(\n    `connection quarantined · phase ${phase} · at ${nowMs.toFixed(3)} ms · ` +\n    `room ${data.roomId || \"-\"} · slot ${data.slotId || \"-\"}`,\n    error,\n  );\n  data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(RefusalCode.ProtocolError));\n  data.peer?.disconnect(4002, `protocol state error: ${detail}`.slice(0, 120));\n}\n\nfunction closeProtocol(\n  data: ConnectionData,\n  code: RefusalFrame[\"code\"],\n  reason: string,\n  nowMs: number,\n  log: ConnectionErrorLog,\n): void {\n  try {\n    data.fsm.malformed(nowMs);\n    data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(code));\n    data.peer?.disconnect(4002, reason);\n  } catch (error) {\n    quarantineConnection(data, nowMs, \"protocol close\", error, log);\n  }\n}\n\nexport interface TransportServer {\n  readonly app: uWS.TemplatedApp;\n  readonly connections: ReadonlySet<ConnectionData>;\n  sweepTimeouts(nowMs: number): void;\n  drainForRestart(): void;\n}\n\nexport function sweepConnectionTimeouts(\n  connections: Iterable<ConnectionData>,\n  nowMs: number,\n  log: ConnectionErrorLog = defaultConnectionErrorLog,\n): void {\n  for (const data of connections) {\n    if (data.quarantined || data.fsm.state === \"closing\") continue;\n    try {\n      if (!data.fsm.timedOut(nowMs)) continue;\n      data.fsm.transition(\"closing\", nowMs);\n      data.peer?.disconnect(4000, \"state timeout\");\n    } catch (error) {\n      quarantineConnection(data, nowMs, \"timeout sweep\", error, log);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport function createTransport(\n  manager: RoomManager,\n  clock: () => number = () => performance.now(),\n  log: ConnectionErrorLog = defaultConnectionErrorLog,\n): TransportServer {\n  const app = uWS.App();\n  const origins = allowedOrigins();\n  const connections = new Set<ConnectionData>();\n\n  app.ws<ConnectionData>(\"/gg/ws\", {\n    compression: uWS.DISABLED,\n    idleTimeout: 32,\n    maxBackpressure: BACKPRESSURE_HARD + SNAPSHOT_SIZE_CEILING,\n    maxPayloadLength: MAX_FRAME_BYTES,\n    closeOnBackpressureLimit: false,\n    sendPingsAutomatically: true,\n    upgrade: (response, request, context) => {\n      if (!validUpgradeOrigin(request, origins)) {\n        response.writeStatus(\"403 Forbidden\").end(\"origin denied\");\n        return;\n      }\n      const now = clock();\n      response.upgrade<ConnectionData>(\n        {\n          fsm: new ConnectionFsm(now),\n          limiter: new ConnectionRateLimit(now),\n          peer: undefined,\n          roomId: \"\",\n          slotId: 0,\n          quarantined: false,\n        },\n        request.getHeader(\"sec-websocket-key\"),\n        request.getHeader(\"sec-websocket-protocol\"),\n        request.getHeader(\"sec-websocket-extensions\"),\n        context,\n      );\n    },\n    open: (ws) => {\n      const data = ws.getUserData();\n      const now = clock();\n      data.peer = new WsPeer(ws, (error, phase, atMs) => {\n        quarantineConnection(data, atMs, phase, error, log);\n      });\n      try {\n        data.fsm.transition(\"hello\", now);\n      } catch (error) {\n        quarantineConnection(data, now, \"open\", error, log);\n        return;\n      }\n      connections.add(data);\n    },\n    message: (ws, raw, isBinary) => {\n      const data = ws.getUserData();\n      const now = clock();\n      if (data.quarantined) return;\n      if (!isBinary) {\n        closeProtocol(data, RefusalCode.ProtocolError, \"binary frames required\", now, log);\n        return;\n      }\n      if (!data.limiter.accept(raw.byteLength, now)) {\n        closeProtocol(data, RefusalCode.RateLimited, \"rate limit\", now, log);\n        return;\n      }\n      try {\n        const frame = decodeFrame(new Uint8Array(raw));\n        data.fsm.touch(now);\n        if (frame.type === FrameType.Hello) {\n          if (data.fsm.state !== \"hello\") throw new Error(\"unexpected hello\");\n          if (\n            frame.protocolVersion !== PROTOCOL_VERSION ||\n            frame.buildHash !== __BUILD_HASH__\n          ) {\n            data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(RefusalCode.VersionMismatch));\n            data.fsm.transition(\"closing\", now);\n            data.peer?.disconnect(4000, \"version mismatch\");\n            return;\n          }\n          const joined = manager.join(frame, data.peer as WsPeer, now);\n          if (\"refusal\" in joined) {\n            data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(refusalFor(joined)));\n            data.fsm.transition(\"closing\", now);\n            data.peer?.disconnect(4003, joined.refusal);\n            return;\n          }\n          data.roomId = joined.room.id;\n          data.slotId = joined.slot.id;\n          data.peer?.sendReliable(encodeFrame({\n            type: FrameType.Welcome,\n            playerId: joined.slot.id,\n            roomId: joined.room.id,\n            reconnectToken: joined.token,\n            maxDatagramSize: SNAPSHOT_SIZE_CEILING,\n            mode: joined.room.config.mode,\n            variant: joined.room.config.variant,\n            ladder: joined.room.config.ladder,\n            mapId: joined.room.mapId,\n          }));\n          data.fsm.transition(\"baseline-install\", now);\n          data.peer?.sendBaseline(joined.room.openBaseline(joined.slot.id, 0), now);\n          return;\n        }\n        if (frame.type === FrameType.BaselineAck) {\n          if (data.fsm.state !== \"baseline-install\" && data.fsm.state !== \"resync\") {\n            throw new Error(\"unexpected baseline ack\");\n          }\n          const room = manager.rooms.get(data.roomId);\n          if (room === undefined) throw new Error(\"room disappeared\");\n          room.acknowledgeBaseline(data.slotId, frame.baselineEpoch, frame.snapshotTick);\n          data.fsm.transition(\"active\", now);\n          return;\n        }\n        if (frame.type === FrameType.Cmd) {\n          if (\n            data.fsm.state !== \"active\" &&\n            data.fsm.state !== \"resync\" &&\n            data.fsm.state !== \"baseline-install\"\n          ) {\n            throw new Error(\"unexpected cmd\");\n          }\n          manager.rooms.get(data.roomId)?.acceptCmd(data.slotId, frame, now);\n          return;\n        }\n        if (frame.type === FrameType.Ping) {\n          data.peer?.sendReliable(encodeFrame({\n            type: FrameType.Pong,\n            nonce: frame.nonce,\n            clientTime: frame.clientTime,\n            serverTick: 0,\n          }));\n          return;\n        }\n        throw new Error(\"unexpected client frame\");\n      } catch (error) {\n        closeProtocol(\n          data,\n          RefusalCode.ProtocolError,\n          error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"malformed frame\",\n          now,\n          log,\n        );\n      }\n    },\n    drain: (ws) => {\n      ws.getUserData().peer?.drain();\n    },\n    close: (ws) => {\n      const data = ws.getUserData();\n      connections.delete(data);\n      const now = clock();\n      manager.rooms.get(data.roomId)?.disconnect(data.slotId, now, data.peer);\n    },\n  });\n\n  return {\n    app,\n    connections,\n    sweepTimeouts: (nowMs) => sweepConnectionTimeouts(connections, nowMs, log),\n    drainForRestart: () => {\n      for (const data of connections) {\n        data.peer?.sendReliable(refusal(RefusalCode.ServerRestarting));\n        data.peer?.disconnect(1012, \"server restarting\");\n      }\n    },\n  };\n}\n","numLines":371,"startLine":1,"totalLines":371}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"7ff6a9d8-0d3f-41cc-aed5-a53354e65165","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}
