StaticAsset>();\n  if (!existsSync(root)) return assets;\n  const visit = (directory: string): void => {\n    for (const entry of readdirSync(directory, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n      const absolute = resolve(directory, entry.name);\n      if (entry.isDirectory()) {\n        visit(absolute);\n        continue;\n      }\n      if (!entry.isFile()) continue;\n      const key = relative(root, absolute).split(sep).join(\"/\");\n      assets.set(key, {\n        body: readFileSync(absolute),\n        contentType: CONTENT_TYPES[extname(entry.name).toLowerCase()] ?? \"application/octet-stream\",\n      });\n    }\n  };\n  visit(root);\n  return assets;\n}\n\nconst spireMap = loadGameplayMap(readFileSync(new URL(\"../../maps/spire.blob\", import.meta.url)));\nconst foundryMap = loadGameplayMap(readFileSync(new URL(\"../../maps/foundry.blob\", import.meta.url)));\nconst dunaMap = loadGameplayMap(readFileSync(new URL(\"../../maps/duna.blob\", import.meta.url)));\nconst cascadeMap = loadGameplayMap(readFileSync(new URL(\"../../maps/cascade.blob\", import.meta.url)));\nconst binding = (mapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId], map: typeof spireMap) => ({\n  mapId,\n  world: new CollisionWorld(map.collision, map.killVolumes),\n  spawns: map.spawns,\n  secrets: map.secrets,\n});\nconst maps = {\n  scoutzknivez: binding(MapId.Spire, spireMap),\n  gunGame: [\n    binding(MapId.Foundry, foundryMap),\n    binding(MapId.Duna, dunaMap),\n    binding(MapId.Cascade, cascadeMap),\n  ],\n} as const;\nconst staticAssets = loadStaticAssets(staticRoot);\nconst spaIndex = staticAssets.get(\"index.html\");\nlet loop: AuthoritativeLoop;\nlet transport: ReturnType<typeof createTransport>;\nconst clock = (): number => performance.now();\nconst rooms = new RoomManager(\n  maps,\n  () => loop.refuseNewRooms,\n);\nloop = new AuthoritativeLoop((tick, nowMs) => {\n  rooms.tick(tick, nowMs);\n}, clock, undefined, (nowMs) => transport.sweepTimeouts(nowMs));\ntransport = createTransport(rooms, clock);\nconst { app, connections } = transport;\n\nlet draining = false;\nconst drain = (): void => {\n  if response.writeStatus(\"400 Bad Request\").end(\"invalid URL\");\n    return;\n  }\n  const asset = staticAssets.get(key === \"\" ? \"index.html\" : key) ?? spaIndex;\n  if (asset === undefined) {\n    response.writeStatus(\"503 Service Unavailable\").end(\"client build unavailable\");\n    return;\n  }\n  response\n    .writeHeader(\"Content-Type\", asset.contentType)\n {\n59\t    return this.winner !== 0;\n60\t  }\n61\t\n62\t  get snapshot(): ModeSnapshot {\n63\t    return {\n64\t      mode: this.mode,\n65\t      ladder: this.ladder,\n66\t      winnerId: this.winner,\n67\t      restartTick: this.restartAt,\n68\t      teamScores: [...this.scores],\n69\t    };\n70\t  }\n71\t\n72\t  addPlayer(id: number): ModePlayer {\n73\t    const tier = this.mode === CombatMode.GunGame ? this.lateJoinTier() : 1;\n74\t    const team = this.mode === CombatMode.Scoutzknivez ? this.smallerTeam() : 0;\n75\t    const player: ModePlayer = { id, tier, team, kills: 0, deaths: 0 };\n76\t    this.players.set(id, player);\n77\t    return player;\n78\t  }\n79\t\n80\t  removePlayer(id: number): readonly ModePlayer[] {\n81\t    this.players.delete(id);\n82\t    return ModeKillInput, tick: number): ModeKillResult {\n93\t    const attacker = this.players.get(input.attackerId);\n94\t    const victim = this.players.get(input.victimId);\n95\t    if (victim !== undefined) victim.deaths += 1;\n96\t    if (input.suicide || attacker === undefined || victim === undefined || this.frozen) {\n97\t      return {\n98\t        attackerAdvanced: false,\n99\t        victimDemoted: false,\n100\t        winnerId: this.winner,\n101\t        suicide: input.suicide,\n102\t        counted: false,\n103\t      };\n104\t    }\n105\t    attacker.kills += 1;\n106\t    if (this.mode === CombatMode.Scoutzknivez) {\n107\t      if (attacker.team === 1 || attacker.team === 2) {\n108\t        if (attacker.team === 1) this.scores[0] += 1;\n109\t        else this.scores[1] += this.restartAt = tick + SCOREBOARD_FREEZE_TICKS;\n114\t        }\n115\t      }\n116\t      return {\n117\t        attackerAdvanced: false,\n118\t        victimDemoted: false,\n119\t        winnerId: {\n130\t      attacker.tier = Math.min(ladderLength, attacker.tier + 1);\n131\t    }\n132\t    const victimDemoted = input.melee && victim.tier > 1;\n133\t    if (victimDemoted) victim.tier -= 1;\n134\t    return {\n135\t      attackerAdvanced: !finalTierKill,\n136\t      victimDemoted,\n137\t      winnerId: this.winner,\n138\t      suicide: false,\n139\t      counted: true,\n140\t    };\n141\t  }\n142\t\n143\t  shouldRestart(tick: number): boolean {\n144\t    return this.restartAt !== 0 && tick >= this.restartAt;\n145\t  }\n146\t\n147\t  restart(): void {\n148\t    this.scores = [0, 0];\n149\t    this.winner = 0;\n150\t    this.restartAt = 0;\n151\t    for (const player of this.players.values()) {\n152\t      player.tier = 1;\n153\t      player.kills = 0;\n154\t      player.deaths = 0;\n155\t    }\n156\t    this.rebalanceTeams();\n157\t  }\n158\t\n159\t  rebalanceTeams(): readonly ModePlayer[] {\n160\t    if (this.mode !== CombatMode.Scoutzknivez) return [];\n161\t    const moved: ModePlayer[] = [];\n162\t    for (;;) {\n163\t      const one = [...this.players.values()].filter((player) => player.team === 1);\n164\t      const two = [...this.players.values()].filter((player) => player.team === 2);\n165\t      if (Math.abs(one.length - two.length) <= 1) break;\n166\t      const source = one.length > two.length ? one : two;\n167\t undefined) break;\n170\t      candidate.team = destination;\n171\t      moved.push(candidate);\n172\t    }\n173\t    return moved;\n174\t  }\n175\t\n176\t  private smallerTeam(): 1 | 2 {\n177\t    let one = 0;\n178\t    let two = 0;\n179\t    for (const player of this.players.values()) {\n180\t      if (player.team === 1) one += 1;\n181\t      if (player.team === 2) two += 1;\n182\t    }\n183\t    return one <= two ? 1 : 2;\n184\t {\n  LadderId,\n  SCOREBOARD_FREEZE_TICKS,\n  SCOUTZ_SCORE_LIMIT,\n  ladderWeapons,\n  type LadderIdValue,\n} from \"@gungame/shared\";\n\nexport const CombatMode = { GunGame: 0, Scoutzknivez: 1 } as const;\nexport type CombatModeValue = typeof CombatMode[keyof typeof CombatMode];\n\nexport interface ModePlayer {\n  readonly id: number;\n  tier: number;\n  team: 0 | 1 | 2;\n  kills: number;\n  deaths: number;\n}\n\nexport interface ModeKillInput {\n  readonly attackerId: number;\n  readonly victimId: number;\n  readonly melee: boolean;\n  readonly suicide: boolean;\n  /** True is informative only: posthumous projectile kills deliberately score. */\n  readonly posthumous?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface ModeKillResult {\n  readonly attackerAdvanced: boolean;\n  readonly victimDemoted: boolean;\n  readonly winnerId: number;\n  readonly suicide: boolean;\n  readonly counted: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface ModeSnapshot {\n  readonly mode: CombatModeValue;\n  readonly ladder: LadderIdValue;\n  readonly winnerId: number;\n  readonly restartTick: number;\n  readonly teamScores: readonly [number, number];\n}\n\nexport class ModeRules {\n  readonly players = new Map<number, ModePlayer>();\n  readonly mode: CombatModeValue;\n  readonly ladder: LadderIdValue;\n  private scores: [number, number] = [0, 0];\n  private winner = 0;\n  private restartAt = 0;\n\n  constructor(mode: CombatModeValue, ladder: LadderIdValue = LadderId.Classic) {\n    this.mode = mode;\n    this.ladder = ladder;\n  }\n\n  get frozen(): boolean {\n    return this.winner !== 0;\n  }\n\n  get snapshot(): ModeSnapshot {\n    return {\n      mode: this.mode,\n      ladder: this.ladder,\n      winnerId: this.winner,\n      restartTick: this.restartAt,\n      teamScores: [...this.scores],\n    };\n  }\n\n  addPlayer(id: number): ModePlayer {\n    const tier = this.mode === CombatMode.GunGame ? this.lateJoinTier() : 1;\n    const team = this.mode === CombatMode.Scoutzknivez ? this.smallerTeam() : 0;\n    const player: ModePlayer = { id, tier, team, kills: 0, deaths: 0 };\n    this.players.set(id, player);\n    return player;\n  }\n\n  removePlayer(id: number): readonly ModePlayer[] {\n    this.players.delete(id);\n    return this.rebalanceTeams();\n  }\n\n  /** trailing parity minus one, with tier numbers one-based and clamped to 1. */\n  lateJoinTier(): number {\n    if (this.players.size === 0) return 1;\n    const trailing = Math.min(...[...this.players.values()].map((player) => player.tier));\n    return Math.max(1, trailing - 1);\n  }\n\n  recordKill(input: ModeKillInput, tick: number): ModeKillResult {\n    const attacker = this.players.get(input.attackerId);\n    const victim = this.players.get(input.victimId);\n    if (victim !== undefined) victim.deaths += 1;\n    if (input.suicide || attacker === undefined || victim === undefined || this.frozen) {\n      return {\n        attackerAdvanced: false,\n        victimDemoted: false,\n        winnerId: this.winner,\n        suicide: input.suicide,\n        counted: false,\n      };\n    }\n    attacker.kills += 1;\n    if (this.mode === CombatMode.Scoutzknivez) {\n      if (attacker.team === 1 || attacker.team === 2) {\n        if (attacker.team === 1) this.scores[0] += 1;\n        else this.scores[1] += 1;\n        const score = attacker.team === 1 ? this.scores[0] : this.scores[1];\n        if (score >= SCOUTZ_SCORE_LIMIT) {\n          this.winner = attacker.id;\n          this.restartAt = tick + SCOREBOARD_FREEZE_TICKS;\n        }\n      }\n      return {\n        attackerAdvanced: false,\n        victimDemoted: false,\n        winnerId: this.winner,\n        suicide: false,\n        counted: true,\n      };\n    }\n    const ladderLength = ladderWeapons(this.ladder).length;\n    const finalTierKill = attacker.tier >= ladderLength && input.melee;\n    if (finalTierKill) {\n      this.winner = attacker.id;\n      this.restartAt = tick + SCOREBOARD_FREEZE_TICKS;\n    } else {\n      attacker.tier = Math.min(ladderLength, attacker.tier + 1);\n    }\n    const victimDemoted = input.melee && victim.tier > 1;\n    if (victimDemoted) victim.tier -= 1;\n    return {\n      attackerAdvanced: !finalTierKill,\n      victimDemoted,\n      winnerId: this.winner,\n      suicide: false,\n      counted: true,\n    };\n  }\n\n  shouldRestart(tick: number): boolean {\n    return this.restartAt !== 0 && tick >= this.restartAt;\n  }\n\n  restart(): void {\n    this.scores = [0, 0];\n    this.winner = 0;\n    this.restartAt = 0;\n    for (const player of this.players.values()) {\n      player.tier = 1;\n      player.kills = 0;\n      player.deaths = 0;\n    }\n    this.rebalanceTeams();\n  }\n\n  rebalanceTeams(): readonly ModePlayer[] {\n    if (this.mode !== CombatMode.Scoutzknivez) return [];\n    const moved: ModePlayer[] = [];\n    for (;;) {\n      const one = [...this.players.values()].filter((player) => player.team === 1);\n      const two = [...this.players.values()].filter((player) => player.team === 2);\n      if (Math.abs(one.length - two.length) <= 1) break;\n      const source = one.length > two.length ? one : two;\n      const destination = one.length > two.length ? 2 : 1;\n      const candidate = source.sort((left, right) => left.kills - right.kills || right.id - left.id)[0];\n      if (candidate === undefined) break;\n      candidate.team = destination;\n      moved.push(candidate);\n    }\n    return moved;\n  }\n\n  private smallerTeam(): 1 | 2 {\n    let one = 0;\n    let two = 0;\n    for (const player of this.players.values()) {\n      if (player.team === 1) one += 1;\n      if (player.team === 2) two += 1;\n    }\n    return one <= two ? 1 : 2;\n  }\n}\n","numLines":186,"startLine":1,"totalLines":186}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"8e995aa1-d485-4105-b262-e58746dc6cc9","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

dedupeLowWaterMark(): number {\n    return this.seenLowWaterMark;\n  }\n\n  add(event: SnapshotEvent): void {\n    if (!this.events.has(event.id)) this.events.set(event.id, event);\n  }\n\n {"parentUuid":"afa46384-ab89-4ab5-9279-fbbaf4dc5c7e","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01D8nQgaubDnMqxicaVnZsTL","type":"tool_result","content":"1\timport { CMD_WINDOW_SIZE } from \"./constants.js\";\n2\timport { ProtocolError } from \"./binary.js\";\n3\timport type { CmdFrame } from \"./types.js\";\n4\t\n5\texport interface ConsumedCmd {\n6\t  readonly cmd: CmdFrame;\n7\t  readonly epochReference: \"current\" | \"valid-stale\";\n8\t}\n9\t\n10\texport class CmdAcceptanceWindow {\n11\t  private readonly accepted = new Map<number, CmdFrame>();\n12\t  private processed = 0;\n13\t  private lastConsumedSnapshotTick = 0;\n14\t\n15\t  get lastProcessedCmdSeq(): number {\n16\t    return this.processed;\n17\t  }\n18\t\n19\t  get size(): number {\n20\t    return this.accepted.size;\n21\t  }\n22\t\n23\t  accept(cmd: CmdFrame): boolean {\n24\t    if (cmd.seq <= this.processed || this.accepted.has(cmd.seq)) return false;\n25\t    this.accepted.set(cmd.seq, cmd);\n26\t    if (this.accepted.size > CMD_WINDOW_SIZE) {\n27\t      const oldest = this.sortedSeqs()[0];\n28\t      if (oldest !== undefined) {\n29\t        this.accepted.delete(oldest);\n30\t        this.processed = Math.max(this.processed, oldest);\n31\t      }\n32\t    }\n33\t    return true;\n34\t  }\n35\t\n36\t  consume(\n37\t    classifyEpoch: (epoch: number) => \"current\" | \"valid-stale\",\n38\t  ): ConsumedCmd | undefined {\n39\t    // A burst delivered after transport recovery must not turn into permanent\n40\t    // input latency. Keep only the two-tick jitter target and advance the ack\n41\t    // across every deliberately shed command.\n42\t    while (this.accepted.size > 2) {\n43\t      const stale = this.sortedSeqs()[0];\n44\t      if (stale === undefined) break;\n45\t      this.accepted.delete(stale);\n46\t      this.processed = Math.max(this.processed, stale);\n47\t    }\n48\t    const seq = this.sortedSeqs()[0];\n49\t    if (seq === undefined) return undefined;\n50\t    const cmd = this.accepted.get(seq);\n51\t    if (cmd === undefined) return undefined;\n52\t    this.accepted.delete(seq);\n53\t    this.processed = Math.max(this.processed, seq);\n54\t    const epochReference = classifyEpoch(cmd.baselineEpoch);\n55\t    if (epochReference === \"current\") {\n56\t      if (cmd.lastSnapshotTick < this.lastConsumedSnapshotTick) {\n57\t        throw new ProtocolError(\"lastSnapshotTick is non-monotonic\");\n58\t      }\n59\t      this.lastConsumedSnapshotTick = cmd.lastSnapshotTick;\n60\t    }\n61\t    return { cmd, epochReference };\n62\t  }\n63\t\n64\t  private sortedSeqs(): number[] {\n65\t    return [...this.accepted.keys()].sort((a, b) => a - b);\n66\t  }\n67\t}\n68\t"}]},"uuid":"ccae3396-c3ae-4cdf-b07f-9b7d4644dc83","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:17:43.769Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/packages/protocol/src/cmd-window.ts","content":"import { CMD_WINDOW_SIZE } from \"./constants.js\";\nimport { ProtocolError } from \"./binary.js\";\nimport type { CmdFrame } from \"./types.js\";\n\nexport interface ConsumedCmd {\n  readonly cmd: CmdFrame;\n  readonly epochReference: \"current\" | \"valid-stale\";\n}\n\nexport class CmdAcceptanceWindow {\n  private readonly accepted = new Map<number, CmdFrame>();\n  private processed = 0;\n  private lastConsumedSnapshotTick = 0;\n\n  get lastProcessedCmdSeq(): number {\n    return this.processed;\n  }\n\n  get size(): number {\n    return this.accepted.size;\n  }\n\n  accept(cmd: CmdFrame): boolean {\n    if (cmd.seq <= this.processed || this.accepted.has(cmd.seq)) return false;\n    this.accepted.set(cmd.seq, cmd);\n    if (this.accepted.size > CMD_WINDOW_SIZE) {\n      const oldest = this.sortedSeqs()[0];\n      if (oldest !== undefined) {\n        this.accepted.delete(oldest);\n        this.processed = Math.max(this.processed, oldest);\n      }\n    }\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  consume(\n    classifyEpoch: (epoch: number) => \"current\" | \"valid-stale\",\n  ): ConsumedCmd | undefined {\n    // A burst delivered after transport recovery must not turn into permanent\n    // input latency. Keep only the two-tick jitter target and advance the ack\n    // across every deliberately shed command.\n    while (this.accepted.size > 2) {\n      const stale = this.sortedSeqs()[0];\n      if (stale === undefined) break;\n      this.accepted.delete(stale);\n      this.processed = Math.max(this.processed, stale);\n    }\n    const seq = this.sortedSeqs()[0];\n    if (seq === undefined) return undefined;\n    const cmd = this.accepted.get(seq);\n    if (cmd === undefined) return undefined;\n    this.accepted.delete(seq);\n    this.processed = Math.max(this.processed, seq);\n    const epochReference = classifyEpoch(cmd.baselineEpoch);\n    if (epochReference === \"current\") {\n      if (cmd.lastSnapshotTick < this.lastConsumedSnapshotTick) {\n        throw new ProtocolError(\"lastSnapshotTick is non-monotonic\");\n      }\n      this.lastConsumedSnapshotTick = cmd.lastSnapshotTick;\n    }\n    return { cmd, epochReference };\n  }\n\n  private sortedSeqs(): number[] {\n    return [...this.accepted.keys()].sort((a, b) => a - b);\n  }\n}\n","numLines":68,"startLine":1,"totalLines":68}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"afa46384-ab89-4ab5-9279-fbbaf4dc5c7e","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{ ProtocolError } from \"./binary.js\";\n\nexport type ConnectionState =\n  | \"connecting\"\n  | \"hello\"\n  | \"baseline-install\"\n  | \"active\"\n  | \"resync\"\n  | \"closing\";\n\nexport const STATE_TIMEOUT_MS: Readonly<Record<ConnectionState, number>> = Object.freeze({\n  connecting: 5_000,\n  hello: 5_000,\n  \"baseline-install\": 5_000,\n  active: 30_000,\n  resync: 5_000,\n  closing: 1_000,\n});\n\nconst LEGAL: Readonly<Record<ConnectionState, readonly ConnectionState[]>> = Object.freeze({\n  connecting: [\"hello\", \"closing\"],\n  hello: [\"baseline-install\", \"closing\"],\n  \"baseline-install\": [\"active\", \"resync\", \"closing\"],\n  active: [\"resync\", \"closing\"],\n  resync: [\"active\", \"resync\", \"closing\"],\n  closing: [],\n});\n\nexport class ConnectionFsm {\n  private current: ConnectionState = \"connecting\";\n  private enteredAt: number;\n\n  constructor(nowMs = 0) {\n    if (!Number.isFinite(nowMs)) throw new ProtocolError(\"FSM time must be finite\");\n    this.enteredAt = nowMs;\n  }\n\n  get state(): ConnectionState {\n    return this.current;\n  }\n\n  transition(next: ConnectionState, nowMs: number): void {\n    if (!Number.isFinite(nowMs) || nowMs < this.enteredAt) {\n      throw new ProtocolError(\"FSM time must be finite and monotonic\");\n    }\n    if (!LEGAL[this.current].includes(next)) {\n      throw new ProtocolError(`illegal transition ${this.current} -> ${next}`);\n    }\n    this.current = next;\n    this.enteredAt = nowMs;\n  }\n\n  malformed(nowMs: number): void {\n    if (this.current !== \"closing\") this.transition(\"closing\", nowMs);\n  }\n\n  touch(nowMs: number): void {\n    if (!Number.isFinite(nowMs) || nowMs < this.enteredAt) {\n      throw new ProtocolError(\"FSM time must be finite and monotonic\");\n    }\n    this.enteredAt = nowMs;\n  }\n\n  timedOut(nowMs: number): boolean {\n    if (!Number.isFinite(nowMs) || nowMs < this.enteredAt) {\n      throw new ProtocolError(\"FSM time must be finite and monotonic\");\n    }\n    return nowMs - this.enteredAt > STATE_TIMEOUT_MS[this.current];\n  }\n}\n","numLines":71,"startLine":1,"totalLines":71}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"b78a9356-dad0-4acf-b4d2-a3f2cd176191","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{"parentUuid":"bbcba29e-c123-4465-bab7-d8c79152dc97","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Cpo1Rw1icVfwUbD8jTXSzy","type":"tool_result","content":"    this.live.set(projectile.id, projectile);\n    return projectile;\n  }\n\n  delete(id: number): void {\n    this.live.delete(id);\n    for (const key of this.nearMissSeen) if (key.startsWith(`${id}:`)) this.nearMissSeen.delete(key);\n  }\n\n  drainNearMisses(): readonly {\n    projectile: ProjectileState;\n    targetId: number;\n    closingSpeed: number;\n  }[] {\n    return this.pendingNearMisses.splice(0);\n  }\n\n  tick(tick: number, world: ProjectileWorld | undefined, targets: readonly ProjectileTarget[]): readonly ProjectileDetonation[] {\n    const detonations = this.pendingDetonations.splice(0);\n    for (const projectile of this.projectiles) {\n      const weapon = WEAPONS[projectile.weaponId];\n      if (tick - projectile.spawnTick >= weapon.projectileLifetimeTicks) {\n        this.live.delete(projectile.id);\n        detonations.push({ projectile, point: projectile.position, reason: \"lifetime\" });\n        continue;\n      }\n      const velocity = {\n        ...projectile.velocity,\n        y: projectile.velocity.y - weapon.projectileGravity * TICK_DT,\n      };\n      const next = addScaled(projectile.position, velocity, TICK_DT);\n      if (world?.projectileInKillVolume(next, weapon.projectileRadius) === true) {\n        this.live.delete(projectile.id);\n        detonations.push({ projectile, point: next, reason: \"kill-volume\" });\n        continue;\n      }\n      const worldImpact = world?.sweepProjectile(projectile.position, next, weapon.projectileRadius);\n      if (worldImpact !== undefined) {\n        this.live.delete(projectile.id);\n        detonations.push({ projectile, point: worldImpact.point, reason: \"impact\" });\n        continue;\n      }\n      let direct: ProjectileTarget | undefined;\n      let distance = Infinity;\n      const nearMisses: Array<{ target: ProjectileTarget; closingSpeed: number }> = [];\n      for (const target of targets) {\n        if (!target.alive) continue;\n        if (target.id === projectile.ownerId && tick - projectile.spawnTick <= 2) continue;\n        const height = target.ducked ? + Math.sin(angle) * orbitRadius,\n1064\t        15,\n1065\t        mapCenter.z + Math.cos(angle) * orbitRadius,\n1066\t      );\n1067\t      camera.lookAt(mapCenter.x, 1.5, mapCenter.z);\n1068\t WeaponViewmodel } from \"./viewmodels.js\";\nimport { RecoverableRenderPipeline, armRecoverableAnimationLoop } from \"./render-runtime.js\";\nimport \"./style.css\";\n\nconst RAD2DEG = 180 / Math.PI;\nconst appRoot = document.querySelector<HTMLDivElement>(\"#app\");\nif (appRoot === null) throw new Error(\"missing #app\");\nconst root: HTMLDivElement = appRoot;\n\nfunction pointInside(\n  point: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n  bounds: { min: { x: number; y: number; z: number }; max: { x: number; y: number; z: number } },\n): boolean {\n  return point.x >= bounds.min.x && point.x <= bounds.max.x &&\n    point.y >= bounds.min.y && point.y <= bounds.max.y &&\n    point.z >= bounds.min.z && point.z <= bounds.max.z;\n}\n\nasync function startGame(frontDoor?: MenuController): Promise<void> {\n  const query = new URLSearchParams(location.search);\n  const canvas = document.createElement(\"canvas\");\n  root.appendChild(canvas);\n  const scene = new Scene();\n  let userSettings: UserSettings = loadUserSettings(localStorage);\n  const fpsCam = new FpsCamera(window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight, userSettings.fov);\n  fpsCam.camera.layers.enable(1);\n  scene.add(fpsCam.camera);\n  const input = new RawInput(() =>\n    canvas.isConnected ? canvas : root.querySelector<HTMLCanvasElement>(\"canvas:last-of-type\") ?? canvas);\n  const hud = new MatchHud(root);\n  const hudState = new HudStateMachine(true);\n  hud.setState(hudState.state);\n  const audio = new GameAudio();\n  let clipMapName = \"map\";\n  const clip = new ClipThat(canvas, () => clipMapName, () => audio.captureStream);\n  audio.setMaster(userSettings.masterVolume, userSettings.muted);\n  const unlockAudio = (): void => {\n    audio.unlock();\n    clip.start();\n  };\n  document.addEventListener(\"pointerdown\", unlockAudio, { once: true });\n  document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", unlockAudio, { once: true });\n  document.addEventListener(\"click\", (event) => {\n    if ((event.target as Element | null)?.closest(\"button, select, input\") !== null) {\n      audio.uiClick();\n    }\n  });\n  input.onLockChange((locked) => hud.setPointerLock(locked));\n  hud.onResume(() => input.requestLock());\n\n  const renderer = new WebGPURenderer({\n    canvas,\n    antialias: true,\n    forceWebGL: query.get(\"backend\") === \"webgl2\",\n    logarithmicDepthBuffer: query.get(\"backend\") === \"webgl2\",\n  });\n  renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));\n  await renderer.init();\n  const showConnectionCard = (\n    state: \"server-restarting\" | \"version-mismatch\" | \"room-full\" | \"room-not-found\",\n  ): void => {\n    if (frontDoor === undefined) {\n      frontDoor = showNameEntry(root, (selection) => location.assign(urlForSelection(selection)));\n    }\n    frontDoor.setConnectionState(state);\n  };\n  let currentMap: GameplayMap | undefined;\n  let currentMode: typeof GameMode[keyof typeof GameMode] = GameMode.Scoutzknivez;\n  let currentStyleId = renderStyleFromQuery(location.search);\n  let currentStyle = RENDER_STYLES[currentStyleId];\n  let materials: RenderMaterials | undefined;\n  let rig: StyleRig | undefined;\n  let mapMesh: Mesh | undefined;\n  let timeTrial: BhopTimeTrial | undefined;\n  let ghostMesh: Mesh | undefined;\n  let raceMarkers: Mesh[] = [];\n  let viewmodel: WeaponViewmodel | undefined;\n  let characters: RemoteCharacterSystem | undefined;\n  let projectiles: ProjectileVisualSystem | undefined;\n  let currentRoomId = \"\";\n  let connectedAtMs = performance.now();\n  let networkClosed = false;\n  let reconnectScheduled = false;\n  let reconnectCountdownTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | undefined;\n  const nameplates = new Map<number, HTMLElement>();\n\n  const constructPipeline = (style: typeof currentStyle): RenderPipeline => {\n    const scenePass = style.id === \"toon-cel\"\n characters?.update(remotePlayers, now / 1_000);\n    const visiblePlayerIds = new Set(remotePlayers.map((remote) => remote.id));\n    for (const remote of remotePlayers) {\n      const speed = predicted.position.x,\n          value.position.y - predicted.position.y,\n          value.position.z - predicted.position.z,\n        ) < 0.8);\n      if (!replicated) projectileViews.set(`p:${predicted.ownerId}:${predicted.fireCmdSeq}`, {\n        position: predicted.position,\n        weaponId: predicted.weaponId,\n      });\n    }\n    const projectileList = [...projectileViews].map(([key, value]) => ({ key, ...value }));\n    if (query.get(\"visualtest\") === \"1\" && projectileList.length === 0) {\n      projectileList.push({\n        key: \"visual-test-rocket\",\n        position: { x: curr.position.x + 1.5, y: curr.position.y + 1.2, z: curr.position.z - 3 },\n        weaponId: 9,\n      });\n    }\n    projectiles?.update(projectileList);\n    if (now >= nextWhooshMs) {\n      const nearest = projectileList\n        .map((projectile) => ({\n          projectile,\n          distance: Math.hypot(\n            projectile.position.x - curr.position.x,\n            projectile.position.y - curr.position.y,\n            projectile.position.z - curr.position.z,\n          ),\n        }))\n        .sort((a, b) => a.distance - b.distance)[0];\n      if (nearest !== undefined && nearest.distance < 7) {\n        audio.projectileWhoosh(nearest.projectile.position, nearest.distance);\n        nextWhooshMs = now + 180;\n      }\n    }\n    const debugWindow = window as unknown as {\n      __GG_VISUAL_DEBUG__?: Record<string, number | string>;\n    };\n    const inputDebug = input.inspector;\n    debugWindow.__GG_VISUAL_DEBUG__ = {\n      projectileMeshes: projectileList.length,\n      characterRigs: remotePlayers.length,\n      drawCalls: renderer.info.render.drawCalls,\n      style: currentStyleId,\n      backend: query.get(\"backend\") === \"webgl2\" ? \"webgl2\" : \"webgpu\",\n      connected: networkClosed ? 0 : (combat.selfId === 0 ? 0 : 1),\n      playerX: curr.position.x,\n      playerZ: curr.position.z,\n      playerVelocityY: curr.velocity.y,\n      playerDucked: curr.ducked ? 1 : 0,\n      inputButtons: inputDebug.buttons,\n      inputLocked: inputDebug.locked ? 1 : 0,\n      inputYaw: input.yaw,\n      inputKeyEvents: inputDebug.keyEvents\n        .map((event) => `${event.phase}:${event.code}`)\n        .join(\",\"),\n    };\n\n    const mode = combat.modeState;\n    const ladderLength = mode === undefined ? CLASSIC_LADDER.length : ladderWeapons(mode.ladder).length;\n    hud.setSelfId(combat.selfId);\n    hud.setStatus({\n      health: combat.health,\n      tier: combat.tier,\n      ladderLength,\n      weapon: WEAPONS[combat.weaponId].displayName,\n      typeIcon: weaponTypeIcon(WEAPONS[combat.weaponId].kind),\n      ...(WEAPONS[combat.weaponId].magazine === 0 ? {} : { ammo: [combat.ammo, WEAPONS[combat.weaponId].magazine] as const }),\n      speed: horizontalSpeed,\n    });\n    if (!howToShown && combat.selfId !== 0 && localStorage.getItem(\"gg:how-to-seen\") !== \"1\") {\n      howToShown = true;\n      hud.showHowTo([\n        \"wasd move · mouse aim · click fire\",\n        `${input.controlBindings.jump.map((code) => code.toLowerCase()).join(\"/\")} jump · wheel down jump`,\n        `${input.controlBindings.duck.map((code) => code.toLowerCase()).join(\"/\")} duck · tab scores`,\n        \"spawn protection 1.5 s\",\n      ]);\n    }\n    if (combat.tier !== lastTier) {\n      const demoted = combat.tier < lastTier;\n      hud.showBanner(demoted ? `demoted · tier ${combat.tier}` : `tier ${combat.tier}`, demoted);\n      if (!demoted) {\n        audio.tierUp();\n        if (combat.tier === ladderLength) audio.lastTierWarning();\n      }\n      lastTier = combat.tier;\n    }\n    if (wasAlive && !combat.alive) {\n      deathAtMs = now;\n      deathPosition = { ...curr.position };\n      killStreak = 0;\n    } else if (!wasAlive && combat.alive) {\n      hud.showSpawnFade();\n    }\n    wasAlive = combat.alive;\n    if (!combat.alive) {\n      hud.setDeathDetails(\n        lastKiller.name,\n        lastKiller.weapon,\n        lastKiller.health,\n        Math.max(0, 2 - (now - deathAtMs) / 1_000),\n      );\n    }\n    const frozen = mode?.roundState === RoundState.ScoreboardFreeze;\n    hud.setState(hudState.dispatch({ type: \"snapshot\", alive: combat.alive, frozen }));\n    if (mode !== undefined) {\n      const heading = mode.mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez\n        ? `${mode.teamScores[0]} — ${mode.teamScores[1]}`\n        : mode.winnerId === 0 ? \"\" : `P${mode.winnerId} wins`;\n      hud.setScoreboard(mode.scoreboard, scoreboardHeld, mode.roundState, heading, {\n        room: currentRoomId,\n        elapsedSeconds: (now - connectedAtMs) / 1_000,\n        ping: roundTripMs,\n      });\n    }\n\n    for (const event of sim.drainCombatEvents()) {\n      const headshot = (event.flags & EventFlags.Headshot) !== 0;\n      if (event.kind === EventKind.HitConfirm && event.actorId === combat.selfId) {\n        hud.hitmarker.classList.add(\"visible\");\n        hud.showDamageNumber(event.amount, headshot);\n        hud.flashHit(false);\n        audio.hitmarker(event.amount);\n        if (headshot) audio.headshot();\n        const target = remotes.find((remote) => remote.id === event.targetId);\n        if (target !== undefined) {\n          showTracer(curr.position, target.position, headshot);\n          audio.playImpact(event.weaponId as WeaponIdValue, target.position);\n        }\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          hud.hitmarker.classList.remove(\"visible\");\n        }, 120);\n      }\n      if (event.kind === EventKind.Damage && event.targetId === combat.selfId) {\n        const attacker = remotes.find((remote) => remote.id === event.actorId);\n        if (attacker !== undefined) {\n          const worldAngle = Math.atan2(attacker.position.x - curr.position.x, -(attacker.position.z - curr.position.z));\n          hud.damageDirection.style.transform = `translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(${worldAngle - input.yaw}rad)`;\n        }\n        hud.damageDirection.classList.add(\"visible\");\n        setTimeout(() => hud.damageDirection.classList.remove(\"visible\"), 350);\n      }\n      if (event.kind === EventKind.Kill) {\n        const suicide = (event.flags & EventFlags.Suicide) !== 0;\n        const killLine = suicide\n          ? `P${event.targetId} suicide`\n          : `P${event.actorId} → P${event.targetId}${headshot ? \" [HEAD]\" : \"\"}`;\n        hud.addKillfeed(killLine,\n          event.actorId === combat.selfId || event.targetId === combat.selfId);\n        clip.recordKillfeed(killLine);\n        if (event.targetId === combat.selfId) {\n          const attacker = remotes.find((remote) => remote.id === event.actorId);\n          lastKiller = {\n            name: suicide ? \"yourself\" : `p${event.actorId}`,\n            weapon: WEAPONS[event.weaponId as WeaponIdValue]?.displayName ?? \"world\",\n            health: attacker?.health ?? 0,\n          };\n        }\n        if (event.actorId === combat.selfId && !suicide) {\n          killStreak += 1;\n          audio.killConfirm(killStreak);\n          hud.flashHit(true);\n          hud.showKillClip(() => clip.export());\n          if (killStreak >= 2) hud.showClipSuggestion(\"multikill ready\", () => clip.export());\n          hud.dismissHowTo();\n          localStorage.setItem(\"gg:how-to-seen\", \"1\");\n        }\n      }\n      if (event.kind === EventKind.Airshot && event.actorId === combat.selfId) {\n        hud.addKillfeed(`AIRSHOT · P${event.targetId}`);\n        clip.recordKillfeed(`airshot · p${event.targetId}`);\n        hud.showClipSuggestion(\"airshot ready\", () => clip.export());\n        audio.airshot();\n      }\n      if (event.kind === EventKind.Impressive && event.actorId === combat.selfId) {\n        hud.showAccolade(event.amount);\n        audio.impressive(event.amount);\n      }\n      if (event.kind === EventKind.NearMiss && event.targetId === combat.selfId) {\n        const source = remotes.find((remote) => remote.id === event.actorId)?.position ?? curr.position;\n        audio.nearMiss(\n          source,\n          event.amount / 10,\n          (event.flags & EventFlags.HitscanNearMiss) !== 0,\n        );\n      }\n      if (\n        event.kind === EventKind.ModeEnd &&\n        event.actorId === combat.selfId &&\n        event.stats !== undefined\n      ) {\n        const mapName = mapMesh?.name ?? \"map\";\n        const stats = event.stats;\n        const personalBests = updatePersonalBest(localStorage, mapName.toLowerCase(), stats);\n        hud.showMatchStats(stats, personalBests, () => {\n          void navigator.clipboard.writeText(matchStatsShareText(stats, mapName, location.href));\n        });\n      }\n      if (event.kind === EventKind.SecretTriggered) {\n        hud.addKillfeed(`P${event.actorId} found the gg sigil`);\n        audio.foundrySigil();\n      }\n    }\n    pipeline.render();\n  };\n  armRecoverableAnimationLoop(\n    (callback) => renderer.setAnimationLoop(callback),\n    renderFrame,\n    (error) => console.error(\"renderer frame failed; re-arming animation loop\", error),\n  );\n}\n\nfunction urlForSelection(selection: MenuSelection): URL {\n  const url = new URL(location.href);\n  url.searchParams.set(\"name\", selection.name);\n  if (selection.create) {\n    url.searchParams.delete(\"room\");\n    url.searchParams.set(\"create\", \"1\");\n    url.searchParams.set(\"mode\", selection.mode);\n    url.searchParams.set(\"ladder\", selection.ladder);\n    url.searchParams.set(\"gravity\", selection.gravity);\n    url.searchParams.set(\"map\", selection.map);\n  } else {\n    for (const key of [\"create\", \"mode\", \"ladder\", \"gravity\", \"map\"]) url.searchParams.delete(key);\n    if (selection.quickplay === true) url.searchParams.delete(\"room\");\n  }\n  return url;\n}\n\nasync function startFrontDoor(): Promise<void> {\n  root.style.background = \"#0e131b\";\n  const canvas = document.createElement(\"canvas\");\n  root.appendChild(canvas);\n  showNameEntry(root, (selection) => location.assign(urlForSelection(selection)));\n  const query = new URLSearchParams(location.search);\n  const renderer = new WebGPURenderer({\n    canvas,\n    antialias: true,\n    forceWebGL: query.get(\"backend\") === \"webgl2\",\n  });\n  try {\n    await renderer.init();\n    renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));\n    renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight);\n    const scene = new Scene();\n    scene.background = new Color(0x0e131b);\n    const camera = new PerspectiveCamera(58, window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight, 0.1, 300);\n    scene.add(camera);\n    const styleId = renderStyleFromQuery(location.search);\n    const style = RENDER_STYLES[styleId];\n    let mapCenter = { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 };\n    let orbitRadius = 48;\n    try {\n      const response = await fetch(foundryBlobUrl);\n      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`front-door map load failed: HTTP ${response.status}`);\n      const map = loadGameplayMap(await response.arrayBuffer());\n      style.fogLightRig(scene);\n      const geometry = new BufferGeometry();\n      geometry.setAttribute(\"position\", new BufferAttribute(map.collision.positions, 3));\n      geometry.setIndex(new BufferAttribute(map.collision.indices, 1));\n      geometry.computeVertexNormals();\n      scene.add(new Mesh(geometry, style.materials(map).map));\n      mapCenter = {\n        x: (map.bounds.min.x + map.bounds.max.x) / 2,\n        y: 0,\n        z: (map.bounds.min.z + map.bounds.max.z) / 2,\n      };\n      orbitRadius = Math.max(32, Math.hypot(\n        map.bounds.max.x - map.bounds.min.x,\n        map.bounds.max.z - map.bounds.min.z,\n      ) * 0.65);\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(error);\n    }\n    const resize = (): void => {\n      renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight);\n      camera.aspect = window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight;\n      camera.updateProjectionMatrix();\n    };\n    window.addEventListener(\"resize\", resize);\n    const started = performance.now();\n    armRecoverableAnimationLoop((callback) => renderer.setAnimationLoop(callback), () => {\n      const angle = ((performance.now() - started) % 60_000) / 60_000 * Math.PI * 2;\n      camera.position.set(\n        mapCenter.x + Math.sin(angle) * orbitRadius,\n        15,\n        mapCenter.z + Math.cos(angle) * orbitRadius,\n      );\n      camera.lookAt(mapCenter.x, 1.5, mapCenter.z);\n      renderer.render(scene, camera);\n    }, (error) => console.error(\"front-door world frame failed\", error));\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"front-door world unavailable; using fallback background\", error);\n  }\n}\n\nconst requestedName = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get(\"name\") ?? \"\";\nif (likelyTouchOnly(navigator, matchMedia(\"(pointer: coarse)\").matches)) {\n  showMobileGate(root);\n} else if (!validPlayerName(requestedName)) {\n  void startFrontDoor();\n} else {\n  void startGame();\n}\n","numLines":1083,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1083}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"b6564cbb-608d-476a-9d66-5c2ff1d3ce38","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

this.durationMs;\n14\t    while (this.entries.length > 0 && this.entries[0]!.at < floor) this.entries.shift();\n15\t  }\n16\t\n17\t  values(now: number): readonly T[] {\n18\t    const floor = now - this.durationMs;\n19\t    return this.entries.filter((entry) => entry.at >= floor).map((entry) => entry.value);\n20\t  }\n21\t}\n22\t\n23\texport class ClipThat {\n24\t  private readonly composite = document.createElement(\"canvas\");\n25\t  private readonly context: CanvasRenderingContext2D;\n26\t  private readonly chunks = new RollingWindow<Blob>();\n27\t  private readonly feed = new RollingWindow<string>();\n28\t  private recorder: MediaRecorder | undefined;\n29\t  private initChunk: Blob | undefined;\n30\t  private drawing = false;\n31\t  private readonly source: HTMLCanvasElement;\n32\t  private readonly mapName: () => string;\n33\t  private readonly audioStream: () => MediaStream | undefined;\n34\t\n35\t  constructor(\n36\t    source: HTMLCanvasElement,\n37\t    mapName: () => string,\n38\t    audioStream: () => MediaStream | undefined,\n39\t  ) {\n40\t    this.source = source;\n41\t    this.mapName = mapName;\n42\t    this.audioStream = audioStream;\n43\t    const context = this.composite.getContext(\"2d\", { alpha: false });\n44\t    if (context === null) throw new Error(\"clip compositor unavailable\");\n45\t    this.context = context;\n46\t  }\n47\t\n48\t  start(): boolean {\n49\t    if (this.recorder !== undefined || typeof MediaRecorder === \"undefined\") return false;\n50\t    const size = this.captureSize();\n51\t    this.composite.width = size.width;\n52\t    this.composite.height = size.height;\n53\t    const video = this.composite.captureStream(60);\n54\t    const audioTrack = this.audioStream()?.getAudioTracks()[0];\n55\t    const stream = new MediaStream([\n56\t      ...video.getVideoTracks(),\n57\t      ...(audioTrack === undefined ? [] : [audioTrack]),\n58\t    ]);\n59\t    const preferred = \"video/webm;codecs=vp9,opus\";\n60\t    const mimeType = MediaRecorder.isTypeSupported(preferred) ? preferred : \"video/webm\";\n61\t    this.recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream, {\n62\t      mimeType,\n63\t      videoBitsPerSecond: 8_000_000,\n64\t      audioBitsPerSecond: 128_000,\n65\t    });\n66\t    this.recorder.addEventListener(\"dataavailable\", (event) => {\n67\t      if (event.data.size === 0) return;\n68\t      this.initChunk ??= event.data;\n69\t      this.chunks.push(performance.now(), event.data);\n70\t    });\n71\t    this.recorder.start(500);\n72\t    this.drawing = true;\n73\t    this.draw();\n74\t    return true;\n75\t  }\n76\t\n77\t  recordKillfeed(line: string): void {\n78\t    this.feed.push(performance.now(), line.toLowerCase());\n79\t  }\n80\t\n81\t  export(): boolean {\n82\t    if (this.recorder === undefined || this.initChunk === undefined) return false;\n83\t    this.recorder.requestData();\n84\t    const recent = this.chunks.values(performance.now());\n85\t    const parts = recent[0] === this.initChunk ? recent : [this.initChunk, ...recent];\n86\t    const blob = new Blob([...parts], { type: this.recorder.mimeType });\n87\t    if (blob.size === 0) return false;\n88\t    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n89\t    const anchor = document.createElement(\"a\");\n90\t    anchor.href = url;\n91\t    anchor.download = `gungame-${this.mapName().toLowerCase()}-${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \"-\")}.webm`;\n92\t    anchor.click();\n93\t    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 30_000);\n94\t    return true;\n95\t  }\n96\t\n97\t  private captureSize(): { width: number; height: number } {\n98\t    const scale = Math.min(1, 1_920 / Math.max(1, this.source.width), 1_080 / Math.max(1, this.source.height));\n99\t    return {\n100\t      width: Math.max(2, Math.floor(this.source.width * scale / 2) * 2),\n101\t      height: Math.max(2, Math.floor(this.source.height * scale / 2) * 2),\n102\t    };\n103\t  }\n104\t\n105\t  private draw = (): void => {\n106\t    if (!this.drawing) return;\n107\t    const { width, height } = this.composite;\n108\t    this.context.drawImage(this.source, 0, 0, width, height);\n109\t    const pad = Math.max(18, Math.round(height * 0.028));\n110\t    this.context.save();\n111\t    this.context.textBaseline = \"bottom\";\n112\t    this.context.shadowColor = \"rgba(0,0,0,.75)\";\n113\t    this.context.shadowBlur = 6;\n114\t    this.context.fillStyle = \"rgba(255,255,255,.92)\";\n115\t    this.context.font = `700 ${Math.max(14, Math.round(height * 0.022))}px ui-monospace, monospace`;\n116\t    this.context.fillText(`gungame · ${this.mapName().toLowerCase()}`, pad, height - pad);\n117\t    const lines = this.feed.values(performance.now()).slice(-5);\n118\t    this.context.font = `600 ${Math.max(12, Math.round(height * 0.018))}px ui-monospace, monospace`;\n119\t    lines.forEach((line, index) => {\n120\t      const metrics = this.context.measureText(line);\n121\t      this.context.fillText(\n122\t        line,\n123\t        width - pad - metrics.width,\n124\t        height - pad - (lines.length - 1 - index) * Math.max(18, height * 0.026),\n125\t      );\n126\t    });\n127\t    this.context.restore();\n128\t    requestAnimationFrame(this.draw);\n129\t  };\n130\t}\n131\t"}]},"uuid":"aab5381f-def1-43e6-a6dc-fd65cfcf41b1","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:19:07.262Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/clip-capture.ts","content":"export const CLIP_WINDOW_MS = 12_000;\n\nexport class RollingWindow<T> {\n  private readonly entries: Array<{ at: number; value: T }> = [];\n  private readonly durationMs: number;\n\n  constructor(durationMs = CLIP_WINDOW_MS) {\n    this.durationMs = durationMs;\n  }\n\n  push(at: number, value: T): void {\n    this.entries.push({ at, value });\n    const floor = at - this.durationMs;\n    while (this.entries.length > 0 && this.entries[0]!.at < floor) this.entries.shift();\n  }\n\n  values(now: number): readonly T[] {\n    const floor = now - this.durationMs;\n    return this.entries.filter((entry) => entry.at >= floor).map((entry) => entry.value);\n  }\n}\n\nexport class ClipThat {\n  private readonly composite = document.createElement(\"canvas\");\n  private readonly context: CanvasRenderingContext2D;\n  private readonly chunks = new RollingWindow<Blob>();\n  private readonly feed = new RollingWindow<string>();\n  private recorder: MediaRecorder | undefined;\n  private initChunk: Blob | undefined;\n  private drawing = false;\n  private readonly source: HTMLCanvasElement;\n  private readonly mapName: () => string;\n  private readonly audioStream: () => MediaStream | undefined;\n\n  constructor(\n    source: HTMLCanvasElement,\n    mapName: () => string,\n    audioStream: () => MediaStream | undefined,\n  ) {\n    this.source = source;\n    this.mapName = mapName;\n    this.audioStream = audioStream;\n    const context = this.composite.getContext(\"2d\", { alpha: false });\n    if (context === null) throw new Error(\"clip compositor unavailable\");\n    this.context = context;\n  }\n\n  start(): boolean {\n    if (this.recorder !== undefined || typeof MediaRecorder === \"undefined\") return false;\n    const size = this.captureSize();\n    this.composite.width = size.width;\n    this.composite.height = size.height;\n    const video = this.composite.captureStream(60);\n    const audioTrack = this.audioStream()?.getAudioTracks()[0];\n    const stream = new MediaStream([\n      ...video.getVideoTracks(),\n      ...(audioTrack === undefined ? [] : [audioTrack]),\n    ]);\n    const preferred = \"video/webm;codecs=vp9,opus\";\n    const mimeType = MediaRecorder.isTypeSupported(preferred) ? preferred : \"video/webm\";\n    this.recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream, {\n      mimeType,\n      videoBitsPerSecond: 8_000_000,\n      audioBitsPerSecond: 128_000,\n    });\n    this.recorder.addEventListener(\"dataavailable\", (event) => {\n      if (event.data.size === 0) return;\n      this.initChunk ??= event.data;\n      this.chunks.push(performance.now(), event.data);\n    });\n    this.recorder.start(500);\n    this.drawing = true;\n    this.draw();\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  recordKillfeed(line: string): void {\n    this.feed.push(performance.now(), line.toLowerCase());\n  }\n\n  export(): boolean {\n    if (this.recorder === undefined || this.initChunk === undefined) return false;\n    this.recorder.requestData();\n    const recent = this.chunks.values(performance.now());\n    const parts = recent[0] === this.initChunk ? recent : [this.initChunk, ...recent];\n    const blob = new Blob([...parts], { type: this.recorder.mimeType });\n    if (blob.size === 0) return false;\n    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n    const anchor = document.createElement(\"a\");\n    anchor.href = url;\n    anchor.download = `gungame-${this.mapName().toLowerCase()}-${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \"-\")}.webm`;\n    anchor.click();\n    setTimeout(() => URL.revokeObjectURL(url), 30_000);\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  private captureSize(): { width: number; height: number } {\n    const scale = Math.min(1, 1_920 / Math.max(1, this.source.width), 1_080 / Math.max(1, this.source.height));\n    return {\n      width: Math.max(2, Math.floor(this.source.width * scale / 2) * 2),\n      height: Math.max(2, Math.floor(this.source.height * scale / 2) * 2),\n    };\n  }\n\n  private draw = (): void => {\n    if (!this.drawing) return;\n    const { width, height } = this.composite;\n    this.context.drawImage(this.source, 0, 0, width, height);\n    const pad = Math.max(18, Math.round(height * 0.028));\n    this.context.save();\n    this.context.textBaseline = \"bottom\";\n    this.context.shadowColor = \"rgba(0,0,0,.75)\";\n    this.context.shadowBlur = 6;\n    this.context.fillStyle = \"rgba(255,255,255,.92)\";\n    this.context.font = `700 ${Math.max(14, Math.round(height * 0.022))}px ui-monospace, monospace`;\n    this.context.fillText(`gungame · ${this.mapName().toLowerCase()}`, pad, height - pad);\n    const lines = this.feed.values(performance.now()).slice(-5);\n    this.context.font = `600 ${Math.max(12, Math.round(height * 0.018))}px ui-monospace, monospace`;\n    lines.forEach((line, index) => {\n      const metrics = this.context.measureText(line);\n      this.context.fillText(\n        line,\n        width - pad - metrics.width,\n        height - pad - (lines.length - 1 - index) * Math.max(18, height * 0.026),\n      );\n    });\n    this.context.restore();\n    requestAnimationFrame(this.draw);\n  };\n}\n","numLines":131,"startLine":1,"totalLines":131}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"8a632876-5f22-4738-bcb4-587607451f7e","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

\"connecting\" : \"name-entry\";\n24\t  }\n25\t\n26\t  get state(): HudState {\n27\t    return this.current;\n28\t  }\n29\t\n30\t  dispatch(event: HudEvent): HudState {\n31\t    if (event.type === \"version-mismatch\") this.current = \"version-mismatch\";\n32\t    else if (event.type === \"server-restarting\") this.current = \"server-restarting\";\n33\t    else if (event.type === \"connection-lost\") this.current = \"connection-lost\";\n34\t    else if (event.type === \"submit-name\" && this.current === \"name-entry\") this.current = \"connecting\";\n35\t    else if (event.type === \"connected\" && this.current === \"connecting\") this.current = \"playing\";\n36\t    else if (event.type === \"snapshot\" && !this.isConnectionTerminal()) {\n37\t      this.current = event.frozen ? \"win\" : event.alive ? \"playing\" : \"dead\";\n38\t    }\n39\t    return this.current;\n40\t  }\n41\t\n42\t  private isConnectionTerminal(): boolean {\n43\t    return this.current === \"server-restarting\" ||\n44\t      this.current === \"connection-lost\" || this.current === \"version-mismatch\";\n45\t  }\n46\t}\n47\t"}]},"uuid":"ddf9c4a3-bf5e-480d-b5eb-1157b05b5387","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:19:07.445Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/hud-state.ts","content":"export type HudState =\n  | \"name-entry\"\n  | \"connecting\"\n  | \"playing\"\n  | \"dead\"\n  | \"win\"\n  | \"server-restarting\"\n  | \"connection-lost\"\n  | \"version-mismatch\";\n\nexport type HudEvent =\n  | { readonly type: \"submit-name\" }\n  | { readonly type: \"connected\" }\n  | { readonly type: \"snapshot\"; readonly alive: boolean; readonly frozen: boolean }\n  | { readonly type: \"server-restarting\" }\n  | { readonly type: \"connection-lost\" }\n  | { readonly type: \"version-mismatch\" };\n\nexport class HudStateMachine {\n  private current: HudState;\n\n  constructor(hasName: boolean) {\n    this.current = hasName ? \"connecting\" : \"name-entry\";\n  }\n\n  get state(): HudState {\n    return this.current;\n  }\n\n  dispatch(event: HudEvent): HudState {\n    if (event.type === \"version-mismatch\") this.current = \"version-mismatch\";\n    else if (event.type === \"server-restarting\") this.current = \"server-restarting\";\n    else if (event.type === \"connection-lost\") this.current = \"connection-lost\";\n    else if (event.type === \"submit-name\" && this.current === \"name-entry\") this.current = \"connecting\";\n    else if (event.type === \"connected\" && this.current === \"connecting\") this.current = \"playing\";\n    else if (event.type === \"snapshot\" && !this.isConnectionTerminal()) {\n      this.current = event.frozen ? \"win\" : event.alive ? \"playing\" : \"dead\";\n    }\n    return this.current;\n  }\n\n  private isConnectionTerminal(): boolean {\n    return this.current === \"server-restarting\" ||\n      this.current === \"connection-lost\" || this.current === \"version-mismatch\";\n  }\n}\n","numLines":47,"startLine":1,"totalLines":47}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"3e957fa8-d5c1-4853-9166-6488ae066cf4","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

\"\") as StoredAttempt;\n22\t  } catch {\n23\t    // A malformed or absent record starts a new retry window.\n24\t  }\n25\t  const count = nowMs - prior.at <= 60_000 ? prior.count + 1 : 1;\n26\t  storage.setItem(RECONNECT_ATTEMPT_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ count, at: nowMs }));\n27\t  return {\n28\t    attempt: count,\n29\t    countdownSeconds: 3,\n30\t    allowed: count <= MAX_AUTOMATIC_RECONNECTS,\n31\t  };\n32\t}\n33\t\n34\texport function clearReconnectAttempts(\n35\t  storage: Pick<Storage, \"removeItem\">,\n36\t): void {\n37\t  storage.removeItem(RECONNECT_ATTEMPT_STORAGE_KEY);\n38\t}\n39\t"}]},"uuid":"89276e94-c0d7-41f4-8dae-1bffb3b9f39d","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:19:07.613Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/reconnect.ts","content":"export const RECONNECT_ATTEMPT_STORAGE_KEY = \"gg:reconnect-attempt\";\nexport const MAX_AUTOMATIC_RECONNECTS = 3;\n\nexport interface ReconnectAttempt {\n  readonly attempt: number;\n  readonly countdownSeconds: number;\n  readonly allowed: boolean;\n}\n\ninterface StoredAttempt {\n  readonly count: number;\n  readonly at: number;\n}\n\nexport function nextReconnectAttempt(\n  storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\" | \"setItem\">,\n  nowMs: number,\n): ReconnectAttempt {\n  let prior: StoredAttempt = { count: 0, at: 0 };\n  try {\n    prior = JSON.parse(storage.getItem(RECONNECT_ATTEMPT_STORAGE_KEY) ?? \"\") as StoredAttempt;\n  } catch {\n    // A malformed or absent record starts a new retry window.\n  }\n  const count = nowMs - prior.at <= 60_000 ? prior.count + 1 : 1;\n  storage.setItem(RECONNECT_ATTEMPT_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ count, at: nowMs }));\n  return {\n    attempt: count,\n    countdownSeconds: 3,\n    allowed: count <= MAX_AUTOMATIC_RECONNECTS,\n  };\n}\n\nexport function clearReconnectAttempts(\n  storage: Pick<Storage, \"removeItem\">,\n): void {\n  storage.removeItem(RECONNECT_ATTEMPT_STORAGE_KEY);\n}\n","numLines":39,"startLine":1,"totalLines":39}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"bb58d7fa-3d8e-49ac-807b-90620821902e","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

this.systemTelemetry = root.querySelector(\".connection-telemetry\")!;\n107\t    this.reloadButton = root.querySelector(\".system-overlay button\")!;\n108\t    this.invite = root.querySelector(\".invite-copy\")!;\n109\t    this.pointerOverlay = root.querySelector(\".resume-overlay\")!;\n110\t    this.toast = root.querySelector(\".how-to-toast\")!;\n111\t    this.banner = root.querySelector(\".tier-banner\")!;\n112\t    this.ping = root.querySelector(\".hud-ping\")!;\n113\t    this.afk = root.querySelector(\".afk-warning\")!;\n114\t    this.trialTimer = root.querySelector(\".trial-timer\")!;\n115\t    this.reloadButton.onclick = () => location.reload();\n116\t    root.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".rejoin-button\")!.onclick = () => this.rejoin?.();\n117\t    this.pointerOverlay.onclick = () => this.resume?.();\n118\t  }\n119\t\n120\t  setStatus(status: HudStatus): void {\n121\t    this.health.textContent = String(status.health);\n122\t    this.ladder.querySelector(\"strong\")!.textContent = `${status.tier}/${status.ladderLength}`;\n123\t    this.ladder.querySelector(\"small\")!.textContent =\n124\t      `${status.typeIcon} ${status.weapon.toLowerCase()}`;\n125\t    this.ammo.textContent = status.ammo === undefined ? \"—\" : `${status.ammo[0]}/${status.ammo[1]}`;\n126\t    this.speed.textContent = `${status.speed.toFixed(1)} m/s`;\n127\t  }\n128\t\n129\t  setState(state: HudState): void {\n130\t    this.death.classList.toggle(\"visible\", state === \"dead\");\n131\t    this.win.classList.toggle(\"visible\", state === \"win\");\n132\t    if (state !== \"win\") this.matchStats.classList.remove(\"visible\");\n133\t    const system = state === \"server-restarting\" || state === \"connection-lost\" || state === \"version-mismatch\";\n134\t    this.system.classList.toggle(\"visible\", system);\n135\t    this.reloadButton.hidden = state !== \"version-mismatch\";\n136\t    this.root.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".rejoin-button\")!.hidden =\n137\t      state !== \"connection-lost\";\n138\t    this.systemText.textContent = state === \"server-restarting\"\n139\t      ? \"server restarting — reconnecting…\"\n140\t      : state === \"connection-lost\"\n141\t        ? \"connection lost\"\n142\t        : state === \"version-mismatch\"\n143\t          ? \"client update required\"\n144\t          : \"\";\n145\t  }\n146\t\n147\t  showMatchStats(\n148\t    stats: MatchStats,\n149\t    personalBests: ReadonlySet<MatchStatKey>,\n150\t    onShare: () => void,\n151\t  ): void {\n152\t    const values = this.matchStats.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\".match-stats-values\")!;\n153\t    values.replaceChildren(...formatMatchStats(stats).map(([label, value], index) => {\n154\t      const item = document.createElement(\"span\");\n155\t      const noun = document.createElement(\"small\");\n156\t      noun.textContent = label;\n157\t      const number = document.createElement(\"strong\");\n158\t      number.textContent = value;\n159\t      item.classList.toggle(\"personal-best\", personalBests.has(MATCH_STAT_KEYS[index]!));\n160\t      item.append(noun, number);\n161\t      return item;\n162\t    }));\n163\t    this.matchStats.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\"button\")!.onclick = onShare;\n164\t    this.matchStats.classList.add(\"visible\");\n165\t  }\n166\t\n167\t  setSelfId(id: number): void {\n168\t    this.selfId = id;\n169\t  }\n170\t\n171\t  onResume(callback: () => void): void {\n172\t    this.resume = callback;\n173\t  }\n174\t\n175\t  onRejoin(callback: () => void): void {\n176\t    this.rejoin = callback;\n177\t  }\n178\t\n179\t  setPointerLock(locked: boolean, hidden = document.hidden): void {\n180\t    this.pointerOverlay.classList.toggle(\"visible\", !locked);\n181\t    this.pointerOverlay.textContent = hidden ? \"return to resume\" : \"click to re-enter\";\n182\t  }\n183\t\n184\t  setCrosshair(\n185\t    settings: CrosshairSettings,\n186\t    gapPixels: number,\n187\t    scoped: boolean,\n188\t  ): void {\n189\t    this.crosshair.style.setProperty(\"--cross-size\", `${settings.size}px`);\n190\t    this.crosshair.style.setProperty(\"--cross-gap\", `${gapPixels}px`);\n191\t    this.crosshair.style.setProperty(\n192\t      \"--cross-stroke\",\n193\t      `${1.5 / Math.max(1, window.devicePixelRatio)}px`,\n194\t    );\n195\t    this.crosshair.dataset.color = settings.color;\n196\t    this.crosshair.classList.toggle(\"dot\", settings.dot);\n197\t    this.crosshair.classList.toggle(\"scoped\", scoped);\n198\t  }\n199\t\n200\t  flashHit(kill = false): void {\n201\t    this.crosshair.classList.remove(\"hit-flash\", \"kill-flash\");\n202\t    void this.crosshair.offsetWidth;\n203\t    this.crosshair.classList.add(kill ? \"kill-flash\" : \"hit-flash\");\n204\t    setTimeout(() => this.crosshair.classList.remove(\"hit-flash\", \"kill-flash\"), 60);\n205\t  }\n206\t\n207\t  showDamageNumber(amount: number, critical: boolean): void {\n208\t    const value = document.createElement(\"span\");\n209\t    value.textContent = String(amount);\n210\t    value.classList.toggle(\"critical\", critical);\n211\t    this.damageNumbers.appendChild(value);\n212\t    setTimeout(() => value.remove(), 400);\n213\t  }\n214\t\n215\t  setPing(milliseconds: number, tone: \"normal\" | \"amber\" | \"red\"): void {\n216\t    this.ping.textContent = `${Math.round(milliseconds)} ms`;\n217\t    this.ping.dataset.tone = tone;\n218\t  }\n219\t\n220\t  showHowTo(lines: readonly string[]): void {\n221\t    this.toast.replaceChildren(...lines.map((line) => {\n222\t      const span = document.createElement(\"span\");\n223\t      span.textContent = line;\n224\t      return span;\n225\t    }));\n226\t    this.toast.classList.add(\"visible\");\n227\t  }\n228\t\n229\t  dismissHowTo(): void {\n230\t    this.toast.classList.remove(\"visible\");\n231\t  }\n232\t\n233\t  showBanner(text: string, demotion = false): void {\n234\t    this.banner.textContent = text.toLowerCase();\n235\t    this.banner.classList.toggle(\"demotion\", demotion);\n236\t    this.banner.classList.add(\"visible\");\n237\t    setTimeout(() => this.banner.classList.remove(\"visible\"), 600);\n238\t  }\n239\t\n240\t  showAccolade(chain: number): void {\n241\t    this.banner.textContent = chain === 2 ? \"impressive\" : `impressive · ${chain}`;\n242\t    this.banner.classList.remove(\"demotion\");\n243\t    this.banner.classList.add(\"accolade\", \"visible\");\n244\t    setTimeout(() => this.banner.classList.remove(\"visible\", \"accolade\"), 500);\n245\t  }\n246\t\n247\t  setAfkWarning(visible: boolean): void {\n248\t    this.afk.textContent = \"move or be kicked in 10 s\";\n249\t    this.afk.classList.toggle(\"visible\", visible);\n250\t  }\n251\t\n252\t  setTrialTimer(visible: boolean, elapsedMs: number, bestMs?: number): void {\n253\t    this.trialTimer.classList.toggle(\"visible\", visible);\n254\t    if (!visible) return;\n255\t    const elapsed = (elapsedMs / 1_000).toFixed(3);\n256\t    this.trialTimer.textContent = bestMs === undefined\n257\t      ? elapsed\n258\t      : `${elapsed} · best ${(bestMs / 1_000).toFixed(3)}`;\n259\t  }\n260\t\n261\t  showClipSuggestion(label: string, onClip: () => void): void {\n262\t    this.clipToast.querySelector(\"span\")!.textContent = label.toLowerCase();\n263\t    this.clipToast.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\"button\")!.onclick = onClip;\n264\t    this.clipToast.classList.add(\"visible\");\n265\t    setTimeout(() => this.clipToast.classList.remove(\"visible\"), 5_000);\n266\t  }\n267\t\n268\t  showKillClip(onClip: () => void): void {\n269\t    this.killClip.onclick = onClip;\n270\t    this.killClip.classList.add(\"visible\");\n271\t    setTimeout(() => this.killClip.classList.remove(\"visible\"), 2_400);\n272\t  }\n273\t\n274\t  showSpawnFade(): void {\n275\t    const fade = this.root.querySelector(\".spawn-fade\")!;\n276\t    fade.classList.remove(\"visible\");\n277\t    void (fade as HTMLElement).offsetWidth;\n278\t    fade.classList.add(\"visible\");\n279\t  }\n280\t\n281\t  setDeathDetails(killer: string, weapon: string, health: number, seconds: number): void {\n282\t    this.death.innerHTML = `<strong>eliminated</strong><small>${killer.toLowerCase()} · ${weapon.toLowerCase()} · ${health} hp<br>respawning in ${Math.max(0, seconds).toFixed(1)} · keep your tier</small>`;\n283\t  }\n284\t\n285\t  setReconnectCountdown(seconds: number): void {\n286\t    this.system.classList.add(\"visible\");\n287\t    this.systemText.textContent = `reconnecting… ${seconds}`;\n288\t  }\n289\t\n290\t  setConnectionTelemetry(code: number, reason: string): void {\n291\t    this.systemTelemetry.textContent = webSocketCloseForensics(code, reason).telemetry;\n292\t  }\n293\t\n294\t  setScoreboard(\n295\t    entries: readonly ScoreboardEntry[],\n296\t    held: boolean,\n297\t    roundState: number,\n298\t    heading: string,\n299\t    metadata: {\n300\t      readonly room: string;\n301\t      readonly elapsedSeconds: number;\n302\t      readonly ping: number;\n303\t    } = { room: \"\", elapsedSeconds: 0, ping: 0 },\n304\t  ): void {\n305\t    this.scoreboard.classList.toggle(\"visible\", held || roundState === RoundState.ScoreboardFreeze);\n306\t    this.scoreboardBody.replaceChildren();\n307\t    const minutes = Math.floor(metadata.elapsedSeconds / 60);\n308\t    const seconds = Math.floor(metadata.elapsedSeconds % 60);\n309\t    this.root.querySelector(\".scoreboard-meta\")!.textContent =\n310\t      `${metadata.room || \"room\"} · ${minutes}:${String(seconds).padStart(2, \"0\")}${heading === \"\" ? \"\" : ` · ${heading.toLowerCase()}`}`;\n311\t    for (const entry of entries) {\n312\t      const row = document.createElement(\"div\");\n313\t      row.classList.toggle(\"self\", entry.playerId === this.selfId);\n314\t      const player = document.createElement(\"span\");\n315\t      player.textContent = `${entry.name ?? `P${entry.playerId}`}${entry.team === 0 ? \"\" : ` · T${entry.team}`}`;\n316\t      if (entry.bot === true) {\n317\t        const dot = document.createElement(\"i\");\n318\t        dot.className = \"bot-dot\";\n319\t        dot.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", \"bot\");\n320\t        player.append(\" \", dot);\n321\t      }\n322\t      const score = document.createElement(\"span\");\n323\t      score.textContent = `${entry.kills} / ${entry.deaths}`;\n324\t      const ping = document.createElement(\"span\");\n325\t      ping.textContent = entry.playerId === this.selfId ? `${Math.round(metadata.ping)}` : \"—\";\n326\t      const tier = document.createElement(\"span\");\n327\t      tier.textContent = String(entry.tier);\n328\t      row.append(player, score, ping, tier);\n329\t      this.scoreboardBody.appendChild(row);\n330\t    }\n331\t  }\n332\t\n333\t  addKillfeed(text: string, emphasized = false): void {\n334\t    const item = document.createElement(\"li\");\n335\t    item.textContent = text.toLowerCase();\n336\t    item.classList.toggle(\"self\", emphasized);\n337\t    this.killfeed.prepend(item);\n338\t    while (this.killfeed.children.length > 6) this.killfeed.lastElementChild?.remove();\n339\t    setTimeout(() => item.remove(), 5_000);\n340\t  }\n341\t\n342\t  showInvite(roomId: string): void {\n343\t    if (roomId === \"\") return;\n344\t    this.invite.classList.add(\"visible\");\n345\t    this.invite.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n346\t      const url = new URL(location.href);\n347\t      url.search = \"\";\n348\t      url.pathname = `${url.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\")}/r/${roomId}`;\n349\t      url.searchParams.set(\"room\", roomId);\n350\t      void navigator.clipboard.writeText(url.toString());\n351\t      this.invite.textContent = \"invite copied\";\n352\t    }, { once: true });\n353\t    const boardInvite = this.root.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".scoreboard-invite\")!;\n354\t    boardInvite.onclick = () => this.invite.click();\n355\t  }\n356\t}\n357\t"}]},"uuid":"911195c8-39fe-4bff-bbb9-2263fe2f8389","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:19:32.853Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/hud.ts","content":"import root.querySelector(\".damage-direction\")!;\n    this.zoomOverlay = root.querySelector(\".zoom-overlay\")!;\n    this.killfeed = root.querySelector(\".killfeed\")!;\n    this.scoreboard = root.querySelector(\".scoreboard\")!;\n    this.scoreboardBody = root.querySelector(\".scoreboard-body\")!;\n    this.death = root.querySelector(\".death-overlay\")!;\n    this.win = root.querySelector(\".win-overlay\")!;\n    this.matchStats = root.querySelector(\".match-stats-screen\")!;\n    this.system = root.querySelector(\".system-overlay\")!;\n    this.systemText = root.querySelector(\".system-overlay strong\")!;\n    this.systemTelemetry = root.querySelector(\".connection-telemetry\")!;\n    this.reloadButton = root.querySelector(\".system-overlay button\")!;\n    this.invite = root.querySelector(\".invite-copy\")!;\n    this.pointerOverlay = root.querySelector(\".resume-overlay\")!;\n    this.toast = root.querySelector(\".how-to-toast\")!;\n    this.banner = root.querySelector(\".tier-banner\")!;\n    this.ping = root.querySelector(\".hud-ping\")!;\n    this.afk = root.querySelector(\".afk-warning\")!;\n    this.trialTimer = root.querySelector(\".trial-timer\")!;\n    this.reloadButton.onclick = () => location.reload();\n    root.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".rejoin-button\")!.onclick = () => this.rejoin?.();\n    this.pointerOverlay.onclick = () => this.resume?.();\n  }\n\n  setStatus(status: HudStatus): void {\n    this.health.textContent = String(status.health);\n    this.ladder.querySelector(\"strong\")!.textContent = `${status.tier}/${status.ladderLength}`;\n    this.ladder.querySelector(\"small\")!.textContent =\n      `${status.typeIcon} ${status.weapon.toLowerCase()}`;\n    this.ammo.textContent = status.ammo === undefined ? \"—\" : `${status.ammo[0]}/${status.ammo[1]}`;\n    this.speed.textContent = `${status.speed.toFixed(1)} m/s`;\n  }\n\n  setState(state: HudState): void {\n    this.death.classList.toggle(\"visible\", state === \"dead\");\n    this.win.classList.toggle(\"visible\", state === \"win\");\n    if (state !== \"win\") this.matchStats.classList.remove(\"visible\");\n    const system = state === \"server-restarting\" || state === \"connection-lost\" || state === \"version-mismatch\";\n    this.system.classList.toggle(\"visible\", system);\n    this.reloadButton.hidden = state !== \"version-mismatch\";\n    this.root.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".rejoin-button\")!.hidden =\n      state !== \"connection-lost\";\n    this.systemText.textContent = state === \"server-restarting\"\n      ? \"server restarting — reconnecting…\"\n      : state === \"connection-lost\"\n        ? \"connection lost\"\n        : state === \"version-mismatch\"\n          ? \"client update required\"\n          : \"\";\n  }\n\n  showMatchStats(\n    stats: MatchStats,\n    personalBests: ReadonlySet<MatchStatKey>,\n    onShare: () => void,\n  ): void {\n    const values = this.matchStats.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\".match-stats-values\")!;\n    values.replaceChildren(...formatMatchStats(stats).map(([label, value], index) => {\n      const item = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      const noun = document.createElement(\"small\");\n      noun.textContent = label;\n      const number = document.createElement(\"strong\");\n      number.textContent = value;\n      item.classList.toggle(\"personal-best\", personalBests.has(MATCH_STAT_KEYS[index]!));\n      item.append(noun, number);\n      return item;\n    }));\n    this.matchStats.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\"button\")!.onclick = onShare;\n    this.matchStats.classList.add(\"visible\");\n  }\n\n  setSelfId(id: number): void {\n    this.selfId = id;\n  }\n\n  onResume(callback: () => void): void {\n    this.resume = callback;\n  }\n\n  onRejoin(callback: () => void): void {\n    this.rejoin = callback;\n  }\n\n  setPointerLock(locked: boolean, hidden = document.hidden): void {\n    this.pointerOverlay.classList.toggle(\"visible\", !locked);\n    this.pointerOverlay.textContent = hidden ? \"return to resume\" : \"click to re-enter\";\n  }\n\n  setCrosshair(\n    settings: CrosshairSettings,\n    gapPixels: number,\n    scoped: boolean,\n  ): void {\n    this.crosshair.style.setProperty(\"--cross-size\", `${settings.size}px`);\n    this.crosshair.style.setProperty(\"--cross-gap\", `${gapPixels}px`);\n    this.crosshair.style.setProperty(\n      \"--cross-stroke\",\n      `${1.5 / Math.max(1, window.devicePixelRatio)}px`,\n    );\n    this.crosshair.dataset.color = settings.color;\n    this.crosshair.classList.toggle(\"dot\", settings.dot);\n    this.crosshair.classList.toggle(\"scoped\", scoped);\n  }\n\n  flashHit(kill = false): void {\n    this.crosshair.classList.remove(\"hit-flash\", \"kill-flash\");\n    void this.crosshair.offsetWidth;\n    this.crosshair.classList.add(kill ? \"kill-flash\" : \"hit-flash\");\n    setTimeout(() => this.crosshair.classList.remove(\"hit-flash\", \"kill-flash\"), 60);\n  }\n\n  showDamageNumber(amount: number, critical: boolean): void {\n    const value = document.createElement(\"span\");\n    value.textContent = String(amount);\n    value.classList.toggle(\"critical\", critical);\n    this.damageNumbers.appendChild(value);\n    setTimeout(() => value.remove(), 400);\n  }\n\n  setPing(milliseconds: number, tone: \"normal\" | \"amber\" | \"red\"): void {\n    this.ping.textContent = `${Math.round(milliseconds)} ms`;\n    this.ping.dataset.tone = tone;\n  }\n\n  showHowTo(lines: readonly string[]): void {\n    this.toast.replaceChildren(...lines.map((line) => {\n      const span = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      span.textContent = line;\n      return span;\n    }));\n    this.toast.classList.add(\"visible\");\n  }\n\n  dismissHowTo(): void {\n    this.toast.classList.remove(\"visible\");\n  }\n\n  showBanner(text: string, demotion = false): void {\n    this.banner.textContent = text.toLowerCase();\n    this.banner.classList.toggle(\"demotion\", demotion);\n    this.banner.classList.add(\"visible\");\n    setTimeout(() => this.banner.classList.remove(\"visible\"), 600);\n  }\n\n  showAccolade(chain: number): void {\n    this.banner.textContent = chain === 2 ? \"impressive\" : `impressive · ${chain}`;\n    this.banner.classList.remove(\"demotion\");\n    this.banner.classList.add(\"accolade\", \"visible\");\n    setTimeout(() => this.banner.classList.remove(\"visible\", \"accolade\"), 500);\n  }\n\n  setAfkWarning(visible: boolean): void {\n    this.afk.textContent = \"move or be kicked in 10 s\";\n    this.afk.classList.toggle(\"visible\", visible);\n  }\n\n  setTrialTimer(visible: boolean, elapsedMs: number, bestMs?: number): void {\n    this.trialTimer.classList.toggle(\"visible\", visible);\n    if (!visible) return;\n    const elapsed = (elapsedMs / 1_000).toFixed(3);\n    this.trialTimer.textContent = bestMs === undefined\n      ? elapsed\n      : `${elapsed} · best ${(bestMs / 1_000).toFixed(3)}`;\n  }\n\n  showClipSuggestion(label: string, onClip: () => void): void {\n    this.clipToast.querySelector(\"span\")!.textContent = label.toLowerCase();\n    this.clipToast.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\"button\")!.onclick = onClip;\n    this.clipToast.classList.add(\"visible\");\n    setTimeout(() => this.clipToast.classList.remove(\"visible\"), 5_000);\n  }\n\n  showKillClip(onClip: () => void): void {\n    this.killClip.onclick = onClip;\n    this.killClip.classList.add(\"visible\");\n    setTimeout(() => this.killClip.classList.remove(\"visible\"), 2_400);\n  }\n\n  showSpawnFade(): void {\n    const fade = this.root.querySelector(\".spawn-fade\")!;\n    fade.classList.remove(\"visible\");\n    void (fade as HTMLElement).offsetWidth;\n    fade.classList.add(\"visible\");\n  }\n\n  setDeathDetails(killer: string, weapon: string, health: number, seconds: number): void {\n    this.death.innerHTML = `<strong>eliminated</strong><small>${killer.toLowerCase()} · ${weapon.toLowerCase()} · ${health} hp<br>respawning in ${Math.max(0, seconds).toFixed(1)} · keep your tier</small>`;\n  }\n\n  setReconnectCountdown(seconds: number): void {\n    this.system.classList.add(\"visible\");\n    this.systemText.textContent = `reconnecting… ${seconds}`;\n  }\n\n  setConnectionTelemetry(code: number, reason: string): void {\n    this.systemTelemetry.textContent = webSocketCloseForensics(code, reason).telemetry;\n  }\n\n  setScoreboard(\n    entries: readonly ScoreboardEntry[],\n    held: boolean,\n    roundState: number,\n    heading: string,\n    metadata: {\n      readonly room: string;\n      readonly elapsedSeconds: number;\n      readonly ping: number;\n    } = { room: \"\", elapsedSeconds: 0, ping: 0 },\n  ): void {\n    this.scoreboard.classList.toggle(\"visible\", held || roundState === RoundState.ScoreboardFreeze);\n    this.scoreboardBody.replaceChildren();\n    const minutes = Math.floor(metadata.elapsedSeconds / 60);\n    const seconds = Math.floor(metadata.elapsedSeconds % 60);\n    this.root.querySelector(\".scoreboard-meta\")!.textContent =\n      `${metadata.room || \"room\"} · ${minutes}:${String(seconds).padStart(2, \"0\")}${heading === \"\" ? \"\" : ` · ${heading.toLowerCase()}`}`;\n    for (const entry of entries) {\n      const row = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      row.classList.toggle(\"self\", entry.playerId === this.selfId);\n      const player = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      player.textContent = `${entry.name ?? `P${entry.playerId}`}${entry.team === 0 ? \"\" : ` · T${entry.team}`}`;\n      if (entry.bot === true) {\n        const dot = document.createElement(\"i\");\n        dot.className = \"bot-dot\";\n        dot.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", \"bot\");\n        player.append(\" \", dot);\n      }\n      const score = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      score.textContent = `${entry.kills} / ${entry.deaths}`;\n      const ping = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      ping.textContent = entry.playerId === this.selfId ? `${Math.round(metadata.ping)}` : \"—\";\n      const tier = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      tier.textContent = String(entry.tier);\n      row.append(player, score, ping, tier);\n      this.scoreboardBody.appendChild(row);\n    }\n  }\n\n  addKillfeed(text: string, emphasized = false): void {\n    const item = document.createElement(\"li\");\n    item.textContent = text.toLowerCase();\n    item.classList.toggle(\"self\", emphasized);\n    this.killfeed.prepend(item);\n    while (this.killfeed.children.length > 6) this.killfeed.lastElementChild?.remove();\n    setTimeout(() => item.remove(), 5_000);\n  }\n\n  showInvite(roomId: string): void {\n    if (roomId === \"\") return;\n    this.invite.classList.add(\"visible\");\n    this.invite.addEventListener(\"click\", () => {\n      const url = new URL(location.href);\n      url.search = \"\";\n      url.pathname = `${url.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\")}/r/${roomId}`;\n      url.searchParams.set(\"room\", roomId);\n      void navigator.clipboard.writeText(url.toString());\n      this.invite.textContent = \"invite copied\";\n    }, { once: true });\n    const boardInvite = this.root.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".scoreboard-invite\")!;\n    boardInvite.onclick = () => this.invite.click();\n  }\n}\n","numLines":357,"startLine":1,"totalLines":357}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"78f63661-1aa2-41fd-b38f-45d595906c56","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

type MenuMode = \"scoutz\" | \"gungame\";\n2\texport type MenuLadder = \"classic\" | \"arsenal\";\n3\texport type MenuGravity = \"standard\" | \"scoutz\";\n4\texport type MenuMap = \"auto\" |
