expanded: boolean;\n18\t  readonly mode: MenuMode;\n19\t  readonly ladder: MenuLadder;\n20\t  readonly gravity: MenuGravity;\n21\t  readonly map: MenuMap;\n22\t}\n23\t\n24\texport type MenuConnectionState =\n25\t  | \"idle\"\n26\t  | \"connecting\"\n27\t  | \"server-restarting\"\n28\t  | \"version-mismatch\"\n29\t  | \"room-full\"\n30\t  | \"room-not-found\";\n31\t\n32\texport type CreateRoomAction =\n33\t  | { readonly type: \"toggle\" }\n34\t  | { readonly type: \"mode\"; readonly value: MenuMode }\n35\t  | { readonly type: \"ladder\"; readonly value: MenuLadder }\n36\t  | { readonly type: \"gravity\"; readonly value: MenuGravity }\n37\t  | { readonly type: \"map\"; readonly value: MenuMap };\n38\t\n39\texport const PLAYER_NAME_STORAGE_KEY = \"gg:name\";\n40\texport const FRONT_DOOR_CARD_MAX_WIDTH = 420;\n41\texport const FRONT_DOOR_VIEWPORT_GUTTER = 16;\n42\t\n43\tconst NAME_PATTERN = /^[a-zA-Z0-9_ -]{2,16}$/;\n44\tconst INVALID_NAME_CHARACTERS = /[^a-zA-Z0-9_ -]+/g;\n45\t\n46\texport function filterPlayerName(value: string): string {\n47\t  return value.replace(INVALID_NAME_CHARACTERS, \"\").slice(0, 16);\n48\t}\n49\t\n50\texport function validPlayerName(value: string): boolean {\n51\t  return NAME_PATTERN.test(value);\n52\t}\n53\t\n54\texport function persistedPlayerName(storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\">): string {\n55\t  return filterPlayerName(storage.getItem(PLAYER_NAME_STORAGE_KEY) ?? \"\");\n56\t}\n57\t\n58\texport function persistPlayerName(storage: Pick<Storage, \"setItem\">, value: string): string {\n59\t  const filtered = filterPlayerName(value);\n60\t  storage.setItem(PLAYER_NAME_STORAGE_KEY, filtered);\n61\t  return filtered;\n62\t}\n63\t\n64\texport function frontDoorCardWidth(viewportWidth: number): number {\n65\t  return Math.min(FRONT_DOOR_CARD_MAX_WIDTH, Math.max(0, viewportWidth - FRONT_DOOR_VIEWPORT_GUTTER * 2));\n66\t}\n67\t\n68\texport function defaultCreateRoomState(): CreateRoomState {\n69\t  return {\n70\t    expanded: false,\n71\t    mode: \"gungame\",\n72\t    ladder: \"classic\",\n73\t    gravity: \"standard\",\n74\t    map: \"auto\",\n75\t  };\n76\t}\n77\t\n78\texport function updateCreateRoomState(\n79\t  state: CreateRoomState,\n80\t  action: CreateRoomAction,\n81\t): CreateRoomState {\n82\t  if (action.type === \"toggle\") return { ...state, expanded: !state.expanded };\n83\t  if (action.type === \"mode\") {\n84\t    return {\n85\t      ...state,\n86\t      mode: action.value,\n87\t      map: state.map === \"auto\" || (action.value === \"scoutz\" && state.map === \"spire\") ||\n88\t        (action.value === \"gungame\" && state.map !== \"spire\")\n89\t        ? state.map\n90\t        : \"auto\",\n91\t    };\n92\t  }\n93\t  if (action.type === \"ladder\") {\n94\t    return {\n95\t      ...state,\n96\t      ladder: action.value,\n97\t      gravity: action.value === \"arsenal\" ? \"scoutz\" : state.gravity,\n98\t    };\n99\t  }\n100\t  if (action.type === \"gravity\") return { ...state, gravity: action.value };\n101\t  const compatible = action.value === \"auto\" ||\n102\t    (state.mode === \"scoutz\" ? action.value === \"spire\" : action.value !== \"spire\");\n103\t  return compatible ? { ...state, map: action.value } : state;\n104\t}\n105\t\n106\texport function visibleCreateRows(state: CreateRoomState): readonly string[] {\n107\t  if (!state.expanded) return [];\n108\t  return state.mode === \"gungame\"\n109\t    ? [\"mode\", \"ladder\", \"gravity\", \"map\"]\n110\t    : [\"mode\", \"gravity\", \"map\"];\n111\t}\n112\t\n113\texport interface MenuController {\n114\t  readonly element: HTMLElement;\n115\t  setConnectionState(state: MenuConnectionState): void;\n116\t  destroy(): void;\n117\t}\n118\t\n119\tinterface SegmentOption<T extends string> {\n120\t  readonly value: T;\n121\t  readonly label: string;\n122\t}\n123\t\n124\tfunction segmentedRow<T extends string>(\n125\t  label: string,\n126\t  options: readonly SegmentOption<T>[],\n127\t  current: T,\n128\t  onChange: (value: T) => void,\n129\t): HTMLElement {\n130\t  const row = document.createElement(\"div\");\n131\t  row.className = \"create-row\";\n132\t  const title = document.createElement(\"span\");\n133\t  title.className = \"create-row-label\";\n134\t  title.textContent = label;\n135\t  const segments = document.createElement(\"div\");\n136\t  segments.className = \"segments\";\n137\t  segments.setAttribute(\"role\", \"group\");\n138\t  segments.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", label);\n139\t  for (const option of options) {\n140\t    const button = document.createElement(\"button\");\n141\t    button.type = \"button\";\n142\t    button.className = \"segment\";\n143\t    button.dataset.value = option.value;\n144\t    button.textContent = option.label;\n145\t    button.classList.toggle(\"active\", option.value === current);\n146\t    button.setAttribute(\"aria-pressed\", String(option.value === current));\n147\t    button.onclick = () => onChange(option.value);\n148\t    segments.appendChild(button);\n149\t  }\n150\t  row.append(title, segments);\n151\t  return row;\n152\t}\n153\t\n154\texport function showNameEntry(\n155\t  parent: HTMLElement,\n156\t  onSelection: (selection: MenuSelection) => void,\n157\t): MenuController {\n158\t  const shell = document.createElement(\"main\");\n159\t  shell.className = \"join-screen\";\n160\t  shell.innerHTML = `\n161\t    <form class=\"join-card\" novalidate>\n162\t      <div class=\"wordmark\" aria-label=\"gungame online\"><span>gungame</span><i></i></div>\n163\t      <input class=\"name-field\" name=\"name\" maxlength=\"16\" autocomplete=\"nickname\"\n164\t        aria-label=\"Your name\" placeholder=\"your name\" autofocus>\n165\t      <button aria-expanded=\"false\">\n168\t        <span class=\"chevron\">›</span><span>create room</span>\n169\t      </button>\n170\t      <div class=\"create-options\" hidden></div>\n171\t      <div class=\"menu-message\" aria-live=\"polite\" hidden></div>\n172\t    </form>`;\n173\t  parent.appendChild(shell);\n174\t\n175\t  const form = shell.querySelector<HTMLFormElement>(\"form\")!;\n176\t  const input = form.elements.namedItem(\"name\") as HTMLInputElement;\n177\t  const play = shell.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".play-button\")!;\n178\t  const disclosure = shell.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".create-disclosure\")!;\n179\t  const options = shell.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\".create-options\")!;\n180\t  const message = shell.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\".menu-message\")!;\n181\t  let createState = defaultCreateRoomState();\n182\t  let connectionState: MenuConnectionState = \"idle\";\n183\t\n184\t  input.value = persistedPlayerName(localStorage);\n185\t\n186\t  const syncPlay = (): void => {\n187\t    const valid = validPlayerName(input.value);\n188\t    play.disabled = !valid || connectionState === \"connecting\";\n189\t  };\n190\t\n191\t  const renderCreateOptions = (): void => {\n192\t    options.replaceChildren();\n193\t    options.hidden = !createState.expanded;\n194\t    disclosure.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", String(createState.expanded));\n195\t    disclosure.querySelector(\".chevron\")!.classList.toggle(\"expanded\", createState.expanded);\n196\t    if (!createState.expanded) return;\n197\t    const update = (action: CreateRoomAction): void => {\n198\t      createState = updateCreateRoomState(createState, action);\n199\t      renderCreateOptions();\n200\t    };\n201\t    options.appendChild(segmentedRow(\"mode\", [\n202\t      { value: \"gungame\", label: \"gun game\" },\n203\t      { value: \"scoutz\", label: \"scoutz\" },\n204\t    ], createState.mode, (value) => update({ type: \"mode\", value })));\n205\t    if (createState.mode === \"gungame\") {\n206\t      options.appendChild(segmentedRow(\"ladder\", [\n207\t        { value: \"classic\", label: \"classic\" },\n208\t        { value: \"arsenal\", label: \"arsenal\" },\n209\t      ], createState.ladder, (value) => update({ type: \"ladder\", value })));\n210\t type MenuMode = \"scoutz\" | \"gungame\";\nexport type MenuLadder = \"classic\" | \"arsenal\";\nexport type MenuGravity = \"standard\" | \"scoutz\";\nexport type MenuMap = \"auto\" | \"spire\" | \"foundry\" | \"duna\" | \"cascade\";\n\nexport interface MenuSelection {\n  readonly name: string;\n  readonly create: boolean;\n  readonly mode: MenuMode;\n  readonly ladder: MenuLadder;\n  readonly gravity: MenuGravity;\n  readonly map: MenuMap;\n  readonly quickplay?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface CreateRoomState {\n  readonly expanded: boolean;\n  readonly mode: MenuMode;\n  readonly ladder: MenuLadder;\n  readonly gravity: MenuGravity;\n  readonly map: MenuMap;\n}\n\nexport type MenuConnectionState =\n  | \"idle\"\n  | \"connecting\"\n  | \"server-restarting\"\n  | \"version-mismatch\"\n  | \"room-full\"\n  | \"room-not-found\";\n\nexport type CreateRoomAction =\n  | { readonly type: \"toggle\" }\n  | { readonly type: \"mode\"; readonly value: MenuMode }\n  | { readonly type: \"ladder\"; readonly value: MenuLadder }\n  | { readonly type: \"gravity\"; readonly value: MenuGravity }\n  | { readonly type: \"map\"; readonly value: MenuMap };\n\nexport const PLAYER_NAME_STORAGE_KEY = \"gg:name\";\nexport const FRONT_DOOR_CARD_MAX_WIDTH = 420;\nexport const FRONT_DOOR_VIEWPORT_GUTTER = 16;\n\nconst NAME_PATTERN = /^[a-zA-Z0-9_ -]{2,16}$/;\nconst INVALID_NAME_CHARACTERS = /[^a-zA-Z0-9_ -]+/g;\n\nexport function filterPlayerName(value: string): string {\n  return value.replace(INVALID_NAME_CHARACTERS, \"\").slice(0, 16);\n}\n\nexport function validPlayerName(value: string): boolean {\n  return NAME_PATTERN.test(value);\n}\n\nexport function persistedPlayerName(storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\">): string {\n  return filterPlayerName(storage.getItem(PLAYER_NAME_STORAGE_KEY) ?? \"\");\n}\n\nexport function persistPlayerName(storage: Pick<Storage, \"setItem\">, value: string): string {\n  const filtered = filterPlayerName(value);\n  storage.setItem(PLAYER_NAME_STORAGE_KEY, filtered);\n  return filtered;\n}\n\nexport function frontDoorCardWidth(viewportWidth: number): number {\n  return Math.min(FRONT_DOOR_CARD_MAX_WIDTH, Math.max(0, viewportWidth - FRONT_DOOR_VIEWPORT_GUTTER * 2));\n}\n\nexport function defaultCreateRoomState(): CreateRoomState {\n  return {\n    expanded: false,\n    mode: \"gungame\",\n    ladder: \"classic\",\n    gravity: \"standard\",\n    map: \"auto\",\n  };\n}\n\nexport function updateCreateRoomState(\n  state: CreateRoomState,\n  action: CreateRoomAction,\n): CreateRoomState {\n  if (action.type === \"toggle\") return { ...state, expanded: !state.expanded };\n  if (action.type === \"mode\") {\n    return {\n      ...state,\n      mode: action.value,\n      map: state.map === \"auto\" || (action.value === \"scoutz\" && state.map === \"spire\") ||\n        (action.value === \"gungame\" && state.map !== \"spire\")\n        ? state.map\n        : \"auto\",\n    };\n  }\n  if (action.type === \"ladder\") {\n    return {\n      ...state,\n      ladder: action.value,\n      gravity: action.value === \"arsenal\" ? \"scoutz\" : state.gravity,\n    };\n  }\n  if (action.type === \"gravity\") return { ...state, gravity: action.value };\n  const compatible = action.value === \"auto\" ||\n    (state.mode === \"scoutz\" ? action.value === \"spire\" : action.value !== \"spire\");\n  return compatible ? { ...state, map: action.value } : state;\n}\n\nexport function visibleCreateRows(state: CreateRoomState): readonly string[] {\n  if (!state.expanded) return [];\n  return state.mode === \"gungame\"\n    ? [\"mode\", \"ladder\", \"gravity\", \"map\"]\n    : [\"mode\", \"gravity\", \"map\"];\n}\n\nexport interface MenuController {\n  readonly element: HTMLElement;\n  setConnectionState(state: MenuConnectionState): void;\n  destroy(): void;\n}\n\ninterface SegmentOption<T extends string> {\n  readonly value: T;\n  readonly label: string;\n}\n\nfunction segmentedRow<T extends string>(\n  label: string,\n  options: readonly SegmentOption<T>[],\n  current: T,\n  onChange: (value: T) => void,\n): HTMLElement {\n  const row = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  row.className = \"create-row\";\n  const title = document.createElement(\"span\");\n  title.className = \"create-row-label\";\n  title.textContent = label;\n  const segments = document.createElement(\"div\");\n  segments.className = \"segments\";\n  segments.setAttribute(\"role\", \"group\");\n  segments.setAttribute(\"aria-label\", label);\n  for (const option of options) {\n    const button = document.createElement(\"button\");\n    button.type = \"button\";\n    button.className = \"segment\";\n    button.dataset.value = option.value;\n    button.textContent = option.label;\n    button.classList.toggle(\"active\", option.value === current);\n    button.setAttribute(\"aria-pressed\", String(option.value === current));\n    button.onclick = () => onChange(option.value);\n    segments.appendChild(button);\n  }\n  row.append(title, segments);\n  return row;\n}\n\nexport function showNameEntry(\n  parent: HTMLElement,\n  onSelection: (selection: MenuSelection) => void,\n): MenuController {\n  const shell = document.createElement(\"main\");\n  shell.className = \"join-screen\";\n  shell.innerHTML = `\n    <form class=\"join-card\" novalidate>\n      <div class=\"wordmark\" aria-label=\"gungame online\"><span>gungame</span><i></i></div>\n      <input class=\"name-field\" name=\"name\" maxlength=\"16\" autocomplete=\"nickname\"\n        aria-label=\"Your name\" placeholder=\"your name\" autofocus>\n      <button class=\"play-button\" type=\"submit\"><span>play</span></button>\n      <div class=\"menu-divider\"></div>\n      <button class=\"create-disclosure\" type=\"button\" aria-expanded=\"false\">\n        <span class=\"chevron\">›</span><span>create room</span>\n      </button>\n      <div class=\"create-options\" hidden></div>\n      <div class=\"menu-message\" aria-live=\"polite\" hidden></div>\n    </form>`;\n  parent.appendChild(shell);\n\n  const form = shell.querySelector<HTMLFormElement>(\"form\")!;\n  const input = form.elements.namedItem(\"name\") as HTMLInputElement;\n  const play = shell.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".play-button\")!;\n  const disclosure = shell.querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>(\".create-disclosure\")!;\n  const options = shell.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\".create-options\")!;\n  const message = shell.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\".menu-message\")!;\n  let createState = defaultCreateRoomState();\n  let connectionState: MenuConnectionState = \"idle\";\n\n  input.value = persistedPlayerName(localStorage);\n\n  const syncPlay = (): void => {\n    const valid = validPlayerName(input.value);\n    play.disabled = !valid || connectionState === \"connecting\";\n  };\n\n  const renderCreateOptions = (): void => {\n    options.replaceChildren();\n    options.hidden = !createState.expanded;\n    disclosure.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", String(createState.expanded));\n    disclosure.querySelector(\".chevron\")!.classList.toggle(\"expanded\", createState.expanded);\n    if (!createState.expanded) return;\n    const update = (action: CreateRoomAction): void => {\n      createState = updateCreateRoomState(createState, action);\n      renderCreateOptions();\n    };\n    options.appendChild(segmentedRow(\"mode\", [\n      { value: \"gungame\", label: \"gun game\" },\n      { value: \"scoutz\", label: \"scoutz\" },\n    ], createState.mode, (value) => update({ type: \"mode\", value })));\n    if (createState.mode === \"gungame\") {\n      options.appendChild(segmentedRow(\"ladder\", [\n        { value: \"classic\", label: \"classic\" },\n        { value: \"arsenal\", label: \"arsenal\" },\n      ], createState.ladder, (value) => update({ type: \"ladder\", value })));\n    }\n    options.appendChild(segmentedRow(\"gravity\", [\n      { value: \"standard\", label: \"standard\" },\n      { value: \"scoutz\", label: \"scoutz\" },\n    ], createState.gravity, (value) => update({ type: \"gravity\", value })));\n    const mapOptions: readonly SegmentOption<MenuMap>[] = createState.mode === \"gungame\"\n      ? [\n          { value: \"auto\", label: \"auto-rotate\" },\n          { value: \"foundry\", label: \"foundry\" },\n          { value: \"duna\", label: \"duna\" },\n          { value: \"cascade\", label: \"cascade\" },\n        ]\n      : [\n          { value: \"auto\", label: \"auto-rotate\" },\n          { value: \"spire\", label: \"spire\" },\n        ];\n    options.appendChild(segmentedRow(\"map\", mapOptions, createState.map, (value) => {\n      update({ type: \"map\", value });\n    }));\n    const create = document.createElement(\"button\");\n    create.type = \"submit\";\n    create.className = \"create-button\";\n    create.dataset.action = \"create\";\n    create.textContent = \"create room\";\n    create.disabled = !validPlayerName(input.value) || connectionState === \"connecting\";\n    options.appendChild(create);\n  };\n\n  const setConnectionState = (state: MenuConnectionState): void => {\n    connectionState = state;\n    message.hidden = state === \"idle\" || state === \"connecting\";\n    message.replaceChildren();\n    play.classList.toggle(\"connecting\", state === \"connecting\");\n    play.innerHTML = state === \"connecting\"\n      ? `<i class=\"spinner\" aria-hidden=\"true\"></i><span>finding a room…</span>`\n      : \"<span>play</span>\";\n    if (state === \"server-restarting\") {\n      message.className = \"menu-message toast\";\n      message.textContent = \"server restarting — reconnecting…\";\n    } else if (state === \"version-mismatch\") {\n      message.className = \"menu-message inline-prompt\";\n      const text = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      text.textContent = \"version mismatch\";\n      const reload = document.createElement(\"button\");\n      reload.type = \"button\";\n      reload.textContent = \"reload\";\n      reload.onclick = () => location.reload();\n      message.append(text, reload);\n    } else if (state === \"room-full\") {\n      message.className = \"menu-message inline-prompt\";\n      const text = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      text.textContent = \"room full — quickplay instead?\";\n      const quickplay = document.createElement(\"button\");\n      quickplay.type = \"button\";\n      quickplay.textContent = \"quickplay\";\n      quickplay.onclick = () => onSelection({\n        name: input.value,\n        create: false,\n        mode: \"gungame\",\n        ladder: \"classic\",\n        gravity: \"standard\",\n        map: \"auto\",\n        quickplay: true,\n      });\n      message.append(text, quickplay);\n    } else if (state === \"room-not-found\") {\n      message.className = \"menu-message inline-prompt\";\n      const text = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      text.textContent = \"room not found\";\n      const quickplay = document.createElement(\"button\");\n      quickplay.type = \"button\";\n      quickplay.textContent = \"quickplay\";\n      quickplay.onclick = () => onSelection({\n        name: input.value,\n        create: false,\n        mode: \"gungame\",\n        ladder: \"classic\",\n        gravity: \"standard\",\n        map: \"auto\",\n        quickplay: true,\n      });\n      message.append(text, quickplay);\n    }\n    syncPlay();\n    renderCreateOptions();\n  };\n\n  input.addEventListener(\"input\", () => {\n    const filtered = filterPlayerName(input.value);\n    if (input.value !== filtered) input.value = filtered;\n    persistPlayerName(localStorage, filtered);\n    input.setCustomValidity(\"\");\n    syncPlay();\n    renderCreateOptions();\n  });\n  disclosure.onclick = () => {\n    createState = updateCreateRoomState(createState, { type: \"toggle\" });\n    renderCreateOptions();\n  };\n  form.onsubmit = (event) => {\n    event.preventDefault();\n    const name = persistPlayerName(localStorage, input.value);\n    if (!validPlayerName(name)) return;\n    const submitter = (event as SubmitEvent).submitter as HTMLButtonElement | null;\n    const creating = submitter?.dataset.action === \"create\";\n    setConnectionState(\"connecting\");\n    onSelection({\n      name,\n      create: creating,\n      mode: createState.mode,\n      ladder: createState.ladder,\n      gravity: createState.gravity,\n      map: createState.map,\n    });\n  };\n\n  renderCreateOptions();\n  syncPlay();\n  requestAnimationFrame(() => input.focus());\n  return {\n    element: shell,\n    setConnectionState,\n    destroy: () => shell.remove(),\n  };\n}\n\nexport function showMobileGate(parent: HTMLElement): HTMLElement {\n  const gate = document.createElement(\"main\");\n  gate.className = \"mobile-gate\";\n  gate.textContent = \"gungame needs a mouse + keyboard. grab a computer.\";\n  parent.replaceChildren(gate);\n  return gate;\n}\n\nexport function likelyTouchOnly(\n  navigatorLike: Pick<Navigator, \"maxTouchPoints\">,\n  coarsePointer: boolean,\n): boolean {\n  return coarsePointer && navigatorLike.maxTouchPoints > 0;\n}\n","numLines":350,"startLine":1,"totalLines":350}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"2be686e9-d555-44af-a7b9-77b1bb95579a","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

createPlayground(\n102\t  canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,\n103\t  blobUrlOrOptions?: string | PlaygroundOptions,\n104\t): { sim: SimHandle } {\n105\t  // The bridge deliberately treats the canvas as an opaque ownership token.\n106\t  void canvas;\n107\t  const options: PlaygroundOptions = typeof blobUrlOrOptions === \"string\"\n108\t    ? { initialMapUrl: blobUrlOrOptions }\n109\t    : prediction?.renderPosition(dtSeconds) ?? state.player.position,\n162\t    getRemotePlayers: (nowMs) => network?.remoteEntities(nowMs) ?? 0,\n178\t  };\n179\t\n180\t  let mapLoadSequence = 0;\n181\t  let requestedMapUrl = \"\";\n182\t  const installMap = async (\n183\t    url: string,\n184\t    mode: typeof GameMode[keyof typeof GameMode],\n185\t    mapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId],\n186\t    placeAtSpawn: boolean,\n187\t  ): Promise<void> => {\n188\t    const sequence = ++mapLoadSequence;\n189\t    requestedMapUrl = url;\n190\t    const response = await fetch(url);\n191\t    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`map load failed: HTTP ${response.status}`);\n192\t    const map = loadGameplayMap(await response.arrayBuffer());\n193\t    if (sequence !== mapLoadSequence) return;\n194\t    world = new CollisionWorld(map.collision, map.killVolumes);\n195\t    if (placeAtSpawn) {\n196\t      const spawn = map.spawns[0];\n197\t      state = createInitialState();\n198\t      if (spawn !== undefined) {\n199\t        state = {\n200\t          ...state,\n201\t          player: {\n202\t            ...state.player,\n203\t            position: { ...spawn.position },\n204\t            viewYaw: (spawn.yaw * 180) / Math.PI,\n205\t          },\n206\t        };\n207\t      }\n208\t    }\n209\t    prediction = new PredictionReconciler(state, world);\n210\t    prediction.configure(params, feel);\n211\t    options.onMapLoaded?.(map, mode, mapId);\n212\t  };\n213\t\n214\t  const initialMode = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get(\"mode\") === \"gungame\"\n215\t    ? GameMode.GunGame\n216\t    : GameMode.Scoutzknivez;\n217\t  const mapQuery = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get(\"map\");\n218\t  const initialMapId = initialMode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez\n219\t    ? MapId.Spire\n220\t    : mapQuery === \"duna\"\n221\t      ? MapId.Duna\n222\t      : mapQuery === \"cascade\"\n223\t        ? MapId.Cascade\n224\t        : MapId.Foundry;\n225\t  const initialUrl = options.initialMapUrl ?? options.mapUrlForMap?.(initialMapId) ??\n226\t    options.mapUrlForMode?.(initialMode) ??\n227\t    new URL(\"../../maps/spire.blob\", import.meta.url).toString();\n228\t\n229\t  void installMap(initialUrl, initialMode, initialMapId, true)\n230\t    .then(() => {\n231\t      network = new NetworkSession({\n232\t        onRefusal: (code) => options.onRefusal?.(code),\n233\t        onClose: (code, reason) => options.onClose?.(code, reason),\n234\t        onWelcome: (mode, variant, ladder, mapId, roomId) => {\n235\t          welcomeMode = mode;\n236\t          welcomeLadder = ladder;\n237\t          welcomeMapId = mapId;\n238\t          params = mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez || variant === GravityVariant.Scoutz\n239\t            ? SCOUTZ\n240\t            : DEFAULT;\n241\t          prediction?.configure(params, feel);\n242\t          options.onWelcome?.(mode, variant, ladder, mapId, roomId);\n243\t          const nextMapUrl = options.mapUrlForMap?.(mapId) ?? options.mapUrlForMode?.(mode);\n244\t          if (nextMapUrl !== undefined && nextMapUrl !== requestedMapUrl) {\n245\t            void installMap(nextMapUrl, mode, mapId, false).catch((error: unknown) => console.error(error));\n246\t          }\n247\t        },\n248\t        onSnapshot: ({ frame, entities, resetPrediction, events }) => {\n249\t          const snapshotMapId = frame.modeState?.mapId;\n250\t          if (snapshotMapId !== undefined && snapshotMapId !== welcomeMapId) {\n251\t            welcomeMapId = snapshotMapId;\n252\t            const nextMapUrl = options.mapUrlForMap?.(snapshotMapId);\n253\t            if (nextMapUrl !== undefined && nextMapUrl !== requestedMapUrl) {\n254\t              void installMap(nextMapUrl, welcomeMode, snapshotMapId, false)\n255\t                .catch((error: unknown) => console.error(error));\n256\t            }\n257\t          }\n258\t          const self = entities.find((entity) =>\n259\t            entity.id === network?.selfId && entity.kind === EntityKind.Player);\n260\t          if (self === undefined || prediction === undefined) return;\n261\t          const authoritative: State = {\n262\t            tick: frame.tick,\n263\t            player: {\n264\t              ...prediction.state.player,\n265\t              position: self.position,\n266\t              velocity: self.velocity,\n267\t              viewYaw: self.viewYaw,\n268\t              viewPitch: self.viewPitch,\n269\t              grounded: self.grounded,\n270\t            },\n271\t          };\n272\t          prevState = prediction.state;\n273\t          const generationChanged = combat.generation !== 0 && combat.generation !== self.generation;\n274\t          if (resetPrediction || generationChanged) prediction.resetForEpoch(authoritative);\n275\t          else prediction.reconcile(authoritative, frame.lastProcessedCmdSeq);\n276\t          const weaponId = welcomeMode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez\n277\t            ? WeaponId.Scout\n278\t            : ladderWeapons(welcomeLadder)[Math.max(0, self.weaponTier - 1)] ?? WeaponId.Pistol;\n279\t          prediction.configureCombat(self.id, self.generation, weaponId);\n280\t          const predictedProjectiles = prediction.reconcileProjectiles(entities);\n281\t          combat = {\n282\t            selfId: self.id,\n283\t            generation: self.generation,\n284\t            health: self.health,\n285\t            alive: self.alive,\n286\t            tier: self.weaponTier,\n287\t            ammo: self.ammo,\n288\t            weaponId,\n289\t            ...(frame.modeState === undefined ? {} : { modeState: frame.modeState }),\n290\t            predictedProjectiles,\n291\t          };\n292\t          combatEvents.push(...events);\n293\t          state = prediction.state;\n294\t        },\n295\t      });\n296\t    })\n297\t    .catch((error: \"../../packages/sim/src/index.js\";\nimport {\n  EntityKind,\n  GameMode,\n  GravityVariant,\n  Ladder,\n  MapId,\n  type SnapshotEvent,\n  type SnapshotModeState,\n} from \"./tick-driver.js\";\n\nexport interface FrameInput {\n  readonly buttons: number;\n  readonly viewYaw: number;\n  readonly viewPitch: number;\n  readonly fireFraction?: number;\n  readonly lastSnapshotTick?: number;\n  readonly interpTargetTick?: number;\n  readonly interpTargetFraction?: number;\n}\n\nexport interface SimHandle {\n  step(): void;\n  getState(): State;\n  /** State one tick behind, for render interpolation. */\n  getPrevState(): State;\n  getRenderPosition(dtSeconds: number): State[\"player\"][\"position\"];\n  getRemotePlayers(nowMs: number): readonly InterpolatedEntity[];\n  /** Fraction [0,1) of the current tick elapsed, for render interpolation. */\n  getAlpha(): number;\n  setParams(params: MoveParams): void;\n  setFeel(feel: FeelParams): void;\n  applyInput(frameInput: FrameInput): void;\n  getCombatState(): CombatView;\n  drainCombatEvents(): readonly SnapshotEvent[];\n  getPingMs(): number;\n}\n\nexport interface CombatView {\n  readonly selfId: number;\n  readonly generation: number;\n  readonly health: number;\n  readonly alive: boolean;\n  readonly tier: number;\n  readonly ammo: number;\n  readonly weaponId: WeaponIdValue;\n  readonly modeState?: SnapshotModeState;\n  readonly predictedProjectiles: ReturnType<PredictionReconciler[\"reconcileProjectiles\"]>;\n}\n\nexport interface PlaygroundOptions {\n  readonly initialMapUrl?: string;\n  readonly mapUrlForMode?: (mode: typeof GameMode[keyof typeof GameMode]) => string;\n  readonly mapUrlForMap?: (mapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId]) => string;\n typeof GameMode[keyof typeof GameMode],\n    variant: typeof GravityVariant[keyof typeof GravityVariant],\n    ladder: typeof Ladder[keyof typeof Ladder],\n    mapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId],\n    roomId: string,\n  ) => void;\n  readonly onRefusal?: (code: number) => void;\n  readonly onClose?: (code: number, reason: string) => void;\n}\n\nconst EMPTY_INPUT: FrameInput = Object.freeze({\n  buttons: 0,\n  viewYaw: 0,\n  viewPitch: 0,\n});\n\nexport function createPlayground(\n  canvas: HTMLCanvasElement,\n  blobUrlOrOptions?: string | PlaygroundOptions,\n): { sim: SimHandle } {\n  // The bridge deliberately treats the canvas as an opaque ownership token.\n  void canvas;\n  const options: PlaygroundOptions = typeof blobUrlOrOptions === \"string\"\n    ? { initialMapUrl: blobUrlOrOptions }\n    : (blobUrlOrOptions ?? {});\n\n  let state = createInitialState();\n  let prevState = state;\n  let world: CollisionWorld | undefined;\n  let prediction: PredictionReconciler | undefined;\n  let network: NetworkSession | undefined;\n  let nextSeq = 1;\n  let params: MoveParams = DEFAULT;\n  let feel: FeelParams = DEFAULT_FEEL;\n  let input = EMPTY_INPUT;\n  let tickDriver: OffRenderTickDriver | undefined;\n  let welcomeMode: typeof GameMode[keyof typeof GameMode] = GameMode.GunGame;\n  let welcomeLadder: typeof Ladder[keyof typeof Ladder] = Ladder.Classic;\n  let welcomeMapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId] = MapId.Foundry;\n  let combat: CombatView = {\n    selfId: 0,\n    generation: 0,\n    health: 100,\n    alive: true,\n    tier: 1,\n    ammo: 0,\n    weaponId: WeaponId.Pistol,\n    predictedProjectiles: [],\n  };\n  const combatEvents: SnapshotEvent[] = [];\n\n  const tick = (): void => {\n    if (world === undefined) return;\n    prevState = state;\n    const cmd: Cmd = {\n      seq: nextSeq,\n      tick: state.tick,\n      buttons: input.buttons,\n      viewYaw: input.viewYaw,\n      viewPitch: input.viewPitch,\n      fireFraction: input.fireFraction ?? 0,\n      lastSnapshotTick: input.lastSnapshotTick ?? 0,\n      interpTargetTick: input.interpTargetTick ?? 0,\n      interpTargetFraction: input.interpTargetFraction ?? 0,\n    };\n    nextSeq += 1;\n    if (prediction === undefined) return;\n    if (combat.alive) state = prediction.predict(cmd);\n    network?.sendCommand(cmd, performance.now());\n  };\n\n  const sim: SimHandle = {\n    step: tick,\n    getState: () => state,\n    getPrevState: () => prevState,\n    getRenderPosition: (dtSeconds) =>\n      prediction?.renderPosition(dtSeconds) ?? state.player.position,\n    getRemotePlayers: (nowMs) => network?.remoteEntities(nowMs) ?? [],\n    getAlpha: () => tickDriver?.alpha ?? 0,\n    setParams: (nextParams) => {\n      params = { ...nextParams };\n      prediction?.configure(params, feel);\n    },\n    setFeel: (nextFeel) => {\n      feel = { ...nextFeel };\n      prediction?.configure(params, feel);\n    },\n    applyInput: (frameInput) => {\n      input = { ...frameInput };\n    },\n    getCombatState: () => combat,\n    drainCombatEvents: () => combatEvents.splice(0),\n    getPingMs: () => network?.clock.roundTripMs ?? 0,\n  };\n\n  let mapLoadSequence = 0;\n  let requestedMapUrl = \"\";\n  const installMap = async (\n    url: string,\n    mode: typeof GameMode[keyof typeof GameMode],\n    mapId: typeof MapId[keyof typeof MapId],\n    placeAtSpawn: boolean,\n  ): Promise<void> => {\n    const sequence = ++mapLoadSequence;\n    requestedMapUrl = url;\n    const response = await fetch(url);\n    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`map load failed: HTTP ${response.status}`);\n    const map = loadGameplayMap(await response.arrayBuffer());\n    if (sequence !== mapLoadSequence) return;\n    world = new CollisionWorld(map.collision, map.killVolumes);\n    if (placeAtSpawn) {\n      const spawn = map.spawns[0];\n      state = createInitialState();\n      if (spawn !== undefined) {\n        state = {\n          ...state,\n          player: {\n            ...state.player,\n            position: { ...spawn.position },\n            viewYaw: (spawn.yaw * 180) / Math.PI,\n          },\n        };\n      }\n    }\n    prediction = new PredictionReconciler(state, world);\n    prediction.configure(params, feel);\n    options.onMapLoaded?.(map, mode, mapId);\n  };\n\n  const initialMode = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get(\"mode\") === \"gungame\"\n    ? GameMode.GunGame\n    : GameMode.Scoutzknivez;\n  const mapQuery = new URLSearchParams(location.search).get(\"map\");\n  const initialMapId = initialMode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez\n    ? MapId.Spire\n    : mapQuery === \"duna\"\n      ? MapId.Duna\n      : mapQuery === \"cascade\"\n        ? MapId.Cascade\n        : MapId.Foundry;\n  const initialUrl = options.initialMapUrl ?? options.mapUrlForMap?.(initialMapId) ??\n    options.mapUrlForMode?.(initialMode) ??\n    new URL(\"../../maps/spire.blob\", import.meta.url).toString();\n\n  void installMap(initialUrl, initialMode, initialMapId, true)\n    .then(() => {\n      network = new NetworkSession({\n        onRefusal: (code) => options.onRefusal?.(code),\n        onClose: (code, reason) => options.onClose?.(code, reason),\n        onWelcome: (mode, variant, ladder, mapId, roomId) => {\n          welcomeMode = mode;\n          welcomeLadder = ladder;\n          welcomeMapId = mapId;\n          params = mode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez || variant === GravityVariant.Scoutz\n            ? SCOUTZ\n            : DEFAULT;\n          prediction?.configure(params, feel);\n          options.onWelcome?.(mode, variant, ladder, mapId, roomId);\n          const nextMapUrl = options.mapUrlForMap?.(mapId) ?? options.mapUrlForMode?.(mode);\n          if (nextMapUrl !== undefined && nextMapUrl !== requestedMapUrl) {\n            void installMap(nextMapUrl, mode, mapId, false).catch((error: unknown) => console.error(error));\n          }\n        },\n        onSnapshot: ({ frame, entities, resetPrediction, events }) => {\n          const snapshotMapId = frame.modeState?.mapId;\n          if (snapshotMapId !== undefined && snapshotMapId !== welcomeMapId) {\n            welcomeMapId = snapshotMapId;\n            const nextMapUrl = options.mapUrlForMap?.(snapshotMapId);\n            if (nextMapUrl !== undefined && nextMapUrl !== requestedMapUrl) {\n              void installMap(nextMapUrl, welcomeMode, snapshotMapId, false)\n                .catch((error: unknown) => console.error(error));\n            }\n          }\n          const self = entities.find((entity) =>\n            entity.id === network?.selfId && entity.kind === EntityKind.Player);\n          if (self === undefined || prediction === undefined) return;\n          const authoritative: State = {\n            tick: frame.tick,\n            player: {\n              ...prediction.state.player,\n              position: self.position,\n              velocity: self.velocity,\n              viewYaw: self.viewYaw,\n              viewPitch: self.viewPitch,\n              grounded: self.grounded,\n            },\n          };\n          prevState = prediction.state;\n          const generationChanged = combat.generation !== 0 && combat.generation !== self.generation;\n          if (resetPrediction || generationChanged) prediction.resetForEpoch(authoritative);\n          else prediction.reconcile(authoritative, frame.lastProcessedCmdSeq);\n          const weaponId = welcomeMode === GameMode.Scoutzknivez\n            ? WeaponId.Scout\n            : ladderWeapons(welcomeLadder)[Math.max(0, self.weaponTier - 1)] ?? WeaponId.Pistol;\n          prediction.configureCombat(self.id, self.generation, weaponId);\n          const predictedProjectiles = prediction.reconcileProjectiles(entities);\n          combat = {\n            selfId: self.id,\n            generation: self.generation,\n            health: self.health,\n            alive: self.alive,\n            tier: self.weaponTier,\n            ammo: self.ammo,\n            weaponId,\n            ...(frame.modeState === undefined ? {} : { modeState: frame.modeState }),\n            predictedProjectiles,\n          };\n          combatEvents.push(...events);\n          state = prediction.state;\n        },\n      });\n    })\n    .catch((error: unknown) => {\n      console.error(error);\n    });\n\n  tickDriver = new OffRenderTickDriver(tick);\n  tickDriver.start();\n\n  return { sim };\n}\n","numLines":306,"startLine":1,"totalLines":306}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"0eba4fee-fa14-4bf3-8038-96d0c8d3bf8f","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

\"\";\n207\t  private latestTick = 0;\n208\t  private arrivalMargin = 0;\n209\t\n210\t  constructor(options: NetworkSessionOptions) {\n211\t    this.onSnapshot = options.onSnapshot;\n212\t    this.onRefusal = options.onRefusal;\n213\t    this.onClose = options.onClose;\n214\t    this.onWelcome = options.onWelcome;\n215\t    this.channel = new WebSocketNetChannel(options.url ?? 0 || this.epochs.epoch === 0) return;\n229\t    const target = this.clock.interpolationTarget(nowMs, this.interpolation.delayTicks);\n230\t    const frame: CmdFrame = {\n231\t      type: FrameType.Cmd,\n232\t      seq: cmd.seq,\n233\t      tick: this.clock.commandTick(cmd.tick, this.arrivalMargin, nowMs),\n234\t      buttons: cmd.buttons,\n235\t      viewYaw: cmd.viewYaw,\n236\t      viewPitch: cmd.viewPitch,\n237\t      fireFraction: cmd.fireFraction,\n238\t      lastSnapshotTick: this.latestTick,\n239\t      interpTargetTick: target.tick,\n240\t      interpTargetFraction: target.fraction,\n241\t      baselineEpoch: this.epochs.epoch,\n242\t    };\n243\t    this.channel.send(encodeFrame(frame), \"latest\");\n244\t  }\n245\t\n246\t  remoteEntities(nowMs: number): readonly InterpolatedEntity[] {\n247\t    const target = this.clock.interpolationTarget(nowMs, this.interpolation.delayTicks);\n248\t    return this.interpolation.sample(target.tick, target.fraction);\n249\t  }\n250\t\n251\t  close(): void {\n252\t    if (this.pingTimer !== undefined) clearInterval(this.pingTimer);\n253\t    this.channel.close();\n254\t  }\n255\t\n256\t  private open(): void {\n257\t    const now = performance.now();\n258\t    this.fsm.transition(\"hello\", now);\n259\t    this.channel.send(encodeFrame(joinHello()), \"reliable\");\n260\t    this.pingTimer = setInterval(() => {\n261\t      const clientTime = performance.now();\n262\t      this.channel.send(encodeFrame({\n263\t        type: FrameType.Ping,\n264\t        nonce: this.pingNonce,\n265\t        clientTime,\n266\t      }), \"reliable\");\n267\t      this.pingNonce += 1;\n268\t    }, 1_000);\n269\t  }\n270\t\n271\t  private message(payload: Uint8Array): void {\n272\t    try {\n273\t      const frame = decodeFrame(payload);\n274\t      const now = performance.now();\n275\t      if (frame.type === FrameType.Welcome) {\n276\t        this.playerId = frame.playerId;\n277\t        this.roomId = frame.roomId;\n278\t        sessionStorage.setItem(`gg:reconnect:${frame.roomId}`, bytesToHex(frame.reconnectToken));\n279\t        this.onWelcome?.(frame.mode, frame.variant, frame.ladder, frame.mapId, frame.roomId);\n280\t        this.fsm.transition(\"baseline-install\", now);\n281\t        return;\n282\t      }\n283\t      if (frame.type === FrameType.Refusal) {\n284\t        if (frame.code === RefusalCode.VersionMismatch) console.error(\"client build mismatch\");\n285\t        this.onRefusal?.(frame.code);\n286\t        return;\n287\t      }\n288\t      if (frame.type === FrameType.Pong) {\n289\t        this.clock.observePong(frame.clientTime, now);\n290\t        return;\n291\t      }\n292\t      if (frame.type !== FrameType.Snapshot) return;\n293\t      this.clock.observeServerTick(frame.tick, now);\n294\t      this.arrivalMargin = frame.cmdArrivalMargin;\n295\t      const resetPrediction = frame.full;\n296\t      if (frame.full) {\n297\t        if (this.fsm.state === \"active\") this.fsm.transition(\"resync\", now);\n298\t        this.epochs.installFull(frame.baselineEpoch);\n299\t        this.entities.clear();\n300\t      } else if (this.epochs.classifyTraffic(frame.baselineEpoch) === \"valid-stale\") {\n301\t        return;\n302\t      }\n303\t      for (const delta of frame.entities) applyDelta(this.entities, delta);\n304\t      const events = this.events.dedupe(frame.events);\n305\t      this.latestTick = Math.max(this.latestTick, frame.tick);\n306\t      const entityValues = [...this.entities.values()];\n307\t      this.interpolation.push(frame.tick, entityValues, this.playerId);\n308\t      this.onSnapshot({ frame, entities: entityValues, resetPrediction, events });\n309\t      if (frame.full) {\n310\t        this.channel.send(encodeFrame({\n311\t          type: FrameType.BaselineAck,\n312\t          baselineEpoch: frame.baselineEpoch,\n313\t          snapshotTick: frame.tick,\n314\t        }), \"reliable\");\n315\t        if (this.fsm.state === \"baseline-install\" || this.fsm.state === \"resync\") {\n316\t          this.fsm.transition(\"active\", now);\n317\t        }\n318\t        this.epochs.finishResync();\n319\t      }\n320\t    } catch (error) {\n321\t      console.error(\"network frame rejected\", error);\n322\t      this.channel.close(4002, \"protocol error\");\n323\t    }\n324\t  }\n325\t\n326\t  private closed(code: number, reason: string): void {\n327\t    if (this.pingTimer !== undefined) clearInterval(this.pingTimer);\n328\t    console.warn(webSocketCloseForensics(code, reason).consoleMessage);\n329\t    if (this.fsm.state !== \"closing\") {\n330\t      try {\n331\t        this.fsm.transition(\"closing\", performance.now());\n332\t      } catch {\n333\t        // Already terminal after an invalid peer transition.\n334\t      }\n335\t    }\n336\t    this.onClose?.(code, reason);\n337\t  }\n338\t}\n339\t"}]},"uuid":"08bcf281-5e49-4410-9281-57068a031d3a","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:20:05.592Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/net/session.ts","content":"import constructor(options: NetworkSessionOptions) {\n    this.onSnapshot = options.onSnapshot;\n    this.onRefusal = options.onRefusal;\n    this.onClose = options.onClose;\n    this.onWelcome = options.onWelcome;\n    this.channel = new WebSocketNetChannel(options.url ?? defaultUrl(), {\n      open: () => this.open(),\n      message: (payload) => this.message(payload),\n      close: (code, reason) => this.closed(code, reason),\n      error: () => {},\n    });\n  }\n\n  get selfId(): number {\n    return this.playerId;\n  }\n\n  sendCommand(cmd: Cmd, nowMs: number): void {\n    if (this.playerId === 0 || this.epochs.epoch === 0) return;\n    const target = this.clock.interpolationTarget(nowMs, this.interpolation.delayTicks);\n    const frame: CmdFrame = {\n      type: FrameType.Cmd,\n      seq: cmd.seq,\n      tick: this.clock.commandTick(cmd.tick, this.arrivalMargin, nowMs),\n      buttons: cmd.buttons,\n      viewYaw: cmd.viewYaw,\n      viewPitch: cmd.viewPitch,\n      fireFraction: cmd.fireFraction,\n      lastSnapshotTick: this.latestTick,\n      interpTargetTick: target.tick,\n      interpTargetFraction: target.fraction,\n      baselineEpoch: this.epochs.epoch,\n    };\n    this.channel.send(encodeFrame(frame), \"latest\");\n  }\n\n  remoteEntities(nowMs: number): readonly InterpolatedEntity[] {\n    const target = this.clock.interpolationTarget(nowMs, this.interpolation.delayTicks);\n    return this.interpolation.sample(target.tick, target.fraction);\n  }\n\n  close(): void {\n    if (this.pingTimer !== undefined) clearInterval(this.pingTimer);\n    this.channel.close();\n  }\n\n  private open(): void {\n    const now = performance.now();\n    this.fsm.transition(\"hello\", now);\n    this.channel.send(encodeFrame(joinHello()), \"reliable\");\n    this.pingTimer = setInterval(() => {\n      const clientTime = performance.now();\n      this.channel.send(encodeFrame({\n        type: FrameType.Ping,\n        nonce: this.pingNonce,\n        clientTime,\n      }), \"reliable\");\n      this.pingNonce += 1;\n    }, 1_000);\n  }\n\n  private message(payload: Uint8Array): void {\n    try {\n      const frame = decodeFrame(payload);\n      const now = performance.now();\n      if (frame.type === FrameType.Welcome) {\n        this.playerId = frame.playerId;\n        this.roomId = frame.roomId;\n        sessionStorage.setItem(`gg:reconnect:${frame.roomId}`, bytesToHex(frame.reconnectToken));\n        this.onWelcome?.(frame.mode, frame.variant, frame.ladder, frame.mapId, frame.roomId);\n        this.fsm.transition(\"baseline-install\", now);\n        return;\n      }\n      if (frame.type === FrameType.Refusal) {\n        if (frame.code === RefusalCode.VersionMismatch) console.error(\"client build mismatch\");\n        this.onRefusal?.(frame.code);\n        return;\n      }\n      if (frame.type === FrameType.Pong) {\n        this.clock.observePong(frame.clientTime, now);\n        return;\n      }\n      if (frame.type !== FrameType.Snapshot) return;\n      this.clock.observeServerTick(frame.tick, now);\n      this.arrivalMargin = frame.cmdArrivalMargin;\n      const resetPrediction = frame.full;\n      if (frame.full) {\n        if (this.fsm.state === \"active\") this.fsm.transition(\"resync\", now);\n        this.epochs.installFull(frame.baselineEpoch);\n        this.entities.clear();\n      } else if (this.epochs.classifyTraffic(frame.baselineEpoch) === \"valid-stale\") {\n        return;\n      }\n      for (const delta of frame.entities) applyDelta(this.entities, delta);\n      const events = this.events.dedupe(frame.events);\n      this.latestTick = Math.max(this.latestTick, frame.tick);\n      const entityValues = [...this.entities.values()];\n      this.interpolation.push(frame.tick, entityValues, this.playerId);\n      this.onSnapshot({ frame, entities: entityValues, resetPrediction, events });\n      if (frame.full) {\n        this.channel.send(encodeFrame({\n          type: FrameType.BaselineAck,\n          baselineEpoch: frame.baselineEpoch,\n          snapshotTick: frame.tick,\n        }), \"reliable\");\n        if (this.fsm.state === \"baseline-install\" || this.fsm.state === \"resync\") {\n          this.fsm.transition(\"active\", now);\n        }\n        this.epochs.finishResync();\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"network frame rejected\", error);\n      this.channel.close(4002, \"protocol error\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  private closed(code: number, reason: string): void {\n    if (this.pingTimer !== undefined) clearInterval(this.pingTimer);\n    console.warn(webSocketCloseForensics(code, reason).consoleMessage);\n    if (this.fsm.state !== \"closing\") {\n      try {\n        this.fsm.transition(\"closing\", performance.now());\n      } catch {\n        // Already terminal after an invalid peer transition.\n      }\n    }\n    this.onClose?.(code, reason);\n  }\n}\n","numLines":339,"startLine":1,"totalLines":339}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"25e3efdc-2989-4721-819c-b54cfdcf2ff3","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

§3.6 input truth: Pointer Lock with raw motion, cm/360 sensitivity,\n2\t// zero smoothing, view sampled per render frame, sim consumes per tick.\n3\t\n4\texport interface FrameInput {\n5\t  yaw: number; // radians, absolute\n6\t  pitch: number; // radians, clamped ±89°\n7\t  buttons: number;\n8\t  /** 0..255 sub-tick position of the newest fire press inside the current tick, or -1 */\n9\t  fireFraction: number;\n10\t  /** yaw/pitch latched at the click sample, valid when fireFraction >= 0 */\n11\t  firedYaw: number;\n12\t  firedPitch: number;\n13\t}\n14\t\n15\texport interface InputKeyEvent {\n16\t  readonly code: string;\n17\t  readonly phase: \"down\" | \"up\";\n18\t  readonly repeat: boolean;\n19\t}\n20\t\n21\texport interface InputInspectorSnapshot {\n22\t  readonly buttons: number;\n23\t  readonly locked: boolean;\n24\t  readonly keyEvents: readonly InputKeyEvent[];\n25\t}\n26\t\n27\texport const Button = {\n28\t  Forward: 1 << 0,\n29\t  Back: 1 << 1,\n30\t  Left: 1 << 2,\n31\t  Right: 1 << 3,\n32\t  Jump: 1 << 4,\n33\t  Fire: 1 << 5,\n34\t  Duck: 1 << 6, // matches sim Buttons.Duck\n35\t  Zoom: 1 << 7, // client-local until the Phase 2 wire format pins it\n36\t  Background: 1 << 8,\n37\t  Melee: 1 << 9,\n38\t} as const;\n39\t\n40\texport type ControlAction =\n41\t  | \"forward\"\n42\t  | \"back\"\n43\t  | \"left\"\n44\t  | \"right\"\n45\t  | \"jump\"\n46\t  | \"duck\"\n47\t  | \"melee\"\n48\t  | \"clip\";\n49\t\n50\texport type ControlBindings = Readonly<Record<ControlAction, readonly string[]>>;\n51\t\n52\texport const CONTROL_BINDINGS_STORAGE_KEY = \"gg:controls\";\n53\texport const DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS: ControlBindings = Object.freeze({\n54\t  forward: Object.freeze([\"KeyW\"]),\n55\t  back: Object.freeze([\"KeyS\"]),\n56\t  left: Object.freeze([\"KeyA\"]),\n57\t  right: Object.freeze([\"KeyD\"]),\n58\t  jump: Object.freeze([\"Space\"]),\n59\t  // Shift is primary because macOS commonly consumes Ctrl+Space.\n60\t  duck: Object.freeze([\"ShiftLeft\", \"KeyC\", \"ControlLeft\"]),\n61\t  melee: Object.freeze([\"KeyF\"]),\n62\t  clip: Object.freeze([\"F8\"]),\n63\t});\n64\t\n65\tconst ACTION_BUTTON: Readonly<Record<ControlAction, number>> = Object.freeze({\n66\t  forward: Button.Forward,\n67\t  back: Button.Back,\n68\t  left: Button.Left,\n69\t  right: Button.Right,\n70\t  jump: Button.Jump,\n71\t  duck: Button.Duck,\n72\t  melee: Button.Melee,\n73\t  clip: 0,\n74\t});\n75\t\n76\tconst BUTTON_NAMES = Object.freeze([\n77\t  [Button.Forward, \"forward\"],\n78\t  [Button.Back, \"back\"],\n79\t  [Button.Left, \"left\"],\n80\t  [Button.Right, \"right\"],\n81\t  [Button.Jump, \"jump\"],\n82\t  [Button.Fire, \"fire\"],\n83\t  [Button.Duck, \"duck\"],\n84\t  [Button.Zoom, \"zoom\"],\n85\t  [Button.Background, \"background\"],\n86\t  [Button.Melee, \"melee\"],\n87\t] as const);\n88\t\n89\tconst CONTROL_ACTIONS = Object.keys(DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS) as ControlAction[];\n90\t\n91\tfunction safeBindingCode(value: unknown): value is string {\n92\t  return typeof value === \"string\" && /^(?:Key[A-Z]|Digit[0-9]|F(?:[1-9]|1[0-2])|Space|ShiftLeft|ShiftRight|ControlLeft|ControlRight|AltLeft|AltRight|Tab)$/.test(value);\n93\t}\n94\t\n95\texport function loadControlBindings(\n96\t  storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\">,\n97\t): ControlBindings {\n98\t  const raw = storage.getItem(CONTROL_BINDINGS_STORAGE_KEY);\n99\t  if (raw === null) return DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS;\n100\t  try {\n101\t    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Partial<Record<ControlAction, unknown>>;\n102\t    return Object.freeze(Object.fromEntries(CONTROL_ACTIONS.map((action) => {\n103\t      const values = parsed[action];\n104\t      return [\n105\t        action,\n106\t        Array.isArray(values) && values.length !== 0 && values.every(safeBindingCode)\n107\t          ? Object.freeze(values.slice(0, 3))\n108\t          : DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS[action],\n109\t      ];\n110\t    })) as Record<ControlAction, readonly string[]>);\n111\t  } catch {\n112\t    return DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS;\n113\t  }\n114\t}\n115\t\n116\texport function saveControlBindings(\n117\t  storage: Pick<Storage, \"setItem\">,\n118\t  bindings: ControlBindings,\n119\t): void {\n120\t  storage.setItem(CONTROL_BINDINGS_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(bindings));\n121\t}\n122\t\n123\texport function rebindControl(\n124\t  bindings: ControlBindings,\n125\t  action: ControlAction,\n126\t  code: string,\n127\t): ControlBindings {\n128\t  if (!safeBindingCode(code)) return bindings;\n129\t  const displaced = bindings[action][0];\n130\t  const next = Object.fromEntries(CONTROL_ACTIONS.map((candidate) => [\n131\t    candidate,\n132\t    candidate === action\n133\t      ? [code, ...bindings[candidate].slice(1)].filter(\n134\t          (value, index, values) => values.indexOf(value) === index,\n135\t        )\n136\t      : bindings[candidate].includes(code)\n137\t        ? [\n138\t            ...(displaced === undefined ? [] : [displaced]),\n139\t            ...bindings[candidate].filter((value) => value !== code && value !== displaced),\n140\t          ]\n141\t        : bindings[candidate],\n142\t  ])) as unknown as Record<ControlAction, readonly string[]>;\n143\t  return Object.freeze(next);\n144\t}\n145\t\n146\texport function bindingLabel(code: string): string {\n147\t  return code\n148\t    .replace(/^Key/, \"\")\n149\t    .replace(/^Digit/, \"\")\n150\t    .replace(\"ShiftLeft\", \"left shift\")\n151\t    .replace(\"ShiftRight\", \"right shift\")\n152\t    .replace(\"ControlLeft\", \"left ctrl\")\n153\t    .replace(\"ControlRight\", \"right ctrl\")\n154\t    .replace(\"Space\", \"space\")\n155\t    .toLowerCase();\n156\t}\n157\t\n158\texport function buttonsForPressedCodes(\n159\t  bindings: ControlBindings,\n160\t  codes: readonly string[],\n161\t): number {\n162\t  let buttons = 0;\n163\t  for (const action of CONTROL_ACTIONS) {\n164\t    if (bindings[action].some((code) => codes.includes(code))) {\n165\t      buttons |= ACTION_BUTTON[action];\n166\t    }\n167\t  }\n168\t  return buttons;\n169\t}\n170\t\n171\texport function formatButtonBits(buttons: number): string {\n172\t  const active = BUTTON_NAMES\n173\t    .filter(([bit]) => (buttons & bit) !== 0)\n174\t    .map(([, name]) => name);\n175\t  return `0x${buttons.toString(16).padStart(3, \"0\")} · ${active.join(\" \") || \"none\"}`;\n176\t}\n177\t\n178\tconst PITCH_LIMIT = (89 * Math.PI) / 180;\n179\t\n180\texport function pointerAnglesAfterDelta(\n181\t  yaw: number,\n182\t  pitch: number,\n183\t  movementX: number,\n184\t  movementY: number,\n185\t  radPerCount: number,\n186\t): { readonly yaw: number; readonly pitch: number } {\n187\t  return {\n188\t    yaw: yaw - movementX * radPerCount,\n189\t    pitch: Math.max(\n190\t      -PITCH_LIMIT,\n191\t      Math.min(PITCH_LIMIT, pitch - movementY * radPerCount),\n192\t    ),\n193\t  };\n194\t}\n195\t\n196\texport function resolveLiveInputElement(\n197\t  configured: HTMLElement,\n198\t  ownerDocument: Document = document,\n199\t): HTMLElement {\n200\t  if (configured.isConnected && configured.ownerDocument === ownerDocument) return configured;\n201\t  return ownerDocument.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\"#app canvas:last-of-type\") ?? configured;\n202\t}\n203\t\n204\texport class RawInput {\n205\t  yaw = 0;\n206\t  pitch = 0;\n207\t  private buttons = 0;\n208\t  private fireFraction = -1;\n209\t  private firedYaw = 0;\n210\t  private firedPitch = 0;\n211\t  private radPerCount: number;\n212\t  private tickStartMs = 0;\n213\t  private tickMs: number;\n214\t  private locked = false;\n215\t  private queuedJump = false;\n216\t  private queuedFire = false;\n217\t  private bindings: ControlBindings;\n218\t  private keyButtons = new Map<string, number>();\n219\t  private lockListeners = new Set<(locked: boolean) => void>();\n220\t  private readonly keyEvents: InputKeyEvent[] = [];\n221\t  private activityMs = performance.now();\n222\t  private readonly resolveConfiguredElement: () => HTMLElement;\n223\t\n224\t  /**\n225\t   * @param cm360 centimeters of mouse travel per full turn (the competitive standard)\n226\t   * @param dpi   mouse counts per inch\n227\t   */\n228\t  constructor(el: HTMLElement | (() => HTMLElement), cm360 = 30, dpi = 800, tickRate = 64) {\n229\t    this.resolveConfiguredElement = typeof el === \"function\" ? el : () => el;\n230\t    this.radPerCount = RawInput.radPerCount(cm360, dpi);\n231\t    this.tickMs = 1000 / tickRate;\n232\t    this.bindings = loadControlBindings(localStorage);\n233\t    this.rebuildKeyButtons();\n234\t    document.addEventListener(\"pointerdown\", (event) => {\n235\t      if (event.target !== this.liveElement()) return;\n236\t      this.markActivity();\n237\t      if (event.button !== 0 || this.locked) return;\n238\t      // Preserve the gesture as an actual shot while it also acquires lock.\n239\t      this.latchFire();\n240\t      this.requestLock();\n241\t      event.preventDefault();\n242\t    }, { capture: true });\n243\t    document.addEventListener(\"pointerlockchange\", () => {\n244\t      this.locked = document.pointerLockElement === this.liveElement();\n245\t      if (!this.locked) {\n246\t        this.buttons = 0;\n247\t        this.queuedJump = false;\n248\t      }\n249\t      for (const listener of this.lockListeners) listener(this.locked);\n250\t    });\n251\t    document.addEventListener(\"mousemove\", (e) => {\n252\t      if (!this.locked) return;\n253\t      this.markActivity();\n254\t      // movementX/Y are raw counts under unadjustedMovement — no OS accel.\n255\t      const next = pointerAnglesAfterDelta(\n256\t        this.yaw,\n257\t        this.pitch,\n258\t        e.movementX,\n259\t        e.movementY,\n260\t        this.radPerCount,\n261\t      );\n262\t      this.yaw = next.yaw;\n263\t      this.pitch = next.pitch;\n264\t    });\n265\t    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", (e) => {\n266\t      if (!this.locked) return;\n267\t      this.markActivity();\n268\t      if (e.button === 0) {\n269\t        this.latchFire();\n270\t      }\n271\t      if (e.button === 2) this.buttons |= Button.Zoom;\n272\t    });\n273\t    document.addEventListener(\"mouseup\", (e) => {\n274\t      if (e.button === 0) this.buttons &= ~Button.Fire;\n275\t      if (e.button === 2) this.buttons &= ~Button.Zoom;\n276\t    });\n277\t    document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (e) => {\n278\t      this.recordKeyEvent(e.code, \"down\", e.repeat);\n279\t      const b = this.keyButtons.get(e.code);\n280\t      if (b !== undefined && b !== 0 && this.locked) {\n281\t        this.buttons |= b;\n282\t        this.markActivity();\n283\t        e.preventDefault();\n284\t      }\n285\t    });\n286\t    document.addEventListener(\"keyup\", (e) => {\n287\t      this.recordKeyEvent(e.code, \"up\", e.repeat);\n288\t      const b = this.keyButtons.get(e.code);\n289\t      if (b !== undefined) this.buttons &= ~b;\n290\t    });\n291\t    document.addEventListener(\"wheel\", (event) => {\n292\t      if (event.target !== this.liveElement()) return;\n293\t      if (!this.locked || event.deltaY <= 0) return;\n294\t      this.queuedJump = true;\n295\t      this.markActivity();\n296\t      event.preventDefault();\n297\t    }, { passive: false });\n298\t    document.addEventListener(\"contextmenu\", (event) => {\n299\t      if (event.target === this.liveElement()) event.preventDefault();\n300\t    });\n301\t    document.addEventListener(\"visibilitychange\", () => {\n302\t      if (document.hidden) this.buttons |= Button.Background;\n303\t      else this.buttons &= ~Button.Background;\n304\t    });\n305\t  }\n306\t\n307\t  static radPerCount(cm360: number, dpi: number): number {\n308\t    const countsPer360 = (cm360 / 2.54) * dpi;\n309\t    return (2 * Math.PI) / countsPer360;\n310\t  }\n311\t\n312\t  setSensitivity(cm360: number, dpi = 800): void {\n313\t    this.radPerCount = RawInput.radPerCount(cm360, dpi);\n314\t  }\n315\t\n316\t  setBindings(bindings: ControlBindings): void {\n317\t    this.bindings = bindings;\n318\t    this.rebuildKeyButtons();\n319\t    saveControlBindings(localStorage, bindings);\n320\t  }\n321\t\n322\t  get controlBindings(): ControlBindings {\n323\t    return this.bindings;\n324\t  }\n325\t\n326\t  get lastActivityMs(): number {\n327\t    return this.activityMs;\n328\t  }\n329\t\n330\t  get inspector(): InputInspectorSnapshot {\n331\t    return {\n332\t      buttons: this.buttons |\n333\t        (this.queuedJump ? Button.Jump : 0) |\n334\t        (this.queuedFire ? Button.Fire : 0),\n335\t      locked: this.locked,\n336\t      keyEvents: this.keyEvents.map((event) => ({ ...event })),\n337\t    };\n338\t  }\n339\t\n340\t  onLockChange(listener: (locked: boolean) => void): () => void {\n341\t    this.lockListeners.add(listener);\n342\t    return () => this.lockListeners.delete(listener);\n343\t  }\n344\t\n345\t  requestLock(): void {\n346\t    // unadjustedMovement gives raw counts; fall back where unsupported.\n347\t    const element = this.liveElement();\n348\t    if (!element.isConnected || element.ownerDocument !== document) {\n349\t      console.warn(\"pointer lock skipped: live canvas is not mounted\");\n350\t      return;\n351\t    }\n352\t    try {\n353\t      const pending = element.requestPointerLock({ unadjustedMovement: true } as PointerLockOptions);\n354\t      if (pending && typeof (pending as Promise<void>).catch === \"function\") {\n355\t        void (pending as Promise<void>).catch(() => this.requestFallbackLock());\n356\t      }\n357\t    } catch {\n358\t      this.requestFallbackLock();\n359\t    }\n360\t  }\n361\t\n362\t  /** Called by the fixed-tick loop at each tick boundary; returns and re-arms per-tick state. */\n363\t  sampleTick(): FrameInput {\n364\t    const pulseButtons =\n365\t      (this.queuedJump ? Button.Jump : 0) |\n366\t      (this.queuedFire ? Button.Fire : 0);\n367\t    const out: FrameInput = {\n368\t      yaw: this.yaw,\n369\t      pitch: this.pitch,\n370\t      buttons: this.buttons | pulseButtons,\n371\t      fireFraction: this.fireFraction,\n372\t      firedYaw: this.firedYaw,\n373\t      firedPitch: this.firedPitch,\n374\t    };\n375\t    this.fireFraction = -1;\n376\t    this.queuedJump = false;\n377\t    this.queuedFire = false;\n378\t    this.tickStartMs = performance.now();\n379\t    return out;\n380\t  }\n381\t\n382\t  get isLocked(): boolean {\n383\t    return this.locked;\n384\t  }\n385\t\n386\t  private latchFire(): void {\n387\t    this.buttons |= Button.Fire;\n388\t    this.queuedFire = true;\n389\t    const frac = (performance.now() - this.tickStartMs) / this.tickMs;\n390\t    this.fireFraction = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, Math.floor(frac * 256)));\n391\t    this.firedYaw = this.yaw;\n392\t    this.firedPitch = this.pitch;\n393\t  }\n394\t\n395\t  private rebuildKeyButtons(): void {\n396\t    this.keyButtons.clear();\n397\t    for (const action of CONTROL_ACTIONS) {\n398\t      for (const code of this.bindings[action]) {\n399\t        this.keyButtons.set(code, (this.keyButtons.get(code) ?? 0) | ACTION_BUTTON[action]);\n400\t      }\n401\t    }\n402\t  }\n403\t\n404\t  private markActivity(): void {\n405\t    this.activityMs = performance.now();\n406\t  }\n407\t\n408\t  private recordKeyEvent(code: string, phase: InputKeyEvent[\"phase\"], repeat: boolean): void {\n409\t    this.keyEvents.push({ code, phase, repeat });\n410\t    if (this.keyEvents.length > 5) this.keyEvents.shift();\n411\t  }\n412\t\n413\t  private requestFallbackLock(): void {\n414\t    const fallback = this.liveElement();\n415\t    if (!fallback.isConnected || fallback.ownerDocument !== document) return;\n416\t    try {\n417\t      const pending = fallback.requestPointerLock();\n418\t      if (pending && typeof (pending as Promise<void>).catch === \"function\") {\n419\t        void (pending as Promise<void>).catch((error) => {\n420\t          console.warn(\"pointer lock request rejected\", error);\n421\t        });\n422\t      }\n423\t    } catch (error) {\n424\t      console.warn(\"pointer lock request rejected\", error);\n425\t    }\n426\t  }\n427\t\n428\t  private liveElement(): HTMLElement {\n429\t    return resolveLiveInputElement(this.resolveConfiguredElement());\n430\t  }\n431\t}\n432\t"}]},"uuid":"776d75c3-53a1-4b8e-b68f-c6e4985335f6","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:20:36.442Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/input.ts","content":"// §3.6 input truth: Pointer Lock with raw motion, cm/360 sensitivity,\n// zero smoothing, view sampled per render frame, sim consumes per tick.\n\nexport interface FrameInput {\n  yaw: number; // radians, absolute\n  pitch: number; // radians, clamped ±89°\n  buttons: number;\n  /** 0..255 sub-tick position of the newest fire press inside the current tick, or -1 */\n  fireFraction: number;\n  /** yaw/pitch latched at the click sample, valid when fireFraction >= 0 */\n  firedYaw: number;\n  firedPitch: number;\n}\n\nexport interface InputKeyEvent {\n  readonly code: string;\n  readonly phase: \"down\" | \"up\";\n  readonly repeat: boolean;\n}\n\nexport interface InputInspectorSnapshot {\n  readonly buttons: number;\n  readonly locked: boolean;\n  readonly keyEvents: readonly InputKeyEvent[];\n}\n\nexport const Button = {\n  Forward: 1 << 0,\n  Back: 1 << 1,\n  Left: 1 << 2,\n  Right: 1 << 3,\n  Jump: 1 << 4,\n  Fire: 1 << 5,\n  Duck: 1 << 6, // matches sim Buttons.Duck\n  Zoom: 1 << 7, // client-local until the Phase 2 wire format pins it\n  Background: 1 << 8,\n  Melee: 1 << 9,\n} as const;\n\nexport type ControlAction =\n  | \"forward\"\n  | \"back\"\n  | \"left\"\n  | \"right\"\n  | \"jump\"\n  | \"duck\"\n  | \"melee\"\n  | \"clip\";\n\nexport type ControlBindings = Readonly<Record<ControlAction, readonly string[]>>;\n\nexport const CONTROL_BINDINGS_STORAGE_KEY = \"gg:controls\";\nexport const DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS: ControlBindings = Object.freeze({\n  forward: Object.freeze([\"KeyW\"]),\n  back: Object.freeze([\"KeyS\"]),\n  left: Object.freeze([\"KeyA\"]),\n  right: Object.freeze([\"KeyD\"]),\n  jump: Object.freeze([\"Space\"]),\n  // Shift is primary because macOS commonly consumes Ctrl+Space.\n  duck: Object.freeze([\"ShiftLeft\", \"KeyC\", \"ControlLeft\"]),\n  melee: Object.freeze([\"KeyF\"]),\n  clip: Object.freeze([\"F8\"]),\n});\n\nconst ACTION_BUTTON: Readonly<Record<ControlAction, number>> = Object.freeze({\n  forward: Button.Forward,\n  back: Button.Back,\n  left: Button.Left,\n  right: Button.Right,\n  jump: Button.Jump,\n  duck: Button.Duck,\n  melee: Button.Melee,\n  clip: 0,\n});\n\nconst BUTTON_NAMES = Object.freeze([\n  [Button.Forward, \"forward\"],\n  [Button.Back, \"back\"],\n  [Button.Left, \"left\"],\n  [Button.Right, \"right\"],\n  [Button.Jump, \"jump\"],\n  [Button.Fire, \"fire\"],\n  [Button.Duck, \"duck\"],\n  [Button.Zoom, \"zoom\"],\n  [Button.Background, \"background\"],\n  [Button.Melee, \"melee\"],\n] as const);\n\nconst CONTROL_ACTIONS = Object.keys(DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS) as ControlAction[];\n\nfunction safeBindingCode(value: unknown): value is string {\n  return typeof value === \"string\" && /^(?:Key[A-Z]|Digit[0-9]|F(?:[1-9]|1[0-2])|Space|ShiftLeft|ShiftRight|ControlLeft|ControlRight|AltLeft|AltRight|Tab)$/.test(value);\n}\n\nexport function loadControlBindings(\n  storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\">,\n): ControlBindings {\n  const raw = storage.getItem(CONTROL_BINDINGS_STORAGE_KEY);\n  if (raw === null) return DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS;\n  try {\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Partial<Record<ControlAction, unknown>>;\n    return Object.freeze(Object.fromEntries(CONTROL_ACTIONS.map((action) => {\n      const values = parsed[action];\n      return [\n        action,\n        Array.isArray(values) && values.length !== 0 && values.every(safeBindingCode)\n          ? Object.freeze(values.slice(0, 3))\n          : DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS[action],\n      ];\n    })) as Record<ControlAction, readonly string[]>);\n  } catch {\n    return DEFAULT_CONTROL_BINDINGS;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function saveControlBindings(\n  storage: Pick<Storage, \"setItem\">,\n  bindings: ControlBindings,\n): void {\n  storage.setItem(CONTROL_BINDINGS_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(bindings));\n}\n\nexport function rebindControl(\n  bindings: ControlBindings,\n  action: ControlAction,\n  code: string,\n): ControlBindings {\n  if (!safeBindingCode(code)) return bindings;\n  const displaced = bindings[action][0];\n  const next = Object.fromEntries(CONTROL_ACTIONS.map((candidate) => [\n    candidate,\n    candidate === action\n      ? [code, ...bindings[candidate].slice(1)].filter(\n          (value, index, values) => values.indexOf(value) === index,\n        )\n      : bindings[candidate].includes(code)\n        ? [\n            ...(displaced === undefined ? [] : [displaced]),\n            ...bindings[candidate].filter((value) => value !== code && value !== displaced),\n          ]\n        : bindings[candidate],\n  ])) as unknown as Record<ControlAction, readonly string[]>;\n  return Object.freeze(next);\n}\n\nexport function bindingLabel(code: string): string {\n  return code\n    .replace(/^Key/, \"\")\n    .replace(/^Digit/, \"\")\n    .replace(\"ShiftLeft\", \"left shift\")\n    .replace(\"ShiftRight\", \"right shift\")\n    .replace(\"ControlLeft\", \"left ctrl\")\n    .replace(\"ControlRight\", \"right ctrl\")\n    .replace(\"Space\", \"space\")\n    .toLowerCase();\n}\n\nexport function buttonsForPressedCodes(\n  bindings: ControlBindings,\n  codes: readonly string[],\n): number {\n  let buttons = 0;\n  for (const action of CONTROL_ACTIONS) {\n    if (bindings[action].some((code) => codes.includes(code))) {\n      buttons |= ACTION_BUTTON[action];\n    }\n  }\n  return buttons;\n}\n\nexport function formatButtonBits(buttons: number): string {\n  const active = BUTTON_NAMES\n    .filter(([bit]) => (buttons & bit) !== 0)\n    .map(([, name]) => name);\n  return `0x${buttons.toString(16).padStart(3, \"0\")} · ${active.join(\" \") || \"none\"}`;\n}\n\nconst PITCH_LIMIT = (89 * Math.PI) / 180;\n\nexport function pointerAnglesAfterDelta(\n  yaw: number,\n  pitch: number,\n  movementX: number,\n  movementY: number,\n  radPerCount: number,\n): { readonly yaw: number; readonly pitch: number } {\n  return {\n    yaw: yaw - movementX * radPerCount,\n    pitch: Math.max(\n      -PITCH_LIMIT,\n      Math.min(PITCH_LIMIT, pitch - movementY * radPerCount),\n    ),\n  };\n}\n\nexport function resolveLiveInputElement(\n  configured: HTMLElement,\n  ownerDocument: Document = document,\n): HTMLElement {\n  if (configured.isConnected && configured.ownerDocument === ownerDocument) return configured;\n  return ownerDocument.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\"#app canvas:last-of-type\") ?? configured;\n}\n\nexport class RawInput {\n  yaw = 0;\n  pitch = 0;\n  private buttons = 0;\n  private fireFraction = -1;\n  private firedYaw = 0;\n  private firedPitch = 0;\n  private radPerCount: number;\n  private tickStartMs = 0;\n  private tickMs: number;\n  private locked = false;\n  private queuedJump = false;\n  private queuedFire = false;\n  private bindings: ControlBindings;\n  private keyButtons = new Map<string, number>();\n  private lockListeners = new Set<(locked: boolean) => void>();\n  private readonly keyEvents: InputKeyEvent[] = [];\n  private activityMs = performance.now();\n  private readonly resolveConfiguredElement: () => HTMLElement;\n\n  /**\n   * @param cm360 centimeters of mouse travel per full turn (the competitive standard)\n   * @param dpi   mouse counts per inch\n   */\n  constructor(el: HTMLElement | (() => HTMLElement), cm360 = 30, dpi = 800, tickRate = 64) {\n    this.resolveConfiguredElement = typeof el === \"function\" ? el : () => el;\n    this.radPerCount = RawInput.radPerCount(cm360, dpi);\n    this.tickMs = 1000 / tickRate;\n    this.bindings = loadControlBindings(localStorage);\n    this.rebuildKeyButtons();\n    document.addEventListener(\"pointerdown\", (event) => {\n      if (event.target !== this.liveElement()) return;\n      this.markActivity();\n      if (event.button !== 0 || this.locked) return;\n      // Preserve the gesture as an actual shot while it also acquires lock.\n      this.latchFire();\n      this.requestLock();\n      event.preventDefault();\n    }, { capture: true });\n    document.addEventListener(\"pointerlockchange\", () => {\n      this.locked = document.pointerLockElement === this.liveElement();\n      if (!this.locked) {\n        this.buttons = 0;\n        this.queuedJump = false;\n      }\n      for (const listener of this.lockListeners) listener(this.locked);\n    });\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousemove\", (e) => {\n      if (!this.locked) return;\n      this.markActivity();\n      // movementX/Y are raw counts under unadjustedMovement — no OS accel.\n      const next = pointerAnglesAfterDelta(\n        this.yaw,\n        this.pitch,\n        e.movementX,\n        e.movementY,\n        this.radPerCount,\n      );\n      this.yaw = next.yaw;\n      this.pitch = next.pitch;\n    });\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", (e) => {\n      if (!this.locked) return;\n      this.markActivity();\n      if (e.button === 0) {\n        this.latchFire();\n      }\n      if (e.button === 2) this.buttons |= Button.Zoom;\n    });\n    document.addEventListener(\"mouseup\", (e) => {\n      if (e.button === 0) this.buttons &= ~Button.Fire;\n      if (e.button === 2) this.buttons &= ~Button.Zoom;\n    });\n    document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (e) => {\n      this.recordKeyEvent(e.code, \"down\", e.repeat);\n      const b = this.keyButtons.get(e.code);\n      if (b !== undefined && b !== 0 && this.locked) {\n        this.buttons |= b;\n        this.markActivity();\n        e.preventDefault();\n      }\n    });\n    document.addEventListener(\"keyup\", (e) => {\n      this.recordKeyEvent(e.code, \"up\", e.repeat);\n      const b = this.keyButtons.get(e.code);\n      if (b !== undefined) this.buttons &= ~b;\n    });\n    document.addEventListener(\"wheel\", (event) => {\n      if (event.target !== this.liveElement()) return;\n      if (!this.locked || event.deltaY <= 0) return;\n      this.queuedJump = true;\n      this.markActivity();\n      event.preventDefault();\n    }, { passive: false });\n    document.addEventListener(\"contextmenu\", (event) => {\n      if (event.target === this.liveElement()) event.preventDefault();\n    });\n    document.addEventListener(\"visibilitychange\", () => {\n      if (document.hidden) this.buttons |= Button.Background;\n      else this.buttons &= ~Button.Background;\n    });\n  }\n\n  static radPerCount(cm360: number, dpi: number): number {\n    const countsPer360 = (cm360 / 2.54) * dpi;\n    return (2 * Math.PI) / countsPer360;\n  }\n\n  setSensitivity(cm360: number, dpi = 800): void {\n    this.radPerCount = RawInput.radPerCount(cm360, dpi);\n  }\n\n  setBindings(bindings: ControlBindings): void {\n    this.bindings = bindings;\n    this.rebuildKeyButtons();\n    saveControlBindings(localStorage, bindings);\n  }\n\n  get controlBindings(): ControlBindings {\n    return this.bindings;\n  }\n\n  get lastActivityMs(): number {\n    return this.activityMs;\n  }\n\n  get inspector(): InputInspectorSnapshot {\n    return {\n      buttons: this.buttons |\n        (this.queuedJump ? Button.Jump : 0) |\n        (this.queuedFire ? Button.Fire : 0),\n      locked: this.locked,\n      keyEvents: this.keyEvents.map((event) => ({ ...event })),\n    };\n  }\n\n  onLockChange(listener: (locked: boolean) => void): () => void {\n    this.lockListeners.add(listener);\n    return () => this.lockListeners.delete(listener);\n  }\n\n  requestLock(): void {\n    // unadjustedMovement gives raw counts; fall back where unsupported.\n    const element = this.liveElement();\n    if (!element.isConnected || element.ownerDocument !== document) {\n      console.warn(\"pointer lock skipped: live canvas is not mounted\");\n      return;\n    }\n    try {\n      const pending = element.requestPointerLock({ unadjustedMovement: true } as PointerLockOptions);\n      if (pending && typeof (pending as Promise<void>).catch === \"function\") {\n        void (pending as Promise<void>).catch(() => this.requestFallbackLock());\n      }\n    } catch {\n      this.requestFallbackLock();\n    }\n  }\n\n  /** Called by the fixed-tick loop at each tick boundary; returns and re-arms per-tick state. */\n  sampleTick(): FrameInput {\n    const pulseButtons =\n      (this.queuedJump ? Button.Jump : 0) |\n      (this.queuedFire ? Button.Fire : 0);\n    const out: FrameInput = {\n      yaw: this.yaw,\n      pitch: this.pitch,\n      buttons: this.buttons | pulseButtons,\n      fireFraction: this.fireFraction,\n      firedYaw: this.firedYaw,\n      firedPitch: this.firedPitch,\n    };\n    this.fireFraction = -1;\n    this.queuedJump = false;\n    this.queuedFire = false;\n    this.tickStartMs = performance.now();\n    return out;\n  }\n\n  get isLocked(): boolean {\n    return this.locked;\n  }\n\n  private latchFire(): void {\n    this.buttons |= Button.Fire;\n    this.queuedFire = true;\n    const frac = (performance.now() - this.tickStartMs) / this.tickMs;\n    this.fireFraction = Math.max(0, Math.min(255, Math.floor(frac * 256)));\n    this.firedYaw = this.yaw;\n    this.firedPitch = this.pitch;\n  }\n\n  private rebuildKeyButtons(): void {\n    this.keyButtons.clear();\n    for (const action of CONTROL_ACTIONS) {\n      for (const code of this.bindings[action]) {\n        this.keyButtons.set(code, (this.keyButtons.get(code) ?? 0) | ACTION_BUTTON[action]);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private markActivity(): void {\n    this.activityMs = performance.now();\n  }\n\n  private recordKeyEvent(code: string, phase: InputKeyEvent[\"phase\"], repeat: boolean): void {\n    this.keyEvents.push({ code, phase, repeat });\n    if (this.keyEvents.length > 5) this.keyEvents.shift();\n  }\n\n  private requestFallbackLock(): void {\n    const fallback = this.liveElement();\n    if (!fallback.isConnected || fallback.ownerDocument !== document) return;\n    try {\n      const pending = fallback.requestPointerLock();\n      if (pending && typeof (pending as Promise<void>).catch === \"function\") {\n        void (pending as Promise<void>).catch((error) => {\n          console.warn(\"pointer lock request rejected\", error);\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.warn(\"pointer lock request rejected\", error);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private liveElement(): HTMLElement {\n    return resolveLiveInputElement(this.resolveConfiguredElement());\n  }\n}\n","numLines":432,"startLine":1,"totalLines":432}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"5052912f-ac82-4369-ac31-752ffcf0accc","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}
