{\n2\t  DEFAULT_FEEL,\n3\t  TICK_DT,\n4\t  WEAPONS,\n5\t  type FeelParams,\n6\t  type Vec3,\n7\t  type WeaponIdValue,\n8\t} from \"@gungame/shared\";\n9\timport { EntityKind, type EntityState } from \"@gungame/protocol\";\n10\timport {\n11\t  DEFAULT,\n12\t  Buttons,\n13\t  OwnProjectilePrediction,\n14\t  ProjectileSystem,\n15\t  fireDirection,\n16\t  resolveSplash,\n17\t  shooterEye,\n18\t  type Cmd,\n19\t  type CollisionWorld,\n20\t  type MoveParams,\n21\t  type State,\n22\t  step,\n23\t  type ProjectileState,\n24\t} from \"@gungame/sim\";\n25\t\n26\tfunction subtract(a: Vec3, b: Vec3): Vec3 {\n27\t  return { x: a.x - b.x, y: a.y - b.y, z: a.z - b.z };\n28\t}\n29\t\n30\tfunction length(value: Vec3): number {\n31\t  return Math.hypot(value.x, value.y, value.z);\n32\t}\n33\t\n34\texport class PredictionReconciler {\n35\t  private predicted: State;\n36\t  private readonly unacked: Cmd[] = [];\n37\t  private renderError: Vec3 = { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 };\n38\t  private readonly world: CollisionWorld | undefined;\n39\t  private params: MoveParams = DEFAULT;\n40\t  private feel: FeelParams = DEFAULT_FEEL;\n41\t  private projectileSystem = new ProjectileSystem();\n42\t  private projectileMatcher = new OwnProjectilePrediction();\n43\t  private matchedProjectiles: readonly ProjectileState[] = [];\n44\t  private ownerId = 0;\n45\t  private ownerGeneration = 0;\n46\t  private weaponId: WeaponIdValue | undefined;\n47\t  private nextFireTick = 0;\n48\t\n49\t  constructor(initial: State, world?: CollisionWorld) {\n50\t    this.predicted = initial;\n51\t    this.world = world;\n52\t  }\n53\t\n54\t  get state(): State {\n55\t    return this.predicted;\n56\t  }\n57\t\n58\t  configure(params: MoveParams, feel: FeelParams): void {\n59\t    this.params = { ...params };\n60\t    this.feel = { ...feel };\n61\t  }\n62\t\n63\t  configureCombat(ownerId: number, generation: number, weaponId: WeaponIdValue): void {\n64\t    this.ownerId = ownerId;\n65\t    this.ownerGeneration = generation;\n66\t    if (this.weaponId !== weaponId) this.nextFireTick = 0;\n67\t    this.weaponId = weaponId;\n68\t  }\n69\t\n70\t  get predictedProjectiles(): readonly ProjectileState[] {\n71\t    return this.matchedProjectiles;\n72\t  }\n73\t\n74\t  predict(cmd: Cmd): State {\n75\t    this.unacked.push(cmd);\n76\t    const previous = this.predicted;\n77\t    const moved = step(\n78\t      this.predicted,\n79\t      cmd,\n80\t      TICK_DT,\n81\t      {\n82\t        ...(this.world === undefined ? {} : { world: this.world }),\n83\t        params: this.params,\n84\t        feel: this.feel,\n85\t      },\n86\t    );\n87\t    this.predicted = this.predictCombat(previous, moved, cmd);\n88\t    return this.predicted;\n89\t  }\n90\t\n91\t  reconcile(\n92\t    authoritative: State,\n93\t    lastProcessedCmdSeq: number,\n94\t    resetRenderOffset = false,\n95\t  ): State {\n96\t    const oldPosition = this.predicted.player.position;\n97\t    while ((this.unacked[0]?.seq ?? Infinity) <= lastProcessedCmdSeq) {\n98\t      const acknowledged = this.unacked.shift();\n99\t      if (acknowledged !== undefined) this.projectileMatcher.remove(this.ownerId, acknowledged.seq);\n100\t    }\n101\t    this.projectileSystem = new ProjectileSystem();\n102\t    this.projectileMatcher = new OwnProjectilePrediction();\n103\t    this.nextFireTick = 0;\n104\t    let rebuilt = authoritative;\n105\t    for (const cmd of this.unacked) {\n106\t      const previous = rebuilt;\n107\t      const moved = step(\n108\t        rebuilt,\n109\t        cmd,\n110\t        TICK_DT,\n111\t        {\n112\t          ...(this.world === undefined ? {} : { world: this.world }),\n113\t          params: this.params,\n114\t          feel: this.feel,\n115\t        },\n116\t      );\n117\t      rebuilt = this.predictCombat(previous, moved, cmd);\n118\t    }\n119\t    this.predicted = rebuilt;\n120\t    const correction = subtract(oldPosition, rebuilt.player.position);\n121\t {\n  DEFAULT_FEEL,\n  TICK_DT,\n  WEAPONS,\n  type FeelParams,\n  type Vec3,\n  type WeaponIdValue,\n} from \"@gungame/shared\";\nimport { EntityKind, type EntityState } from \"@gungame/protocol\";\nimport {\n  DEFAULT,\n  Buttons,\n  OwnProjectilePrediction,\n  ProjectileSystem,\n  fireDirection,\n  resolveSplash,\n  shooterEye,\n  type Cmd,\n  type CollisionWorld,\n  type MoveParams,\n  type State,\n  step,\n  type ProjectileState,\n} from \"@gungame/sim\";\n\nfunction subtract(a: Vec3, b: Vec3): Vec3 {\n  return { x: a.x - b.x, y: a.y - b.y, z: a.z - b.z };\n}\n\nfunction length(value: Vec3): number {\n  return Math.hypot(value.x, value.y, value.z);\n}\n\nexport class PredictionReconciler {\n  private predicted: State;\n  private readonly unacked: Cmd[] = [];\n  private renderError: Vec3 = { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 };\n  private readonly world: CollisionWorld | undefined;\n  private params: MoveParams = DEFAULT;\n  private feel: FeelParams = DEFAULT_FEEL;\n  private projectileSystem = new ProjectileSystem();\n  private projectileMatcher = new OwnProjectilePrediction();\n  private matchedProjectiles: readonly ProjectileState[] = [];\n  private ownerId = 0;\n  private ownerGeneration = 0;\n  private weaponId: WeaponIdValue | undefined;\n  private nextFireTick = 0;\n\n  constructor(initial: State, world?: CollisionWorld) {\n    this.predicted = initial;\n    this.world = world;\n  }\n\n  get state(): State {\n    return this.predicted;\n  }\n\n  configure(params: MoveParams, feel: FeelParams): void {\n    this.params = { ...params };\n    this.feel = { ...feel };\n  }\n\n  configureCombat(ownerId: number, generation: number, weaponId: WeaponIdValue): void {\n    this.ownerId = ownerId;\n    this.ownerGeneration = generation;\n    if (this.weaponId !== weaponId) this.nextFireTick = 0;\n    this.weaponId = weaponId;\n  }\n\n  get predictedProjectiles(): readonly ProjectileState[] {\n    return this.matchedProjectiles;\n  }\n\n  predict(cmd: Cmd): State {\n    this.unacked.push(cmd);\n    const previous = this.predicted;\n    const moved = step(\n      this.predicted,\n      cmd,\n      TICK_DT,\n      {\n        ...(this.world === undefined ? {} : { world: this.world }),\n        params: this.params,\n        feel: this.feel,\n      },\n    );\n    this.predicted = this.predictCombat(previous, moved, cmd);\n    return this.predicted;\n  }\n\n  reconcile(\n    authoritative: State,\n    lastProcessedCmdSeq: number,\n    resetRenderOffset = false,\n  ): State {\n    const oldPosition = this.predicted.player.position;\n    while ((this.unacked[0]?.seq ?? Infinity) <= lastProcessedCmdSeq) {\n      const acknowledged = this.unacked.shift();\n      if (acknowledged !== undefined) this.projectileMatcher.remove(this.ownerId, acknowledged.seq);\n    }\n    this.projectileSystem = new ProjectileSystem();\n    this.projectileMatcher = new OwnProjectilePrediction();\n    this.nextFireTick = 0;\n    let rebuilt = authoritative;\n    for (const cmd of this.unacked) {\n      const previous = rebuilt;\n      const moved = step(\n        rebuilt,\n        cmd,\n        TICK_DT,\n        {\n          ...(this.world === undefined ? {} : { world: this.world }),\n          params: this.params,\n          feel: this.feel,\n        },\n      );\n      rebuilt = this.predictCombat(previous, moved, cmd);\n    }\n    this.predicted = rebuilt;\n    const correction = subtract(oldPosition, rebuilt.player.position);\n    this.renderError = resetRenderOffset || length(correction) > 0.5\n      ? { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 }\n      : {\n          x: this.renderError.x + correction.x,\n          y: this.renderError.y + correction.y,\n          z: this.renderError.z + correction.z,\n        };\n    this.constrainRenderError();\n    return this.predicted;\n  }\n\n  renderPosition(dtSeconds: number): Vec3 {\n    const decay = Math.exp(-Math.max(0, dtSeconds) / 0.1);\n    this.renderError = {\n      x: this.renderError.x * decay,\n      y: this.renderError.y * decay,\n      z: this.renderError.z * decay,\n    };\n    this.constrainRenderError();\n    return {\n      x: this.predicted.player.position.x + this.renderError.x,\n      y: this.predicted.player.position.y + this.renderError.y,\n      z: this.predicted.player.position.z + this.renderError.z,\n    };\n  }\n\n  resetForEpoch(authoritative: State): void {\n    this.unacked.length = 0;\n    this.predicted = authoritative;\n    this.renderError = { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 };\n    this.projectileSystem = new ProjectileSystem();\n    this.projectileMatcher = new OwnProjectilePrediction();\n    this.matchedProjectiles = [];\n    this.nextFireTick = 0;\n  }\n\n  reconcileProjectiles(entities: readonly EntityState[]): readonly ProjectileState[] {\n    const replicated = entities\n      .filter((entity) => entity.kind === EntityKind.Projectile && entity.ownerId === this.ownerId)\n      .map((entity): ProjectileState => ({\n        id: entity.id,\n        generation: entity.generation,\n        ownerId: entity.ownerId,\n        ownerGeneration: this.ownerGeneration,\n        fireCmdSeq: entity.fireCmdSeq,\n        weaponId: entity.weaponId as WeaponIdValue,\n        spawnTick: 0,\n        position: entity.position,\n        velocity: entity.velocity,\n      }));\n    this.matchedProjectiles = this.projectileMatcher.reconcile(replicated);\n    return this.matchedProjectiles;\n  }\n\n  private predictCombat(previous: State, moved: State, cmd: Cmd): State {\n    let result = moved;\n    const weaponId = this.weaponId;\n    if (\n      weaponId !== undefined &&\n      WEAPONS[weaponId].kind === \"projectile\" &&\n      (cmd.buttons & Buttons.Fire) !== 0 &&\n      moved.tick >= this.nextFireTick\n    ) {\n      const weapon = WEAPONS[weaponId];\n      const projectile = this.projectileSystem.spawn(\n        this.ownerId,\n        this.ownerGeneration,\n        cmd.seq,\n        weaponId,\n        shooterEye(previous.player.position, moved.player.position, cmd.fireFraction, moved.player.ducked),\n        fireDirection(cmd.viewYaw, cmd.viewPitch),\n        moved.tick,\n      );\n      if (projectile !== undefined) this.projectileMatcher.add(projectile);\n      this.nextFireTick = moved.tick + weapon.refireTicks;\n    }\n    const detonations = this.projectileSystem.tick(moved.tick, this.world, [{\n      id: this.ownerId,\n      generation: this.ownerGeneration,\n      alive: true,\n      position: moved.player.position,\n      ducked: moved.player.ducked,\n    }]);\n    for (const projectile of this.projectileSystem.projectiles) this.projectileMatcher.add(projectile);\n    for (const detonation of detonations) {\n      this.projectileMatcher.remove(detonation.projectile.ownerId, detonation.projectile.fireCmdSeq);\n      if (detonation.reason !== \"impact\" && detonation.reason !== \"target\") continue;\n      const effect = resolveSplash(\n        WEAPONS[detonation.projectile.weaponId],\n        detonation.point,\n        [{ id: this.ownerId, position: moved.player.position }],\n        this.ownerId,\n      )[0];\n      if (effect === undefined) continue;\n      result = {\n        ...result,\n        player: {\n          ...result.player,\n          velocity: {\n            x: result.player.velocity.x + effect.impulse.x,\n            y: result.player.velocity.y + effect.impulse.y,\n            z: result.player.velocity.z + effect.impulse.z,\n          },\n        },\n      };\n    }\n    this.matchedProjectiles = this.projectileMatcher.reconcile([]);\n    return result;\n  }\n\n  private constrainRenderError(): void {\n    if (this.world === undefined) return;\n    const candidate = {\n      x: this.predicted.player.position.x + this.renderError.x,\n      y: this.predicted.player.position.y + this.renderError.y,\n      z: this.predicted.player.position.z + this.renderError.z,\n    };\n    if (!this.world.capsuleFits(candidate)) this.renderError = { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 };\n  }\n}\n","numLines":241,"startLine":1,"totalLines":241}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"8c924d9d-c397-4d43-b73e-87d014892ad0","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

1];\n37\t      if (previous !== undefined && previous.state.generation !== state.generation) {\n38\t        buffer.length = 0;\n39\t      }\n40\t      buffer.push({ tick, state });\n41\t      while (buffer.length > 16) buffer.shift();\n42\t    }\n43\t  }\n44\t\n45\t  noteStall(stalled: boolean): void {\n46\t    if (stalled) this.adaptiveDelay = Math.min(7, this.adaptiveDelay + 1);\n47\t    else this.adaptiveDelay = Math.max(this.baseDelay, this.adaptiveDelay - 0.05);\n48\t  }\n49\t\n50\t  sample(targetTick: number, fraction: number): readonly InterpolatedEntity[] {\n51\t    const exact = targetTick + Math.max(0, Math.min(255, fraction)) / 256;\n52\t    const result: InterpolatedEntity[] = [];\n53\t    for (const buffer of this.buffers.values()) {\n54\t      if (buffer.length === 0) continue;\n55\t      let before = buffer[0];\n56\t      let after = buffer[buffer.length - 1];\n57\t      for (const item of buffer) {\n58\t        if (item.tick <= exact) before = item;\n59\t        if (item.tick >= exact) {\n60\t          after = item;\n61\t          break;\n62\t        }\n63\t      }\n64\t      if (before === undefined || after === undefined) continue;\n65\t      if (before.state.generation !== after.state.generation) {\n66\t        result.push({ ...after.state, sourceTick: after.tick });\n67\t        continue;\n68\t      }\n69\t      const span = Math.max(1, after.tick - before.tick);\n70\t      const alpha = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (exact - before.tick) / span));\n71\t      result.push({\n72\t        ...after.state,\n73\t        position: {\n74\t          x: before.state.position.x + (after.state.position.x - before.state.position.x) * alpha,\n75\t          y: before.state.position.y + (after.state.position.y - before.state.position.y) * alpha,\n76\t          z: before.state.position.z + (after.state.position.z - before.state.position.z) * alpha,\n77\t        },\n78\t        velocity: {\n79\t          x: before.state.velocity.x + (after.state.velocity.x - before.state.velocity.x) * alpha,\n80\t          y: before.state.velocity.y + (after.state.velocity.y - before.state.velocity.y) * alpha,\n81\t          z: before.state.velocity.z + (after.state.velocity.z - before.state.velocity.z) * alpha,\n82\t        },\n83\t        viewYaw: before.state.viewYaw + (after.state.viewYaw - before.state.viewYaw) * alpha,\n84\t        viewPitch:\n85\t          before.state.viewPitch + (after.state.viewPitch - before.state.viewPitch) * alpha,\n86\t        sourceTick: before.tick,\n87\t      });\n88\t    }\n89\t    return result;\n90\t  }\n91\t}\n92\t"}]},"uuid":"57cbdaa2-f8dd-40a6-bde9-257ddd178c41","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:21:36.994Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/net/interpolation.ts","content":"import type { EntityState } from \"@gungame/protocol\";\n\nexport type NetTransport = \"datagram\" | \"ws\";\n\ninterface BufferedEntity {\n  readonly tick: number;\n  readonly state: EntityState;\n}\n\nexport interface InterpolatedEntity extends EntityState {\n  readonly sourceTick: number;\n}\n\nexport class RemoteInterpolation {\n  private readonly buffers = new Map<number, BufferedEntity[]>();\n  private adaptiveDelay: number;\n  private readonly baseDelay: number;\n\n  constructor(transport: NetTransport) {\n    this.baseDelay = transport === \"datagram\" ? 3 : 5;\n    this.adaptiveDelay = this.baseDelay;\n  }\n\n  get delayTicks(): number {\n    return this.adaptiveDelay;\n  }\n\n  push(tick: number, entities: readonly EntityState[], selfId: number): void {\n    for (const state of entities) {\n      if (state.id === selfId) continue;\n      let buffer = this.buffers.get(state.id);\n      if (buffer === undefined) {\n        buffer = [];\n        this.buffers.set(state.id, buffer);\n      }\n      const previous = buffer[buffer.length - 1];\n      if (previous !== undefined && previous.state.generation !== state.generation) {\n        buffer.length = 0;\n      }\n      buffer.push({ tick, state });\n      while (buffer.length > 16) buffer.shift();\n    }\n  }\n\n  noteStall(stalled: boolean): void {\n    if (stalled) this.adaptiveDelay = Math.min(7, this.adaptiveDelay + 1);\n    else this.adaptiveDelay = Math.max(this.baseDelay, this.adaptiveDelay - 0.05);\n  }\n\n  sample(targetTick: number, fraction: number): readonly InterpolatedEntity[] {\n    const exact = targetTick + Math.max(0, Math.min(255, fraction)) / 256;\n    const result: InterpolatedEntity[] = [];\n    for (const buffer of this.buffers.values()) {\n      if (buffer.length === 0) continue;\n      let before = buffer[0];\n      let after = buffer[buffer.length - 1];\n      for (const item of buffer) {\n        if (item.tick <= exact) before = item;\n        if (item.tick >= exact) {\n          after = item;\n          break;\n        }\n      }\n      if (before === undefined || after === undefined) continue;\n      if (before.state.generation !== after.state.generation) {\n        result.push({ ...after.state, sourceTick: after.tick });\n        continue;\n      }\n      const span = Math.max(1, after.tick - before.tick);\n      const alpha = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (exact - before.tick) / span));\n      result.push({\n        ...after.state,\n        position: {\n          x: before.state.position.x + (after.state.position.x - before.state.position.x) * alpha,\n          y: before.state.position.y + (after.state.position.y - before.state.position.y) * alpha,\n          z: before.state.position.z + (after.state.position.z - before.state.position.z) * alpha,\n        },\n        velocity: {\n          x: before.state.velocity.x + (after.state.velocity.x - before.state.velocity.x) * alpha,\n          y: before.state.velocity.y + (after.state.velocity.y - before.state.velocity.y) * alpha,\n          z: before.state.velocity.z + (after.state.velocity.z - before.state.velocity.z) * alpha,\n        },\n        viewYaw: before.state.viewYaw + (after.state.viewYaw - before.state.viewYaw) * alpha,\n        viewPitch:\n          before.state.viewPitch + (after.state.viewPitch - before.state.viewPitch) * alpha,\n        sourceTick: before.tick,\n      });\n    }\n    return result;\n  }\n}\n","numLines":92,"startLine":1,"totalLines":92}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"53b1fe55-5834-417a-b8f2-0f0b6d87496f","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{"parentUuid":"8c6d8774-455b-4ba7-86c8-a44a9a4a6c93","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019Rbu4L31QvyLBuTvvJ2ra1","type":"tool_result","content":"1\timport { TICK_DT } from \"@gungame/shared\";\n2\t\n3\tconst TICK_MS = TICK_DT * 1_000;\n4\tconst STEP_RESYNC_MS = 250;\n5\t\n6\texport class ClockSync {\n7\t  private offsetTicks = 0;\n8\t  private rttMs = 0;\n9\t  private cmdBiasTicks = 1.5;\n10\t  private lastPacingMs = 0;\n11\t  private stepped = false;\n12\t\n13\t  get roundTripMs(): number {\n14\t    return this.rttMs;\n15\t  }\n16\t\n17\t  get commandBiasTicks(): number {\n18\t    return this.cmdBiasTicks;\n19\t  }\n20\t\n21\t  consumeStepResync(): boolean {\n22\t    const value = this.stepped;\n23\t    this.stepped = false;\n24\t    return value;\n25\t  }\n26\t\n27\t  observePong(sentMs: number, receivedMs: number): void {\n28\t    if (!Number.isFinite(sentMs) || !Number.isFinite(receivedMs) || receivedMs < sentMs) return;\n29\t    const sample = receivedMs - sentMs;\n30\t    this.rttMs = this.rttMs === 0 ? sample : this.rttMs * 0.8 + sample * 0.2;\n31\t  }\n32\t\n33\t  observeServerTick(serverTick: number, receivedMs: number): void {\n34\t    if (!Number.isFinite(receivedMs) || !Number.isInteger(serverTick)) return;\n35\t    const localTick = receivedMs / TICK_MS;\n36\t    const sampleOffset = serverTick + this.rttMs / (2 * TICK_MS) - localTick;\n37\t    const errorMs = Math.abs(sampleOffset - this.offsetTicks) * TICK_MS;\n38\t    if (errorMs > STEP_RESYNC_MS) {\n39\t      this.offsetTicks = sampleOffset;\n40\t      this.stepped = true;\n41\t    } else {\n42\t      this.offsetTicks += (sampleOffset - this.offsetTicks) * 0.1;\n43\t    }\n44\t  }\n45\t\n46\t  commandTick(localTick: number, arrivalMargin: number, nowMs: number): number {\n47\t    if (!Number.isFinite(nowMs)) return Math.max(0, Math.round(localTick));\n48\t    if (this.lastPacingMs === 0) this.lastPacingMs = nowMs;\n49\t    const elapsedSeconds = Math.max(0, nowMs - this.lastPacingMs) / 1_000;\n50\t    this.lastPacingMs = nowMs;\n51\t    const targetBias = arrivalMargin < 1 ? 2 : arrivalMargin > 2 ? 1 : this.cmdBiasTicks;\n52\t    const maximumSlew = elapsedSeconds;\n53\t    this.cmdBiasTicks += Math.max(\n54\t      -maximumSlew,\n55\t      Math.min(maximumSlew, targetBias - this.cmdBiasTicks),\n56\t    );\n57\t    return Math.max(0, Math.round(localTick + this.offsetTicks + this.cmdBiasTicks));\n58\t  }\n59\t\n60\t  interpolationTarget(receivedMs: number, delayTicks: number): {\n61\t    readonly tick: number;\n62\t    readonly fraction: number;\n63\t  } {\n64\t    const exact = receivedMs / TICK_MS + this.offsetTicks - delayTicks;\n65\t    const tick = Math.max(0, Math.floor(exact));\n66\t    return {\n67\t      tick,\n68\t      fraction: Math.max(0, Math.min(255, Math.floor((exact - tick) * 256))),\n69\t    };\n70\t  }\n71\t}\n72\t"}]},"uuid":"2a0816ea-195b-4154-b23e-36b3c3758546","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:21:37.128Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/net/clock.ts","content":"import { TICK_DT } from \"@gungame/shared\";\n\nconst TICK_MS = TICK_DT * 1_000;\nconst STEP_RESYNC_MS = 250;\n\nexport class ClockSync {\n  private offsetTicks = 0;\n  private rttMs = 0;\n  private cmdBiasTicks = 1.5;\n  private lastPacingMs = 0;\n  private stepped = false;\n\n  get roundTripMs(): number {\n    return this.rttMs;\n  }\n\n  get commandBiasTicks(): number {\n    return this.cmdBiasTicks;\n  }\n\n  consumeStepResync(): boolean {\n    const value = this.stepped;\n    this.stepped = false;\n    return value;\n  }\n\n  observePong(sentMs: number, receivedMs: number): void {\n    if (!Number.isFinite(sentMs) || !Number.isFinite(receivedMs) || receivedMs < sentMs) return;\n    const sample = receivedMs - sentMs;\n    this.rttMs = this.rttMs === 0 ? sample : this.rttMs * 0.8 + sample * 0.2;\n  }\n\n  observeServerTick(serverTick: number, receivedMs: number): void {\n    if (!Number.isFinite(receivedMs) || !Number.isInteger(serverTick)) return;\n    const localTick = receivedMs / TICK_MS;\n    const sampleOffset = serverTick + this.rttMs / (2 * TICK_MS) - localTick;\n    const errorMs = Math.abs(sampleOffset - this.offsetTicks) * TICK_MS;\n    if (errorMs > STEP_RESYNC_MS) {\n      this.offsetTicks = sampleOffset;\n      this.stepped = true;\n    } else {\n      this.offsetTicks += (sampleOffset - this.offsetTicks) * 0.1;\n    }\n  }\n\n  commandTick(localTick: number, arrivalMargin: number, nowMs: number): number {\n    if (!Number.isFinite(nowMs)) return Math.max(0, Math.round(localTick));\n    if (this.lastPacingMs === 0) this.lastPacingMs = nowMs;\n    const elapsedSeconds = Math.max(0, nowMs - this.lastPacingMs) / 1_000;\n    this.lastPacingMs = nowMs;\n    const targetBias = arrivalMargin < 1 ? 2 : arrivalMargin > 2 ? 1 : this.cmdBiasTicks;\n    const maximumSlew = elapsedSeconds;\n    this.cmdBiasTicks += Math.max(\n      -maximumSlew,\n      Math.min(maximumSlew, targetBias - this.cmdBiasTicks),\n    );\n    return Math.max(0, Math.round(localTick + this.offsetTicks + this.cmdBiasTicks));\n  }\n\n  interpolationTarget(receivedMs: number, delayTicks: number): {\n    readonly tick: number;\n    readonly fraction: number;\n  } {\n    const exact = receivedMs / TICK_MS + this.offsetTicks - delayTicks;\n    const tick = Math.max(0, Math.floor(exact));\n    return {\n      tick,\n      fraction: Math.max(0, Math.min(255, Math.floor((exact - tick) * 256))),\n    };\n  }\n}\n","numLines":72,"startLine":1,"totalLines":72}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"8c6d8774-455b-4ba7-86c8-a44a9a4a6c93","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

type SendPolicy = \"reliable\" | \"latest\";\n\nexport interface NetChannel {\n  readonly ready: boolean;\n  readonly bufferedBytes: number;\n  send(payload: Uint8Array, policy: SendPolicy): void;\n  close(code?: number, reason?: string): void;\n}\n\nexport interface ChannelHandlers {\n  readonly open: () => void;\n  readonly message: (payload: Uint8Array) => void;\n  readonly close: (code: number, reason: string) => void;\n  readonly error: () => void;\n}\n\nexport class WebSocketNetChannel implements NetChannel {\n  private readonly socket: WebSocket;\n  private pendingLatest: Uint8Array | undefined;\n  private flushTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | undefined;\n\n  constructor(url: string, handlers: ChannelHandlers) {\n    this.socket = new WebSocket(url);\n    this.socket.binaryType = \"arraybuffer\";\n    this.socket.addEventListener(\"open\", handlers.open);\n    this.socket.addEventListener(\"message\", (event: MessageEvent<ArrayBuffer>) => {\n      handlers.message(new Uint8Array(event.data));\n    });\n    this.socket.addEventListener(\"close\", (event) => handlers.close(event.code, event.reason));\n    this.socket.addEventListener(\"error\", handlers.error);\n  }\n\n  get ready(): boolean {\n    return this.socket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN;\n  }\n\n  get bufferedBytes(): number {\n    return this.socket.bufferedAmount;\n  }\n\n  send(payload: Uint8Array, policy: SendPolicy): void {\n    if (!this.ready) return;\n    if (policy === \"reliable\" || this.socket.bufferedAmount < 32 * 1_024) {\n      this.socket.send(payload);\n      return;\n    }\n    this.pendingLatest = payload.slice();\n    this.scheduleFlush();\n  }\n\n  close(code = 1_000, reason = \"\"): void {\n    if (this.flushTimer !== undefined) clearTimeout(this.flushTimer);\n    this.socket.close(code, reason);\n  }\n\n  private scheduleFlush(): void {\n    if (this.flushTimer !== undefined) return;\n    const flush = (): void => {\n      this.flushTimer = undefined;\n      if (!this.ready || this.pendingLatest === undefined) return;\n      if (this.socket.bufferedAmount >= 8 * 1_024) {\n        this.scheduleFlush();\n        return;\n      }\n      const payload = this.pendingLatest;\n      this.pendingLatest = undefined;\n      this.socket.send(payload);\n    };\n    this.flushTimer = setTimeout(flush, 4);\n  }\n}\n","numLines":72,"startLine":1,"totalLines":72}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"9feec42e-1240-4751-adca-910ec60df716","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{"parentUuid":"4caab919-f0da-4613-9326-8d2789c47048","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QBShCJ1hA1DFXqRnmuwR9x","type":"tool_result","content":"1\texport type TickSchedule = (callback: () => void, delayMs: number) => unknown;\n2\t\n3\t/** Fixed-step sim/network driver intentionally independent from rendering/rAF. */\n4\texport class OffRenderTickDriver {\n5\t  private previousMs: number;\n6\t  private accumulatorSeconds = 0;\n7\t  private running = false;\n8\t  private readonly tick: () => void;\n9\t  private readonly now: () => number;\n10\t  private readonly schedule: TickSchedule;\n11\t  private readonly tickSeconds: number;\n12\t\n13\t  constructor(\n14\t    tick: () => void,\n15\t    now: () => number = () => performance.now(),\n16\t    schedule: TickSchedule = (callback, delayMs) => setTimeout(callback, delayMs),\n17\t    tickSeconds = 1 / 64,\n18\t  ) {\n19\t    this.tick = tick;\n20\t    this.now = now;\n21\t    this.schedule = schedule;\n22\t    this.tickSeconds = tickSeconds;\n23\t    this.previousMs = now();\n24\t  }\n25\t\n26\t  start(): void {\n27\t    if (this.running) return;\n28\t    this.running = true;\n29\t    this.previousMs = this.now();\n30\t    this.schedule(this.loop, 0);\n31\t  }\n32\t\n33\t  stop(): void {\n34\t    this.running = false;\n35\t  }\n36\t\n37\t  get alpha(): number {\n38\t    return Math.min(1, this.accumulatorSeconds / this.tickSeconds);\n39\t  }\n40\t\n41\t  private readonly loop = (): void => {\n42\t    if (!this.running) return;\n43\t    const currentMs = this.now();\n44\t    this.accumulatorSeconds += Math.min(0.25, Math.max(0, (currentMs - this.previousMs) / 1_000));\n45\t    this.previousMs = currentMs;\n46\t    let catchUpTicks = 0;\n47\t    while (this.accumulatorSeconds >= this.tickSeconds && catchUpTicks < 4) {\n48\t      this.tick();\n49\t      this.accumulatorSeconds -= this.tickSeconds;\n50\t      catchUpTicks += 1;\n51\t    }\n52\t    if (catchUpTicks === 4 && this.accumulatorSeconds >= this.tickSeconds) {\n53\t      this.accumulatorSeconds = 0;\n54\t    }\n55\t    this.schedule(this.loop, 4);\n56\t  };\n57\t}\n58\t"}]},"uuid":"c9a76e00-b728-4486-89e0-bfb8d8d88f82","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:21:37.805Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/tick-driver.ts","content":"export type TickSchedule = (callback: () => void, delayMs: number) => unknown;\n\n/** Fixed-step sim/network driver intentionally independent from rendering/rAF. */\nexport class OffRenderTickDriver {\n  private previousMs: number;\n  private accumulatorSeconds = 0;\n  private running = false;\n  private readonly tick: () => void;\n  private readonly now: () => number;\n  private readonly schedule: TickSchedule;\n  private readonly tickSeconds: number;\n\n  constructor(\n    tick: () => void,\n    now: () => number = () => performance.now(),\n    schedule: TickSchedule = (callback, delayMs) => setTimeout(callback, delayMs),\n    tickSeconds = 1 / 64,\n  ) {\n    this.tick = tick;\n    this.now = now;\n    this.schedule = schedule;\n    this.tickSeconds = tickSeconds;\n    this.previousMs = now();\n  }\n\n  start(): void {\n    if (this.running) return;\n    this.running = true;\n    this.previousMs = this.now();\n    this.schedule(this.loop, 0);\n  }\n\n  stop(): void {\n    this.running = false;\n  }\n\n  get alpha(): number {\n    return Math.min(1, this.accumulatorSeconds / this.tickSeconds);\n  }\n\n  private readonly loop = (): void => {\n    if (!this.running) return;\n    const currentMs = this.now();\n    this.accumulatorSeconds += Math.min(0.25, Math.max(0, (currentMs - this.previousMs) / 1_000));\n    this.previousMs = currentMs;\n    let catchUpTicks = 0;\n    while (this.accumulatorSeconds >= this.tickSeconds && catchUpTicks < 4) {\n      this.tick();\n      this.accumulatorSeconds -= this.tickSeconds;\n      catchUpTicks += 1;\n    }\n    if (catchUpTicks === 4 && this.accumulatorSeconds >= this.tickSeconds) {\n      this.accumulatorSeconds = 0;\n    }\n    this.schedule(this.loop, 4);\n  };\n}\n","numLines":58,"startLine":1,"totalLines":58}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"4caab919-f0da-4613-9326-8d2789c47048","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

point.x >= bounds.min.x && point.x <= bounds.max.x &&\n51\t    point.y >= bounds.min.y && point.y <= bounds.max.y &&\n52\t    point.z >= bounds.min.z && point.z <= bounds.max.z;\n53\t}\n54\t\n55\texport function serializeGhost(lap: GhostLap): string {\n56\t  return JSON.stringify(lap);\n57\t}\n58\t\n59\texport function deserializeGhost(value: string | null, mapId: ValueOf<typeof MapId>): GhostLap | undefined {\n60\t  if (value === null) return undefined;\n61\t  try {\n62\t    const lap = JSON.parse(value) as GhostLap;\n63\t    if (lap.version !== 1 || lap.mapId !== mapId || !Number.isFinite(lap.durationMs) ||\n64\t      lap.durationMs <= 0 || !Array.isArray(lap.samples) || lap.samples.length < 2 ||\n65\t      lap.samples.some((sample) => !Number.isFinite(sample.timeMs) ||\n66\t        !Number.isFinite(sample.x) || !Number.isFinite(sample.y) || !Number.isFinite(sample.z))) {\n67\t      return undefined;\n68\t    }\n69\t    return lap;\n70\t  } catch {\n71\t    return undefined;\n72\t  }\n73\t}\n74\t\n75\texport class BhopTimeTrial {\n76\t  readonly route: BhopRoute;\n77\t  private readonly storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\" | \"setItem\">;\n78\t  private readonly storageKey: string;\n79\t  private armed = false;\n80\t  private startedAt = 0;\n81\t  private checkpoint = 0;\n82\t  private recording: GhostSample[] = [];\n83\t  private best: GhostLap | undefined;\n84\t\n85\t  constructor(route: BhopRoute, storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\" | \"setItem\">) {\n86\t    this.route = route;\n87\t    this.storage = storage;\n88\t    this.storageKey = `gg:bhop-best:${route.mapId}`;\n89\t    this.best = deserializeGhost(storage.getItem(this.storageKey), route.mapId);\n90\t  }\n91\t\n92\t  get bestLap(): GhostLap | undefined {\n93\t    return this.best;\n94\t  }\n95\t\n96\t  update(position: Vec3, nowMs: number): {\n97\t    readonly visible: boolean;\n98\t    readonly active: boolean;\n99\t    readonly elapsedMs: number;\n100\t    readonly bestMs?: number;\n101\t    readonly ghost?: Vec3;\n102\t    readonly completed?: boolean;\n103\t  } {\n104\t    const inStart = inside(position, this.route.startGate);\n105\t    if (this.startedAt === 0) {\n106\t      if (inStart) this.armed = true;\n107\t      else if (this.armed) {\n108\t        this.armed = false;\n109\t        this.startedAt = nowMs;\n110\t        this.checkpoint = 0;\n111\t        this.recording = [{ timeMs: 0, ...position }];\n112\t      }\n113\t    }\n114\t    let completed = false;\n115\t    if (this.startedAt !== 0) {\n116\t      const elapsed = nowMs - this.startedAt;\n117\t      const last = this.recording.at(-1);\n118\t      if (last === undefined || elapsed - last.timeMs >= 32) {\n119\t        this.recording.push({ timeMs: elapsed, ...position });\n120\t      }\n121\t      const next = this.route.checkpoints[this.checkpoint];\n122\t      if (next !== undefined && inside(position, next)) this.checkpoint += 1;\n123\t      if (this.checkpoint === this.route.checkpoints.length && inStart && elapsed >= 1_000) {\n124\t        const lap: GhostLap = {\n125\t          version: 1,\n126\t          mapId: this.route.mapId,\n127\t          durationMs: Math.round(elapsed),\n128\t          samples: this.recording,\n129\t        };\n130\t        if (this.best === undefined || lap.durationMs < this.best.durationMs) {\n131\t          this.best = lap;\n132\t          this.storage.setItem(this.storageKey, serializeGhost(lap));\n133\t        }\n134\t        this.startedAt = 0;\n135\t        this.checkpoint = 0;\n136\t        this.recording = [];\n137\t        completed = true;\n138\t      }\n139\t    }\n140\t    const elapsedMs = this.startedAt === 0 ? 0 : nowMs - this.startedAt;\n141\t    const result = {\n142\t      visible: inStart || this.startedAt !== 0,\n143\t      active: this.startedAt !== 0,\n144\t      elapsedMs,\n145\t      ...(this.best === undefined ? {} : { bestMs: this.best.durationMs }),\n146\t      ...(completed ? { completed: true } : {}),\n147\t    };\n148\t    const ghost = this.sampleBest(elapsedMs);\n149\t    return ghost === undefined ? result : { ...result, ghost };\n150\t  }\n151\t\n152\t  private sampleBest(elapsedMs: number): Vec3 | undefined {\n153\t    const lap = this.best;\n154\t    if (lap === undefined || this.startedAt === 0) return undefined;\n155\t    const time = Math.min(lap.durationMs, elapsedMs);\n156\t    let rightIndex = lap.samples.findIndex((sample) => sample.timeMs >= time);\n157\t    if (rightIndex < 0) rightIndex = lap.samples.length - 1;\n158\t    const right = lap.samples[rightIndex];\n159\t    const left = lap.samples[Math.max(0, rightIndex - 1)];\n160\t    if (left === undefined || right === undefined) return undefined;\n161\t    const range = Math.max(1, right.timeMs - left.timeMs);\n162\t    const alpha = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (time - left.timeMs) / range));\n163\t    return {\n164\t      x: left.x + (right.x - left.x) * alpha,\n165\t      y: left.y + (right.y - left.y) * alpha,\n166\t      z: left.z + (right.z - left.z) * alpha,\n167\t    };\n168\t  }\n169\t}\n170\t"}]},"uuid":"22bec00c-aa64-4e8e-b1a2-feaeef1502b2","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:22:11.207Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/bhop-ghost.ts","content":"import { MapId, type ValueOf } from \"@gungame/protocol\";\nimport type { MapAabb, Vec3 } from \"@gungame/shared\";\n\nexport interface GhostSample extends Vec3 {\n  readonly timeMs: number;\n}\n\nexport interface GhostLap {\n  readonly version: 1;\n  readonly mapId: ValueOf<typeof MapId>;\n  readonly durationMs: number;\n  readonly samples: readonly GhostSample[];\n}\n\nexport interface BhopRoute {\n  readonly mapId: ValueOf<typeof MapId>;\n  readonly startGate: MapAabb;\n  readonly checkpoints: readonly MapAabb[];\n}\n\nconst gate = (x: number, y: number, z: number, radius = 2.2): MapAabb => ({\n  min: { x: x - radius, y: y - 1, z: z - radius },\n  max: { x: x + radius, y: y + 3, z: z + radius },\n});\n\nexport const BHOP_ROUTES: Readonly<Record<ValueOf<typeof MapId>, BhopRoute>> = Object.freeze({\n  [MapId.Cascade]: {\n    mapId: MapId.Cascade,\n    startGate: gate(0, 2, 20, 2.8),\n    checkpoints: [gate(20, 5, 0, 3.5), gate(0, 8, -20, 3.5), gate(-20, 5, 0, 3.5)],\n  },\n  [MapId.Foundry]: {\n    mapId: MapId.Foundry,\n    startGate: gate(-18, 0, -16),\n    checkpoints: [gate(0, -2, -4, 3), gate(18, 0, 14, 3), gate(-18, 0, 14, 3)],\n  },\n  [MapId.Duna]: {\n    mapId: MapId.Duna,\n    startGate: gate(-42, 0, -12, 3),\n    checkpoints: [gate(0, 0, -29, 4), gate(42, 0, -11, 3), gate(0, 0, 27, 4)],\n  },\n  [MapId.Spire]: {\n    mapId: MapId.Spire,\n    startGate: gate(-34, 10, -10, 3),\n    checkpoints: [gate(0, 4, -20, 4), gate(34, 10, 10, 3), gate(0, 4, 20, 4)],\n  },\n});\n\nfunction inside(point: Vec3, bounds: MapAabb): boolean {\n  return point.x >= bounds.min.x && point.x <= bounds.max.x &&\n    point.y >= bounds.min.y && point.y <= bounds.max.y &&\n    point.z >= bounds.min.z && point.z <= bounds.max.z;\n}\n\nexport function serializeGhost(lap: GhostLap): string {\n  return JSON.stringify(lap);\n}\n\nexport function deserializeGhost(value: string | null, mapId: ValueOf<typeof MapId>): GhostLap | undefined {\n  if (value === null) return undefined;\n  try {\n    const lap = JSON.parse(value) as GhostLap;\n    if (lap.version !== 1 || lap.mapId !== mapId || !Number.isFinite(lap.durationMs) ||\n      lap.durationMs <= 0 || !Array.isArray(lap.samples) || lap.samples.length < 2 ||\n      lap.samples.some((sample) => !Number.isFinite(sample.timeMs) ||\n        !Number.isFinite(sample.x) || !Number.isFinite(sample.y) || !Number.isFinite(sample.z))) {\n      return undefined;\n    }\n    return lap;\n  } catch {\n    return undefined;\n  }\n}\n\nexport class BhopTimeTrial {\n  readonly route: BhopRoute;\n  private readonly storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\" | \"setItem\">;\n  private readonly storageKey: string;\n  private armed = false;\n  private startedAt = 0;\n  private checkpoint = 0;\n  private recording: GhostSample[] = [];\n  private best: GhostLap | undefined;\n\n  constructor(route: BhopRoute, storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\" | \"setItem\">) {\n    this.route = route;\n    this.storage = storage;\n    this.storageKey = `gg:bhop-best:${route.mapId}`;\n    this.best = deserializeGhost(storage.getItem(this.storageKey), route.mapId);\n  }\n\n  get bestLap(): GhostLap | undefined {\n    return this.best;\n  }\n\n  update(position: Vec3, nowMs: number): {\n    readonly visible: boolean;\n    readonly active: boolean;\n    readonly elapsedMs: number;\n    readonly bestMs?: number;\n    readonly ghost?: Vec3;\n    readonly completed?: boolean;\n  } {\n    const inStart = inside(position, this.route.startGate);\n    if (this.startedAt === 0) {\n      if (inStart) this.armed = true;\n      else if (this.armed) {\n        this.armed = false;\n        this.startedAt = nowMs;\n        this.checkpoint = 0;\n        this.recording = [{ timeMs: 0, ...position }];\n      }\n    }\n    let completed = false;\n    if (this.startedAt !== 0) {\n      const elapsed = nowMs - this.startedAt;\n      const last = this.recording.at(-1);\n      if (last === undefined || elapsed - last.timeMs >= 32) {\n        this.recording.push({ timeMs: elapsed, ...position });\n      }\n      const next = this.route.checkpoints[this.checkpoint];\n      if (next !== undefined && inside(position, next)) this.checkpoint += 1;\n      if (this.checkpoint === this.route.checkpoints.length && inStart && elapsed >= 1_000) {\n        const lap: GhostLap = {\n          version: 1,\n          mapId: this.route.mapId,\n          durationMs: Math.round(elapsed),\n          samples: this.recording,\n        };\n        if (this.best === undefined || lap.durationMs < this.best.durationMs) {\n          this.best = lap;\n          this.storage.setItem(this.storageKey, serializeGhost(lap));\n        }\n        this.startedAt = 0;\n        this.checkpoint = 0;\n        this.recording = [];\n        completed = true;\n      }\n    }\n    const elapsedMs = this.startedAt === 0 ? 0 : nowMs - this.startedAt;\n    const result = {\n      visible: inStart || this.startedAt !== 0,\n      active: this.startedAt !== 0,\n      elapsedMs,\n      ...(this.best === undefined ? {} : { bestMs: this.best.durationMs }),\n      ...(completed ? { completed: true } : {}),\n    };\n    const ghost = this.sampleBest(elapsedMs);\n    return ghost === undefined ? result : { ...result, ghost };\n  }\n\n  private sampleBest(elapsedMs: number): Vec3 | undefined {\n    const lap = this.best;\n    if (lap === undefined || this.startedAt === 0) return undefined;\n    const time = Math.min(lap.durationMs, elapsedMs);\n    let rightIndex = lap.samples.findIndex((sample) => sample.timeMs >= time);\n    if (rightIndex < 0) rightIndex = lap.samples.length - 1;\n    const right = lap.samples[rightIndex];\n    const left = lap.samples[Math.max(0, rightIndex - 1)];\n    if (left === undefined || right === undefined) return undefined;\n    const range = Math.max(1, right.timeMs - left.timeMs);\n    const alpha = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (time - left.timeMs) / range));\n    return {\n      x: left.x + (right.x - left.x) * alpha,\n      y: left.y + (right.y - left.y) * alpha,\n      z: left.z + (right.z - left.z) * alpha,\n    };\n  }\n}\n","numLines":170,"startLine":1,"totalLines":170}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"3224c0e0-9844-44d5-8c4b-378b7fa374e9","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}
{"parentUuid":"8915be8c-4bd1-48a8-8091-23963e9dad08","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Dv4nF3S6RZSs4PG5Dfqmpj","type":"tool_result","content":"1\timport {\n2\t  AdditiveBlending,\n3\t  BoxGeometry,\n4\t  BufferAttribute,\n5\t  BufferGeometry,\n6\t  Color,\n7\t  CylinderGeometry,\n8\t  Euler,\n9\t  InstancedMesh,\n10\t  LineBasicMaterial,\n11\t  LineSegments,\n12\t  Matrix4,\n13\t  MeshBasicNodeMaterial,\n14\t  PointLight,\n15\t  Quaternion,\n16\t  Scene,\n17\t  SphereGeometry,\n18\t  Vector3,\n19\t  type Material,\n20\t} from \"three/webgpu\";\n21\t\n22\timport { WeaponId } from \"../../packages/shared/src/index.js\";\n23\t\n24\texport interface ProjectileView {\n25\t  readonly key: string;\n26\t  readonly position: Readonly<{ x: number; y: number; z: number }>;\n27\t  readonly weaponId: number;\n28\t}\n29\t\n30\tconst ROCKET_GEOMETRY = new SphereGeometry(0.16, 10, 7);\n31\tconst DISC_GEOMETRY = new CylinderGeometry(0.2, 0.2, 0.055, 18);\n32\tconst IDENTITY = new Quaternion();\n33\tconst HIDDEN = new Matrix4().compose(\n34\t  new Vector3(0, -10_000, 0),\n35\t  IDENTITY,\n36\t  new Vector3(0, 0, 0),\n37\t);\n38\t\n39\texport class ProjectileVisualSystem {\n40\t  readonly rocketCores: InstancedMesh;\n41\t  readonly discCores: InstancedMesh;\n42\t  readonly trails: LineSegments;\n43\t  readonly smokePuffs: InstancedMesh;\n44\t  private readonly trailGeometry: BufferGeometry;\n45\t  private readonly trailPositions: Float32Array;\n46\t  private readonly prior = new Map<string, Vector3>();\n47\t  private readonly lights: PointLight[] = [];\n48\t  private readonly capacity: number;\n49\t\n50\t  constructor(scene: Scene, material: Material, capacity = 48) {\n51\t    this.capacity = capacity;\n52\t    this.rocketCores = new InstancedMesh(ROCKET_GEOMETRY, material, capacity);\n53\t    this.rocketCores.name = \"projectile-meshes-rockets\";\n54\t    this.rocketCores.userData.projectileMeshes = true;\n55\t    this.discCores = new InstancedMesh(DISC_GEOMETRY, material, capacity);\n56\t    this.discCores.name = \"projectile-meshes-discs\";\n57\t    this.discCores.userData.projectileMeshes = true;\n58\t    this.trailPositions = new Float32Array(capacity * 2 * 3);\n59\t    this.trailGeometry = new BufferGeometry();\n60\t    this.trailGeometry.setAttribute(\"position\", new BufferAttribute(this.trailPositions, 3));\n61\t    this.trails = new LineSegments(\n62\t      this.trailGeometry,\n63\t      new LineBasicMaterial({\n64\t        color: 0x8eeaff,\n65\t        transparent: true,\n66\t        opacity: 0.72,\n67\t        blending: AdditiveBlending,\n68\t        depthWrite: false,\n69\t      }),\n70\t    );\n71\t    this.trails.name = \"projectile-additive-trails\";\n72\t    this.trails.userData.discRibbon = true;\n73\t    this.smokePuffs = new InstancedMesh(\n74\t      new SphereGeometry(0.13, 6, 4),\n75\t      new MeshBasicNodeMaterial({\n76\t        color: new Color(0xb9c0c6),\n77\t        transparent: true,\n78\t        opacity: 0.3,\n79\t        depthWrite: false,\n80\t      }),\n81\t      capacity,\n82\t    );\n83\t    this.smokePuffs.name = \"rocket-smoke-puffs\";\n84\t    this.smokePuffs.userData.rocketSmoke = true;\n85\t    scene.add(this.rocketCores, this.discCores, this.trails, this.smokePuffs);\n86\t    for (let index = 0; index < 4; index += 1) {\n87\t      const light = new PointLight(0xffb45d, 2.2, 5.5, 2);\n88\t      light.visible = false;\n89\t      this.lights.push(light);\n90\t      scene.add(light);\n91\t    }\n92\t  }\n93\t\n94\t  setMaterial(material: Material): void {\n95\t    this.rocketCores.material = material;\n96\t    this.discCores.material = material;\n97\t  }\n98\t\n99\t  update(views: readonly ProjectileView[]): void {\n100\t    let rockets = 0;\n101\t    let discs = 0;\n102\t    let trails = 0;\n103\t    let lights = 0;\n104\t    const visible = new Set<string>();\n105\t    for (const view of views.slice(0, this.capacity)) {\n106\t      visible.add(view.key);\n107\t      const position = new Vector3(view.position.x, view.position.y, view.position.z);\n108\t      const matrix = new Matrix4().makeTranslation(position.x, position.y, position.z);\n109\t      if (view.weaponId === const ids = new Set(visible.map((state) => state.id));\n233\t    for (let index = 0; index < this.capacity; index += 1) {\n234\t      const state = visible[index];\n235\t      if (state === undefined) {\n  AdditiveBlending,\n  BoxGeometry,\n  BufferAttribute,\n  BufferGeometry,\n  Color,\n  CylinderGeometry,\n  Euler,\n  InstancedMesh,\n  LineBasicMaterial,\n  LineSegments,\n  Matrix4,\n  MeshBasicNodeMaterial,\n  PointLight,\n  Quaternion,\n  Scene,\n  SphereGeometry,\n  Vector3,\n  type Material,\n} from \"three/webgpu\";\n\nimport { WeaponId } from \"../../packages/shared/src/index.js\";\n\nexport interface ProjectileView {\n  readonly key: string;\n  readonly position: Readonly<{ x: number; y: number; z: number }>;\n  readonly weaponId: number;\n}\n\nconst ROCKET_GEOMETRY = new SphereGeometry(0.16, 10, 7);\nconst DISC_GEOMETRY = new CylinderGeometry(0.2, 0.2, 0.055, 18);\nconst IDENTITY = new Quaternion();\nconst HIDDEN = new Matrix4().compose(\n  new Vector3(0, -10_000, 0),\n  IDENTITY,\n  new Vector3(0, 0, 0),\n);\n\nexport class ProjectileVisualSystem {\n  readonly rocketCores: InstancedMesh;\n  readonly discCores: InstancedMesh;\n  readonly trails: LineSegments;\n  readonly smokePuffs: InstancedMesh;\n  private readonly trailGeometry: BufferGeometry;\n  private readonly trailPositions: Float32Array;\n  private readonly prior = new Map<string, Vector3>();\n  private readonly lights: PointLight[] = [];\n  private readonly capacity: number;\n\n  constructor(scene: Scene, material: Material, capacity = 48) {\n    this.capacity = capacity;\n    this.rocketCores = new InstancedMesh(ROCKET_GEOMETRY, material, capacity);\n    this.rocketCores.name = \"projectile-meshes-rockets\";\n    this.rocketCores.userData.projectileMeshes = true;\n    this.discCores = new InstancedMesh(DISC_GEOMETRY, material, capacity);\n    this.discCores.name = \"projectile-meshes-discs\";\n    this.discCores.userData.projectileMeshes = true;\n    this.trailPositions = new Float32Array(capacity * 2 * 3);\n    this.trailGeometry = new BufferGeometry();\n    this.trailGeometry.setAttribute(\"position\", new BufferAttribute(this.trailPositions, 3));\n    this.trails = new LineSegments(\n      this.trailGeometry,\n      new LineBasicMaterial({\n        color: 0x8eeaff,\n        transparent: true,\n        opacity: 0.72,\n        blending: AdditiveBlending,\n        depthWrite: false,\n      }),\n    );\n    this.trails.name = \"projectile-additive-trails\";\n    this.trails.userData.discRibbon = true;\n    this.smokePuffs = new InstancedMesh(\n      new SphereGeometry(0.13, 6, 4),\n      new MeshBasicNodeMaterial({\n        color: new Color(0xb9c0c6),\n        transparent: true,\n        opacity: 0.3,\n        depthWrite: false,\n      }),\n      capacity,\n    );\n    this.smokePuffs.name = \"rocket-smoke-puffs\";\n    this.smokePuffs.userData.rocketSmoke = true;\n    scene.add(this.rocketCores, this.discCores, this.trails, this.smokePuffs);\n    for (let index = 0; index < 4; index += 1) {\n      const light = new PointLight(0xffb45d, 2.2, 5.5, 2);\n      light.visible = false;\n      this.lights.push(light);\n      scene.add(light);\n    }\n  }\n\n  setMaterial(material: Material): void {\n    this.rocketCores.material = material;\n    this.discCores.material = material;\n  }\n\n  update(views: readonly ProjectileView[]): void {\n    let rockets = 0;\n    let discs = 0;\n    let trails = 0;\n    let lights = 0;\n    const visible = new Set<string>();\n    for (const view of views.slice(0, this.capacity)) {\n      visible.add(view.key);\n      const position = new Vector3(view.position.x, view.position.y, view.position.z);\n      const matrix = new Matrix4().makeTranslation(position.x, position.y, position.z);\n      if (view.weaponId === WeaponId.Peacemaker) {\n        this.rocketCores.setMatrixAt(rockets++, matrix);\n        const previous = this.prior.get(view.key) ?? position;\n        const smokePosition = position.clone().lerp(previous, 0.6);\n        this.smokePuffs.setMatrixAt(\n          rockets - 1,\n          new Matrix4().compose(\n            smokePosition,\n            IDENTITY,\n            new Vector3(1 + rockets * 0.025, 1 + rockets * 0.025, 1 + rockets * 0.025),\n          ),\n        );\n        if (lights < this.lights.length) {\n          const light = this.lights[lights++]!;\n          light.visible = true;\n          light.position.copy(position);\n        }\n      } else {\n        matrix.multiply(new Matrix4().makeRotationX(Math.PI / 2));\n        this.discCores.setMatrixAt(discs++, matrix);\n      }\n      const previous = this.prior.get(view.key) ?? position;\n      const offset = trails * 6;\n      this.trailPositions.set([\n        previous.x, previous.y, previous.z,\n        position.x, position.y, position.z,\n      ], offset);\n      trails += 1;\n      this.prior.set(view.key, position);\n    }\n    for (let index = rockets; index < this.capacity; index += 1) {\n      this.rocketCores.setMatrixAt(index, HIDDEN);\n      this.smokePuffs.setMatrixAt(index, HIDDEN);\n    }\n    for (let index = discs; index < this.capacity; index += 1) {\n      this.discCores.setMatrixAt(index, HIDDEN);\n    }\n    for (const [key] of this.prior) if (!visible.has(key)) this.prior.delete(key);\n    for (let index = lights; index < this.lights.length; index += 1) {\n      this.lights[index]!.visible = false;\n    }\n    this.rocketCores.count = Math.max(1, rockets);\n    this.discCores.count = Math.max(1, discs);\n    this.rocketCores.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    this.smokePuffs.count = Math.max(1, rockets);\n    this.smokePuffs.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    this.discCores.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    this.trailGeometry.setDrawRange(0, trails * 2);\n    this.trailGeometry.attributes.position!.needsUpdate = true;\n    this.trails.visible = trails !== 0;\n  }\n}\n\nexport interface RemoteCharacterState {\n  readonly id: number;\n  readonly generation?: number;\n  readonly position: Readonly<{ x: number; y: number; z: number }>;\n  readonly velocity: Readonly<{ x: number; y: number; z: number }>;\n  readonly grounded: boolean;\n  readonly alive: boolean;\n  readonly ducked?: boolean;\n}\n\nconst PARTS = [\"torso\", \"head\", \"leftArm\", \"rightArm\", \"leftLeg\", \"rightLeg\"] as const;\ntype PartName = typeof PARTS[number];\nconst PART_GEOMETRY: Readonly<Record<PartName, BoxGeometry | SphereGeometry>> = {\n  torso: new BoxGeometry(0.56, 0.78, 0.3),\n  head: new SphereGeometry(0.22, 10, 7),\n  leftArm: new BoxGeometry(0.16, 0.66, 0.16),\n  rightArm: new BoxGeometry(0.16, 0.66, 0.16),\n  leftLeg: new BoxGeometry(0.2, 0.72, 0.22),\n  rightLeg: new BoxGeometry(0.2, 0.72, 0.22),\n};\n\nfunction localPartMatrix(\n  offset: readonly [number, number, number],\n  rotation: Euler,\n  scaleY: number,\n): Matrix4 {\n  return new Matrix4().compose(\n    new Vector3(offset[0], offset[1] * scaleY, offset[2]),\n    new Quaternion().setFromEuler(rotation),\n    new Vector3(1, scaleY, 1),\n  );\n}\n\nexport class RemoteCharacterSystem {\n  readonly meshes: Readonly<Record<PartName, InstancedMesh>>;\n  readonly rimTorso: InstancedMesh;\n  readonly rimHead: InstancedMesh;\n  private readonly capacity: number;\n  private readonly spawnKeys = new Map<number, string>();\n  private readonly spawnedAt = new Map<number, number>();\n\n  constructor(scene: Scene, material: Material, capacity = 12) {\n    this.capacity = capacity;\n    this.meshes = Object.fromEntries(PARTS.map((part) => {\n      const mesh = new InstancedMesh(PART_GEOMETRY[part], material, capacity);\n      mesh.name = `remote-character-${part}`;\n      mesh.userData.riggedHumanoid = true;\n      scene.add(mesh);\n      return [part, mesh];\n    })) as unknown as Readonly<Record<PartName, InstancedMesh>>;\n    const rimMaterial = new MeshBasicNodeMaterial({\n      color: new Color(0x65d4ff),\n      transparent: true,\n      opacity: 0.45,\n      depthWrite: false,\n      blending: AdditiveBlending,\n    });\n    this.rimTorso = new InstancedMesh(PART_GEOMETRY.torso, rimMaterial, capacity);\n    this.rimHead = new InstancedMesh(PART_GEOMETRY.head, rimMaterial, capacity);\n    this.rimTorso.name = \"enemy-accent-rim-torso\";\n    this.rimHead.name = \"enemy-accent-rim-head\";\n    scene.add(this.rimTorso, this.rimHead);\n  }\n\n  setMaterial(material: Material): void {\n    for (const mesh of Object.values(this.meshes)) mesh.material = material;\n  }\n\n  update(states: readonly RemoteCharacterState[], elapsedSeconds: number): void {\n    const visible = states.slice(0, this.capacity);\n    const ids = new Set(visible.map((state) => state.id));\n    for (let index = 0; index < this.capacity; index += 1) {\n      const state = visible[index];\n      if (state === undefined) {\n        for (const mesh of Object.values(this.meshes)) mesh.setMatrixAt(index, HIDDEN);\n        this.rimTorso.setMatrixAt(index, HIDDEN);\n        this.rimHead.setMatrixAt(index, HIDDEN);\n        continue;\n      }\n      const speed = Math.hypot(state.velocity.x, state.velocity.z);\n      const spawnKey = `${state.generation ?? 0}:${state.alive ? 1 : 0}`;\n      if (state.alive && this.spawnKeys.get(state.id) !== spawnKey) {\n        this.spawnedAt.set(state.id, elapsedSeconds);\n      }\n      this.spawnKeys.set(state.id, spawnKey);\n      const spawnAge = elapsedSeconds - (this.spawnedAt.get(state.id) ?? -10);\n      const shimmer = state.alive && spawnAge < 1.5\n        ? 1 + Math.sin(spawnAge * Math.PI * 12) * 0.035\n        : 1;\n      const facing = speed > 0.15\n        ? Math.atan2(state.velocity.x, state.velocity.z)\n        : 0;\n      const duckScale = state.ducked === true ? 0.56 : 1;\n      const phase = elapsedSeconds * Math.min(12, 4 + speed * 1.3) + state.id;\n      const stride = state.grounded ? Math.sin(phase) * Math.min(0.72, speed * 0.09) : 0.34;\n      const airborneTuck = state.grounded ? 0 : 0.48;\n      const deathRoll = state.alive ? 0 : Math.PI / 2;\n      const root = new Matrix4().compose(\n        new Vector3(\n          state.position.x,\n          state.position.y + (state.alive ? 0 : 0.28),\n          state.position.z,\n        ),\n        new Quaternion().setFromEuler(new Euler(0, facing, deathRoll)),\n        new Vector3(shimmer, 1, shimmer),\n      );\n      const matrices: Record<PartName, Matrix4> = {\n        torso: localPartMatrix([0, 1.08, 0], new Euler(0, 0, -state.velocity.x * 0.015), duckScale),\n        head: localPartMatrix([0, 1.62, 0], new Euler(0, 0, 0), duckScale),\n        leftArm: localPartMatrix([-0.38, 1.08, 0], new Euler(stride, 0, 0), duckScale),\n        rightArm: localPartMatrix([0.38, 1.08, 0], new Euler(-stride, 0, 0), duckScale),\n        leftLeg: localPartMatrix([-0.16, 0.42 + airborneTuck * 0.2, 0], new Euler(-stride + airborneTuck, 0, 0), duckScale),\n        rightLeg: localPartMatrix([0.16, 0.42 + airborneTuck * 0.2, 0], new Euler(stride + airborneTuck, 0, 0), duckScale),\n      };\n      for (const part of PARTS) {\n        this.meshes[part].setMatrixAt(index, root.clone().multiply(matrices[part]));\n      }\n      this.rimTorso.setMatrixAt(\n        index,\n        root.clone().multiply(matrices.torso).scale(new Vector3(1.08, 1.08, 1.08)),\n      );\n      this.rimHead.setMatrixAt(\n        index,\n        root.clone().multiply(matrices.head).scale(new Vector3(1.12, 1.12, 1.12)),\n      );\n    }\n    for (const mesh of [...Object.values(this.meshes), this.rimTorso, this.rimHead]) {\n      mesh.count = Math.max(1, visible.length);\n      mesh.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true;\n    }\n    for (const id of this.spawnKeys.keys()) {\n      if (!ids.has(id)) {\n        this.spawnKeys.delete(id);\n        this.spawnedAt.delete(id);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n","numLines":300,"startLine":1,"totalLines":300}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"8915be8c-4bd1-48a8-8091-23963e9dad08","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

(typeof RENDER_STYLE_IDS)[number];\n\nexport interface RenderPalette {\n  readonly background: number;\n  readonly surface: number;\n  readonly actor: number;\n  readonly accent: number;\n  readonly ink: number;\n}\n\nexport interface RenderMaterials {\n  readonly map: Material;\n  readonly actor: Material;\n  readonly projectile: Material;\n  readonly viewmodel: Material;\n  /** Present for the fog;\n  const root = new Group();\n  root.name = \"render-style-rig\";\n  root.add(new HemisphereLight(sky, ground, intensity * 0.55));\n  const key = new DirectionalLight(sun, intensity);\n  key.position.set(28, 54, 18);\n  root.add(key);\n  scene.add(root);\n  return {\n    root,\n    dispose: () => {\n      scene.remove(root);\n      if (scene.fog === fog) scene.fog = null;\n    },\n  };\n};\n\nconst standardMaterials = (palette: RenderPalette, roughness = 0.9): RenderMaterials => {\n  const map = new MeshStandardNodeMaterial({ roughness, metalness: 0 });\n  map.colorNode = color(palette.surface);\n  const actor = new MeshStandardNodeMaterial({ roughness: 0.72 });\n  actor.colorNode = color(palette.actor);\n  const projectile = new MeshStandardNodeMaterial({ roughness: 0.35 });\n  projectile.colorNode = color(palette.accent);\n  projectile.emissiveNode = color(palette.accent).mul(0.75);\n  const viewmodel = new MeshStandardNodeMaterial({ roughness: 0.55 });\n  viewmodel.colorNode = color(palette.accent);\n  return { map, actor, projectile, viewmodel };\n};\n\nconst devPalette: RenderPalette = {\n  background: 0x071018,\n  surface: 0x253846,\n  actor: materials = standardMaterials(devPalette, 0.95);\n    const map = materials.map as MeshStandardNodeMaterial;\n    const p = positionWorld.mul(0.5);\n    const weights = normalWorld.abs();\n    const planeXY = fract(p.xy).sub(0.5).abs();\n    const planeYZ = fract(p.yz).sub(0.5).abs();\n    const planeXZ = fract(p.xz).sub(0.5).abs();\n    const lineXY = planeXY.x.max(planeXY.y);\n    const lineYZ = planeYZ.x.max(planeYZ.y);\n    const lineXZ = planeXZ.x.max(planeXZ.y);\n    const edge = lineYZ.mul(weights.x)\n      .add(lineXZ.mul(weights.y))\n      .add(lineXY.mul(weights.z));\n    const grid = step(0.465, edge);\n    map.colorNode = mix(color(devPalette.surface), color(devPalette.accent), grid.mul(0.72));\n    return { ...materials, map };\n  },\n  postChain: (source) => source,\n 0xbac8d2,\n  actor: 0x10283a,\n  accent: 0x2f72a3,\n  ink: 0x07131d,\n};\n\nconst inkDuotone: RenderStyle = {\n  id: \"ink-duotone\",\n  label: \"Ink duotone\",\n  palette: inkPalette,\n  materials: luminance = source.rgb.dot(vec3(0.2126, 0.7152, 0.0722));\n    const bit = step(threshold, luminance);\n    const duotone = mix(color(inkPalette.ink), color(inkPalette.background), bit);\n    return vec4(duotone, source.a);\n  },\n  fogLightRig: (scene) => makeRig(\n    scene,\n    inkPalette.background,\n    new Fog(inkPalette.background, 70, 155),\n    0xdde7ec,\n    0x8b9aa5,\n    0xf8fbff,\n {\n23\t    this.active = initial;\n24\t    this.reportError = reportError;\n25\t  }\n26\t\n27\t  replace(candidate: RenderPipelineLike, commit: () => void, rollback: () => void): void {\n28\t function armRecoverableAnimationLoop(\n74\t  setLoop: AnimationLoopSetter,\n75\t  frame: () => void,\n76\t  reportError: (error: unknown) => void = console.error,\n77\t  schedule: (callback: () => interface RenderPipelineLike {\n  render(): void;\n  dispose(): void;\n}\n\ninterface PendingPipeline {\n  readonly previous: RenderPipelineLike;\n  readonly candidate: RenderPipelineLike;\n  readonly commit: () => void;\n  readonly rollback: () => void;\n}\n\n/**\n * A style switch is not committed until its newly constructed pipeline renders\n * one frame. A graph/build failure restores the still-live previous pipeline.\n */\nexport class RecoverableRenderPipeline {\n  private active: RenderPipelineLike;\n  private pending: PendingPipeline | undefined;\n  private readonly reportError: (error: unknown) => void;\n\n  constructor(initial: RenderPipelineLike, reportError: (error: unknown) => void = console.error) {\n    this.active = initial;\n    this.reportError = reportError;\n  }\n\n  replace(candidate: RenderPipelineLike, commit: () => void, rollback: () => void): void {\n    this.cancelPending();\n    this.pending = { previous: this.active, candidate, commit, rollback };\n    this.active = candidate;\n  }\n\n  cancelPending(): void {\n    if (this.pending === undefined) return;\n    this.pending.candidate.dispose();\n    this.pending.rollback();\n    this.active = this.pending.previous;\n    this.pending = undefined;\n  }\n\n  render(): boolean {\n    try {\n      this.active.render();\n    } catch (error) {\n      const pending = this.pending;\n      this.reportError(error);\n      if (pending === undefined) throw error;\n      pending.candidate.dispose();\n      pending.rollback();\n      this.active = pending.previous;\n      this.pending = undefined;\n      this.active.render();\n      return false;\n    }\n    if (this.pending !== undefined) {\n      this.pending.previous.dispose();\n      this.pending.commit();\n      this.pending = undefined;\n    }\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  dispose(): void {\n    this.pending?.previous.dispose();\n    this.active.dispose();\n    this.pending = undefined;\n  }\n}\n\nexport type AnimationLoopSetter = (callback: (() => void) | null) => unknown;\n\n/** Re-arms the renderer after any uncaught frame failure. */\nexport function armRecoverableAnimationLoop(\n  setLoop: AnimationLoopSetter,\n  frame: () => void,\n  reportError: (error: unknown) => void = console.error,\n  schedule: (callback: () => void) => void = (callback) => setTimeout(callback, 0),\n): () => void {\n  const guarded = (): void => {\n    try {\n      frame();\n    } catch (error) {\n      reportError(error);\n      schedule(() => {\n        void setLoop(guarded);\n      });\n    }\n  };\n  void setLoop(guarded);\n  return guarded;\n}\n","numLines":92,"startLine":1,"totalLines":92}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"0a7f6a38-f646-4c55-8ca0-bb322c0dfbda","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

weaponId: WeaponId.Arc, silhouette: \"arc\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: false },\n42\t  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 4, weaponId: WeaponId.Peacemaker, silhouette: \"launcher\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: silhouette: \"scout\", scale: [0.95, 1, 1.08], rack: true },\n45\t  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 7, weaponId: WeaponId.Goldie, silhouette: \"pistol\", scale: [0.9, 0.92, 1.08], rack: true },\n46\t  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 8, weaponId: WeaponId.Knife, silhouette: \"knife\", scale: [1.08, 1.08, 1.08], rack: false },\n47\t]);\n48\t\n49\tfunction part(\n50\t  parent: Group,\n51\t  geometry: mesh;\n61\t}\n62\t\n63\tfunction buildSilhouette(config: ViewmodelConfig, material: Material): Group {\n64\t  const root = new Group();\n65\t  const body = new Group();\n66\t  root.add(body);\n67\t RECOIL_PROFILES: Readonly<Record<WeaponIdValue, readonly [number, number]>> = Object.freeze({\n122\t  [WeaponId.Pistol]: [0.12, 0.13],\n123\t  [WeaponId.Smg]: [0.07, 0.08],\n124\t  [WeaponId.Shotgun]: 0.19],\n134\t  [WeaponId.Goldie]: [0.28, 0.24],\n135\t});\n136\t\n137\texport interface WeaponViewmodelOptions {\n138\t  readonly loadAssets?: boolean;\n139\t}\n140\t\n141\texport class WeaponViewmodel {\n142\t  readonly root = new Group();\n143\t  private readonly material: Material;\n144\t  private readonly loadAssets: boolean;\n145\t  private weaponId: WeaponIdValue | undefined;\n146\t  private model: Group | undefined;\n147\t  private loadGeneration = 0;\n148\t  private equip = 1;\n149\t  private recoil = 0;\n150\t  private rack = 0;\n151\t  private goldieReload = 0;\n152\t  private previousAmmo = 1;\n153\t  private swayYaw = 0;\n154\t  private swayPitch = 0;\n155\t\n156\t  constructor(material: Material, options: WeaponViewmodelOptions = {}) {\n157\t    this.material = material;\n158\t    this.loadAssets = options.loadAssets ?? true;\n159\t    this.root.position.set(0.3, -0.28, -0.62);\n160\t    this.root.rotation.set(-0.08, -0.06, 0);\n161\t    this.root.layers.set(1);\n162\t    this.addProceduralArms();\n163\t  }\n164\t\n165\t  setWeapon(weaponId: WeaponIdValue): void {\n166\t    if (weaponId === this.weaponId) return;\n167\t    this.weaponId = weaponId;\n168\t    if (this.model !== undefined) this.root.remove(this.model);\n169\t    const config = VIEWMODEL_CONFIGS.find((entry) => entry.weaponId === weaponId);\n170\t    if (config === undefined) throw new RangeError(`missing viewmodel for weapon ${weaponId}`);\n171\t    this.model = buildSilhouette(config, this.material);\n172\t    this.root.add(this.model);\n173\t    const generation = ++this.loadGeneration;\n174\t    const url = WEAPON_MODEL_URLS[weaponId];\n175\t    if (this.loadAssets && url !== undefined) {\n176\t      void this.loadVendoredModel(url, config, generation);\n177\t    }\n178\t    this.equip = 0;\n179\t    this.recoil = 0;\n180\t    this.rack = 0;\n181\t    this.goldieReload = 0;\n182\t  }\n183\t\n184\t  onFire(): void {\n185\t    this.recoil = 1;\n186\t    if (VIEWMODEL_CONFIGS.find((entry) => entry.weaponId === this.weaponId)?.rack === true) this.rack = 1;\n187\t  }\n188\t\n189\t  update(\n190\t    dtSeconds: number,\n191\t    ammo: number,\n192\t    alive: boolean,\n193\t    viewYawVelocity = 0,\n194\t    viewPitchVelocity = 0,\n195\t  ): void {\n196\t    this.equip = Math.min(1, this.equip + dtSeconds * 6.5);\n197\t    this.recoil = Math.max(0, this.recoil - dtSeconds * 9);\n198\t    this.rack = Math.max(0, this.rack - dtSeconds * 2.8);\n199\t    if (this.weaponId === WeaponId.Goldie && this.previousAmmo === 1 && ammo === 0) this.goldieReload = 1.2;\n200\t    this.previousAmmo = ammo;\n201\t    if (this.goldieReload > 0) this.goldieReload = Math.max(0, this.goldieReload - dtSeconds);\n202\t    const equipDrop = (1 - this.equip) ** 2;\n203\t    const rackArc = Math.sin(this.rack * Math.PI);\n204\t    const goldiePhase = this.goldieReload / 1.2;\n205\t    const goldieArc = Math.sin(goldiePhase * Math.PI);\n206\t    const swayBlend = Math.min(1, dtSeconds * 12);\n207\t    this.swayYaw += (Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, viewYawVelocity * -0.018)) - this.swayYaw) * swayBlend;\n208\t    this.swayPitch +=\n209\t      (Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, viewPitchVelocity * 0.014)) - this.swayPitch) * swayBlend;\n210\t    const [recoilPitch, recoilKick] =\n211\t      RECOIL_PROFILES[this.weaponId ?? WeaponId.Pistol];\n212\t    this.root.visible = alive;\n213\t    this.root.position.set(\n214\t      0.3 + rackArc * 0.045 + this.swayYaw * 0.045,\n215\t      -0.28 - equipDrop * 0.46 - goldieArc * 0.06 + this.swayPitch * 0.035,\n216\t      -0.62 + this.recoil * recoilKick,\n217\t    );\n218\t    this.root.rotation.set(\n219\t      -0.08 + this.recoil * recoilPitch + goldieArc * 0.5 + addProceduralArms(): void {\n226\t    const armGeometry = new CylinderGeometry(0.075, 0.1, 0.72, 8);\n227\t    const left = new Mesh(armGeometry, this.material);\n228\t    left.position.set(-0.2, -0.3, -0.05);\n229\t    left.rotation.set(1.12, 0.12, -0.18);\n230\t    const right = new Mesh(armGeometry, this.material);\n231\t    right.position.set(0.2, -0.3, -0.05);\n232\t    right.rotation.set(1.12, -0.12, 0.18);\n233\t    left.name = \"procedural-arm-left\";\n234\t    right.name = \"procedural-arm-right\";\n235\t    left.layers.set(1);\n236\t    right.layers.set(1);\n237\t    this.root.add(left, right);\n238\t  }\n239\t\n240\t  private async loadVendoredModel(\n241\t    url: string,\n242\t    config: ViewmodelConfig,\n243\t    generation: number,\n244\t  ): Promise<void> {\n245\t    try {\n246\t      const gltf = await new GLTFLoader().loadAsync(url);\n247\t      if (generation !== this.loadGeneration || this.weaponId !== config.weaponId) return;\n248\t      const model = gltf.scene;\n249\t      model.traverse((object: Object3D) => {\n250\t        object.layers.set(1);\n251\t        if (object instanceof Mesh) bounds.getCenter(new Vector3());\n256\t      const longest = Math.max(size.x, size.y, size.z, 0.001);\n257\t      model.position.sub(center);\n258\t      model.scale.setScalar(0.95 / longest);\n259\t
