{\n  Box3,\n  BoxGeometry,\n  ConeGeometry,\n  CylinderGeometry,\n  Group,\n  Mesh,\n  SphereGeometry,\n  TorusGeometry,\n  Vector3,\n  type Material,\n  type Object3D,\n} from \"three/webgpu\";\nimport { GLTFLoader } from \"three/addons/loaders/GLTFLoader.js\";\n\nimport { WeaponId, type WeaponIdValue } from \"../../packages/shared/src/index.js\";\nimport { WEAPON_MODEL_URLS } from \"./asset-manifest.js\";\n\ntype Silhouette = \"pistol\" | \"smg\" | \"shotgun\" | \"rifle\" | \"scout\" | \"knife\" |\n  \"arc\" | \"launcher\" | \"discus\";\n\nexport interface ViewmodelConfig {\n  readonly ladder: \"classic\" | \"arsenal\";\n  readonly tier: number;\n  readonly weaponId: WeaponIdValue;\n  readonly silhouette: Silhouette;\n  readonly scale: readonly [number, number, number];\n  readonly rack: boolean;\n}\n\n/** Fourteen ladder configurations; shared silhouettes are explicit, never accidental. */\nexport const VIEWMODEL_CONFIGS: readonly ViewmodelConfig[] = Object.freeze([\n  { ladder: \"classic\", tier: 1, weaponId: WeaponId.Pistol, silhouette: \"pistol\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: false },\n  { ladder: \"classic\", tier: 2, weaponId: WeaponId.Smg, silhouette: \"smg\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: false },\n  { ladder: \"classic\", tier: 3, weaponId: WeaponId.Shotgun, silhouette: \"shotgun\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: true },\n  { ladder: \"classic\", tier: 4, weaponId: WeaponId.Rifle, silhouette: \"rifle\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: false },\n  { ladder: \"classic\", tier: 5, weaponId: WeaponId.Scout, silhouette: \"scout\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: true },\n  { ladder: \"classic\", tier: 6, weaponId: WeaponId.Knife, silhouette: \"knife\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: false },\n  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 1, weaponId: WeaponId.Sidewinder, silhouette: \"pistol\", scale: [1.12, 1.05, 1.18], rack: false },\n  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 2, weaponId: WeaponId.Boomstick, silhouette: \"shotgun\", scale: [1.08, 1.15, 1.12], rack: true },\n  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 3, weaponId: WeaponId.Arc, silhouette: \"arc\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: false },\n  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 4, weaponId: WeaponId.Peacemaker, silhouette: \"launcher\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: false },\n  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 5, weaponId: WeaponId.Discus, silhouette: \"discus\", scale: [1, 1, 1], rack: false },\n  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 6, weaponId: WeaponId.Deadeye, silhouette: \"scout\", scale: [0.95, 1, 1.08], rack: true },\n  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 7, weaponId: WeaponId.Goldie, silhouette: \"pistol\", scale: [0.9, 0.92, 1.08], rack: true },\n  { ladder: \"arsenal\", tier: 8, weaponId: WeaponId.Knife, silhouette: \"knife\", scale: [1.08, 1.08, 1.08], rack: false },\n]);\n\nfunction part(\n  parent: Group,\n  geometry: ConstructorParameters<typeof Mesh>[0],\n  material: Material,\n  position: readonly [number, number, number],\n  rotation: readonly [number, number, number] = [0, 0, 0],\n): Mesh {\n  const mesh = new Mesh(geometry, material);\n  mesh.position.set(...position);\n  mesh.rotation.set(...rotation);\n  parent.add(mesh);\n  return mesh;\n}\n\nfunction buildSilhouette(config: ViewmodelConfig, material: Material): Group {\n  const root = new Group();\n  const body = new Group();\n  root.add(body);\n  switch (config.silhouette) {\n    case \"pistol\":\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.16, 0.16, 0.58), material, [0, 0, -0.22]);\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.12, 0.34, 0.14), material, [0, -0.2, -0.04], [0.18, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new CylinderGeometry(0.035, 0.035, 0.36, 8), material, [0, 0.015, -0.62], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      if (config.weaponId === WeaponId.Goldie) {\n        part(body, new TorusGeometry(0.11, 0.025, 5, 10), material, [0, -0.02, -0.18], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      }\n      break;\n    case \"smg\":\n    case \"rifle\": {\n      const long = config.silhouette === \"rifle\" ? 0.9 : 0.68;\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.19, 0.22, long), material, [0, 0, -0.35]);\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.12, 0.3, 0.18), material, [0, -0.22, -0.18], [0.2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.13, 0.18, 0.32), material, [0, -0.04, 0.18]);\n      break;\n    }\n    case \"shotgun\":\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.24, 0.2, 0.72), material, [0, 0, -0.25]);\n      part(body, new CylinderGeometry(0.045, 0.045, 0.92, 8), material, [-0.06, 0.05, -0.72], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new CylinderGeometry(0.045, 0.045, 0.92, 8), material, [0.06, 0.05, -0.72], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.18, 0.18, 0.3), material, [0, -0.18, -0.12], [0.2, 0, 0]);\n      break;\n    case \"scout\":\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.17, 0.2, 1.05), material, [0, 0, -0.45]);\n      part(body, new CylinderGeometry(0.07, 0.07, 0.42, 10), material, [0, 0.17, -0.38], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.13, 0.3, 0.17), material, [0, -0.2, -0.16], [0.15, 0, 0]);\n      break;\n    case \"knife\":\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.09, 0.1, 0.38), material, [0, -0.08, 0]);\n      part(body, new ConeGeometry(0.105, 0.72, 4), material, [0, 0, -0.52], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      break;\n    case \"arc\":\n      part(body, new CylinderGeometry(0.16, 0.22, 0.72, 8), material, [0, 0, -0.25], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new TorusGeometry(0.2, 0.035, 6, 12), material, [0, 0, -0.55], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new SphereGeometry(0.12, 8, 6), material, [0, 0.08, -0.24]);\n      break;\n    case \"launcher\":\n      part(body, new CylinderGeometry(0.18, 0.23, 0.9, 10), material, [0, 0, -0.4], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.16, 0.32, 0.18), material, [0, -0.23, -0.1], [0.15, 0, 0]);\n      break;\n    case \"discus\":\n      part(body, new TorusGeometry(0.26, 0.07, 8, 18), material, [0, 0, -0.35], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new CylinderGeometry(0.17, 0.17, 0.09, 18), material, [0, 0, -0.35], [Math.PI / 2, 0, 0]);\n      part(body, new BoxGeometry(0.12, 0.27, 0.2), material, [0, -0.2, -0.12]);\n      break;\n  }\n  root.scale.set(...config.scale);\n  root.traverse((object: Object3D) => {\n    object.layers.set(1);\n  });\n  return root;\n}\n\nconst RECOIL_PROFILES: Readonly<Record<WeaponIdValue, readonly [number, number]>> = Object.freeze({\n  [WeaponId.Pistol]: [0.12, 0.13],\n  [WeaponId.Smg]: [0.07, 0.08],\n  [WeaponId.Shotgun]: [0.18, 0.2],\n  [WeaponId.Rifle]: [0.1, 0.11],\n  [WeaponId.Scout]: [0.2, 0.18],\n  [WeaponId.Knife]: [0.08, 0.04],\n  [WeaponId.Sidewinder]: [0.14, 0.14],\n  [WeaponId.Boomstick]: [0.24, 0.23],\n  [WeaponId.Arc]: [0.025, 0.035],\n  [WeaponId.Peacemaker]: [0.2, 0.21],\n  [WeaponId.Discus]: [0.11, 0.1],\n  [WeaponId.Deadeye]: [0.22, 0.19],\n  [WeaponId.Goldie]: [0.28, 0.24],\n});\n\nexport interface WeaponViewmodelOptions {\n  readonly loadAssets?: boolean;\n}\n\nexport class WeaponViewmodel {\n  readonly root = new Group();\n  private readonly material: Material;\n  private readonly loadAssets: boolean;\n  private weaponId: WeaponIdValue | undefined;\n  private model: Group | undefined;\n  private loadGeneration = 0;\n  private equip = 1;\n  private recoil = 0;\n  private rack = 0;\n  private goldieReload = 0;\n  private previousAmmo = 1;\n  private swayYaw = 0;\n  private swayPitch = 0;\n\n  constructor(material: Material, options: WeaponViewmodelOptions = {}) {\n    this.material = material;\n    this.loadAssets = options.loadAssets ?? true;\n    this.root.position.set(0.3, -0.28, -0.62);\n    this.root.rotation.set(-0.08, -0.06, 0);\n    this.root.layers.set(1);\n    this.addProceduralArms();\n  }\n\n  setWeapon(weaponId: WeaponIdValue): void {\n    if (weaponId === this.weaponId) return;\n    this.weaponId = weaponId;\n    if (this.model !== undefined) this.root.remove(this.model);\n    const config = VIEWMODEL_CONFIGS.find((entry) => entry.weaponId === weaponId);\n    if (config === undefined) throw new RangeError(`missing viewmodel for weapon ${weaponId}`);\n    this.model = buildSilhouette(config, this.material);\n    this.root.add(this.model);\n    const generation = ++this.loadGeneration;\n    const url = WEAPON_MODEL_URLS[weaponId];\n    if (this.loadAssets && url !== undefined) {\n      void this.loadVendoredModel(url, config, generation);\n    }\n    this.equip = 0;\n    this.recoil = 0;\n    this.rack = 0;\n    this.goldieReload = 0;\n  }\n\n  onFire(): void {\n    this.recoil = 1;\n    if (VIEWMODEL_CONFIGS.find((entry) => entry.weaponId === this.weaponId)?.rack === true) this.rack = 1;\n  }\n\n  update(\n    dtSeconds: number,\n    ammo: number,\n    alive: boolean,\n    viewYawVelocity = 0,\n    viewPitchVelocity = 0,\n  ): void {\n    this.equip = Math.min(1, this.equip + dtSeconds * 6.5);\n    this.recoil = Math.max(0, this.recoil - dtSeconds * 9);\n    this.rack = Math.max(0, this.rack - dtSeconds * 2.8);\n    if (this.weaponId === WeaponId.Goldie && this.previousAmmo === 1 && ammo === 0) this.goldieReload = 1.2;\n    this.previousAmmo = ammo;\n    if (this.goldieReload > 0) this.goldieReload = Math.max(0, this.goldieReload - dtSeconds);\n    const equipDrop = (1 - this.equip) ** 2;\n    const rackArc = Math.sin(this.rack * Math.PI);\n    const goldiePhase = this.goldieReload / 1.2;\n    const goldieArc = Math.sin(goldiePhase * Math.PI);\n    const swayBlend = Math.min(1, dtSeconds * 12);\n    this.swayYaw += (Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, viewYawVelocity * -0.018)) - this.swayYaw) * swayBlend;\n    this.swayPitch +=\n      (Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, viewPitchVelocity * 0.014)) - this.swayPitch) * swayBlend;\n    const [recoilPitch, recoilKick] =\n      RECOIL_PROFILES[this.weaponId ?? WeaponId.Pistol];\n    this.root.visible = alive;\n    this.root.position.set(\n      0.3 + rackArc * 0.045 + this.swayYaw * 0.045,\n      -0.28 - equipDrop * 0.46 - goldieArc * 0.06 + this.swayPitch * 0.035,\n      -0.62 + this.recoil * recoilKick,\n    );\n    this.root.rotation.set(\n      -0.08 + this.recoil * recoilPitch + goldieArc * 0.5 + this.swayPitch * 0.055,\n      -0.06 + rackArc * 0.15 + this.swayYaw * 0.07,\n      goldieArc * -0.55 + this.swayYaw * -0.035,\n    );\n  }\n\n  private addProceduralArms(): void {\n    const armGeometry = new CylinderGeometry(0.075, 0.1, 0.72, 8);\n    const left = new Mesh(armGeometry, this.material);\n    left.position.set(-0.2, -0.3, -0.05);\n    left.rotation.set(1.12, 0.12, -0.18);\n    const right = new Mesh(armGeometry, this.material);\n    right.position.set(0.2, -0.3, -0.05);\n    right.rotation.set(1.12, -0.12, 0.18);\n    left.name = \"procedural-arm-left\";\n    right.name = \"procedural-arm-right\";\n    left.layers.set(1);\n    right.layers.set(1);\n    this.root.add(left, right);\n  }\n\n  private async loadVendoredModel(\n    url: string,\n    config: ViewmodelConfig,\n    generation: number,\n  ): Promise<void> {\n    try {\n      const gltf = await new GLTFLoader().loadAsync(url);\n      if (generation !== this.loadGeneration || this.weaponId !== config.weaponId) return;\n      const model = gltf.scene;\n      model.traverse((object: Object3D) => {\n        object.layers.set(1);\n        if (object instanceof Mesh) object.material = this.material;\n      });\n      const bounds = new Box3().setFromObject(model);\n      const size = bounds.getSize(new Vector3());\n      const center = bounds.getCenter(new Vector3());\n      const longest = Math.max(size.x, size.y, size.z, 0.001);\n      model.position.sub(center);\n      model.scale.setScalar(0.95 / longest);\n      model.rotation.set(0, Math.PI, 0);\n      const composed = new Group();\n      composed.add(model);\n      composed.scale.set(...config.scale);\n      this.model?.removeFromParent();\n      this.model = composed;\n      this.root.add(composed);\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.warn(`viewmodel asset unavailable; keeping procedural ${config.silhouette}`, error);\n    }\n  }\n}\n","numLines":271,"startLine":1,"totalLines":271}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"d90fad56-3825-4754-95c9-fc28c2bf4c87","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{ NEAR_MISS_DIALS, WeaponId, type WeaponIdValue } from \"../../packages/shared/src/index.js\";\nimport { AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS } from \"./asset-manifest.js\";\n\nexport type SurfaceMaterial = \"concrete\" | \"metal\" | \"stone\";\n\nexport interface SynthRecipe {\n  readonly duration: number;\n  readonly attack: number;\n  readonly decay: number;\n  readonly noiseMix: number;\n  readonly toneHz: number;\n  readonly pitchDrop: number;\n  readonly filterHz: number;\n  readonly gain: number;\n}\n\nconst recipe = (\n  duration: number,\n  noiseMix: number,\n  toneHz: number,\n  filterHz: number,\n  gain: number,\n  pitchDrop = 0.35,\n): SynthRecipe => ({ duration, attack: 0.002, decay: duration * 0.78, noiseMix, toneHz, pitchDrop, filterHz, gain });\n\nexport const FIRE_RECIPES: Readonly<Record<WeaponIdValue, SynthRecipe>> = Object.freeze({\n  [WeaponId.Pistol]: recipe(0.13, 0.62, 150, 2_600, 0.55),\n  [WeaponId.Smg]: recipe(0.075, 0.58, 190, 3_200, 0.38),\n  [WeaponId.Shotgun]: recipe(0.3, 0.88, 72, 1_650, 0.72, 0.55),\n  [WeaponId.Rifle]: recipe(0.095, 0.7, 125, 2_900, 0.48),\n  [WeaponId.Scout]: recipe(0.34, 0.72, 92, 2_200, 0.7, 0.62),\n  [WeaponId.Knife]: recipe(0.11, 0.8, 620, 5_400, 0.3, 0.08),\n  [WeaponId.Sidewinder]: recipe(0.16, 0.5, 118, 2_800, 0.58),\n  [WeaponId.Boomstick]: recipe(0.4, 0.9, 58, 1_400, 0.78, 0.66),\n  [WeaponId.Arc]: recipe(0.06, 0.35, 740, 6_200, 0.28, 0.05),\n  [WeaponId.Peacemaker]: recipe(0.25, 0.82, 66, 1_800, 0.7, 0.58),\n  [WeaponId.Discus]: recipe(0.18, 0.32, 410, 4_800, 0.48, 0.15),\n  [WeaponId.Deadeye]: recipe(0.29, 0.6, 105, 2_500, 0.65, 0.55),\n  [WeaponId.Goldie]: recipe(0.32, 0.4, 128, 3_600, 0.68, 0.7),\n});\n\nexport const IMPACT_RECIPES: Readonly<Record<WeaponIdValue, SynthRecipe>> = Object.freeze(\n  Object.fromEntries(Object.values(WeaponId).map((id) => [\n    id,\n    recipe(id === WeaponId.Knife ? 0.09 : 0.12, 0.76, 260 + id * 19, 4_200, 0.3, 0.12),\n  ])) as Record<WeaponIdValue, SynthRecipe>,\n);\n\nexport function validateRecipe(value: SynthRecipe): boolean {\n  return Object.values(value).every(Number.isFinite) &&\n    value.duration > 0 && value.duration <= 2 && value.attack >= 0 &&\n    value.decay > 0 && value.decay <= value.duration &&\n    value.noiseMix >= 0 && value.noiseMix <= 1 &&\n    value.toneHz > 0 && value.filterHz > 0 &&\n    value.gain >= 0 && value.gain <= 0.9 &&\n    value.pitchDrop >= 0 && value.pitchDrop <= 1;\n}\n\n/** Deterministic PCM oracle used by tests and by the Web Audio runtime. */\nexport function renderRecipe(\n  value: SynthRecipe,\n  sampleRate = 48_000,\n  seed = 0x9e3779b9,\n): Float32Array<ArrayBuffer> {\n  if (!validateRecipe(value)) throw new RangeError(\"invalid synth recipe\");\n  const samples = new Float32Array(Math.ceil(value.duration * sampleRate));\n  let random = seed >>> 0;\n  let phase = 0;\n  let filteredNoise = 0;\n  const filterAlpha = Math.min(1, (2 * Math.PI * value.filterHz) / sampleRate);\n  for (let index = 0; index < samples.length; index += 1) {\n    const time = index / sampleRate;\n    random = (Math.imul(random, 1_664_525) + 1_013_904_223) >>> 0;\n    const white = random / 0xffff_ffff * 2 - 1;\n    filteredNoise += (white - filteredNoise) * filterAlpha;\n    const progress = time / value.duration;\n    const frequency = value.toneHz * (1 - progress * value.pitchDrop);\n    phase += 2 * Math.PI * frequency / sampleRate;\n    const attack = value.attack === 0 ? 1 : Math.min(1, time / value.attack);\n    const tail = Math.exp(-Math.max(0, time - value.attack) / value.decay * 6);\n    const mixed = Math.sin(phase) * (1 - value.noiseMix) + filteredNoise * value.noiseMix;\n    samples[index] = Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, mixed * attack * tail * value.gain));\n  }\n  return samples;\n}\n\nexport class GameAudio {\n  private context: AudioContext | undefined;\n  private master: GainNode | undefined;\n  private windGain: GainNode | undefined;\n  private ambienceGain: GainNode | undefined;\n  private captureDestination: MediaStreamAudioDestinationNode | undefined;\n  private seed = 1;\n  private volume = 0.8;\n  private muted = false;\n  private readonly samples = new Map<string, AudioBuffer>();\n  private preloadStarted = false;\n  private footstepIndex = 0;\n\n  unlock(): void {\n    this.context ??= new AudioContext();\n    this.ensureMaster();\n    void this.context.resume();\n    this.ensureLoops();\n    this.preloadSamples();\n  }\n\n  setMaster(volume: number, muted: boolean): void {\n    this.volume = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, volume));\n    this.muted = muted;\n    this.ensureMaster();\n    if (this.context !== undefined && this.master !== undefined) {\n      this.master.gain.setTargetAtTime(\n        muted ? 0 : this.volume,\n        this.context.currentTime,\n        0.015,\n      );\n    }\n  }\n","numLines":120,"startLine":1,"totalLines":438}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"b3d756b6-d791-4652-a5b2-6d60b6b1cccb","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{"parentUuid":"71d2c4a8-5af9-4479-b79e-2d6ed02683aa","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01N4tfaG5XYrAgx9xYcct6Yq","type":"tool_result","content":"120\t\n121\t  get captureStream(): MediaStream | undefined {\n122\t    return this.captureDestination?.stream;\n123\t  }\n124\t\n125\t  setListener(\n126\t    position: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n127\t    forward: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n128\t  ): void {\n129\t    if (this.context === undefined) return;\n130\t    const listener = this.context.listener;\n131\t    listener.positionX.value = position.x;\n132\t    listener.positionY.value = position.y;\n133\t    listener.positionZ.value = position.z;\n134\t    listener.forwardX.value = forward.x;\n135\t    listener.forwardY.value = forward.y;\n136\t    listener.forwardZ.value = forward.z;\n137\t    listener.upX.value = 0;\n138\t    listener.upY.value = 1;\n139\t    listener.upZ.value = 0;\n140\t  }\n141\t\n142\t  playFire(weaponId: WeaponIdValue, position?: { x: number; y: number; z: number }): void {\n143\t    const sampled = weaponId === WeaponId.Arc\n144\t      ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.laserSmall\n145\t      : weaponId === WeaponId.Peacemaker\n146\t        ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.forceField\n147\t        : weaponId === WeaponId.Discus\n148\t          ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.laserRetro\n149\t          : undefined;\n150\t    if (sampled !== undefined && this.playSample(sampled, position, 0.55)) return;\n151\t    this.play(FIRE_RECIPES[weaponId], position);\n152\t  }\n153\t\n154\t  playImpact(weaponId: WeaponIdValue, position?: { x: number; y: number; z: number }): void {\n155\t    const sampled = weaponId === WeaponId.Peacemaker || weaponId === WeaponId.Discus\n156\t      ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.explosion\n157\t      : AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactGeneric;\n158\t    if (this.playSample(sampled, position, 0.65)) return;\n159\t    this.play(IMPACT_RECIPES[weaponId], position);\n160\t  }\n161\t\n162\t  hitmarker(damage: number): void {\n163\t    this.tone(220 + Math.max(0, Math.min(100, damage)) * 5.2, 0.052, 0.085);\n164\t  }\n165\t\n166\t  headshot(): void {\n167\t    this.tone(1_120, 0.12, 0.095);\n168\t  }\n169\t\n170\t  killConfirm(streak = 1): void {\n171\t    const rise = Math.min(4, Math.max(0, streak - 1)) * 55;\n172\t    this.tone(690 + rise, 0.15, 0.12);\n173\t    this.tone(920 + rise, 0.11, 0.1, 0.045);\n174\t  }\n175\t\n176\t  airshot(): void {\n177\t    this.tone(1_380, 0.2, 0.12);\n178\t    this.tone(1_840, 0.16, 0.09, 0.055);\n179\t  }\n180\t\n181\t  impressive(chain: number): void {\n182\t    const lift = Math.min(3, Math.max(0, chain / 2 - 1)) * 18;\n183\t    this.voicedTone(294 + lift, 0.19, 0.075);\n184\t    this.voicedTone(440 + lift, 0.25, 0.065, 0.105);\n185\t  }\n186\t\n187\t  foundrySigil(): void {\n188\t    [392, 523.25, 659.25, 783.99].forEach((frequency, index) =>\n189\t      this.tone(frequency, 0.24, 0.09, index * 0.095));\n190\t  }\n191\t\n192\t  tierUp(): void {\n193\t    this.tone(520, 0.14, 0.08);\n194\t    this.tone(780, 0.18, 0.09, 0.07);\n195\t  }\n196\t\n197\t  lastTierWarning(): void {\n198\t    this.tone(185, 0.28, 0.055);\n199\t    this.tone(247, 0.32, 0.045, 0.11);\n200\t  }\n201\t\n202\t  footstep(\n203\t    material: SurfaceMaterial,\n204\t    position?: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n205\t    own = true,\n206\t  ): void {\n207\t    const footstepUrl = AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.footstepConcrete[\n208\t      this.footstepIndex++ % AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.footstepConcrete.length\n209\t    ]!;\n210\t    if (material !== \"metal\" && this.playSample(footstepUrl, position, own ? 0.24 : 0.44)) return;\n211\t    if (material === \"metal\" && this.playSample(AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactMetal, position, own ? 0.1 : 0.2, 1.4)) {\n212\t      return;\n213\t    }\n214\t    const params = material === \"metal\"\n215\t      ? recipe(0.07, 0.62, 360, 5_500, 0.15, 0.12)\n216\t      : material === \"stone\"\n217\t        ? recipe(0.09, 0.82, 145, 2_500, 0.17, 0.25)\n218\t        : recipe(0.08, 0.75, 190, 3_200, 0.16, 0.2);\n219\t    this.play(params, position, own ? 0.55 : 1);\n220\t  }\n221\t\n222\t  landing(material: SurfaceMaterial, speed: number): void {\n223\t    const sample = material === \"metal\"\n224\t      ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactMetal\n225\t      : AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactGeneric;\n226\t    if (this.playSample(sample, undefined, Math.min(0.44, 0.12 + speed * 0.018), 0.8)) return;\n227\t    const base = material === \"metal\" ? 240 : material === \"stone\" ? 105 : 140;\n228\t    this.play(recipe(0.12, 0.82, base, 2_200, Math.min(0.35, 0.12 + speed * 0.012), 0.3));\n229\t  }\n230\t\n231\t  projectileWhoosh(position: { x: number; y: number; z: number }, distance: number): void {\n232\t    if (distance > 7) return;\n233\t    this.play(\n234\t      recipe(0.09, 0.48, 180 + (7 - distance) * 24, 3_800, 0.13, 0.08),\n235\t      position,\n236\t      Math.max(0.15, 1 - distance / 7),\n237\t    );\n238\t  }\n239\t\n240\t  nearMiss(\n241\t    position: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n242\t    closingSpeed: number,\n243\t    hitscan: boolean,\n244\t  ): void {\n245\t    const speed = Math.max(0, closingSpeed);\n246\t    const doppler = 1 + Math.min(0.7, speed / 70 *  get captureStream(): MediaStream | undefined {\n    return this.captureDestination?.stream;\n  }\n\n  setListener(\n    position: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n    forward: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n  ): void {\n    if (this.context === undefined) return;\n    const listener = this.context.listener;\n    listener.positionX.value = position.x;\n    listener.positionY.value = position.y;\n    listener.positionZ.value = position.z;\n    listener.forwardX.value = forward.x;\n    listener.forwardY.value = forward.y;\n    listener.forwardZ.value = forward.z;\n    listener.upX.value = 0;\n    listener.upY.value = 1;\n    listener.upZ.value = 0;\n  }\n\n  playFire(weaponId: WeaponIdValue, position?: { x: number; y: number; z: number }): void {\n    const sampled = weaponId === WeaponId.Arc\n      ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.laserSmall\n      : weaponId === WeaponId.Peacemaker\n        ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.forceField\n        : weaponId === WeaponId.Discus\n          ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.laserRetro\n          : undefined;\n    if (sampled !== undefined && this.playSample(sampled, position, 0.55)) return;\n    this.play(FIRE_RECIPES[weaponId], position);\n  }\n\n  playImpact(weaponId: WeaponIdValue, position?: { x: number; y: number; z: number }): void {\n    const sampled = weaponId === WeaponId.Peacemaker || weaponId === WeaponId.Discus\n      ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.explosion\n      : AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactGeneric;\n    if (this.playSample(sampled, position, 0.65)) return;\n    this.play(IMPACT_RECIPES[weaponId], position);\n  }\n\n  hitmarker(damage: number): void {\n    this.tone(220 + Math.max(0, Math.min(100, damage)) * 5.2, 0.052, 0.085);\n  }\n\n  headshot(): void {\n    this.tone(1_120, 0.12, 0.095);\n  }\n\n  killConfirm(streak = 1): void {\n    const rise = Math.min(4, Math.max(0, streak - 1)) * 55;\n    this.tone(690 + rise, 0.15, 0.12);\n    this.tone(920 + rise, 0.11, 0.1, 0.045);\n  }\n\n  airshot(): void {\n    this.tone(1_380, 0.2, 0.12);\n    this.tone(1_840, 0.16, 0.09, 0.055);\n  }\n\n  impressive(chain: number): void {\n    const lift = Math.min(3, Math.max(0, chain / 2 - 1)) * 18;\n    this.voicedTone(294 + lift, 0.19, 0.075);\n    this.voicedTone(440 + lift, 0.25, 0.065, 0.105);\n  }\n\n  foundrySigil(): void {\n    [392, 523.25, 659.25, 783.99].forEach((frequency, index) =>\n      this.tone(frequency, 0.24, 0.09, index * 0.095));\n  }\n\n  tierUp(): void {\n    this.tone(520, 0.14, 0.08);\n    this.tone(780, 0.18, 0.09, 0.07);\n  }\n\n  lastTierWarning(): void {\n    this.tone(185, 0.28, 0.055);\n    this.tone(247, 0.32, 0.045, 0.11);\n  }\n\n  footstep(\n    material: SurfaceMaterial,\n    position?: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n    own = true,\n  ): void {\n    const footstepUrl = AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.footstepConcrete[\n      this.footstepIndex++ % AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.footstepConcrete.length\n    ]!;\n    if (material !== \"metal\" && this.playSample(footstepUrl, position, own ? 0.24 : 0.44)) return;\n    if (material === \"metal\" && this.playSample(AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactMetal, position, own ? 0.1 : 0.2, 1.4)) {\n      return;\n    }\n    const params = material === \"metal\"\n      ? recipe(0.07, 0.62, 360, 5_500, 0.15, 0.12)\n      : material === \"stone\"\n        ? recipe(0.09, 0.82, 145, 2_500, 0.17, 0.25)\n        : recipe(0.08, 0.75, 190, 3_200, 0.16, 0.2);\n    this.play(params, position, own ? 0.55 : 1);\n  }\n\n  landing(material: SurfaceMaterial, speed: number): void {\n    const sample = material === \"metal\"\n      ? AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactMetal\n      : AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactGeneric;\n    if (this.playSample(sample, undefined, Math.min(0.44, 0.12 + speed * 0.018), 0.8)) return;\n    const base = material === \"metal\" ? 240 : material === \"stone\" ? 105 : 140;\n    this.play(recipe(0.12, 0.82, base, 2_200, Math.min(0.35, 0.12 + speed * 0.012), 0.3));\n  }\n\n  projectileWhoosh(position: { x: number; y: number; z: number }, distance: number): void {\n    if (distance > 7) return;\n    this.play(\n      recipe(0.09, 0.48, 180 + (7 - distance) * 24, 3_800, 0.13, 0.08),\n      position,\n      Math.max(0.15, 1 - distance / 7),\n    );\n  }\n\n  nearMiss(\n    position: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n    closingSpeed: number,\n    hitscan: boolean,\n  ): void {\n    const speed =   const gain = Math.max(0, Math.min(0.16, (speed - 5) / 100));\n    this.windGain.gain.setTargetAtTime(gain, this.context.currentTime, 0.08);\n  }\n\n  setSpireSecretAmbience(active: boolean): void {\n    this.ensureLoops();\n    if (this.context === undefined || this.ambienceGain === undefined) return;\n    this.ambienceGain.gain.setTargetAtTime(active ? 0.055 : 0, this.context.currentTime, 0.35);\n  }\n\n  private play(\n    value: SynthRecipe,\n    position?: { x: number; y: number; z: number },\n    gainScale = 1,\n  ): void {\n    if (this.context === undefined) return;\n    this.ensureMaster();\n    const samples = renderRecipe(value, this.context.sampleRate, this.seed++);\n    const buffer = this.context.createBuffer(1, samples.length, this.context.sampleRate);\n    buffer.copyToChannel(samples, 0);\n    const source = this.context.createBufferSource();\n    const gain = this.context.createGain();\n    gain.gain.value = gainScale;\n    source.buffer = buffer;\n panner.positionZ.value = position.z;\n      source.connect(panner).connect(gain).connect(this.master!);\n    }\n    source.start();\n  }\n\n  private playSample(\n    url: string,\n    position?: { x: === undefined) return false;\n    this.ensureMaster();\n    const source = this.context.createBufferSource();\n    const gain = this.context.createGain();\n    source.buffer = buffer;\n    source.playbackRate.value = playbackRate;\n    gain.gain.value = gainValue;\n    if (position === undefined) source.connect(gain).connect(this.master!);\n    else {\n      const panner = panner.positionX.value = position.x;\n      panner.positionY.value = position.y;\n      panner.positionZ.value = position.z;\n      source.connect(panner).connect(gain).connect(this.master!);\n    }\n    source.start();\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  private preloadSamples(): void {\n    if (this.preloadStarted || this.context === undefined) return;\n    this.preloadStarted = true;\n    const urls = new Set<string>([\n      ...AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.footstepConcrete,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactGeneric,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.impactMetal,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.uiClick,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.uiConfirm,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.uiError,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.explosion,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.forceField,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.laserLarge,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.laserRetro,\n      AUDIO_SAMPLE_URLS.laserSmall,\n    ]);\n    for (const url of urls) {\n      void fetch(url)\n        .then((response) => {\n          if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`audio HTTP ${response.status}`);\n          return response.arrayBuffer();\n        })\n        .then((bytes) => this.context!.decodeAudioData(bytes))\n        .then((buffer) => this.samples.set(url, buffer))\n        .catch((error: unknown) => console.warn(\"audio sample unavailable\", error));\n    }\n  }\n\n  private tone(frequency: number, duration: number, gainValue: number, delay = 0): void {\n    if (this.context === undefined) return;\n    this.ensureMaster();\n    const start = this.context.currentTime + delay;\n    const oscillator = this.context.createOscillator();\n    const gain = this.context.createGain();\n    oscillator.frequency.setValueAtTime(frequency, start);\n    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(Math.max(0.0001, gainValue), start);\n    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, start + duration);\n    oscillator.connect(gain).connect(this.master!);\n    oscillator.start(start);\n    oscillator.stop(start + duration);\n  }\n\n  private voicedTone(frequency: number, duration: number, gainValue: number, delay = 0): void {\n    if (this.context === undefined) return;\n    this.ensureMaster();\n    const start = this.context.currentTime + delay;\n    const oscillator = this.context.createOscillator();\n    const formant = this.context.createBiquadFilter();\n    const gain = this.context.createGain();\n    oscillator.type = \"sawtooth\";\n    oscillator.frequency.setValueAtTime(frequency, start);\n    oscillator.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(frequency * 0.94, start + duration);\n    formant.type = \"bandpass\";\n    formant.frequency.value = frequency < 400 ? 760 : 1_180;\n    formant.Q.value = 3.8;\n    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, start);\n    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(gainValue, start + 0.018);\n    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, start + duration);\n    oscillator.connect(formant).connect(gain).connect(this.master!);\n    oscillator.start(start);\n    oscillator.stop(start + duration);\n  }\n\n  private ensureLoops(): void {\n    if (this.context === undefined || this.windGain !== undefined) return;\n    const makeNoiseLoop = (filterHz: number): { source: AudioBufferSourceNode; gain: GainNode } => {\n      const samples = renderRecipe(recipe(1, 1, 80, filterHz, 0.65, 0), this.context!.sampleRate, this.seed++);\n      const buffer = this.context!.createBuffer(1, samples.length, this.context!.sampleRate);\n      buffer.copyToChannel(samples, 0);\n      const source = this.context!.createBufferSource();\n      const gain = this.context!.createGain();\n      source.buffer = buffer;\n      source.loop = true;\n      gain.gain.value = 0;\n      source.connect(gain).connect(this.master!);\n      source.start();\n      return { source, gain };\n    };\n    this.windGain = makeNoiseLoop(1_800).gain;\n    this.ambienceGain = this.captureDestination = this.context.createMediaStreamDestination();\n    this.master.gain.value = this.muted ? 0 : this.volume;\n    this.master.connect(this.context.destination);\n    this.master.connect(this.captureDestination);\n id=\"gg-presets\"></div>\n74\t    <div id=\"gg-params\"></div>\n75\t    <h3 style=\"margin-top:10px\">render style</h3>\n76\t    <div class=\"row\"><select id=\"gg-style\"></select></div>\n77\t    <h3 class=\"val\" id=\"gg-dpiv\">800</span></div>\n86\t    <div class=\"row\"><span>fov</span><input type=\"range\" id=\"gg-fov\" min=\"90\" max=\"120\" step=\"1\"><span class=\"val\" id=\"gg-fovv\"></span></div>\n87\t    <h3 style=\"margin-top:10px\">crosshair</h3>\n88\t    <div class=\"row\"><span>size</span><input type=\"range\" id=\"gg-cross-size\" min=\"3\" max=\"14\" step=\"1\"><span class=\"val\"></span></div>\n89\t    <div class=\"row\"><span>gap</span><input type=\"range\" id=\"gg-cross-gap\" min=\"0\" max=\"16\" step=\"1\"><span class=\"val\"></span></div>\n90\t    <div class=\"row\"><span>center dot</span><input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"gg-cross-dot\"></div>\n91\t    <div class=\"row\"><span>color</span><select type=\"checkbox\" id=\"gg-mute\"></div>`;\n95\t    document.body.appendChild(toggle);\n96\t    document.body.appendChild(root);\n97\t    const storageKey = \"gg:dev-panel-open\";\n98\t    root.hidden = localStorage.getItem(storageKey) !== \"1\";\n99\t    toggle.onclick = () => {\n100\t      root.hidden = !root.hidden;\n101\t      localStorage.setItem(storageKey, root.hidden ? \"0\" : \"1\");\n102\t    };\n103\t    document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n104\t      if (event.code !== \"Backquote\" || event.repeat) return;\n105\t      root.hidden = !root.hidden;\n106\t      localStorage.setItem(storageKey, root.hidden ? \"0\" : \"1\");\n107\t      event.preventDefault();\n108\t    });\n109\t\n110\t    this.drawEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-draws\")!;\n111\t    this.fpsEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-fps\")!;\n112\t    this.inputBitsEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-input-bits\")!;\n113\t    this.inputLockEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-input-lock\")!;\n114\t    this.inputEventsEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-input-events\")!;\n115\t\n116\t    const style = root.querySelector<HTMLSelectElement>(\"#gg-style\")!;\n117\t    for (const id of bind.styles) style.add(new Option(id, id));\n118\t    style.value = bind.activeStyle;\n119\t    style.onchange = () => bind.onStyle(style.value);\n120\t\n121\t    const presets = root.querySelector(\"#gg-presets\")!;\n122\t    for (const name of Object.keys(bind.presets)) {\n123\t      const b = document.createElement(\"button\");\n124\t      b.textContent = name;\n125\t      b.onclick = () => {\n126\t        bind.onPreset(name);\n127\t        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(bind.presets[name] ?? {})) this.setParam(k, v);\n128\t      };\n129\t      presets.appendChild(b);\n130\t    }\n131\t\n132\t    const paramsEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-params\")!;\n133\t    const ranges: Record<string, [number, number, number]> = {\n134\t      gravity: [1, 40, 0.5],\n135\t      runSpeed: [2, 12, 0.1],\n136\t      airAccelerate: [0, 20, 0.5],\n137\t      groundAccelerate: [1, 20, 0.5],\n138\t      friction: [0, 12, 0.5],\n139\t      jumpVelocity: [2, 10, 0.1],\n140\t      jumpBufferMs: [0, 200, 5],\n141\t    };\n142\t    for (const [key, val] of Object.entries(bind.params)) {\n143\t      const [min, max, step] = ranges[key] ?? [0, val * 3 || 10, 0.1];\n144\t      const row = document.createElement(\"div\");\n145\t      row.className = \"row\";\n146\t      row.innerHTML = `<span>${key}</span><input type=\"range\" min=\"${min}\" max=\"${max}\" step=\"${step}\" value=\"${val}\"><span class=\"val\">${val}</span>`;\n147\t      const input = row.querySelector(\"input\")!;\n148\t      const valEl = row.querySelector(\".val\")!;\n149\t      input.oninput = () => {\n150\t        valEl.textContent = input.value;\n151\t        bind.onParamChange(key, Number(input.value));\n152\t      };\n153\t      this.inputs.set(key, input);\n154\t      paramsEl.appendChild(row);\n155\t    }\n156\t\n157\t    const cm = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-cm\")!;\n158\t    const dpi = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-dpi\")!;\n159\t    const sync = () => {\n160\t      root.querySelector(\"#gg-cmv\")!.textContent = cm.value;\n161\t      root.querySelector(\"#gg-dpiv\")!.textContent = dpi.value;\n162\t      bind.onSensitivity(Number(cm.value), Number(dpi.value));\n163\t    };\n164\t    cm.oninput = sync;\n165\t    dpi.oninput = sync;\n166\t\n167\t    const controlsRoot = root.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\"#gg-controls\")!;\n168\t    const actions: readonly ControlAction[] = [\n169\t      \"forward\", \"back\", \"left\", \"right\", \"jump\", \"duck\", \"melee\",\n170\t    ];\n171\t    const renderControls = (): void => {\n172\t      controlsRoot.replaceChildren();\n173\t      for (const action of actions) {\n174\t        const row = document.createElement(\"div\");\n175\t        row.className = \"row\";\n176\t        const label = document.createElement(\"span\");\n177\t        label.textContent = action;\n178\t        const button = document.createElement(\"button\");\n179\t        button.type = \"button\";\n180\t        button.className = \"control\";\n181\t        button.textContent = controls[action].map(bindingLabel).join(\" / \");\n182\t        button.onclick = () => {\n183\t          button.textContent = \"press a key\";\n184\t          const capture = (event: KeyboardEvent): void => {\n185\t            event.preventDefault();\n186\t            if (event.code === \"Escape\" || event.metaKey ||\n187\t              (event.ctrlKey && !event.code.startsWith(\"Control\"))) {\n188\t              renderControls();\n189\t              return;\n190\t            }\n191\t            bind.onControl(action, event.code);\n192\t            controls = {\n193\t              ...controls,\n194\t              [action]: [event.code, ...controls[action].slice(1)],\n195\t            };\n196\t            renderControls();\n197\t          };\n198\t          document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", capture, { once: true, capture: true });\n199\t        };\n200\t        row.append(label, button);\n201\t        controlsRoot.appendChild(row);\n202\t      }\n203\t    };\n204\t    renderControls();\n205\t\n206\t    const fov = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-fov\")!;\n207\t    const size = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-cross-size\")!;\n208\t    const gap = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-cross-gap\")!;\n209\t    const dot = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-cross-dot\")!;\n210\t    const color = root.querySelector<HTMLSelectElement>(\"#gg-cross-color\")!;\n211\t    const volume = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-volume\")!;\n212\t    const mute = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-mute\")!;\n213\t    fov.value = String(settings.fov);\n214\t    size.value = String(settings.crosshair.size);\n215\t    gap.value = String(settings.crosshair.gap);\n216\t    dot.checked = settings.crosshair.dot;\n217\t    color.value = settings.crosshair.color;\n218\t    volume.value = String(settings.masterVolume);\n219\t    mute.checked = settings.muted;\n220\t    const emitSettings = (): void => {\n221\t      settings = {\n222\t        fov: Number(fov.value),\n223\t        masterVolume: Number(volume.value),\n224\t        muted: mute.checked,\n225\t        crosshair: {\n226\t          size: Number(size.value),\n227\t          gap: Number(gap.value),\n228\t          dot: dot.checked,\n229\t          color: color.value as UserSettings[\"crosshair\"][\"color\"],\n230\t        },\n231\t      };\n232\t      root.querySelector(\"#gg-fovv\")!.textContent = fov.value;\n233\t      (size.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement).textContent = size.value;\n234\t      (gap.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement).textContent = gap.value;\n235\t      (volume.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement).textContent =\n236\t        `${Math.round(Number(volume.value) * 100)}%`;\n237\t      bind.onSettings(settings);\n238\t    };\n239\t    for (const input of [fov, size, gap, dot, color, volume, mute]) {\n240\t      input.addEventListener(\"input\", emitSettings);\n241\t    }\n242\t    emitSettings();\n243\t  }\n244\t\n245\t  private setParam(key: string, value: number): void {\n246\t    const input = this.inputs.get(key);\n247\t    if (!input) return;\n248\t    input.value = String(value);\n249\t    (input.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement).textContent = String(value);\n250\t  }\n251\t\n252\t  update(fps: number, drawCalls: number): void {\n253\t    this.fpsEl.textContent = String(Math.round(fps));\n254\t    this.drawEl.textContent = String(drawCalls);\n255\t    const input = this.inputInspector();\n256\t    this.inputBitsEl.textContent = formatButtonBits(input.buttons);\n257\t    this.inputLockEl.textContent = input.locked ? \"locked\" : \"unlocked\";\n258\t    this.inputEventsEl.replaceChildren(...input.keyEvents.map((event) => {\n259\t      const item = document.createElement(\"li\");\n260\t      item.textContent = `${event.phase === \"down\" ? \"↓\" : \"↑\"} ${bindingLabel(event.code)}${event.repeat ? \" · repeat\" : \"\"}`;\n261\t      return item;\n262\t    }));\n263\t  }\n264\t}\n265\t"}]},"uuid":"2d31d67f-d6e8-46c7-97c0-7deadc6f3682","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:23:02.285Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/panel.ts","content":"//    <div class=\"row\"><span>size</span><input type=\"range\" id=\"gg-cross-size\" min=\"3\" max=\"14\" step=\"1\"><span class=\"val\"></span></div>\n    <div class=\"row\"><span>gap</span><input id=\"gg-cross-dot\"></div>\n    <div class=\"row\"><span>color</span><select id=\"gg-cross-color\"><option>white</option><option>cyan</option><option>green</option><option>amber</option></select></div>\n    <h3 style=\"margin-top:10px\">audio</h3>\n    <div class=\"row\"><span>master</span><input type=\"range\" id=\"gg-volume\" min=\"0\" max=\"1\" step=\"0.05\"><span class=\"val\"></span></div>\n    <div class=\"row\"><span>mute</span><input type=\"checkbox\" id=\"gg-mute\"></div>`;\n    document.body.appendChild(toggle);\n    document.body.appendChild(root);\n    const storageKey = \"gg:dev-panel-open\";\n    root.hidden = localStorage.getItem(storageKey) !== \"1\";\n    toggle.onclick = () => {\n      root.hidden = !root.hidden;\n      localStorage.setItem(storageKey, root.hidden ? \"0\" : \"1\");\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", (event) => {\n      if (event.code !== \"Backquote\" || event.repeat) return;\n      root.hidden = !root.hidden;\n      localStorage.setItem(storageKey, root.hidden ? \"0\" : \"1\");\n      event.preventDefault();\n    });\n\n    this.drawEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-draws\")!;\n    this.fpsEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-fps\")!;\n    this.inputBitsEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-input-bits\")!;\n    this.inputLockEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-input-lock\")!;\n    this.inputEventsEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-input-events\")!;\n\n    const style = root.querySelector<HTMLSelectElement>(\"#gg-style\")!;\n    for (const id of bind.styles) style.add(new Option(id, id));\n    style.value = bind.activeStyle;\n    style.onchange = () => bind.onStyle(style.value);\n\n    const presets = root.querySelector(\"#gg-presets\")!;\n    for (const name of Object.keys(bind.presets)) {\n      const b = document.createElement(\"button\");\n      b.textContent = name;\n      b.onclick = () => {\n        bind.onPreset(name);\n        for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(bind.presets[name] ?? {})) this.setParam(k, v);\n      };\n      presets.appendChild(b);\n    }\n\n    const paramsEl = root.querySelector(\"#gg-params\")!;\n    const ranges: Record<string, [number, number, number]> = {\n      gravity: [1, 40, 0.5],\n      runSpeed: [2, 12, 0.1],\n      airAccelerate: [0, 20, 0.5],\n      groundAccelerate: [1, 20, 0.5],\n      friction: [0, 12, 0.5],\n      jumpVelocity: [2, 10, 0.1],\n      jumpBufferMs: [0, 200, 5],\n    };\n    for (const [key, val] of Object.entries(bind.params)) {\n      const [min, max, step] = ranges[key] ?? [0, val * 3 || 10, 0.1];\n      const row = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      row.className = \"row\";\n      row.innerHTML = `<span>${key}</span><input type=\"range\" min=\"${min}\" max=\"${max}\" step=\"${step}\" value=\"${val}\"><span class=\"val\">${val}</span>`;\n      const input = row.querySelector(\"input\")!;\n      const valEl = row.querySelector(\".val\")!;\n      input.oninput = () => {\n        valEl.textContent = input.value;\n        bind.onParamChange(key, Number(input.value));\n      };\n      this.inputs.set(key, input);\n      paramsEl.appendChild(row);\n    }\n\n    const cm = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-cm\")!;\n    const dpi = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-dpi\")!;\n    const sync = () => {\n      root.querySelector(\"#gg-cmv\")!.textContent = cm.value;\n      root.querySelector(\"#gg-dpiv\")!.textContent = dpi.value;\n      bind.onSensitivity(Number(cm.value), Number(dpi.value));\n    };\n    cm.oninput = sync;\n    dpi.oninput = sync;\n\n    const controlsRoot = root.querySelector<HTMLElement>(\"#gg-controls\")!;\n    const actions: readonly ControlAction[] = [\n      \"forward\", \"back\", \"left\", \"right\", \"jump\", \"duck\", \"melee\",\n    ];\n    const renderControls = (): void => {\n      controlsRoot.replaceChildren();\n      for (const action of actions) {\n        const row = document.createElement(\"div\");\n        row.className = \"row\";\n        const label = document.createElement(\"span\");\n        label.textContent = action;\n        const button = document.createElement(\"button\");\n        button.type = \"button\";\n        button.className = \"control\";\n        button.textContent = controls[action].map(bindingLabel).join(\" / \");\n        button.onclick = () => {\n          button.textContent = \"press a key\";\n          const capture = (event: KeyboardEvent): void => {\n            event.preventDefault();\n            if (event.code === \"Escape\" || event.metaKey ||\n              (event.ctrlKey && !event.code.startsWith(\"Control\"))) {\n              renderControls();\n              return;\n            }\n            bind.onControl(action, event.code);\n            controls = {\n              ...controls,\n              [action]: [event.code, ...controls[action].slice(1)],\n            };\n            renderControls();\n          };\n          document.addEventListener(\"keydown\", capture, { once: true, capture: true });\n        };\n        row.append(label, button);\n        controlsRoot.appendChild(row);\n      }\n    };\n    renderControls();\n\n    const fov = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-fov\")!;\n    const size = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-cross-size\")!;\n    const gap = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-cross-gap\")!;\n    const dot = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-cross-dot\")!;\n    const color = root.querySelector<HTMLSelectElement>(\"#gg-cross-color\")!;\n    const volume = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-volume\")!;\n    const mute = root.querySelector<HTMLInputElement>(\"#gg-mute\")!;\n    fov.value = String(settings.fov);\n    size.value = String(settings.crosshair.size);\n    gap.value = String(settings.crosshair.gap);\n    dot.checked = settings.crosshair.dot;\n    color.value = settings.crosshair.color;\n    volume.value = String(settings.masterVolume);\n    mute.checked = settings.muted;\n    const emitSettings = (): void => {\n      settings = {\n        fov: Number(fov.value),\n        masterVolume: Number(volume.value),\n        muted: mute.checked,\n        crosshair: {\n          size: Number(size.value),\n          gap: Number(gap.value),\n          dot: dot.checked,\n          color: color.value as UserSettings[\"crosshair\"][\"color\"],\n        },\n      };\n      root.querySelector(\"#gg-fovv\")!.textContent = fov.value;\n      (size.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement).textContent = size.value;\n      (gap.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement).textContent = gap.value;\n      (volume.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement).textContent =\n        `${Math.round(Number(volume.value) * 100)}%`;\n      bind.onSettings(settings);\n    };\n    for (const input of [fov, size, gap, dot, color, volume, mute]) {\n      input.addEventListener(\"input\", emitSettings);\n    }\n    emitSettings();\n  }\n\n  private setParam(key: string, value: number): void {\n    const input = this.inputs.get(key);\n    if (!input) return;\n    input.value = String(value);\n    (input.nextElementSibling as HTMLElement).textContent = String(value);\n  }\n\n  update(fps: number, drawCalls: number): void {\n    this.fpsEl.textContent = String(Math.round(fps));\n    this.drawEl.textContent = String(drawCalls);\n    const input = this.inputInspector();\n    this.inputBitsEl.textContent = formatButtonBits(input.buttons);\n    this.inputLockEl.textContent = input.locked ? \"locked\" : \"unlocked\";\n    this.inputEventsEl.replaceChildren(...input.keyEvents.map((event) => {\n      const item = document.createElement(\"li\");\n      item.textContent = `${event.phase === \"down\" ? \"↓\" : \"↑\"} ${bindingLabel(event.code)}${event.repeat ? \" · repeat\" : \"\"}`;\n      return item;\n    }));\n  }\n}\n","numLines":265,"startLine":1,"totalLines":265}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"b95d6700-88cd-47b8-8b69-e4f4f4841141","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{"parentUuid":"109f570b-cff1-42a0-b2a8-73986886be2a","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013JDDL2DfhLFg6da7a8ht8X","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t// First-person camera: applies view angles directly (input truth — no smoothing),\n2\t// eye height from the sim capsule, landing dip as the ONLY camera-side motion\n3\t// (§3.6: camera-only, ≤2°, ~60 ms — a grounding cue, not theater).\n4\t\n5\timport { PerspectiveCamera } from \"three\";\n6\t\n7\tconst EYE_HEIGHT = 1.62;\n8\tconst DUCK_EYE_HEIGHT = 0.78; // GoldSrc-proportioned: low enough to read as ducked, high enough to fight from\n9\tconst DIP_RADIANS = (2 * Math.PI) / 180;\n10\tconst DIP_MS = 60;\n11\t\n12\texport class FpsCamera {\n13\t  readonly camera: PerspectiveCamera;\n14\t  private dipT = 1; // 0 → dipping, 1 → settled\n15\t\n16\t  constructor(aspect: number, fovDeg = 105) {\n17\t    this.camera = new PerspectiveCamera(fovDeg, aspect, 0.05, 500);\n18\t    this.camera.rotation.order = \"YXZ\";\n19\t  }\n20\t\n21\t  setFov(deg: number): void {\n22\t    this.camera.fov = deg;\n23\t    this.camera.updateProjectionMatrix();\n24\t  }\n25\t\n26\t  onLand(): void {\n27\t    this.dipT = 0;\n28\t  }\n29\t\n30\t  /**\n31\t   * Per render frame. Position from interpolated sim state; angles raw from input.\n32\t   * duckProgress eases the eye with a Hermite spline (GoldSrc's view curve).\n33\t   */\n34\t  update(\n35\t    px: number,\n36\t    py: number,\n37\t    pz: number,\n38\t    yaw: number,\n39\t    pitch: number,\n40\t    dtMs: number,\n41\t    duckProgress = 0,\n42\t  ): void {\n43\t    let dip = 0;\n44\t    if (this.dipT < 1) {\n45\t      this.dipT = Math.min(1, this.dipT + dtMs / DIP_MS);\n46\t      dip = Math.sin(this.dipT * Math.PI) * DIP_RADIANS;\n47\t    }\n48\t    const t = duckProgress * duckProgress * (3 - 2 * duckProgress);\n49\t    const eye = EYE_HEIGHT + (DUCK_EYE_HEIGHT - EYE_HEIGHT) * t;\n50\t    this.camera.position.set(px, py + eye, pz);\n51\t    this.camera.rotation.set(pitch - dip, yaw, 0);\n52\t  }\n53\t}\n54\t"}]},"uuid":"3fc92374-c1ae-41b2-8d49-87622c677d68","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:23:10.320Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/camera.ts","content":"// First-person camera: applies view angles directly (input truth — no smoothing),\n// eye height from the sim capsule, landing dip as the ONLY camera-side motion\n// (§3.6: camera-only, ≤2°, ~60 ms — a grounding cue, not theater).\n\nimport { PerspectiveCamera } from \"three\";\n\nconst EYE_HEIGHT = 1.62;\nconst DUCK_EYE_HEIGHT = 0.78; // GoldSrc-proportioned: low enough to read as ducked, high enough to fight from\nconst DIP_RADIANS = (2 * Math.PI) / 180;\nconst DIP_MS = 60;\n\nexport class FpsCamera {\n  readonly camera: PerspectiveCamera;\n  private dipT = 1; // 0 → dipping, 1 → settled\n\n  constructor(aspect: number, fovDeg = 105) {\n    this.camera = new PerspectiveCamera(fovDeg, aspect, 0.05, 500);\n    this.camera.rotation.order = \"YXZ\";\n  }\n\n  setFov(deg: number): void {\n    this.camera.fov = deg;\n    this.camera.updateProjectionMatrix();\n  }\n\n  onLand(): void {\n    this.dipT = 0;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Per render frame. Position from interpolated sim state; angles raw from input.\n   * duckProgress eases the eye with a Hermite spline (GoldSrc's view curve).\n   */\n  update(\n    px: number,\n    py: number,\n    pz: number,\n    yaw: number,\n    pitch: number,\n    dtMs: number,\n    duckProgress = 0,\n  ): void {\n    let dip = 0;\n    if (this.dipT < 1) {\n      this.dipT = Math.min(1, this.dipT + dtMs / DIP_MS);\n      dip = Math.sin(this.dipT * Math.PI) * DIP_RADIANS;\n    }\n    const t = duckProgress * duckProgress * (3 - 2 * duckProgress);\n    const eye = EYE_HEIGHT + (DUCK_EYE_HEIGHT - EYE_HEIGHT) * t;\n    this.camera.position.set(px, py + eye, pz);\n    this.camera.rotation.set(pitch - dip, yaw, 0);\n  }\n}\n","numLines":54,"startLine":1,"totalLines":54}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"109f570b-cff1-42a0-b2a8-73986886be2a","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{"parentUuid":"bf5a1cf7-07f7-4404-bac2-cb6113188b1e","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BT6V6hwoAjqiupiGNaqvVX","type":"tool_result","content":"1\timport { describe, expect, it } from \"vitest\";\n2\t\n3\timport { WeaponId } from \"@gungame/shared\";\n4\timport {\n5\t  FrameType,\n6\t  GameMode,\n7\t  GravityVariant,\n8\t  JoinKind,\n9\t  Ladder,\n10\t  MapPreference,\n11\t  PROTOCOL_VERSION,\n12\t} from \"@gungame/protocol\";\n13\t\n14\timport {\n15\t  ImpressiveTracker,\n16\t  MatchStatTracker,\n17\t  angularDeltaDegrees,\n18\t  desiredBotCount,\n19\t} from \"../src/godtier.js\";\n20\timport { RoomManager, type PlayerPeer } from \"../src/rooms.js\";\n21\t\n22\tconst peer = (): PlayerPeer => ({\n23\t  sendReliable: () => {},\n24\t  sendBaseline: () => {},\n25\t  sendSnapshot: () => {},\n26\t  disconnect: () => {},\n27\t});\n28\t\n29\tdescribe(\"phase 6.5 deterministic server features\", () => {\n30\t  it(\"removes exactly one of five fill bots per connected human\", () => {\n31\t    expect(Array.from({ length: 8 }, (_, humans) => desiredBotCount(humans)))\n32\t      .toEqual([5, 4, 3, 2, 1, 0, 0, 0]);\n33\t    const manager = new RoomManager(undefined, () => false);\n34\t    const hello = (name: string) => ({\n35\t      type: FrameType.Hello,\n36\t      protocolVersion: PROTOCOL_VERSION,\n37\t      buildHash: \"dev\",\n38\t      joinKind: JoinKind.Quickplay,\n39\t      mode: GameMode.GunGame,\n40\t      variant: GravityVariant.Standard,\n41\t      ladder: Ladder.Classic,\n42\t      mapPreference: MapPreference.AutoRotate,\n43\t      name,\n44\t      roomId: \"\",\n45\t      reconnectToken: new Uint8Array(),\n46\t    } as const);\n47\t    const first = manager.join(hello(\"Human One\"), peer(), 0);\n48\t    if (\"refusal\" in first) throw new Error(first.refusal);\n49\t    expect([...first.room.players.values()].filter((slot) => slot.isBot)).toHaveLength(4);\n50\t    const second = manager.join(hello(\"Human Two\"), peer(), 1);\n51\t    if (\"refusal\" in second) throw new Error(second.refusal);\n52\t    expect([...first.room.players.values()].filter((slot) => slot.isBot)).toHaveLength(3);\n53\t    first.room.disconnect(first.slot.id, 2);\n54\t    expect([...first.room.players.values()].filter((slot) => slot.isBot)).toHaveLength(4);\n55\t  });\n56\t\n57\t  it(\"computes flat match-end nouns from authoritative observations\", () => {\n58\t    const stats = new MatchStatTracker();\n59\t    stats.observeMovement(31.24, false);\n60\t    for (let hop = 0; hop < 3; hop += 1) {\n61\t      stats.observeMovement(12 + hop, true);\n62\t      stats.observeMovement(12 + hop, false);\n63\t    }\n64\t    stats.recordShot(true, 31);\n65\t    stats.recordShot(false, 90);\n66\t    stats.recordAirshot();\n67\t    stats.recordKnifeKill();\n68\t    expect(stats.snapshot).toEqual({\n69\t      airshots: 1,\n70\t      topSpeedDeci: 312,\n71\t      longestHopChain: 3,\n72\t      flicksLanded: 1,\n73\t      knifeKills: 1,\n74\t      accuracyPercent: 50,\n75\t    });\n76\t    expect(angularDeltaDegrees(179, -179)).toBe(2);\n77\t  });\n78\t\n79\t  it(\"awards IMPRESSIVE at 2/4/6/8 and silently resets on miss or life\", () => {\n80\t    const tracker = new ImpressiveTracker();\n81\t    const sequence = Array.from({ length: 8 }, () => tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Scout, true));\n82\t    expect(sequence).toEqual([undefined, 2, undefined, 4, undefined, 6, undefined, 8]);\n83\t    expect(tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Scout, false)).toBeUndefined();\n84\t    expect(tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Scout, true)).toBeUndefined();\n85\t    expect(tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Deadeye, true)).toBe(2);\n86\t    tracker.resetLife();\n87\t    expect(tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Deadeye, true)).toBeUndefined();\n88\t  });\n89\t});\n90\t"}]},"uuid":"e726a0af-424c-42d6-aa7c-c10ebf60602a","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:23:37.692Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/server/test/godtier.test.ts","content":"import { describe, expect, it } from \"vitest\";\n\nimport { WeaponId } from \"@gungame/shared\";\nimport {\n  FrameType,\n  GameMode,\n  GravityVariant,\n  JoinKind,\n  Ladder,\n  MapPreference,\n  PROTOCOL_VERSION,\n} from \"@gungame/protocol\";\n\nimport {\n  ImpressiveTracker,\n  MatchStatTracker,\n  angularDeltaDegrees,\n  desiredBotCount,\n} from \"../src/godtier.js\";\nimport { RoomManager, type PlayerPeer } from \"../src/rooms.js\";\n\nconst peer = (): PlayerPeer => ({\n  sendReliable: () => {},\n  sendBaseline: () => {},\n  sendSnapshot: () => {},\n  disconnect: () => {},\n});\n\ndescribe(\"phase 6.5 deterministic server features\", () => {\n  it(\"removes exactly one of five fill bots per connected human\", () => {\n    expect(Array.from({ length: 8 }, (_, humans) => desiredBotCount(humans)))\n      .toEqual([5, 4, 3, 2, 1, 0, 0, 0]);\n    const manager = new RoomManager(undefined, () => false);\n    const hello = (name: string) => ({\n      type: FrameType.Hello,\n      protocolVersion: PROTOCOL_VERSION,\n      buildHash: \"dev\",\n      joinKind: JoinKind.Quickplay,\n      mode: GameMode.GunGame,\n      variant: GravityVariant.Standard,\n      ladder: Ladder.Classic,\n      mapPreference: MapPreference.AutoRotate,\n      name,\n      roomId: \"\",\n      reconnectToken: new Uint8Array(),\n    } as const);\n    const first = manager.join(hello(\"Human One\"), peer(), 0);\n    if (\"refusal\" in first) throw new Error(first.refusal);\n    expect([...first.room.players.values()].filter((slot) => slot.isBot)).toHaveLength(4);\n    const second = manager.join(hello(\"Human Two\"), peer(), 1);\n    if (\"refusal\" in second) throw new Error(second.refusal);\n    expect([...first.room.players.values()].filter((slot) => slot.isBot)).toHaveLength(3);\n    first.room.disconnect(first.slot.id, 2);\n    expect([...first.room.players.values()].filter((slot) => slot.isBot)).toHaveLength(4);\n  });\n\n  it(\"computes flat match-end nouns from authoritative observations\", () => {\n    const stats = new MatchStatTracker();\n    stats.observeMovement(31.24, false);\n    for (let hop = 0; hop < 3; hop += 1) {\n      stats.observeMovement(12 + hop, true);\n      stats.observeMovement(12 + hop, false);\n    }\n    stats.recordShot(true, 31);\n    stats.recordShot(false, 90);\n    stats.recordAirshot();\n    stats.recordKnifeKill();\n    expect(stats.snapshot).toEqual({\n      airshots: 1,\n      topSpeedDeci: 312,\n      longestHopChain: 3,\n      flicksLanded: 1,\n      knifeKills: 1,\n      accuracyPercent: 50,\n    });\n    expect(angularDeltaDegrees(179, -179)).toBe(2);\n  });\n\n  it(\"awards IMPRESSIVE at 2/4/6/8 and silently resets on miss or life\", () => {\n    const tracker = new ImpressiveTracker();\n    const sequence = Array.from({ length: 8 }, () => tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Scout, true));\n    expect(sequence).toEqual([undefined, 2, undefined, 4, undefined, 6, undefined, 8]);\n    expect(tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Scout, false)).toBeUndefined();\n    expect(tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Scout, true)).toBeUndefined();\n    expect(tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Deadeye, true)).toBe(2);\n    tracker.resetLife();\n    expect(tracker.recordShot(WeaponId.Deadeye, true)).toBeUndefined();\n {"parentUuid":"7cc3fe61-53f5-4b7f-9aae-b4777d726a07","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TbRJMWLeuMCLeJAhK4Dpiw","type":"tool_result","content":"import {\n  EntityKind,\n  EventKind,\n  FrameType,\n  SNAPSHOT_RING_SIZE,\n  SNAPSHOT_SIZE_CEILING,\n} from \"./constants.js\";\nimport { ProtocolError } from \"./binary.js\";\nimport { encodeFrame, encodeFrameForSizeProbe } from \"./codec.js\";\nimport type { EntityDelta, EntityState, SnapshotEvent, SnapshotFrame } from \"./types.js\";\n\nfunction fullEntity(entity: EntityState, selfId: number): EntityDelta {\n  const common: EntityDelta = {\n    id: entity.id,\n    generation: entity.generation,\n    create: true,\n    ...(entity.id === selfId ? { self: true } : {}),\n    position: entity.position,\n    velocity: entity.velocity,\n    kind: entity.kind,\n  };\n  return entity.kind === 0\n    ? {\n        ...common,\n        viewYaw: entity.viewYaw,\n        viewPitch: entity.viewPitch,\n        grounded: entity.grounded,\n        alive: entity.alive,\n        ducked: entity.ducked ?? false,\n        health: entity.health,\n        weaponTier: entity.weaponTier,\n        ammo: entity.ammo,\n      }\n    : {\n        ...common,\n        ownerId: entity.ownerId,\n        fireCmdSeq: entity.fireCmdSeq,\n        weaponId: entity.weaponId,\n      };\n}\n\nfunction changedVec(\n  current: EntityState[\"position\"],\n  baseline: EntityState[\"position\"],\n): boolean {\n  return current.x !== baseline.x || current.y !== baseline.y || current.z !== baseline.z;\n}\n\nexport function deltaEntities(\n  current: readonly EntityState[],\n  baseline: readonly EntityState[],\n  selfId: number,\n): EntityDelta[] {\n  const prior = new Map(baseline.map((entity) => [entity.id, entity]));\n  const result: EntityDelta[] = [];\n  for (const entity of current) {\n    const old = prior.get(entity.id);\n    prior.delete(entity.id);\n    if (old === undefined || old.generation !== entity.generation) {\n      result.push(fullEntity(entity, selfId));\n      continue;\n    }\n    const position = changedVec(entity.position, old.position) ? entity.position : undefined;\n    const velocity = changedVec(entity.velocity, old.velocity) ? entity.velocity : undefined;\n    const angles = entity.viewYaw !== old.viewYaw || entity.viewPitch !== old.viewPitch;\n    const status =\n      entity.grounded !== old.grounded ||\n      entity.alive !== old.alive ||\n      (entity.ducked ?? false) !== (old.ducked ?? false);\n    const combat =\n      entity.kind !== old.kind ||\n      entity.health !== old.health ||\n      entity.weaponTier !== old.weaponTier ||\n      entity.ammo !== old.ammo ||\n      entity.ownerId !== old.ownerId ||\n      entity.fireCmdSeq !== old.fireCmdSeq ||\n      entity.weaponId !== old.weaponId;\n    if (position !== undefined || velocity !== undefined || angles || status || combat) {\n      result.push({\n        id: entity.id,\n        generation: entity.generation,\n        ...(entity.id === selfId ? { self: true } : {}),\n        ...(position === undefined ? {} : { position }),\n        ...(velocity === undefined ? {} : { velocity }),\n        ...(angles ? { viewYaw: entity.viewYaw, viewPitch: entity.viewPitch } : {}),\n        ...(status ? {\n          grounded: entity.grounded,\n          alive: entity.alive,\n          ducked: entity.ducked ?? false,\n        } : {}),\n        ...(combat ? {\n          kind: entity.kind,\n          health: entity.health,\n          weaponTier: entity.weaponTier,\n          ammo: entity.ammo,\n          ownerId: entity.ownerId,\n          fireCmdSeq: entity.fireCmdSeq,\n          weaponId: entity.weaponId,\n        } : {}),\n      });\n    }\n  }\n  for (const deleted of prior.values()) {\n    result.push({\n      id: deleted.id,\n      generation: deleted.generation,\n      delete: true,\n      ...(deleted.id === selfId ? { self: true } : {}),\n    });\n  }\n  return result.sort((a, b) => Number(b.self === true) - Number(a.self === true) || a.id - b.id);\n}\n\nexport interface PackSnapshotInput {\n  readonly tick: number;\n  readonly lastProcessedCmdSeq: number;\n  readonly cmdArrivalMargin: number;\n  readonly baselineEpoch: number;\n  readonly baselineTick: number;\n  readonly selfId: number;","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"7064fa04-cf91-431c-bc49-fc8206685c3e","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:23:51.221Z","toolUseResult":{"stdout":"import {\n  EntityKind,\n  EventKind,\n  FrameType,\n  SNAPSHOT_RING_SIZE,\n  SNAPSHOT_SIZE_CEILING,\n} from \"./constants.js\";\nimport { ProtocolError } from \"./binary.js\";\nimport { encodeFrame, encodeFrameForSizeProbe } from \"./codec.js\";\nimport type { EntityDelta, EntityState, SnapshotEvent, SnapshotFrame } from \"./types.js\";\n\nfunction fullEntity(entity: EntityState, selfId: number): EntityDelta {\n  const common: EntityDelta = {\n    id: entity.id,\n    generation: entity.generation,\n    create: true,\n    ...(entity.id === selfId ? storage.setItem(USER_SETTINGS_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(settings));\n70\t}\n71\t\n72\texport function crosshairGapPixels(\n73\t  settings: CrosshairSettings,\n74\t  weapon: WeaponDefinition,\n75\t  scoped: boolean,\n76\t  viewportHeight: number,\n77\t  fovDegrees: number,\n78\t): number {\n79\t  if (scoped) return 0;\n80\t  const spread = weapon.spreadDegrees;\n81\t  if (spread <= 0) return settings.gap;\n82\t  const projection = viewportHeight / (2 * Math.tan(fovDegrees * Math.PI / 360));\n83\t  return Math.min(48, settings.gap + Math.tan(spread * Math.PI / 180) * type { WeaponDefinition } from \"../../packages/shared/src/index.js\";\n\nexport const USER_SETTINGS_STORAGE_KEY = \"gg:settings\";\n\nexport interface CrosshairSettings {\n  readonly size: number;\n  readonly gap: number;\n  readonly dot: boolean;\n  readonly color: \"white\" | \"cyan\" | \"green\" | \"amber\";\n}\n\nexport interface UserSettings {\n  readonly fov: number;\n  readonly masterVolume: number;\n  readonly muted: boolean;\n  readonly crosshair: CrosshairSettings;\n}\n\nexport const DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS: UserSettings = Object.freeze({\n  fov: 105,\n  masterVolume: 0.8,\n  muted: false,\n  crosshair: Object.freeze({\n    size: 6,\n    gap: 4,\n    dot: true,\n    color: \"white\",\n  }),\n});\n\nconst COLORS: readonly CrosshairSettings[\"color\"][] = [\"white\", \"cyan\", \"green\", \"amber\"];\n\nfunction clamp(value: unknown, minimum: number, maximum: number, fallback: number): number {\n  return typeof value === \"number\" && Number.isFinite(value)\n    ? Math.max(minimum, Math.min(maximum, value))\n    : fallback;\n}\n\nexport function loadUserSettings(storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\">): UserSettings {\n  const raw = storage.getItem(USER_SETTINGS_STORAGE_KEY);\n  if (raw === null) return DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS;\n  try {\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Partial<UserSettings>;\n    const crosshair = parsed.crosshair as Partial<CrosshairSettings> | undefined;\n    return {\n      fov: clamp(parsed.fov, 90, 120, DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS.fov),\n      masterVolume: clamp(parsed.masterVolume, 0, 1, DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS.masterVolume),\n      muted: typeof parsed.muted === \"boolean\" ? parsed.muted : DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS.muted,\n      crosshair: {\n        size: clamp(crosshair?.size, 3, 14, DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS.crosshair.size),\n        gap: clamp(crosshair?.gap, 0, 16, DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS.crosshair.gap),\n        dot: typeof crosshair?.dot === \"boolean\"\n          ? crosshair.dot\n          : DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS.crosshair.dot,\n        color: COLORS.includes(crosshair?.color as CrosshairSettings[\"color\"])\n          ? crosshair!.color as CrosshairSettings[\"color\"]\n          : DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS.crosshair.color,\n      },\n    };\n  } catch {\n    return DEFAULT_USER_SETTINGS;\n  }\n}\n\nexport function saveUserSettings(\n  storage: Pick<Storage, \"setItem\">,\n  settings: UserSettings,\n): void {\n  storage.setItem(USER_SETTINGS_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(settings));\n}\n\nexport function crosshairGapPixels(\n  settings: CrosshairSettings,\n  weapon: WeaponDefinition,\n  scoped: boolean,\n  viewportHeight: number,\n  fovDegrees: number,\n): number {\n  if (scoped) return 0;\n  const spread = weapon.spreadDegrees;\n  if (spread <= 0) return settings.gap;\n  const projection = viewportHeight / (2 * Math.tan(fovDegrees * Math.PI / 360));\n  return Math.min(48, settings.gap + Math.tan(spread * Math.PI / 180) * projection);\n}\n\nexport function pingTone(roundTripMs: number): \"normal\" | \"amber\" | \"red\" {\n  if (roundTripMs > 200) return \"red\";\n  if (roundTripMs > 120) return \"amber\";\n  return \"normal\";\n}\n\nexport function weaponTypeIcon(kind: WeaponDefinition[\"kind\"]): string {\n  if (kind === \"projectile\") return \"◆\";\n  if (kind === \"melee\") return \"⌁\";\n  if (kind === \"beam\") return \"═\";\n  return \"•\";\n}\n","numLines":98,"startLine":1,"totalLines":98}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"8a5c9315-b1ca-4980-9729-7c71f0bbf948","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}
{"parentUuid":"67361a73-8948-411b-a511-ae72135eea64","isSidechain":true,"promptId":"49eceec4-a29d-4d6b-bef9-f1f93fcaa607","agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WuMdXohTthmTyJ1GBYn9sX","type":"tool_result","content":"1\timport type { MatchStats } from \"@gungame/protocol\";\n2\t\n3\texport type MatchStatKey = keyof MatchStats;\n4\texport type PersonalBest = Readonly<Partial<Record<MatchStatKey, number>>>;\n5\t\n6\texport const MATCH_STAT_KEYS = Object.freeze([\n7\t  \"airshots\",\n8\t  \"topSpeedDeci\",\n9\t  \"longestHopChain\",\n10\t  \"flicksLanded\",\n11\t  \"knifeKills\",\n12\t  \"accuracyPercent\",\n13\t] as const satisfies readonly MatchStatKey[]);\n14\t\n15\texport function formatMatchStats(stats: MatchStats): readonly [string, string][] {\n16\t  return [\n17\t    [\"airshots\", String(stats.airshots)],\n18\t    [\"top speed\", `${(stats.topSpeedDeci / 10).toFixed(1)} m/s`],\n19\t    [\"longest hop chain\", String(stats.longestHopChain)],\n20\t    [\"flicks landed\", String(stats.flicksLanded)],\n21\t    [\"knife kills\", String(stats.knifeKills)],\n22\t    [\"accuracy\", `${stats.accuracyPercent}%`],\n23\t  ];\n24\t}\n25\t\n26\texport function updatePersonalBest(\n27\t  storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\" | \"setItem\">,\n28\t  mapKey: string,\n29\t  stats: MatchStats,\n30\t): ReadonlySet<MatchStatKey> {\n31\t  const key = `gg:match-pb:${mapKey}`;\n32\t  let prior: PersonalBest = {};\n33\t  try {\n34\t    prior = JSON.parse(storage.getItem(key) ?? \"{}\") as PersonalBest;\n35\t  } catch {\n36\t    prior = {};\n37\t  }\n38\t  const next: Record<MatchStatKey, number> = { ...stats };\n39\t  const personalBests = new Set<MatchStatKey>();\n40\t  for (const statKey of MATCH_STAT_KEYS) {\n41\t    const oldValue = prior[statKey] ?? -1;\n42\t    if (stats[statKey] > oldValue) personalBests.add(statKey);\n43\t    next[statKey] = Math.max(oldValue, stats[statKey]);\n44\t  }\n45\t  storage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(next));\n46\t  return personalBests;\n47\t}\n48\t\n49\texport function matchStatsShareText(stats: MatchStats, mapName: string, url: string): string {\n50\t  const nouns = formatMatchStats(stats).map(([label, value]) => `${label} ${value}`).join(\" · \");\n51\t  return `gungame — ${mapName.toLowerCase()} · ${nouns} · ${url}`;\n52\t}\n53\t"}]},"uuid":"19c220d1-3246-484e-91cc-c9de349e95f0","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:24:06.861Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/client/src/match-stats.ts","content":"import type { MatchStats } from \"@gungame/protocol\";\n\nexport type MatchStatKey = keyof MatchStats;\nexport type PersonalBest = Readonly<Partial<Record<MatchStatKey, number>>>;\n\nexport const MATCH_STAT_KEYS = Object.freeze([\n  \"airshots\",\n  \"topSpeedDeci\",\n  \"longestHopChain\",\n  \"flicksLanded\",\n  \"knifeKills\",\n  \"accuracyPercent\",\n] as const satisfies readonly MatchStatKey[]);\n\nexport function formatMatchStats(stats: MatchStats): readonly [string, string][] {\n  return [\n    [\"airshots\", String(stats.airshots)],\n    [\"top speed\", `${(stats.topSpeedDeci / 10).toFixed(1)} m/s`],\n    [\"longest hop chain\", String(stats.longestHopChain)],\n    [\"flicks landed\", String(stats.flicksLanded)],\n    [\"knife kills\", String(stats.knifeKills)],\n    [\"accuracy\", `${stats.accuracyPercent}%`],\n  ];\n}\n\nexport function updatePersonalBest(\n  storage: Pick<Storage, \"getItem\" | \"setItem\">,\n  mapKey: string,\n  stats: MatchStats,\n): ReadonlySet<MatchStatKey> {\n  const key = `gg:match-pb:${mapKey}`;\n  let prior: PersonalBest = {};\n  try {\n    prior = JSON.parse(storage.getItem(key) ?? \"{}\") as PersonalBest;\n  } catch {\n    prior = {};\n  }\n  const next: Record<MatchStatKey, number> = { ...stats };\n  const personalBests = new Set<MatchStatKey>();\n  for (const statKey of MATCH_STAT_KEYS) {\n    const oldValue = prior[statKey] ?? -1;\n    if (stats[statKey] > oldValue) personalBests.add(statKey);\n    next[statKey] = Math.max(oldValue, stats[statKey]);\n  }\n  storage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(next));\n  return personalBests;\n}\n\nexport function matchStatsShareText(stats: MatchStats, mapName: string, url: string): string {\n  const nouns = formatMatchStats(stats).map(([label, value]) => `${label} ${value}`).join(\" · \");\n  return `gungame — ${mapName.toLowerCase()} · ${nouns} · ${url}`;\n}\n","numLines":53,"startLine":1,"totalLines":53}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"67361a73-8948-411b-a511-ae72135eea64","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}

{"parentUuid":"6be8f574-f91c-432e-a8a3-5c29c8e63751","isSidechain":true,"agentId":"ad6a450b0f39ab436","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_011CdBQr54axUAnGUsXfntq8","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01GywMJXoMWLw79WZiQVLie1","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/Volumes/SD/gungame/server/tmp-bot-probe.ts","content":"import { RoomManager, type PlayerPeer } from \"./src/rooms.js\";\nimport {\n  FrameType, GameMode, GravityVariant, JoinKind, Ladder, MapPreference, PROTOCOL_VERSION,\n} from \"@gungame/protocol\";\n\nconst peer = (): PlayerPeer => ({\n  sendReliable: () => {},\n  sendBaseline: () => {},\n  sendSnapshot: () => {},\n  disconnect: () => {},\n});\n\nconst manager = new RoomManager(undefined, () => false);\nconst hello = {\n  type: FrameType.Hello,\n  protocolVersion: PROTOCOL_VERSION,\n  buildHash: \"dev\",\n  joinKind: JoinKind.Quickplay,\n  mode: GameMode.GunGame,\n  variant: GravityVariant.Standard,\n  ladder: Ladder.Classic,\n  mapPreference: MapPreference.AutoRotate,\n  name: \"Probe\",\n  roomId: \"\",\n  reconnectToken: new Uint8Array(),\n} as const;\nconst joined = manager.join(hello as never, peer(), 0);\nif (\"refusal\" in joined) throw new Error(joined.refusal);\nconst room = joined.room;\nconst bots = [...room.players.values()].filter((s) => s.isBot);\nconst before = bots.map((b) => ({ id: b.id, x: b.state.player.position.x, z: b.state.player.position.z }));\nfor (let t = 1; t <= 256; t += 1) room.tick(t, t * 15.625);\nconst after = [...room.players.values()].filter((s) => s.isBot)\n  .map((b) => ({ id: b.id, x: b.state.player.position.x, z: b.state.player.position.z, seq: b.botSeq }));\nconsole.log(\"bots before:\", JSON.stringify(before));\nconsole.log(\"bots after 256 ticks:\", JSON.stringify(after));\nconst human = joined.slot;\nconsole.log(\"human events pending:\", human.events.pendingAfter(0).length);\nconsole.log(\"bot journal size:\", bots[0]?.events.pendingAfter(0).length);\n\n// hold expiry vs afk: disconnect the human, verify slot removal time\nconst m2 = new RoomManager(undefined, () => false);\nconst j2 = m2.join(hello as never, peer(), 0);\nif (\"refusal\" in j2) throw new Error(\"j2\");\nj2.room.disconnect(j2.slot.id, 1_000);\nlet removedAt = -1;\nfor (let ms = 2_000; ms <= 60_000; ms += 1_000) {\n  j2.room.tick(ms / 15.625 | 0, ms);\n  if (!j2.room.players.has(j2.slot.id)) { removedAt = ms; break; }\n}\nconsole.log(\"disconnected human slot removed at ms:\", removedAt, \"(hold promised 45000)\");\nconsole.log(\"room players after removal:\", j2.room.players.size, \"— reapable:\", j2.room.shouldReap(10 * 60_000));\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":975,"cache_read_input_tokens":227809,"output_tokens":1382,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":975},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":1382,"cache_read_input_tokens":227809,"cache_creation_input_tokens":975,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":975,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CdBQr3jihRDMKA28oQM4w","attributionAgent":"general-purpose","type":"assistant","uuid":"d028cfd2-b91a-4853-bbaf-18ff7d6f6fad","timestamp":"2026-07-19T12:25:26.242Z","effort":"high","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Volumes/SD/gungame","sessionId":"bd0d75af-e4ac-4650-932a-6d7c12498f7e","version":"2.1.214","gitBranch":"HEAD"}
